local: A 'yɛrbinsɩ lɛ a anyãna, Ta sɛ̃ ɛ. Ta kʊ nɩrɛ ɛ. Ta ju nɩrɛ bon ɛ. Ta jɩɛlɛ nɩrɛ bon ɛ. A 'yɛrbinsɩ ala a jaa nɩ pãa chɛ, ba den a jaa 'yɛr 'yɛr bir bʊ̃'yen ɩka, Nʊ̃ a fʊ tɔ sʊɔ nɩtãa a fʊ mãɛ.

eng: Love doesnt do anything wrong to a neighbor; therefore, love is what fulfills the Law.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ wa nʊ̃ nɩrɛ, faa maala wʊ bier ɛ. Ala lɛ so, fʊ̃ʊ wa tara nʊ̃fʊ, fʊ tu naa a lɛ jaa a Mosesɩ nɛɛ na 'yɛr.

eng: As you do all this, you know what time it is. The hour has already come for you to wake up from your sleep. Now our salvation is nearer than when we first had faith.
local: Yɩ maala a nɩtɔ̃, bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa lɛ a dɩna sɔ̃ɔ nyã na kaara. A sɔ̃ɔ ta naa ɩka yɩ jɛɔ ir a yɩ gʊ̃ɔ pɔ, bojũu a sɩ faafʊ gbʊr jaa yɛ̃yɛ̃ gar a bɩbir 'lɔ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ sɔɔ de.

eng: The night is almost over, and the day is near. So lets get rid of the actions that belong to the darkness and put on the weapons of light.
local: A chɛn bãlãa ka a tãsɔɔ baar, tɩchɛ ka a ɩ a wɛr mɩ tɔ̃ɔ chaar a lɛ nɛ. Yɩ ɩ a sɩ yaar a tãsɔɔ bomo bar tɩ de a chãa bomo su.

eng: Lets behave appropriately as people who live in the day, not in partying and getting drunk, not in sleeping around and obscene behavior, not in fighting and obsession.
local: Yɩ ɩ a sɩ kpɩɛrɛ jaa kãkar fɩka a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ nɩbɛ, na sɩ ir sɩ mãɛ yin dãɛn bɔyuor pɔ, dãa buufʊ pɔ, sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ, nɩ folaa ɩfʊ pɔ, bɩɩ gɔ̃mɔ̃ bɔfʊ nɩ nyuur pɔ.

eng: Instead, dress yourself with the Lord Jesus Christ, and dont plan to indulge your selfish desires.
local: Tɩchɛ yɩ de a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na yɩ su pɔɔ a yɩ mãɛ, na yɩ ta lɛ tɩɛrɛ ɩka yɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ a yɩ ãgãn vɔlaa na bʊɔrɔ go ɛ.

eng: One person believes in eating everything, while the weak person eats only vegetables.
local: Ɩ̃sʊɔ sɔɔfʊ ma vɛ̃n ka waa chire bon jaa ɛ, ka a ãsʊɔ sɔɔfʊ mɩ na bal ka 'lɔ mɩ dire jɛvai tɛɛ.

eng: Those who eat must not look down on the ones who dont, and the ones who dont eat must not judge the ones who do, because God has accepted them.
local: A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba chire bon jaa ɛ, wʊ ta kaara a 'lɔ na ba dire a jaa pɔrɔ ɛ, a fʊ̃ʊ nyã mɩ na ba dire a jaa ɛ, ta kpɛrɛ a 'lɔ na dire a jaa ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn de wʊ naa.

eng: Who are you to judge someone elses servants? They stand or fall before their own Lord .
local: Fʊ̃ʊ mɩ nɩ ana na fʊn tɔɔr nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ 'yɛr? A wʊ mãɛ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ sɛ̃ ka wʊ ara na bɩɩ wʊ lo naa, wʊn lɛ ara na, bojũu a wʊ Soro na tʊ̃ɔn maal wʊ a wʊ ara.

eng: One person considers some days to be more sacred than others, while another person considers all days to be the same. Each person must have their own convictions.
local: Nɩrɛ ma kãan a bɩbir ãsʊɔ a wʊ gar ãsʊɔ, ka ãsʊɔ kaa a bɩbie a jaa ka a ɩ bʊ̃'yen. Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ ma tɩɛr kaa a wʊ mãɛ tɩɛr pɔ.

eng: Someone who thinks that a day is sacred, thinks that way for the Lord. Those who eat, eat for the Lord, because they thank God. And those who dont eat, dont eat for the Lord, and they thank the Lord too.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na de a bɩbir ãsʊɔ a wʊ gar a jaa, wʊ ɩrɛ a lɛ a sɩ Soro jũu. 'Lɔ na ɔɔrɔ a nʊ̃n, wʊ ɔɔrɔ a sɩ Soro jũu, bojũu wʊ ma sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ. A 'lɔ mɩ na ba ɔɔrɔ ɛ, wʊ mɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ a sɩ Soro jũu, wʊ mɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan.

eng: We dont live for ourselves and we dont die for ourselves.
local: Bojũu nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa ba be be kʊ a wʊ mãɛ tɛɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ. Nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa mɩ ba kpi kʊ a wʊ mãɛ tɛɛ ɛ.

eng: If we live, we live for the Lord, and if we die, we die for the Lord. Therefore, whether we live or die, we belong to God.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ ben ka, sɩ ben be kʊ a sɩ Soro. Ala ɩ sɩ mɩ kpi naa, sɩ kpin kʊ a sɩ Soro. Ka sɩ chɛnɛ na vʊrɔ, bɩɩ sɩ kpi naa, a sɩ Soro lɛ so sɩ.

eng: This is why Christ died and lived: so that he might be Lord of both the dead and the living.
local: A anyãna jũu lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto kpi tɩ na wʊ lɛ ir ɩ vʊr, ɩka a wʊ ɩ a kũn nɩ a vʊɛ ba jaa Soro.

eng: But why do you judge your brother or sister? Or why do you look down on your brother or sister? We all will stand in front of the judgment seat of God.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ mɩ, baa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ fʊ tɔɔrɔ a fʊ yɛbɛ 'yɛr, bɩɩ bo lɛ so ka fʊ kaara a fʊ yɛbɛ pɔrɔ? Bojũu sɩ jaa lɛ na ara a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ dakɔɔ par.

eng: Because it is written, As I live, says the Lord, every knee will bow to me, and every tongue will give praise to God. .
local: A sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, A sɩ Soro lɛ 'yɛr, ɩn ɩ vʊr jũu, a gbɛdumo a jaa na gbur a n niem, ka a kɔkɔr jaa haa 'yɛr ɩka maa lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: So then, each of us will give an account of ourselves to God.
local: Be lɛ a sɩ ãsʊɔ jaa na pãa 'yɛr a sɩ mãɛ 'yɛr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: So stop judging each other. Instead, this is what you should decide: never put a stumbling block or obstacle in the way of your brother or sister.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ɩ a sɩ bar a sɩ taaba 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ, na sɩ lɩɛb a sɩ tɩɛr na sɩ ta ɩrɛ kʊsɩr bãraa kʊrɔ a sɩ taaba sɔɩ pɔ a ba ŋmiere loro ɛ.

eng: I know and Im convinced in the Lord Jesus that nothing is wrong to eat in itself. But if someone thinks something is wrong to eat, it becomes wrong for that person.
local: A maa na be a sɩ Soro Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ, n sɔɔn sɩrɛ jaa ɩka bʊ̃diraa jaa ba ɩ dɛɛr a wʊ mãɛ ɛ. Tɩchɛ ala ɩ a nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wa kãan bon ɩka wʊ ɩn bʊ̃dɛɛr, a bʊ̃nyɩnɛ ɩn bʊ̃dɛɛr kʊ wʊ.

eng: If your brother or sister is upset by your food, you are no longer walking in love. Dont let your food destroy someone for whom Christ died.
local: Ala wa ɩ a chɛn a fʊ yɛbɛ bʊ̃diraa kɔ̃ɔ fʊn di jũu, faa maala wile nɩ nʊ̃fʊ ɛ. Ta vɛ̃ ka a fʊ bʊ̃dirsɩ sɔ̃ɔ a fʊ yɛbɛ 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto na kpi ɛ.

eng: And dont let something you consider to be good be criticized as wrong.
local: Ta vɛ̃ ka a bon 'lɔ fʊ̃ʊ na bʊɔlɔ bʊ̃vɩla, ka nɩrɛ bʊɔl wʊ bʊ̃dɛɛr ɛ.

eng: Gods kingdom isnt about eating food and drinking but about righteousness, peace, and joy in the Holy Spirit.
local: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ yele ba ɩ bʊ̃diir nɩ bʊ̃nyursɩ yele ɛ, tɩchɛ a ɩn torfʊ, nɩ nyã'maar nɩ a pʊpɛl na yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ yele lɛ.

eng: Whoever serves Christ this way pleases God and gets human approval.
local: bojũu nɩrɛ jaa na tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto tu a sɔr nyã pɔ, wʊ maala na a lɛ na pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, ka a nɩbɛ mɩ 'yɛrɛ a nɩnyɩnɛ 'yɛr vɩla.

eng: So lets strive for the things that bring peace and the things that build each other up.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ɩ a sɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir, na sɩ maala a lɛ na waan nyã'maar a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔn taa ãkpãɛn.

eng: Dont destroy what God has done because of food. All food is acceptable, but its a bad thing if it trips someone else.
local: Yɩ ta de bʊ̃diir yele sɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ bar ɛ. Bʊ̃diraa a jaa vɩɛlɛ naa, tɩchɛ a ɩn dɛɛr ala ɩ nɩrɛ din bon na vɛ̃ ka a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ lo.

eng: Its a good thing not to eat meat or drink wine or to do anything that trips your brother or sister.
local: A lɛ a sɛɛ naa ka nɩrɛ ta 'wɔb nʊ̃n ɛ, bɩɩ nyũ dãa ɛ, bɩɩ maal yele kɔ̃ɔ na vɛ̃ ka a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ lo ɛ.

eng: Keep the belief that you have to yourself—its between you and God. People are blessed who dont convict themselves by the things they approve.
local: Lɛ jaa fʊn bɔ̃ɔ a yelsɩ anyãna pɔ, bar ka a be a fʊ̃ʊ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn chara pɔ. Pʊpɛl sʊɔ lɛ a 'lɔ tɩɛr na ba 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ yele nɩ a bonsɩ ala a 'lɔ mãɛ na 'yɛr ɩka a ɩ naa ɛ.

eng: But those who have doubts are convicted if they go ahead and eat, because they arent acting on the basis of faith. Everything that isnt based on faith is sin.
local: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na dire nɩ baal, 'yɔ̃ɔn a wʊ mãɛ 'yɛr, bojũu waa dire nɩ sɔɔfʊ ɛ. Bon jaa mɩ na ba wa yi sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ, a ɩn bier.

eng: Im introducing our sister Phoebe to you, who is a servant of the church in Cenchreae.
local: N pʊrɔ naa a sɩ yɛpɔɔ Fiibi yovɩla kʊrɔ yɩ, a pɔɔ nyã ɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ be a Kenkɩrya tẽdẽme pupuorbiir pɔ.

eng: Welcome her in the Lord in a way that is worthy of Gods people, and give her whatever she needs from you, because she herself has been a sponsor of many people, myself included.
local: N sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka 'lɔ wa tɩ, yɩ de wʊ nɩ a sɩ Soro yuor, na yɩ maal wʊ a lɛ na sɛɛn a Nãaŋmɩn puoro, na yɩ mɩ kʊ wʊ sʊ̃ʊfʊ jaa wʊn na bʊɔrɔ yi a yɩ sɛ̃. Bojũu wʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ sʊ̃ʊ nɩyɔɔ nɩ a maa mãɛ.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila, my coworkers in Christ Jesus.
local: Yɩ puor a Pɩrɩsɩla nɩ Akuila kʊ ma. Ba ɩ naa a n tʊ̃tʊ̃taaba a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

eng: who risked their own necks for my life. Im not the only one who thanks God for them, but all the churches of the Gentiles do the same.
local: Ba tʊ̃n kũu tʊ̃mɔ̃ kʊ ma. A ba ɩ maa tɛɛ gba lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a pupuorbo bala ba jaa na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ãgãn mɩ 'maan ba naa.

eng: Also say hello to the church that meets in their house. Say hello to Epaenetus, my dear friend, who was the first convert in Asia for Christ.
local: Puor a pupuorbiir bala na ma lɔ̃ɔ puor a ba yir. Puor a n badaba Epainɩtʊsɩ, 'lɔ lɛ de nie turo a Kɩrɩsɩto be a Asɩya paal pɔ.

eng: Say hello to Mary, who has worked very hard for you.
local: Yɩ puor a Mɛɛr mɩ na ir nyãa 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ yɩ.

eng: Say hello to Andronicus and Junia, my relatives and my fellow prisoners. They are prominent among the apostles, and they were in Christ before me.
local: na yɩ mɩ puor a Andirunɩkasɩ nɩ a Junɩyasɩ. Ba ɩn a n bʊr nɩbɛ ka maa nɩ bala jaa mɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'mataa be a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ. A nɩtʊ̃nsɩ bɔ̃ɔ ban jaa chɛchɛ, bala mɩ lɛ de nie turo a Kɩrɩsɩto tɩchɛ ka a maa wa bɩɛr.

eng: Say hello to Ampliatus, my dear friend in the Lord.
local: Yɩ puor Ampɩlatusɩ kʊ ma, n nʊ̃ wʊ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto tufʊ jũu.

eng: Say hello to Urbanus, our coworker in Christ, and my dear friend Stachys.
local: na yɩ mɩ puor Urbanusɩ na pʊɔ sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ nɩ a n badaba Sɩtachɩsɩ.

eng: Say hello to Apelles, who is tried and true in Christ. Say hello to the members of the household of Aristobulus.
local: Yɩ puor Apelesɩ nɩrɛ jaa na sɔɔ ɩka wʊ turo naa a Kɩrɩsɩto sɔr jaa nɛ nɛ nɛ, na yɩ mɩ puor Aristobulus nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme ba jaa.

eng: Say hello to my relative Herodion. Say hello to the members of the household of Narcissus who are in the Lord.
local: Yɩ puor a Hɛrɔdiyɔn na ɩ a n bʊr nɩrɛ, na yɩ mɩ puor a Narsɩsusɩ nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme ba jaa na turo a sɩ Soro.

eng: Say hello to Tryphaena and Tryphosa, who are workers for the Lord. Say hello to my dear friend Persis, who has worked hard in the Lord.
local: Yɩ puor a Tɩrafaina nɩ Tɩrafosa, a pɔbɔ ba nyãna mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir nɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃, na yɩ puor a Persis mɩ na ɩ a pɔɔ ãsʊɔ na mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃.

eng: Say hello to Rufus, who is an outstanding believer, along with his mother and mine.
local: Yɩ puor a Worofʊs ban ir a sɩ Soro pɔ nɩ a wʊ ma, a wʊ ma mɩ ɩn a n ma.

eng: Say hello to Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, and the brothers and sisters who are with them.
local: Yɩ puor Asɩnkirtusɩ, nɩ Filegon, nɩ Hɛmɩsɩ nɩ Patrobas nɩ Hermasɩ nɩ a yɛɛr bala jaa na be a ba sɛ̃.

eng: Say hello to Philologus and Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints who are with them.
local: Yɩ puor a Filologusɩ nɩ Juliya nɩ Nereyus nɩ a wʊ yɛpɔɔ nɩ Olinpasɩ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo ba jaa na be a ba sɛ̃.

eng: Say hello to each other with a holy kiss. All the churches of Christ say hello to you.
local: Yɩ puor puor taa nɩ pʊpɛl. A pupuorbiir ba jaa puor yɩ naa nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto yuor.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I urge you to watch out for people who create divisions and problems against the teaching that you learned. Keep away from them.
local: N kpãkpãana yɩ naa yɛɛr ɩka yɩ guro yɩ mãɛ sʊ̃ nɩ a bala na ma waara nɩ a ootaa, na ba ma vɛ̃ ka yɩ bãra loro a wiilfʊ nyã yɩn jãn pɔ. Yɩ tɔɔ 'laa tɩ bar ba.

eng: People like that arent serving the Lord. They are serving their own feelings. They deceive the hearts of innocent people with smooth talk and flattery.
local: Bojũu a nɩbɛ ba nyãna a ba ɩ a sɩ Soro Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala mãɛ vɔlaa bomo lɛ ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ bʊɔrɔ. Ba ma 'yɛrɛ na jaa hɛ lɛ lɛ lɛ na ba de nɛnʊ̃ɔ bɛl a nɩbɛ bala tɩɛr na ba chen niem ɛ.

eng: The news of your obedience has reached everybody, so Im happy for you. But I want you to be wise about whats good, and innocent about whats evil.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa wõn a lɛ yɩn turo a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɛ nɛ nɛ, ka nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ sɩ a yɩ yele jũu. Tɩchɛ n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ maala vɩla nɩ yɛ̃, na yɩ ta bɔ̃ɔ yelbier maalfʊ ɛ.

eng: The God of peace will soon crush Satan under your feet. The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a nyã'maar sʊɔ, a kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a wʊ ŋmãɛ a Satan a yɩ gbɛɛ pĩlem. A wãɛfʊ na yi a sɩ Soro Yesu sɛ̃ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: Timothy my coworker says hello to you, and Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater, my relatives.
local: Timoti na ɩ a n tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ puor yɩ naa, ka a Lusiyusɩ nɩ Jason nɩ Sosipater na ɩ a n bʊr nɩbɛ mɩ puoro yɩ naa.

eng: Im Tertius, and Im writing this letter to you in the Lord—hello!.
local: Maa mɩ na ɩ Tɛrtɩyɔsɩ na sɛɛrɛ a Pɔɔl gãn nyã mɩ puoro yɩ naa nɩ a sɩ Soro yuor.

eng: Gaius, who is host to me and to the whole church, says hello to you. Erastus the city treasurer says hello to you, along with our brother Quartus.
local: Gayus yir maa nɩ pupuorbiir na kpɩɛrɛ a wʊ kaara sɩ mɩ puoro yɩ naa. Erastus na ɩ a tẽe libikaara nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nɩ a sɩ yɛbɛ Kuwartusɩ mɩ puoro yɩ naa.

eng: May the glory be to God who can strengthen you with my good news and the message that I preach about Jesus Christ. He can strengthen you with the announcement of the secret that was kept quiet for a long time.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, tɩɩr wʊ ta a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na sʊ̃ʊ yɩ a yɩ tʊ̃ɔ ara tu a n 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã ɩn mʊɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, naa chaar a yelsɔɔlaa nyãna na sɔɔl a kõr jaa na po.

eng: Now that secret is revealed through what the prophets wrote. It is made known to the Gentiles in order to lead to their faithful obedience based on the command of the eternal God.
local: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, a yelsɔɔlaa chaar naa tu a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn vʊr nyã na 'yɛr ba, ka a paalsɩ ba jaa na sɔɔ de, na ba turo wʊ.

eng: May the glory be to God, who alone is wise! May the glory be to him through Jesus Christ forever! Amen.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã tɛɛ lɛ ɩ a yɛ̃ sʊɔ, wʊ nyɛrɛ tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: We who are powerful need to be patient with the weakness of those who dont have power, and not please ourselves.
local: Sɩn bala na kpɛ̃mɛ, a sɛɛ naa ka sɩ tuo a bala na ba kpɛ̃mɛ ɛ, na loro tuor, na sɩ ta pɛlɛ a sɩn mãɛ pʊʊr ɛ.

eng: Each of us should please our neighbors for their good in order to build them up.
local: A sɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ ma pɛlɛ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ pʊɔ, na sɩ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ a wʊ mɩ ba nyɩbɛ.

eng: Christ didnt please himself, but, as it is written, The insults of those who insulted you fell on me. .
local: Bojũu a Kɩrɩsɩto mãɛ gba mɩ ba dɔ̃ɔ pɛl a wʊ mãɛ pʊɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ a lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, A tʊbie ala a bala na tʊfʊ, a wa dɔɔl a n ju.

eng: Whatever was written in the past was written for our instruction so that we could have hope through endurance and through the encouragement of the scriptures.
local: Bojũu a ala a jaa na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, a kõr jaa bin, a sɛb a sɩn wiilfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a gãma anyãna kʊ sɩ kãnyir 'yɔ̃ɔn sɩ ãkpãɛn ka sɩ tara tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie.

eng: May the God of endurance and encouragement give you the same attitude toward each other, similar to Christ Jesus attitude.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn na kʊrɔ yɩ a kãnyir na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ yɩ a ãkpãɛn, wʊ kʊ yɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen ka yɩ turo nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: That way you can glorify the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ together with one voice.
local: Ka yɩ jaa 'mataa tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen na yɩ de nɛbʊ̃'yen 'yɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sãa.

eng: So welcome each other, in the same way that Christ also welcomed you, for Gods glory.
local: Yɩ sɔɔ diere taa nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ na sɔɔ de yɩ, ka yɩn tʊ̃ɔ waan pɛɛfʊ wa kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: Im saying that Christ became a servant of those who are circumcised for the sake of Gods truth, in order to confirm the promises given to the ancestors.
local: N 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a Kɩrɩsɩto wa lɩɛb naa a Juu nɩbɛ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn yelmãɛ jũu, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ a sɩ Sãakpãmɩne ɩ yelmãɛ.

eng: and so that the Gentiles could glorify God for his mercy. As it is written, Because of this I will confess you among the Gentiles, and I will sing praises to your name .
local: Ka a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, mɩ na tʊ̃ɔ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr a wʊ nɩbaal jũu. Nɩtãa lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, A lɛ jũu, ɩn dãnfʊ naa a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ sɛ̃, naa yiel yiel kʊ a fʊ yuor.

eng: And again, it says, Rejoice, Gentiles, with his people .
local: A lɛ sɛb go, A yɩn na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, yɩ 'matãan a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ chɩlɛ.

eng: And again, Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles, and all the people should sing his praises .
local: A lɛ sɛb go, A yɩn na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, yɩ pɛɛrɛ a sɩ Soro, na yɩ yiele pɛɛfʊ yiel kʊrɔ wʊ, a yɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa.

eng: And again, Isaiah says, There will be a root of Jesse, who will also rise to rule the Gentiles. The Gentiles will place their hope in him .
local: Isaiya gba mɩ lɛ 'yɛr go a wʊ gãn pɔ, A Jesɩ nyɩɩr na lɛ tɔ naa. 'Lɔ lɛ na ir na wʊ kaara a paalsɩ a jaa, na wʊ mɩ ɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie.

eng: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in faith so that you overflow with hope by the power of the Holy Spirit.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a yɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ sʊɔ, wʊ sɛɛ a yɩ nyãn nɩ chɩlfʊ, nɩ nyã'maar a lɛ yɩn sɔɔ wʊ, ka a yɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ pãa ŋme yaar nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, I myself am convinced that you yourselves are full of goodness, filled with all knowledge, and are able to teach each other.
local: N yɛɛr, maa mãɛ sɔɔ naa ɩka yɩ sɛɛn naa vɩla maalfʊ, na yɩ tara yɛ̃ na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ taa wiilfʊ.

eng: But Ive written to you in a sort of daring way, partly to remind you of what you already know. Im writing to you in this way because of the grace that was given to me by God.
local: N sɛb a da sɛɛr amɩne 'yɔ̃ɔ kʊ yɩ, ka a kaara fɩka n lɛ bɔ̃ɔ tɩɛr yɩ go, a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ wʊn kʊ ma.

eng: It helps me to be a minister of Christ Jesus to the Gentiles. Im working as a priest of Gods gospel so that the offering of the Gentiles can be acceptable and made holy by the Holy Spirit.
local: ka n ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ naa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ pɔ jũu, naa sʊ̃nɔ̃ mʊɔlɔ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ. Lɛ lɛ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, puorfʊ na tara par ka a Nãaŋmɩn sɔɔ de na wʊ oon ba nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ.

eng: So in Christ Jesus I brag about things that have to do with God.
local: Ɩn be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ jũu, a tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yin yuor.

eng: I dont dare speak about anything except what Christ has done through me to bring about the obedience of the Gentiles. He did it by what Ive said and what Ive done.
local: N kʊ̃ wa 'la 'yɛr 'yɛr jaa ɛ, ka a ala a Kɩrɩsɩto na maal baar ba lɛ ɛ, tu a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ka a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, lɩɛrɛ wa wõnõ a Nãaŋmɩn toor, tu a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr nɩ a lɛ ɩn tʊ̃.

eng: by the power of signs and wonders, and by the power of Gods Spirit. So Ive completed the circuit of preaching Christs gospel from Jerusalem all the way around to Illyricum.
local: wʊ den kpɛ̃ɔ tʊ̃n nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ tʊ̃fɛrsɩ tun a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ. Lɛ lɛ, n yin a Jerusalɛm chen lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ gʊɔr a Ilirikum tẽe naa man a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna jaa nɛ nɛ nɛ.

eng: In this way, I have a goal to preach the gospel where they havent heard of Christ yet, so that I wont be building on someone elses foundation.
local: Maa nɩbijɩɛ yele lɛ ɩka n mʊɔl 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ jie 'lɔ jaa ban ba wõ a Kɩrɩsɩto yele ɛ, naa ta ɩrɛ wa mɛ dɔɔl nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ dachin par kparaa ju ɛ.

eng: Instead, as its written, Those who hadnt been told about him will see, and those who hadnt heard will understand .
local: Nɩtãa lɛ an dɔ̃ɔ sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, A bala ban ba dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ɛ, na nyɛ naa, ka a bala mɩ na ba dɔ̃ɔ wõ naa ɛ, na bɔ̃ɔn a par.

eng: Thats why Ive been stopped so many times from coming to see you.
local: A yele nyãna lɛ var ma a sɔr ka n ba tʊɔrɔ waara a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ.

eng: But now, since I dont have any place to work in these regions anymore, and since Ive wanted to come to see you for many years.
local: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ, n ba lɛ tara jipaalaa ka a paalsɩ anyã pɔ na lɛ tʊ̃ go ɛ, n mɩn dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔrɔ a yɩ nyɛfʊ a yuon yɔ̃ɔ na po jũu.

eng: Ill visit you when I go to Spain. I hope to see you while Im passing through. And I hope you will send me on my way there, after I have first been reenergized by some time in your company.
local: N guor naa ɩka n chen Sɩpẽen, maa wa tala ɩn ara na piir yɩ kaa, naa jɛ̃ a yɩ sɛ̃ bãlãa a yɩ sʊ̃ʊ ma ka n chen.

eng: But now Im going to Jerusalem, to serve Gods people.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ, Jerusalɛm lɛ n chiine nɩ a sʊ̃ʊfʊ ɩka n tɩ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo a be.

eng: Macedonia and Achaia have been happy to make a contribution for the poor among Gods people in Jerusalem.
local: Bojũu a Masedonɩya dẽme nɩ a Akaya dẽme man taa ɩka ba chɩɛr chɩɛrfʊ sʊ̃ʊn a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo bamɩne na be a Jerusalɛm na ba tara bon jaa ɛ.

eng: They were happy to do this, and they are actually in debt to Gods people in Jerusalem. If the Gentiles got a share of the Jewish peoples spiritual resources, they ought to minister to them with material resources.
local: Ba nyɛn a lɛ ka a ɩ sãn kʊ ba a ba de a lɛ dɔɔl a ba mãɛ. Ala ɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, põn naa a Juu nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sʊ̃ʊfʊsɩ, ala lɛ so ka a mɩ sɛɛ ɩka ba mɩ lɔ̃ɔn a Juu nɩbɛ põn a ba bʊ̃tarsɩ.

eng: So then after I have finished this job and have safely delivered the final amount of the Gentiles offering to them, I will leave for Spain, visiting you on the way.
local: Maa wa tʊ̃ a nɩtɔ̃, naa de a chɩɛrfʊsɩ anyã kʊ ba baar, ala lɛ ɩn chen a Sɩpẽen naa tɩ 'lɔɔ piir yɩ kaa.

eng: And I know that when I come to you I will come with the fullest blessing of Christ.
local: N bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka maa wa waara, ɩn waan naa a Kɩrɩsɩto sʊ̃ʊfʊ na bɛrma.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I urge you, through our Lord Jesus Christ and through the love of the Spirit, to join me in my struggles in your prayers to God for me.
local: N sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa n yɛɛr, nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ nʊ̃fʊ ɩka, yɩ pʊɔ ma a n mɔ̃fʊ nyã pɔ, sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ma.

eng: Pray that I will be rescued from the people in Judea who dont believe. Also, pray that my service for Jerusalem will be acceptable to Gods people there.
local: Yɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn, a wʊ faa ma yin a bala na ba sɔɔ be a Judiya, ka a lɛ mɩ ɩn chiine a Jerusalɛm ka a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo mɩ tɩ sɔɔ de.

eng: so that I can come to you with joy by Gods will and be reenergized with your company.
local: ka ala ɩka Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ lɛ, ka n wa a yɩ sɛ̃ nɩ pʊpɛl a sɩ 'mataa 'yɔ̃ɔ taa ãkpãɛn.

eng: May the God of peace be with you all. Amen.
local: Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a nyã'maar sʊɔ, wʊ be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: From Paul, called by Gods will to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Sosthenes our brother.
local: Maa Pɔɔl a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl a wʊ bɔfʊ pɔ ɩka n ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa nɩ a sɩ yɛbɛ Sosetenesɩ.

eng: To Gods church that is in Corinth: To those who have been made holy to God in Christ Jesus, who are called to be Gods people. Together with all those who call upon the name of our Lord Jesus Christ in every place—hes their Lord and ours!.
local: lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a yɩn na puoro a Nãaŋmɩn be a Korɩntɩ tẽe pɔ. A yɩn na oo be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ na yɩ ɩ a wʊ nɩ chɛchɛsɩ lɔ̃ɔn a bala na be jie jaa na bʊɔlɔ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor na ɩ a sɩn nɩ a ba jaa Soro.

eng: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: I thank my God always for you, because of Gods grace that was given to you in Christ Jesus.
local: N ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan kʊ yɩ bojũu wʊ wãɛ yɩ naa tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: That is, you were made rich through him in everything: in all your communication and every kind of knowledge.
local: A wʊ jũu lɛ yɩ le yele a jaa pɔ, a yɩ 'yɛrbie nɩ a yɩ bɔ̃ɔfʊ a jaa pɔ.

eng: in the same way that the testimony about Christ was confirmed with you.
local: bojũu a Kɩrɩsɩto dãasɩɛ sɩn di, yɩ sɔɔn de.

eng: The result is that you arent missing any spiritual gift while you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to be revealed.
local: A lɛ jũu, yaa faa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊfʊ ãsʊɔ jaa ɛ, na yɩ pãa mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir chɛlɛ a lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na lɛ lɩɛb wa.

eng: He will also confirm your testimony about Christ until the end so that you will be blameless on the day of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Wʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩn ãkpãɛn tɩ tãn a baaraa, ka yɩ kʊ̃ tara chɛfʊ ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa bɩbir.

eng: God is faithful, and you were called by him to partnership with his Son, Jesus Christ our Lord.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã na bʊɔl yɩ wa lɔ̃ɔn a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ Soro ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ.

eng: Now I encourage you, brothers and sisters, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ: Agree with each other and dont be divided into rival groups. Instead, be restored with the same mind and the same purpose.
local: N yɛɛr, n den a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor naa sʊɔrɔ nɩ yɩ ɩka yɩ jaa yɩ ta ŋma dẽdẽ ka ootaa be a yɩ pɔ ɛ, a lɛ na vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ pãa tara nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen.

eng: My brothers and sisters, Chloes people gave me some information about you, that youre fighting with each other.
local: N yɛɛr, nɩbɛ bamɩne na yi a Kɩloe yir wa man kʊ ma ɩka nɛchɩrɛ ben a yɩ chara pɔ.

eng: What I mean is this: that each one of you says, I belong to Paul, I belong to Apollos, I belong to Cephas, I belong to Christ.
local: A lɛ par lɛ ɩka, a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ma 'yɛr ɩka, Pɔɔl lɛ maa turo, ka ãsʊɔ mɩ 'yɛr, Apolosɩ lɛ maa turo, ka a ãsʊɔ mɩ 'yɛr, Sɩfasɩ lɛ n turo, ka a ãsʊɔ mɩ 'yɛr ɩka, Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ n turo.

eng: Has Christ been divided? Was Paul crucified for you, or were you baptized in Pauls name?.
local: A Kɩrɩsɩto ŋman dẽdẽme bɩɩ? Pɔɔl lɛ ba kpa a daa ju bɩɩ? Bɩɩ Pɔɔl yuor lɛ yɩ son a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ?.

eng: Thank God that I didnt baptize any of you, except Crispus and Gaius.
local: N pʊɔ pɛl naa ɩn ba so a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ɛ, ka ala ba ɩ Kɩrɩsɩpusɩ nɩ Gayus tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

eng: so that nobody can say that you were baptized in my name!.
local: ka nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩka maa yuor lɛ n son yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: Oh, I baptized the house of Stephanas too. Otherwise, I dont know if I baptized anyone else.
local: Ɔ̃ɔ, n mɩ dɔ̃ɔ so a Sɩtɛfanas nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme ba jaa a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ. A anyã puor n ba tɩɛr nɩrɛ jaa ɩn lɛ so a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: Christ didnt send me to baptize but to preach the good news. And Christ didnt send me to preach the good news with clever words so that Christs cross wont be emptied of its meaning.
local: Bojũu Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ba tʊ̃ ma ɩka n tɩ suoro nɩbɛ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ n tɩ mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ na ba ɩ nɩsaal yɛ̃ 'yɛr ɛ. Ka a Kɩrɩsɩto kũu wʊn kpi a daa taa ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ.

eng: The message of the cross is foolishness to those who are being destroyed. But it is the power of God for those of us who are being saved.
local: Bojũu a daa 'yɛr ɩn dãbol 'yɛr kʊ a bala na wɛrɛ, tɩchɛ a ɩn Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ kʊ a sɩn bala na nyɛ a faafʊ.

eng: It is written in scripture: I will destroy the wisdom of the wise, and I will reject the intelligence of the intelligent .
local: Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, Ɩn sɔ̃ɔ naa a yɛ̃ dẽme yɛ̃ bar, naa bʊ̃bʊr a bɔ̃ɔfʊ dẽme bɔ̃ɔfʊ bar.

eng: Where are the wise? Where are the legal experts? Where are todays debaters? Hasnt God made the wisdom of the world foolish?.
local: Nyɩnɛ lɛ a yɛ̃ dẽme be? Nyɩnɛ lɛ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ sʊɔ be? Nyɩnɛ lɛ chɩbɛ dẽme mɩ be a dɩna? A ba ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɩɛb a wɛr nyã yɛ̃ a wʊ ɩ jɔl ɛ?.

eng: In Gods wisdom, he determined that the world wouldnt come to know him through its wisdom. Instead, God was pleased to save those who believe through the foolishness of preaching.
local: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn yɛ̃ kʊ vɛ̃ ka a wɛr de a wʊ yɛ̃ bɔ̃ɔn wʊ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ pɛl naa nɩ a jɔl mʊɔl ban mʊɔl ka a na faa a bala na sɔɔ de.

eng: Jews ask for signs, and Greeks look for wisdom.
local: A Juu nɩbɛ ma bʊɔrɔ naa nɛ'maa yele, ka a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, mɩ bʊɔrɔ yɛ̃.

eng: but we preach Christ crucified, which is a scandal to Jews and foolishness to Gentiles.
local: Tɩchɛ sɩn mʊɔl naa Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ban kpa a daa ju, ka a ɩ gbɛr bãrfʊ kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ tɩ mɩ ɩ jɔl yele kʊ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ.

eng: But to those who are called—both Jews and Greeks—Christ is Gods power and Gods wisdom.
local: Tɩchɛ a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na lɔ̃ɔ bʊɔl a Juu nɩbɛ nɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn yɛ̃.

eng: This is because the foolishness of God is wiser than human wisdom, and the weakness of God is stronger than human strength.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn jɔlʊ̃ ɩn yɛ̃ gar a nɩrɛ yɛ̃, ka a Nãaŋmɩn balfʊ tara kpɛ̃ɔ gar a nɩrɛ kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: Look at your situation when you were called, brothers and sisters! By ordinary human standards not many were wise, not many were powerful, not many were from the upper class.
local: N yɛɛr, yɩ tɩɛr a lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ be tɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wa bʊɔl yɩ, nɩsaal kaafʊ pɔ, a yɩ yɔɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yɛ̃ dẽme ɛ, a yɩ yɔɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yuor dẽme ɛ, yaa ɩ nãmɩne bibiir ɛ.

eng: But God chose what the world considers foolish to shame the wise. God chose what the world considers weak to shame the strong.
local: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn ir naa a wɛr nyã jɔl bon 'yɔ̃ɔn a yɛ̃ dẽme vã, Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ir naa a wɛr nyã bʊ̃balaa na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn a kpãɛn dẽme vã.

eng: And God chose what the world considers low-class and low-life—what is considered to be nothing—to reduce what is considered to be something to nothing.
local: Nãaŋmɩn ma ir naa a wɛr bon ba 'yɔ̃ɔnaa, a ala a nɩbɛ na kaara pɔrɔ, nɩ a nɩbɛ bala gba nɩrɛ jaa na ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, wʊ ɩ naa nɩtɔ̃ ka a bon 'lɔ a wɛr na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ka wʊ ɩ pɔrɔ.

eng: So no human being can brag in Gods presence.
local: ka nɩrɛ jaa taa bʊɔrɔ yuor a wʊ niem ɛ.

eng: It is because of God that you are in Christ Jesus. He became wisdom from God for us. This means that he made us righteous and holy, and he delivered us.
local: A wʊ jũu lɛ yɩ be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a yɛ̃ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ kʊ sɩ, na wʊ ɩ a sɩ torfʊ nɩ chɛchɛ nɩ a faafʊ.

eng: This is consistent with what was written: The one who brags should brag in the Lord! .
local: A lɛ jũu, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, Vɛ̃ ka a 'lɔ na bʊɔrɔ yuor, wʊ bʊɔrɔ a yuor a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: When I came to you, brothers and sisters, I didnt come preaching Gods secrets to you like I was an expert in speech or wisdom.
local: N yɛɛr, ɩn dɔ̃ɔ wa a yɩ sɛ̃, n ba waan nɛbɔ̃ɔn bɩɩ yɛ̃ 'yɛr naa wa man a Nãaŋmɩn dãasɩɛ kʊ yɩ ɛ.

eng: I had made up my mind not to think about anything while I was with you except Jesus Christ, and to preach him as crucified.
local: Bojũu a lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ be a yɛ sɛ̃, n ba lɛ bɔ̃ɔ bon jaa pʊɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ban kpa a daa ju ɛ.

eng: I stood in front of you with weakness, fear, and a lot of shaking.
local: Balfʊ, dãbãɛ nɩ mĩifʊ lɛ n dɔ̃ɔ ben a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: My message and my preaching werent presented with convincing wise words but with a demonstration of the Spirit and of power.
local: A n 'yɛr nɩ a n mʊɔlfʊ ba ɩ yɛ̃ 'yɛrbie ɛ, tɩchɛ a ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ wiilfʊ lɛ.

eng: I did this so that your faith might not depend on the wisdom of people but on the power of God.
local: ka a yɩ sɔɔfʊ taa dɩɛl a nɩrɛ yɛ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a dɩɛl a Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: What we say is wisdom to people who are mature. It isnt a wisdom that comes from the present day or from todays leaders who are being reduced to nothing.
local: Faa nyɛ, sɩn ma 'yɛr a sɩ 'yɛr nɩ yɛ̃ kʊ a bala na nʊ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr pɔ, a ba ɩ a wɛr nyã bɩɩ a kpãɛn dẽme yɛ̃ na wa ɩ pɔrɔ daar kɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: We talk about Gods wisdom, which has been hidden as a secret. God determined this wisdom in advance, before time began, for our glory.
local: Kai, sɩn 'yɛrɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn yɛ̃ sɔɔlaa, a yɛ̃ 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ sɔɔl a Nãaŋmɩn na kaa ir a sɩ daar kɔ̃ɔ tɩɩr jũu sɛrɛ na wʊ wa maal a wɛr.

eng: It is a wisdom that none of the present-day rulers have understood, because if they did understand it, they would never have crucified the Lord of glory!.
local: A wɛr nyã kpãɛn dẽme ba dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ, ala ɩ bala ta bɔ̃ɔ ba kʊ̃ naa kpa a tɩɩr Soro a daa ju ɛ.

eng: But this is precisely what is written: God has prepared things for those who love him that no eye has seen, or ear has heard, or that havent crossed the mind of any human being .
local: Tɩchɛ a lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, Nɩbir jaa ba nyɛ ɛ, toor jaa ba wõ ɛ, tɩɛr jaa mɩ ba bɔ̃ɔn a ala a Nãaŋmɩn na chɔɔr kʊ a bala na nʊ̃ wʊ ɛ.

eng: God has revealed these things to us through the Spirit. The Spirit searches everything, including the depths of God.
local: Tɩchɛ anyãna lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ wiil kʊ sɩ, Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ma bɩɛr naa a yelsɩ a jaa, na wʊ gba ma bɔ̃ɔ a ala na be a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔm.

eng: Who knows a persons depths except their own spirit that lives in them? In the same way, no one has known the depths of God except Gods Spirit.
local: Nɩbuor lɛ bɔ̃ɔ lɛ na be a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ tɩɛr pɔ, ka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ mãɛ ba lɛ ɛ? A lɛ mɩ lɛ nɩrɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ lɛ na be a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɛr pɔ ɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ Sɩɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

eng: We havent received the worlds spirit but Gods Spirit so that we can know the things given to us by God.
local: A ba ɩ a wɛr nyã sɩɛ lɛ sɩ tara ɛ, tɩchɛ a Sɩɛ 'lɔ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ a sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn a ala a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ sɩ a pɔrɔ.

eng: These are the things we are talking about—not with words taught by human wisdom but with words taught by the Spirit—we are interpreting spiritual things to spiritual people.
local: A anyãna lɛ sɩ 'yɛrɛ, a ba ɩ nɩrɛ 'yɛrbie sɩn jãn ɛ, tɩchɛ 'yɛrbie ala sɩn jãn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛ̃ na sɩ wile nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ yelmãɛ nɩ a Sɩɛ 'yɛrbie.

eng: But people who are unspiritual dont accept the things from Gods Spirit. They are foolishness to them and cant be understood, because they can only be comprehended in a spiritual way.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ba tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ, maa sɔɔ a ala na yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛ̃ ɛ, bojũu a ɩn dãbol yele kʊ wʊ a wʊ maa bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ, bojũu nɩrɛ na tʊ̃ɔn bɔ̃ɔ ala ɩ wʊ tara naa Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ.

eng: Spiritual people comprehend everything, but they themselves arent understood by anyone.
local: A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ma vɩɛr naa a yele a jaa kaa, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ, wʊ kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ tɩɛr ɛ.

eng: Who has known the mind of the Lord, who will advise him? But we have the mind of Christ.
local: Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, An lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro tɩɛr, na wʊn kpãa wʊ? Tɩchɛ sɩn lɛ tara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɩɛr.

eng: So a person should think about us this way—as servants of Christ and managers of Gods secrets.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ma kaa sɩ a sɩ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na de a wʊ yelsɔɔlsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ nuur pɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I couldnt talk to you like spiritual people but like unspiritual people, like babies in Christ.
local: N yɛɛr, n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ nɩ yɩ fɩka nɩbɛ na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ n 'yɛrɛ nɩ yɩ naa fɩka a wɛr nɩbɛ na yɩ ɩ bibiir a Kɩrɩsɩto sɔr pɔ.

eng: In this kind of situation, what is expected of a manager is that they prove to be faithful.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a lɛ na gã lɛ ɩka a bala ban de bon 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba nuur pɔ, ba tara yelmãɛ.

eng: I gave you milk to drink instead of solid food, because you werent up to it yet.
local: Bɩrkʊ̃ɔ tɛɛ lɛ n kʊ yɩ a ba ɩ saa yɩn ba ta na tʊ̃ɔ di ɛ. Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ yɩ chɛnɛ ba ta ɛ.

eng: I couldnt care less if Im judged by you or by any human court; I dont even judge myself.
local: A ba bã ma ɛ, ala ɩ ka yɩn lɛ bɩɩ a wɛr nɩrɛ lɛ tɔɔrɔ a n 'yɛr sɩrɛ jaa a maa mãɛ kʊ̃ tɔɔr a n 'yɛr ɛ.

eng: Now you are still not up to it because you are still unspiritual. When jealousy and fighting exist between you, arent you unspiritual and living by human standards?.
local: Yɩ chɛnɛ na ɩrɛ fɩka nɩbɛ na ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, bojũu nyuur nɩ nɛchɩrɛ chɛnɛ na be a yɩ pɔ, yaa chɛnɛ ɩ a wɛr nɩbɛ ɛ? Na yɩ maala a lɛ ban maala ɛ?.

eng: Im not aware of anything against me, but that doesnt make me innocent, because the Lord is the one who judges me.
local: N ba tɩɛr yele jaa ɩn ɩ bɔr ɛ, tɩchɛ a ba wiil ɩka n ba tara yele ɛ. A sɩ Soro lɛ na tɔɔr a n 'yɛr.

eng: When someone says, I belong to Paul, and someone else says, I belong to Apollos, arent you acting like people without the Spirit?.
local: A yɩ ãsʊɔ na ma 'yɛr, maa turo na Pɔɔl, ka a ãsʊɔ mɩ 'yɛr ɩka, maa turo na Apolosɩ. Yaa chɛnɛ ɩrɛ fɩka nɩbɛ na ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ?.

eng: So dont judge anything before the right time—wait until the Lord comes. He will bring things that are hidden in the dark to light, and he will make peoples motivations public. Then there will be recognition for each person from God.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta de nie tɔɔrɔ a 'yɛr ka a bɩbir ba ta ɛ. Yɩ chɛlɛ ka a sɩ Soro wa. 'Lɔ lɛ na yin yele a jaa na sɔɔl a libe pɔ, chãa pɔ, na wʊ mɩ wiil a ala na sɔɔl a nɩbɛ tɩɛr pɔ. A bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ãsʊɔ jaa na nyɛ a wʊ pɛɛfʊ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

eng: After all, what is Apollos? What is Paul? They are servants who helped you to believe. Each one had a role given to them by the Lord.
local: A anyãna a jaa pɔ, Pɔɔl nɩ a Apolosɩ, bo ba ɩ? Tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ lɛ sɩn ɩ a yɩ tu a be wa sɔɔ de ka a sɩ Soro kʊ ãsʊɔ jaa nɩ wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I have applied these things to myself and Apollos for your benefit. Ive done this so that you can learn what it means not to go beyond what has been written and so none of you will become arrogant by supporting one of us against the other.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n yɛɛr, a yɩn jũu lɛ n de a yele anyãna naa man a maa nɩ a Apolosɩ, ka yɩn jãn a par yi a sɩ sɛ̃ a lɛ ban 'yɛr ɩka, Taa ɩrɛ wa chen po a lɛ ban sɛb ɛ. Ka a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa taa pãa 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩbɛ gara taa ɛ.

eng: I planted, Apollos watered, but God made it grow.
local: Maa lɛ bʊr ka a Apolosɩ mɩ chɔr a kʊ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ so an nʊ̃ɔ.

eng: Who says that you are better than anyone else? What do you have that you didnt receive? And if you received it, then why are you bragging as if you didnt receive it?.
local: Ana lɛ maal yɩ a yɩ be yɩ yõ gar nɩrɛ jaa? Bo yɩ tara, ka a ba ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ yɩ ɛ? Ala ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ yɩ, ŋmɩnɛ a ɩ a yɩ bʊɔrɔ yuor fɩka yaa ɩ lɛ ɛ?.

eng: Because of this, neither the one who plants nor the one who waters is anything, but the only one who is anything is God who makes it grow.
local: Lɛ a 'lɔ na bʊr, nɩ a 'lɔ na chɔr a kʊ̃ɔ, ba ɩ bon jaa ɛ, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ tɛɛ na vɛ̃ ka a bonsɩ a jaa nʊ̃ɔ.

eng: Youve been filled already! Youve become rich already! You rule like kings without us! I wish you did rule so that we could be kings with you!.
local: Yɩ ben tara bon jaa yɩn bʊɔrɔ! Na yɩ be ɩ taraa dẽme! Yɩ ben lɩɛb nãmɩne ka sɩn ba ɩ ɛ! Maa bɔfʊ lɛ fɩka yɩ ta ɩ a nãmɩne sɩrɛ jaa, ka a sɩ mɩ ta pʊɔ yɩ ɩ a nãmɩne.

eng: The one who plants and the one who waters work together, but each one will receive their own reward for their own labor.
local: A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bʊr nɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na chɔr a kʊ̃ɔ ba jaa tara na tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen ka a ãsʊɔ jaa na nyɛ a lɛ wʊn tʊ̃ sãyar.

eng: I suppose that God has shown that we apostles are at the end of the line. We are like prisoners sentenced to death, because we have become a spectacle in the world, both to angels and to humans.
local: Bojũu maa sɛ̃, a kaara naa fɩka a Nãaŋmɩn den a sɩn na ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ a sɩ pii a nɩyɔɔ puor, a ban kʊ sɩ chãa pɔ. Ka a sɩ ɩ bʊ̃manãa kʊ a wɛr nɩ a malakasɩ nɩ a nɩbɛ ba jaa.

eng: We are Gods coworkers, and you are Gods field, Gods building.
local: Bojũu, sɩn ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃taaba, yɩn mɩ lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puo, a Nãaŋmɩn yir wʊn mɩɛrɛ.

eng: We are fools for Christ, but you are wise through Christ! We are weak, but you are strong! You are honored, but we are dishonored!.
local: Sɩn ɩn jɔlɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu tɩchɛ ka a yɩn ɩ yɛ̃n dẽme a wʊ pɔ. Sɩn ɩn nɩbaalsɩ tɩchɛ ka a yɩn ɩ kpãɛn dẽme. Ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ yɩ naa tɩ kpɛrɛ sɩn.

eng: I laid a foundation like a wise master builder according to Gods grace that was given to me, but someone else is building on top of it. Each person needs to pay attention to the way they build on it.
local: A wãɛfʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ ma lɛ so ka n kpar a dachin par kparaa nɩtãa bɔ̃ɔ mɩɛrɛ, ka a bamɩne mɩ mɩɛrɛ dɔɔlɔ. Tɩchɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ bɔ̃ɔ kaara a lɛ wʊn mɩɛrɛ dɔɔlɔ.

eng: Up to this very moment we are hungry, thirsty, wearing rags, abused, and homeless.
local: Wa tãn dɩna gba, kɔ̃ nɩ kɔ̃nyũur lɛ sɩ ma chiine, ka a sɩ bʊ̃sursɩ chɩɛr chɩɛr ka ba pɔɔrɔ sɩ, saa tara yir kpɩɛrɛ ɛ.

eng: No one can lay any other foundation besides the one that is already laid, which is Jesus Christ.
local: A yele lɛ ɩka, nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ kpar a dachin par kpar yuo lɛ pʊɔ a 'lɔ na be be ɛ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: We work hard with our own hands. When we are insulted, we respond with a blessing; when we are harassed, we put up with it.
local: Tʊ̃ kpãɛn lɛ sɩ ma tʊ̃n a sɩ mãɛ nuur, bala wa tʊ sɩ, sɩ ma 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ ba, bala sɔɔ gere sɩ, tɩ sɩ ma tara na kãnyir.

eng: So, whether someone builds on top of the foundation with gold, silver, precious stones, wood, grass, or hay.
local: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ den sɛlma, kpãna, kʊsɩr kpãɛn, daar, mʊɔr bɩɩ kakɩɛ.

eng: when our reputation is attacked, we are encouraging. We have become the scum of the earth, the waste that runs off everything, up to the present time.
local: Bala wa sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a sɩ yuor, sɩ maa 'yɛr tuo ɛ, wa tãn dɩna, baa bʊɔlɔ sɩ bon jaa ɛ, ka a sɩ ɩ a wɛr wʊ jaa tãpuor ju sɔɔr.

eng: Im not writing these things to make you ashamed but to warn you, since you are my loved children.
local: N ba sɛɛrɛ a anyãna ɩka n su yɩ vã ɛ, tɩchɛ ka n kpãa yɩ maa mãɛ bi'yɔ̃ɔnsɩ kaar.

eng: each ones work will be clearly shown. The day will make it clear, because it will be revealed with fire—the fire will test the quality of each ones work.
local: nɩrɛ jaa na nyɛ naa a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃, bojũu a bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a jaa na gãn chãa pɔ. Bũu lɛ na vuul nɩrɛ jaa tʊ̃mɔ̃ na wʊ bɛɛr ãsʊɔ jaa tʊ̃mɔ̃ kaa.

eng: If anyones work survives, theyll get a reward.
local: Ala ɩ a lɛ wʊn mɛ dɔɔl ba sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, wʊn nyɛn a wʊ sãyar.

eng: You may have ten thousand mentors in Christ, but you dont have many fathers. I gave birth to you in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: Yɩn gba tara nɩbɛ turo pie na kaara yɩ a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ, tɩ yaa tara sãamɩne yɔɔ ɛ, maa na wa mʊɔl a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ yɩ lɛ ɩ a yɩ sãa.

eng: But if anyones work goes up in flames, theyll lose it. However, they themselves will be saved as if they had gone through a fire.
local: Ala ɩ a wa di naa a nɩnyɩnɛ kʊ̃ nyɛ bon jaa ɛ, wʊn nyɛn faafʊ, tɩchɛ wʊn kaara naa fɩka nɩrɛ bũu na vuul.

eng: so I encourage you to follow my example.
local: Ala lɛ so ka n pãa sʊɔrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩ turo a lɛ ɩn turo.

eng: Dont you know that you are Gods temple and Gods Spirit lives in you?.
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka yɩn mãɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir ka a wʊ Sɩɛ kpɩɛrɛ a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ?.

eng: This is why Ive sent Timothy to you; hes my loved and trusted child in the Lord; hell remind you about my way of life in Christ Jesus. Hell teach the same way as I teach everywhere in every church.
local: A anyãna jũu mɩ lɛ so ka n tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Timoti na ɩ a n bie ɩn nʊ̃, wʊ tara na yelmãɛ a sɩ Soro pɔ. Wʊn tɩ jɛɔ yɩ naa a lɛ a n befʊ na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, na n mɩ wile nɩ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ a jiir a jaa.

eng: If someone destroys Gods temple, God will destroy that person, because Gods temple is holy, which is what you are.
local: Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wa sɔ̃ɔ naa a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir nyã, Nãaŋmɩn na sɔ̃ɔ naa a nɩnyɩnɛ, bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir ɩn chɛchɛ. Yɩn mãɛ lɛ a puorfʊ yir nyã.

eng: Dont fool yourself. If some of you think they are worldly-wise, then they should become foolish so that they can become wise.
local: Yɩ ta bɛlɛ a yɩ mãɛ ɛ. Ala ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ tɩɛr naa ɩka wʊ ɩ naa yɛ̃ sʊɔ a wɛr nyã pɔ, wʊ lɩɛb ɩ Jɔl na wʊ pãa tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb yɛ̃ sʊɔ.

eng: Some have become arrogant as if Im not coming to see you.
local: A yɩ bamɩne chɩɛrɛ nɩ nyãa ɩrɛ fɩka n kʊ̃ lɛ wa be go ɛ.

eng: But, if the Lord is willing, Ill come to you soon. Then I wont focus on what these arrogant people say, but Ill find out what power they possess.
local: Tɩchɛ a kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, ala ɩ a sɩ Soro sɔɔ naa, ɩn wan a yɩ sɛ̃, naa tɩ kaa a ba ɩ a bala na chɩɛrɛ a nyãa 'yɛrɛ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka n tɩ kaa a kpɛ̃ɔ buor ban tara.

eng: Gods kingdom isnt about words but about power.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ yele ba ɩ nɛɛ 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ɩn kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: This worlds wisdom is foolishness to God. As its written, He catches the wise in their cleverness. .
local: Bojũu a wɛr nyã yɛ̃ ɩ naa jɔl yele a Nãaŋmɩn niem, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, Wʊ ma nyɔɔ naa a yɛ̃ sʊɔ a wʊ yɛ̃ yele pɔ.

eng: And also, The Lord knows that the thoughts of the wise are silly .
local: A lɛ sɛb go, A Soro bɔ̃ɔ naa a yɛ̃ dẽme tɩɛr ka a ɩ pɔrɔ.

eng: So then, no one should brag about human beings. Everything belongs to you.
local: A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ wʊ ta lɛ 'mɔɔrɔ a wʊ mãɛ nɩ nɩrɛ yele ɛ! Yɩn lɛ so a bonsɩ a jaa.

eng: Which do you want? Should I come to you with a big stick to punish you, or with love and a gentle spirit?.
local: Buor sʊɔ lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ? Maa wa tɩrɛ, n tɩn kpaara bɩɩ nʊ̃fʊ nɩ jomm sɩɛ?.

eng: Paul, Apollos, Cephas, the world, life, death, things in the present, things in the future—everything belongs to you.
local: ka maa Pɔɔl lɛ bɩɩ, Apolosɩ lɛ bɩɩ, Sɩfasɩ lɛ bɩɩ, a wɛr lɛ bɩɩ, nyɛvʊr lɛ bɩɩ, kũu lɛ bɩɩ, dɩna lɛ bɩɩ, ka daar kɔ̃ɔ lɛ, yɩn lɛ so a jaa.

eng: but you belong to Christ, and Christ belongs to God.
local: A Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ so yɩ, ka Nãaŋmɩn mɩ so a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: Everyone has heard that there is sexual immorality among you. This is a type of immorality that isnt even heard of among the Gentiles—a man is having sex with his fathers wife!.
local: Ba wa man kʊ ma sɩrɛ jaa ɩka sɛ̃sɛ̃yele ben a yɩ pɔ, a lɛ gba na ba ɩrɛ a bala na ba puoro pɔ ɛ. Bie na na gãn a wʊ sãa pɔɔ.

eng: And youre proud of yourselves instead of being so upset that the one who did this thing is expelled from your community.
local: Tɩ a yɩ chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ yuor, vã kʊ̃ naa nyɔɔ yɩ ka yɩ dii a nɩrɛ nyãna na maal a nɩtɔ̃ bar a yɩ pɔ ɛ?.

eng: Though Im absent physically, Im present in the spirit and Ive already judged the man who did this as if I were present.
local: A maa mãɛ gba na ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a maa tɩɛr wʊ jaa ben a yɩ sɛ̃, naa gba tɔɔr a daba 'yɛr fɩka n ben be.

eng: When you meet together in the name of our Lord Jesus, Ill be present in spirit with the power of our Lord Jesus.
local: Yɩn wa lɔ̃ɔn a sɩ Soro Yesu yuor, a n tɩɛr mɩ ben a yɩ sɛ̃, ka a sɩ Soro Yesu kpɛ̃ɔ mɩ be be.

eng: At that time we need to hand this man over to Satan to destroy his human weakness so that his spirit might be saved on the day of the Lord.
local: yɩ de a daba nyãna 'yɔ̃ɔ Satan nũu pɔ, ka wʊ sɔ̃ɔ a wʊ ãgãn bar, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn faa a wʊ sɩɛ a sɩ Soro bɩbir daar.

eng: Your bragging isnt good! Dont you know that a tiny grain of yeast makes a whole batch of dough rise?.
local: A yɩ yuor bɔfʊ nyã ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ. Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a dãbɩl jaa pʊʊr lɛ ma vɛ̃ ka a paanʊ̃ɔ vʊ̃ a yɔɔ ɛ?.

eng: Clean out the old yeast so you can be a new batch of dough, given that youre supposed to be unleavened bread. Christ our Passover lamb has been sacrificed.
local: Yɩ kpaar a dãbɩl koraa bar, tɩ na yɩ ɩ paanʊ̃ɔ paalaa na ba tara a dãbɩl ɛ. Lɛ lɛ yɩ kaara sɩrɛ jaa. Bojũu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ Gõl Bar Pɛɛraabile lon a sɩ bɔɔr.

eng: When someone in your assembly has a legal case against another member, do they dare to take it to court to be judged by people who arent just, instead of by Gods people?.
local: Ala ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ nɩ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ wa nyɛn 'yɛr, ŋmɩnɛ a ɩ a wʊ na tara a 'yɛr chiin a 'yɛr tɔɔrbɔ bala na ba puoro ɛ jie, tɩ bar a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo jie?.

eng: Or dont you know that Gods people will judge the world? If the world is to be judged by you, are you incompetent to judge trivial cases?.
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo lɛ na wa tɔɔr a bala na ba puoro 'yɛr ɛ? Ka ala ɩ yɩn lɛ na wa tɔɔr a bala na ba puoro 'yɛr, ŋmɩnɛ a yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ maal a yɩ mãɛ yelbil ɛ?.

eng: Dont you know that we will judge angels? Why not ordinary things?.
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka sɩn lɛ na tɔɔr a malakasɩ gba 'yɛr ɛ? Wa 'yɛrɛ nɩ a sɩ mãɛ yelbil?.

eng: So then if you have ordinary lawsuits, do you appoint people as judges who arent respected by the church?.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩn wa tara a 'yɛrbil anyãna taaba, yɩ ma ir a pupuorbo bamɩne gba yɛ̃ na ba tal tɛɛr ɛ, ka ba tɔɔr a 'yɛr.

eng: so lets celebrate the feast with the unleavened bread of honesty and truth, not with old yeast or with the yeast of evil and wickedness.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta ɩ a sɩ dire a Gõl Bar Difʊ nɩ a dãbɩl koraa ɛ, a dãbɩl koraa na ɩ yosɔ̃ɔ nɩ putuyele, tɩchɛ a ɩ a paanʊ̃ɔ na ba tara a dãbɩl ɛ. A paanʊ̃ɔ na ɩ chɛchɛ ɩfʊ nɩ yelmãɛ tarfʊ.

eng: I wrote to you in my earlier letter not to associate with sexually immoral people.
local: A gãn 'lɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ sɛb kʊ yɩ, n 'yɛr ɩka yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ a sɛ̃sɛ̃nbɛ ɛ.

eng: Im saying this because you should be ashamed of yourselves! Isnt there one person among you who is wise enough to pass judgment between believers?.
local: N 'yɛr naa anyãna na 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ vã, a ɩn sɩrɛ ɩka a yɩ pɔ ãsʊɔ jaa ba tara yɛ̃ jaa pʊʊr na wʊn maal a wʊ taaba 'yɛr ɛ?.

eng: But I wasnt talking about the sexually immoral people in the outside world by any means—or the greedy, or the swindlers, or people who worship false gods—otherwise, you would have to leave the world entirely!.
local: n ba 'yɛrɛ a bala na ba puoro na sɛ̃nɛ ɛ, bɩɩ a bɔgar dẽme, bɩɩ a nɩfɔlbɔ bɩɩ a tɩpuorbo ɛ. Ala ɩ lɛ lɛ, yɩ kʊ̃ naa yi a ka a wɛr nyã pɔ.

eng: But instead, does a brother or sister have a lawsuit against another brother or sister, and do they do this in front of unbelievers?.
local: Tɩchɛ ka a yɛbɛ ma tara a yɛbɛ chiin a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ jie, a bala na ba ɩ a Yesu turbo sɛ̃.

eng: The fact that you have lawsuits against each other means that youve already lost your case. Why not be wronged instead? Why not be cheated?.
local: Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ ɩka yɩ ben maal bɔr, bojũu yɩ ma nyɔɔr taa chiin a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ jie. Bo lɛ so ka yɩ kʊ̃ naa sɔɔ ka a nɩbɛ maal yɩ dɛɛr ɛ? Bɩɩ sɔɔ ka ba fɔl yɩ ɛ?.

eng: But instead you are doing wrong and cheating—and youre doing it to your own brothers and sisters.
local: Tɩchɛ a yɩn mãɛ fɔlɔ nɩ taa na yɩ maala taa dɛbɛ, na yɩ maala a anyãna kʊrɔ a yɩ yɛɛr.

eng: But now Im writing to you not to associate with anyone who calls themselves brother or sister who is sexually immoral, greedy, someone who worships false gods, an abusive person, a drunk, or a swindler. Dont even eat with anyone like this.
local: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, n sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ, a lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ ɩ nɩ nyã. Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ a 'lɔ na bʊɔlɔ, a wʊ mãɛ a yɩ yɛbɛ tɩ na wʊ sɛ̃nɛ, nɩ bɔgar sʊɔ, na wʊ puoro tɩbɛ, nɩ yosɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, na wʊ ɩ dãburo, nɩ nɩfɔlɔ. A nɩrɛ nyãna tɔ sʊɔ, yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa 'mataa wʊ gba dire ɛ.

eng: What do I care about judging outsiders? Isnt it your job to judge insiders?.
local: N tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ ɩka n tɔɔrɔ a bala na puoro 'yɛr, tɩchɛ yɩn 'lɔ yɩ kpãa a nɩbɛ bala yɩn 'mataa puoro nɩ na tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yelsɩ anyãna.

eng: God will judge outsiders. Expel the evil one from among you! .
local: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ na tɔɔr a bala na ba puoro ɛ 'yɛr. Yɩ dii a putusʊɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ bar a yɩ pɔ.

eng: Dont you know that people who are unjust wont inherit Gods kingdom? Dont be deceived. Those who are sexually immoral, those who worship false gods, adulterers, both participants in same-sex intercourse.
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a putudẽme kʊ̃ kpɛ be a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ? Yɩ ta bɛlɛ yɩ mãɛ ɛ. Sɛ̃sɛ̃nbɛ, tɩpuorbo, a bala na fol bɩɩ a dɔɔr na lɩɛb gãna nɩ taa.

eng: thieves, the greedy, drunks, abusive people, and swindlers wont inherit Gods kingdom.
local: bɩɩ nãnyisɩ, bɩɩ a bɔgar dẽme, bɩɩ a dãburbo, bɩɩ a yosɔ̃ɔnbɔ, bɩɩ a nɩfɔlbɔ, ba ãsʊɔ jaa kʊ̃ kpɛ be a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ.

eng: That is what some of you used to be! But you were washed clean, you were made holy to God, and you were made right with God in the name of the Lord Jesus Christ and in the Spirit of our God.
local: Lɛ lɛ a yɩ bamɩne mɩ dɔ̃ɔ kaara, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn pɛɛ yɩ bar, na wʊ oo yɩ ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor nɩ a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ.

eng: I have the freedom to do anything, but not everything is helpful. I have the freedom to do anything, but I wont be controlled by anything.
local: A yɩ bamɩne 'yɛr naa ɩka, n ba chire bon jaa maalfʊ ɛ. Yele jaa ba chɩre maalfʊ ɛ. Tɩchɛ a ba ɩ yele a jaa lɛ vɩɛlɛ maalfʊ ɛ. Maa kʊ̃ sɔɔ ka bon jaa so ma ɛ.

eng: Food is for the stomach and the stomach is for food, and yet God will do away with both. The body isnt for sexual immorality but for the Lord, and the Lord is for the body.
local: Bamɩne mɩ ma lɛ 'yɛr naa ɩka, bʊ̃diir ben be puor 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a puor mɩ be be a bʊ̃diir 'yɔ̃ɔ. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn na sɔ̃ɔn a jaa ayi bar. Sɛ̃sɛ̃yele jũu ba lɛ a ãgãn be be ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro jũu lɛ, ka a sɩ Soro mɩ be be a ãgãn jũu.

eng: God has raised the Lord and will raise us through his power.
local: A kpɛ̃ɔ nyãna lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sãɩn a sɩ Soro a kũu pɔ, ka wʊ mɩ na sãɩ sɩ a kũu pɔ.

eng: Dont you know that your bodies are parts of Christ? So then, should I take parts of Christ and make them a part of someone who is sleeping around? No way!.
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a yɩ ãgãma ɩn bʊ̃'yen nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn ɛ? N pãa de a n ãgãn na ɩ bʊ̃'yen nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn naa tɩ 'mar pɔɔ baa pɔ? N kʊ̃ ɩ a lɛ ɛ.

eng: Dont you know that anyone who is joined to someone who is sleeping around is one body with that person? The scripture says, The two will become one flesh .
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka nɩrɛ 'lɔ na de a wʊ ãgãn tɩ 'mar a pɔɔ baa pɔ, ɩn bʊ̃'yen nɩ a wʊ ãgãn ɛ? Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, Ka ba jaa ayi ɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen.

eng: The one who is joined to the Lord is one spirit with him.
local: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na de wʊ mãɛ 'mar a sɩ Soro, 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ ɩn bʊ̃'yen.

eng: Avoid sexual immorality! Every sin that a person can do is committed outside the body, except those who engage in sexual immorality commit sin against their own bodies.
local: Yɩ tɔɔ yi a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ. Yelbier jaa nɩrɛ na ɩrɛ ma ben a wʊ ãgãn yõo, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɛ̃nɛ, a wʊ ãgãn lɛ wʊ maala a yelbier 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃.

eng: Or dont you know that your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit who is in you? Dont you know that you have the Holy Spirit from God, and you dont belong to yourselves?.
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a yɩ ãgãn ɩn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ puorfʊ yir ɛ? A 'lɔ na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. A 'lɔ yɩn nyɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɔ? Yaa so yɩ mãɛ ɛ.

eng: You have been bought and paid for, so honor God with your body.
local: Nãaŋmɩn da yɩn so. A lɛ jũu, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a yɩ ãgãma.

eng: Now, about what you wrote: Its good for a man not to have sex with a woman.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a yele ala yɩn sɛb kʊ ma, an taa vɩɛlɛ na ka daba ta kul pɔɔ ɛ.

eng: Each man should have his own wife, and each woman should have her own husband because of sexual immorality.
local: Tɩchɛ an ɩ a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele na be be jũu, daba jaa wʊ kul a wʊ mãɛ pɔɔ, ka a pɔɔ jaa mɩ kul a wʊ mãɛ sɩrɛ.

eng: The husband should meet his wifes sexual needs, and the wife should do the same for her husband.
local: Ka a sɩrɛ nɩ a wʊ mãɛ pɔɔ na ma lɔ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔ, lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a pɔɔ nɩ a wʊ mãɛ sɩrɛ mɩ ma lɔ̃ɔ a sɔ̃ɔ.

eng: The wife doesnt have authority over her own body, but the husband does. Likewise, the husband doesnt have authority over his own body, but the wife does.
local: A pɔɔ tɛɛ ba lɛ so a wʊ mãɛ ãgãn ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ sɩrɛ lɛ so. A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, a daba tɛɛ mɩ ba so a wʊ ãgãn ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ pɔɔ lɛ so.

eng: Dont refuse to meet each others needs unless you both agree for a short period of time to devote yourselves to prayer. Then come back together again so that Satan might not tempt you because of your lack of self-control.
local: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa mɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa a gaa jie ɛ, ka ala ba wa ɩ yɩ man taa na yɩ kʊ taa sɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ jũu ɛ. Ka yɩn wa sʊɔr a Nãaŋmɩn baar, a yɩ lɛ lɔ̃ɔ taa go, ka a Satan taa nyɛ yɩn kʊ̃ lɛ wa tʊɔrɔ a yɩ mãɛ nyɔɔrɔ bɛl yɩ ɛ.

eng: Im saying this to give you permission; its not a command.
local: N 'yɛr naa ɩka anyã tara na sɔr, a ba ɩ binfʊ lɛ ɛ.

eng: I wish all people were like me, but each has a particular gift from God: one has this gift, and another has that one.
local: N naa bʊɔrɔ naa fɩka a dɔɔr ba ta be a n kaar. Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa tara na a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ wʊ, ãsʊɔ jaa bon ma tɛɛ naa a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ bon.

eng: Im telling those who are single and widows that its good for them to stay single like me.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a yɩn bala na ba kul taa ɛ, nɩ a pɔɔkɔɛ, a vɩɛlɛ naa ba taa kulo taa ɛ, na ba jãnɛ nɩtãa lɛ ɩn jãnɛ.

eng: But if they cant control themselves, they should get married, because its better to marry than to burn with passion.
local: Tɩchɛ bala ba wa tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nyɔɔrɔ a ba mãɛ ɛ, ba kul taa. Ala ɩ ba kul taa, a sãn ban jɛ̃ ka a vɔlaa kʊrɔ ba.

eng: Im passing on the Lords command to those who are married: A wife shouldnt leave her husband.
local: A bala na kul taa, a nɛbinãa lɛ a nyã, a ba ɩ maa lɛ 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro lɛ 'yɛr. A pɔɔ wʊ taa ɩrɛ wa bara a wʊ sɩrɛ ɛ.

eng: but if she does leave him, then she should stay single or be reconciled to her husband. And a man shouldnt divorce his wife.
local: Tɩchɛ 'lɔ wa bar a wʊ sɩrɛ, wʊ taa lɛ kulo daba go ɛ, bɩɩ wʊ lɩɛb tɩ 'maal a wʊ sɩrɛ. Daba mɩ wʊ taa dire a wʊ pɔɔ bara ɛ.

eng: Im telling everyone else : If a believer has a wife who doesnt believe, and she agrees to live with him, then he shouldnt divorce her.
local: A anyã 'lɔ, maa lɛ 'yɛrɛ, a ba ɩ a sɩ Soro lɛ ɛ. Ala ɩ a Yesu turo ãsʊɔ pɔɔ ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, tɩ sɔɔ ɩka wʊn jɛ̃n wʊ naa wʊ taa ɩrɛ wa dire wʊ bara ɛ.

eng: If a woman has a husband who doesnt believe and he agrees to live with her, then she shouldnt divorce him.
local: Ala ɩ a pɔɔ mɩ lɛ ɩ a Yesu turo, tɩchɛ ka a wʊ sɩrɛ ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, tɩ mɩ sɔɔ ɩka wʊn jɛ̃n wʊ naa, a pɔɔ nyɩnɛ mɩ wʊ taa bara a sɩrɛ ɛ.

eng: The husband who doesnt believe belongs to God because of his wife, and the wife who doesnt believe belongs to God because of her husband. Otherwise, your children would be contaminated by the world, but now they are spiritually set apart.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn kãan a danyɩnɛ na ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, ka wʊ ɩ nɩsʊ̃ a wʊ pɔɔ na ɩ a Yesu turo jũu, ka a pɔɔ mɩ na ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, mɩ ɩ nɩsʊ̃ a sɩrɛ na ɩ a Yesu turo jũu. Ka lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, a ba bibiir na ɩn bidɛbɛ, tɩchɛ a lɛ jũu ba ɩn bisʊ̃n.

eng: But if a spouse who doesnt believe chooses to leave, then let them leave. The brother or sister isnt tied down in these circumstances. God has called you to peace.
local: Tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, 'lɔ wa chiine wʊ chiine. Fʊn ɩ a Yesu turo, ka daba lɛ, bɩɩ pɔɔ lɛ, ta ŋmaa wʊ sɔr ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔl sɩ naa ka sɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ nyã'maar.

eng: How do you know as a wife if you will save your husband? Or how do you know as a husband if you will save your wife?.
local: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a ɩ a fʊ̃ʊ pɔɔ, ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊn tʊ̃ɔ faa a fʊ sɩrɛ ɛ? Bɩɩ a daba, faa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊ mɩn tʊ̃ɔ faa a fʊ pɔɔ ɛ?.

eng: Nevertheless, each person should live the kind of life that the Lord assigned when he called each one. This is what I teach in all the churches.
local: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ mɔ̃ be a jie 'lɔ a sɩ Soro na bin wʊ, nɩ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl wʊ. A binfʊ nyãna lɛ n bin kʊ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba jaa.

eng: If someone was circumcised when called, he shouldnt try to reverse it. If someone wasnt circumcised when he was called, he shouldnt be circumcised.
local: Nɩrɛ ŋmaan yʊɔr tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn wa bʊɔl wʊ bɩɩ? Wʊ taa ɩrɛ wa sɔɔlɔ a wʊ yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ ɛ. Nɩrɛ mɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl, ba ŋmaa a wʊ yʊɔr bɩɩ? Wʊ taa lɛ ŋmaara go ɛ.

eng: Circumcision is nothing; not being circumcised is nothing. What matters is keeping Gods commandments.
local: Yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ ɩn pɔrɔ, ka a yʊɔr ba ŋmaafʊ mɩ ɩ pɔrɔ, Nãaŋmɩn yelbinsɩ fʊn turo lɛ ɩ yelkpɛ̃ɛ.

eng: Each person should stay in the situation they were in when they were called.
local: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ chɛnɛ a lɛ nɛ wʊn be tɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wa bʊɔl wʊ.

eng: If you were a slave when you were called, dont let it bother you. But if you are actually able to be free, take advantage of the opportunity.
local: Gbãgbaar lɛ yɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔl yɩ bɩɩ? Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a ɩ tuo kʊ yɩ ɛ, ala ɩ yɩ tara na sɔr na so yɩ mãɛ, yɩn tʊ̃ɔ ɩ a lɛ.

eng: Anyone who was a slave when they were called by the Lord has the status of being the Lords free person. In the same way, anyone who was a free person when they were called is Christs slave.
local: Bojũu ala ɩ nɩrɛ ɩn gbãgbaa tɩchɛ ka a sɩ Soro wa bʊɔl wʊ, a nɩnyɩnɛ son wʊ mãɛ a sɩ Soro jũu. Lɛ mɩ lɛ, nɩrɛ na so wʊ mãɛ tɩchɛ ka a sɩ Soro wa bʊɔl wʊ, a nɩnyɩnɛ mɩ ɩ naa Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto gbãgbaa.

eng: You were bought and paid for. Dont become slaves of people.
local: Nãaŋmɩn da yɩn da tuo, yɩ ta ɩ nɩrɛ jaa gbãgbaa ɛ.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, each of you should stay with God in the situation you were in when you were called.
local: Yɛɛr, ãsʊɔ jaa ben Nãaŋmɩn niem, ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ chɛnɛ a lɛ nɛ wʊn be tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn wa bʊɔl wʊ.

eng: I dont have a command from the Lord about people who have never been married, but Ill give you my opinion as someone you can trust because of the Lords mercy.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã a bala na ba kul taa sɛrɛ ɛ, n ba tara yele jaa a sɩ Soro na kʊ ma ɩka n 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ n tara na 'yɛr ɩn na 'yɛr an ɩ a sɩ Soro nɩbaal jũu, n sɔɔ naa ɩka n ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ ka yɩn sɔɔ de.

eng: So I think this advice is good because of the present crisis: Stay as you are.
local: A dɩna yelwõnsɩ jũu, n tɩɛraa ɩka a ɩn vɩla ka nɩrɛ jaa kpɩɛrɛ wʊ yõ.

eng: If you are married, dont get a divorce. If you are divorced, dont try to find a spouse.
local: Fʊ kul pɔɔ bɩɩ? Taa ɩrɛ wa dire wʊ bara ɛ. Dakʊɔr lɛ fʊ ɩ bɩɩ, pɔɔ kʊɔr lɛ fʊ ɩ? Taa tɩɛrɛ pɔɔ bɩɩ sɩrɛ kulfʊ ɛ.

eng: But if you do marry, you havent sinned; and if someone who hasnt been married gets married, they havent sinned. But married people will have a hard time, and Im trying to spare you that.
local: Tɩchɛ ala wa ɩ fʊ kul pɔɔ, faa maal yelbier ɛ, ka ala ɩ pɔɔsaraa mɩ kul sɩrɛ, waa maal yelbier ɛ. Tɩchɛ a bala na kul taa na kpɛ̃n yelwõnsɩ pɔ ka n kʊ̃ sɔɔl yɩ a yele nyãna ɛ.

eng: This is what Im saying, brothers and sisters: The time has drawn short. From now on, those who have wives should be like people who dont have them.
local: Yɛɛr, bon ɩn 'yɛrɛ lɛ ɩka, a sɔ̃ɔ ɩn jaa ŋmaa. An yi a dɩna chiine, bala na tara pɔbɔ, ba maala fɩka baa tara pɔbɔ ɛ.

eng: Those who are sad should be like people who arent crying. Those who are happy should be like people who arent happy. Those who buy something should be like people who dont have possessions.
local: Bala na kõnõ, ba maala fɩka baa kõnõ ɛ, bala mɩ pʊɔ na pɛl, ba mɩ maala fɩka ba pʊɔ ba pɛl ɛ. Ka bala mɩ na da bon, ba maala fɩka a ba ɩ bala lɛ so bin ɛ.

eng: Those who use the world should be like people who arent preoccupied with it, because this world in its present form is passing away.
local: Bala mɩ na tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a wɛr nyã bonsɩ, ba ta de ba mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a ala pɔ ɛ, bojũu a wɛr nɩ a wʊ bonsɩ a jaa poro na chiine.

eng: I want you to be free from concerns. A man who isnt married is concerned about the Lords concerns—how he can please the Lord.
local: Maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka yɩ ta tara yele jaa tɩɛr ɛ. An ɩ daba baa tara pɔɔ ɛ, a sɩ Soro yele lɛ wʊ ma tɩɛrɛ, lɛ wʊn na ɩ pɛl a sɩ Soro pʊɔ.

eng: But a married man is concerned about the worlds concerns—how he can please his wife.
local: Tɩchɛ daba na tara pɔɔ a wɛr nyã yelsɩ lɛ wʊ ma tɩɛrɛ, lɛ wʊn na ɩ pɛl a pɔɔ pʊɔ.

eng: His attention is divided. A woman who isnt married or who is a virgin is concerned about the Lords concerns so that she can be dedicated to God in both body and spirit. But a married woman is concerned about the worlds concerns—how she can please her husband.
local: Ka a wʊ tɩɛr maa gã jibʊ̃'yen ɛ. Ka a pɔɔ mɩ na ba kul sɩrɛ ɛ, bɩɩ pɔɔsarbile ma tɩɛrɛ a sɩ Soro yele. A wʊ bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka wʊ de a wʊ ãgãn nɩ a wʊ sɩɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro. Tɩchɛ pɔɔ na tara sɩrɛ, a wɛr nyã bonsɩ tɩɛr lɛ wʊ ma tara, lɛ wʊn na pɛl a wʊ sɩrɛ pʊɔ.

eng: Im saying this for your own advantage. Its not to restrict you but rather to promote effective and consistent service to the Lord without distraction.
local: Yɩ mãɛ sʊ̃ʊfʊ jũu lɛ n 'yɛrɛ nɩ a anyãna, a ba ɩ yele lɛ n bine kʊrɔ yɩ ɛ. N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ kpɩɛrɛ a lɛ na tor na yɩ tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen kʊ a sɩ Soro.

eng: If someone thinks he is acting inappropriately toward an unmarried woman whom he knows, and if he has strong feelings and it seems like the right thing to do, he should do what he wants—hes not sinning—they should get married.
local: Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wa tɩɛr ɩka waa maal a lɛ na sɛɛ nɩ a pɔɔsarbile wʊn ŋmaan a bara ɛ, ka a pɔɔbile mɩ jɛ̃ kor, ka a sɛɛ ɩka ba kul taa, wʊ ɩ a lɛ wʊn tɩɛr, a ba ɩ bier ɛ. Ba kul taa.

eng: But if a man stands firm in his decision, and doesnt feel the pressure, but has his own will under control, he does right if he decides in his own heart not to marry the woman.
local: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ tɩɛr na ba vavire ɛ, a wʊ tɩɛr ba fɩrɛ wʊ ka wʊ tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ a tɩɛr nyɔɔrɔ na wʊ 'yɛr a wʊ tɩɛr pɔ ɩka wʊ kʊ̃ kul a pɔɔsarbile ɛ, a nɩrɛ nyã mɩ maal a lɛ na tor.

eng: Therefore, the one who marries the unmarried woman does right, and the one who doesnt get married will do even better.
local: A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kul a pɔɔsarbile wʊ maal vɩla, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na ba kul ɛ, 'lɔ lɛ maal vɩla gar.

eng: A woman is obligated to stay in her marriage as long as her husband is alive. But if her husband dies, she is free to marry whomever she wants, only it should be a believer in the Lord.
local: Pɔɔ wa kul sɩrɛ, 'lɔ nɩ a sɩrɛ ben taa, tɩchɛ a sɩrɛ wa kpi wʊ tara na sɔr ɩka wʊ kul daba 'lɔ jaa wʊn bʊɔrɔ, tɩchɛ a danyɩnɛ wʊ ɩ Yesu turo.

eng: But in my opinion, she will be happier if she stays the way she is. And I think that I have Gods Spirit too.
local: Lɛ ɩn nyɛ lɛ ɩka, ala ɩ waa kul sɩrɛ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ jãnɛ, wʊn ɩn bɔɔsʊ̃n sʊɔ. N tɩɛr ɩka n mɩ tara na a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ.

eng: Am I not free? Am I not an apostle? Havent I seen Jesus our Lord? Arent you my work in the Lord?.
local: N ba so n mãɛ bɩɩ? N ba ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nãa ãsʊɔ bɩɩ? N mɩ ba nyɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu nɩ nɩbir bɩɩ? A ba ɩ yɩn lɛ ɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn tʊ̃, tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ?.

eng: If Im not an apostle to others, at least I am to you! You are the seal that shows Im an apostle.
local: Ala ɩ gba, n ba ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nãa bamɩne sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩ yɩn sɛ̃ 'lɔ, sɩrɛ jaa n ɩ naa! Bojũu yɩn lɛ ɩ a jãnɛ wiil sɩrɛ jaa ɩka n ɩ naa a nɩtʊ̃nãa a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: This is my defense against those who criticize me.
local: A anyãna lɛ na ɩ a maa 'yɛr ɩn na 'yɛr kʊ a bala na wa bɛrɛ ma a nɛɛ.

eng: Dont we have the right to eat and drink?.
local: A mɔ̃ sɩn tɛɛ lɛ ba tara sɔr ɩka yɩ kʊ sɩ bʊ̃diir nɩ bʊ̃nyursɩ ɛ?.

eng: Dont we have the right to travel with a wife who believes like the rest of the apostles, the Lords brothers, and Cephas?.
local: Sɩn tɛɛ lɛ ba tara sɔr ɩka sɩ ma tara a sɩ pɔbɔ 'mataa yʊɔrɔ nɩ nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ Soro yɛɛr nɩ a Sɩfasɩ na ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ ɛ?.

eng: Or is it only I and Barnabas who dont have the right to not work for our living?.
local: Bɩɩ maa nɩ Banabasɩ tɛɛ lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ tɩ yɩ kʊ̃ kʊ sɩ bon jaa ɛ?.

eng: Who joins the army and pays their own way? Who plants a vineyard and doesnt eat its fruit? Who shepherds a flock and doesnt drink its milk?.
local: Nɩbuor lɛ ba de soja tɩ wʊ lɩɛb yara wʊ mãɛ? An lɛ ma sɛl tɩɛ tɩ ba dire a wʊ wɔ̃mɔ̃ ɛ? Bɩɩ an lɛ ɩ nachĩnɛ tɩ maa pɛ̃ a bɩr di ɛ?.

eng: Im not saying these things just based on common sense, am I? Doesnt the Law itself say these things?.
local: Nɩsaal kaafʊ pɔ 'yɛr lɛ a nyã ɩn 'yɛr bɩɩ? A Mosesɩ nɛbinãa ba 'yɛr a lɛ nɩ wʊ ju ɛ?.

eng: In Moses Law its written: You will not muzzle the ox when it is threshing . Is God worried about oxen.
local: Bojũu nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a Mosesɩ nɛbinãa dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, Ta lũ a nadar 'lɔ fʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ vara fʊ a chi nɛɛ pɔɔ ɛ. A nadai yele lɛ fɛr a Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ?.

eng: or did he say this entirely for our sake? It was written for our sake because the one who plows and the one who threshes should each do so with the hope of sharing the produce.
local: Sɩrɛ jaa a ba ɩ sɩn jũu lɛ wʊ 'yɛr a anyãna ɛ? Ɔ̃ɔ, sɩn jũu lɛ ba sɛb a yelsɩ anyãna, bojũu a bala na kʊɔrɔ nɩ a bala na vara tara na tɩɛr ɩka ban nyɛn bon kɔ̃ɔ.

eng: If we sowed spiritual things in you, is it so much to ask to harvest some material things from you?.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ bʊr a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃bʊrɔ a yɩ sɛ̃, an ɩn tuo ala ɩ yɩ mɩ kʊ sɩ naa a yɩ bʊ̃tarsɩ bɩɩ?.

eng: If others have these rights over you, dont we deserve them all the more? However, we havent made use of this right, but we put up with everything so we dont put any obstacle in the way of the gospel of Christ.
local: Ala ɩ bamɩne tara na sɔr ka yɩ ma sʊ̃ʊ ba, sɩn ba lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka sɩ nyɛ gar ba ɛ? Tɩchɛ sɩn ba kpãkpãana nɩ a yele nyãna ɛ. Sɩ ma bar yele jaa ka a po, a sɩ taa pɔɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna sɔr ɛ.

eng: Dont you know that those who serve in the temple get to eat food from the temple, and those who serve at the altar share part of what is sacrificed on the altar?.
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a bala na tʊ̃nɔ̃ a be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir, a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir pɔ lɛ ba dire ɛ? Ka a bala mɩ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔrlorbo mɩ dire a bɔɔrlo bomo ala ɛ?.

eng: In the same way, the Lord commanded that those who preach the gospel should get their living from the gospel.
local: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr ɩka a bala na mʊɔlɔ a wʊ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ, ba mɩ dire yire a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ pɔ.

eng: But I havent taken advantage of this. And Im not writing this so that it will be done for me. Its better for me to die than to lose my right to brag about this!.
local: Tɩchɛ maa ba dɩɛl a anyãna ɛ, n mɩ ba sɛɛrɛ a anyãna tɩ tara tɩɛr ɩka yɩ maal a lɛ kʊ ma ɛ. Maa kpin kɔ̃ a sa naa nɩrɛ na wa kaa a n yo bɔ yele nyãna pɔrɔ.

eng: If I preach the gospel, I have no reason to brag, since Im obligated to do it. Im in trouble if I dont preach the gospel.
local: Tɩchɛ maa wa mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã, n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ yuor ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ma ɩka n mʊɔl. Yele na pɔɔ ma naa ala ɩ n ba wa mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã ɛ.

eng: If I do this voluntarily, I get rewarded for it. But if Im forced to do it, then Ive been charged with a responsibility.
local: Maa mʊɔl a 'yɛr nyã pɔrɔ, n tara na sãyar, ala ba ɩ pɔrɔ gba lɛ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn na kaa ir ma 'yɛr lɛ n 'yɛrɛ.

eng: What reward do I get? That when I preach, I offer the good news free of charge. Thats why I dont use the rights to which Im entitled through the gospel.
local: Bo lɛ ɩ a n sãyar? Ala lɛ a anyã ɩka, n mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ pɔrɔ kʊ a nɩbɛ, naa taa bʊɔrɔ tɔ̃nɔ̃ yin a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã mʊɔlfʊ pɔ ɛ.

eng: Although Im free from all people, I make myself a slave to all people, to recruit more of them.
local: N gba na so n mãɛ ka nɩrɛ jaa ba so ɛ, tɩ n maal n mãɛ gbãgbaa kʊ nɩrɛ jaa lɛ an na ɩ ka n tʊ̃ɔ nɩyɔɔ tɔɔ wa kʊ Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: I act like a Jew to the Jews, so I can recruit Jews. I act like Im under the Law to those under the Law, so I can recruit those who are under the Law .
local: Maa wa ta a Juu nɩbɛ sɛ̃, n ma lɩɛb n mãɛ a Juu nɩrɛ, na tʊ̃ɔ ba nyɛ. A bala na be a nɛbinãa pɔ, n ma lɩɛb a ba kaar, n gba na ba be a nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, lɛ ɩn na ɩ tʊ̃ɔ ba tɔɔ wa kʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: I act like Im outside the Law to those who are outside the Law, so I can recruit those outside the Law .
local: A bala mɩ na ba be a nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, maa wa ta a ba sɛ̃, n mɩ ma maal fɩka n ba be a nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, ka n na tʊ̃ɔ ba tɔɔ wa kʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto. N gba na ba so n mãɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ n be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɛbinãa pɔ.

eng: I act weak to the weak, so I can recruit the weak. I have become all things to all people, so I could save some by all possible means.
local: Maa wa ta a bala sɔɔfʊ na ba kpɛ̃mɛ ɛ, n ma lɩɛb a ba kaar lɛ ɩn na ɩ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ ba ãkpãɛn. N ma lɩɛb bon jaa kʊ nɩrɛ jaa, ala ɩ n tʊ̃ɔ naa ka n faa a bamɩne.

eng: All the things I do are for the sake of the gospel, so I can be a partner with it.
local: A 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna jũu lɛ n maala nɩ a anyãna, naa mɩ na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ a sʊ̃ʊfʊ.

eng: Dont you know that all the runners in the stadium run, but only one gets the prize? So run to win.
local: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ka a bala na ma joro dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa a joa pɔ, tɩchɛ nɩbʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ ma jo na wʊ nyɛ bon ɛ? Yɩ mɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir joro a lɛ na yɩ nyɛ bon.

eng: Everyone who competes practices self-discipline in everything. The runners do this to get a crown of leaves that shrivel up and die, but we do it to receive a crown that never dies.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa na pʊɔ a jo dɔ̃ɔtaa nyã pɔ, wʊ ma nyɔɔrɔ naa a wʊ mãɛ yele a jaa pɔ sʊ̃. Ba ma ɩn a lɛ na ba de a vaar ban maal nãa jupil na maa kor ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩn ɩrɛ naa na nyɛ a nãa jupil 'lɔ na ba tara sɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ.

eng: So now this is how I run—not without a clear goal in sight. I fight like a boxer in the ring, not like someone who is shadowboxing.
local: Ala lɛ so, n ba joro fɩka nɩrɛ na bʊ̃n joro ɛ, ŋmetaa kaar, n ba bʊ̃n lɔɔrɔ a n nuur ɛ.

eng: Rather, Im landing punches on my own body and subduing it like a slave. I do this to be sure that I myself wont be disqualified after preaching to others.
local: Kai, n ma ŋmen a n ãgãn na n maal wʊ a wʊ lɩɛb a n gbãgbaa, ka n taa 'yɛr Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ka a nɩyɔɔ wa nyɛ tɔ̃nɔ̃ tɩchɛ ka Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩka maa ba sɛɛ ɛ. N ba bʊɔrɔ a lɛ ɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to be sure of the fact that our ancestors were all under the cloud and they all went through the sea.
local: Bojũu n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka a yele nyã wʊ sɔɔl yɩ ɛ, n yɛɛr. A julõjuur dɔ̃ɔ geru pɔɔ a sɩ sãakpãmɩne ba jaa ka ba jaa tɩ kpɛ a man jɩɛ pɔ gɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Follow my example, just like I follow Christs.
local: Yɩ kaara ma na yɩ turo nɩtãa lɛ ɩn mɩ na kaara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto naa turo wʊ.

eng: All were baptized into Moses in the cloud and in the sea.
local: Ba jaa tun a Mosesɩ puor ka a julõjuur geru pɔɔ ba, a ba tɩ kpɛ a man jɩɛ gɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Now concerning meat that has been sacrificed to a false god: We know that we all have knowledge. Knowledge makes people arrogant, but love builds people up.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a bomo ala ban ma lon bɔɔr kʊ a tɩbɛ 'yɛr lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɩka n 'yɛr. Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ jaa tara na bɔ̃ɔfʊ, ka a bɔ̃ɔfʊ ma wile wʊ mãɛ, tɩchɛ nʊ̃fʊ ma vɛ̃n ka sɩ baa.

eng: I praise you because you remember all my instructions, and you hold on to the traditions exactly as I handed them on to you.
local: N ma kpir yɩn jaa a lɛ yɩn chɛnɛ tara a n tɩɛr na yɩ turo a yele ala a jaa ɩn dɔ̃ɔ wiil yɩ.

eng: All ate the same spiritual food.
local: Ba jaa lɛ di a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃dibʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃.

eng: Now I want you to know that the head of every man is Christ, and the head of the woman is the man, and the head of Christ is God.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka, daba jaa ju lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, ka a pɔɔ jaa ju mɩ ɩ a wʊ sɩrɛ, ka a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ju mɩ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: Every man who prays or prophesies with his head covered shames his head.
local: Daba jaa wa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ 'yɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɩ na wʊ pɔɔ a ju wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn a ju vã.

eng: If anyone thinks they know something, they dont yet know as much as they should know.
local: Nɩrɛ na tɩɛr ɩka wʊ bɔ̃ɔn bon kɔ̃ɔ, waa bɔ̃ɔ bon jaa sɛrɛ ɛ, a lɛ wʊn tɩɛr ɩka wʊ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɛ.

eng: But if someone loves God, then they are known by God.
local: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn, Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa nɩnyɩnɛ.

eng: So concerning the actual food involved in these sacrifices to false gods, we know that a false god isnt anything in this world, and that there is no God except for the one God.
local: A bomo ala ban lon a tɩbɛ bɔɔr nʊ̃nɔ̃ 'wɔfʊ yele. Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a tɩɩ ba ɩ bon jaa a ka a wɛr pɔ ɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn ba lɛ be be go ɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen nyã tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

eng: and all drank the same spiritual drink. They drank from a spiritual rock that followed them, and the rock was Christ.
local: na ba nyũ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃nyũ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, bojũu ba jaa nyũn yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a kʊsɩr pie 'mataa chiine ba, a kʊsɩr pie 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: Every woman who prays or prophesies with her head uncovered disgraces her head. It is the same thing as having her head shaved.
local: Ka pɔɔ jaa mɩ wa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ 'yɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɩ mɩ ba pɔɔ a wʊ ju mɩ 'yɔ̃ɔn a ju vã, a kaara fɩka wʊ põn jukpãakpol.

eng: Granted, there are so-called gods, in heaven and on the earth, as there are many gods and many lords.
local: Ka ba gba bʊɔlɔ ŋmɩnsɩ, ka saaju lɛ, bɩɩ a ka a tẽe lɛ, sɩrɛ jaa lɛ ɩka ŋmɩn yɔɔ ben be, nɩ sorbo yɔɔ.

eng: However, God was unhappy with most of them, and they were struck down in the wilderness.
local: A anyã a jaa pɔ, tɩ Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ ba pɛl ba ɛ, na wʊ nyɛ suur kʊn ba, ka a ba kũn yɛ̃yɛl be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ.

eng: If a woman doesnt cover her head, then she should have her hair cut off. If it is disgraceful for a woman to have short hair or to be shaved, then she should keep her head covered.
local: Ala ɩ a pɔɔ kʊ̃ pɔɔ a ju ɛ, wʊ ŋma a ju, ala ɩ a mɩ ɩn vã pɔɔ na põ jukpãakpol wʊ ma pɔɔ a ju.

eng: A man shouldnt have his head covered, because he is the image and glory of God; but the woman is mans glory.
local: Daba ba sɛɛ ɩka wʊ pɔɔ a wʊ ju ɛ, bojũu 'lɔ lɛ nyɛtãan a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a wʊ tɩɩr. Tɩchɛ ka a pɔɔ mɩ ɩ a sɩrɛ tɩɩr.

eng: Man didnt have his origin from woman, but woman from man.
local: Bojũu daba baa dɔ̃ɔ yi a pɔɔ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ pɔɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ yɩ a daba pɔ.

eng: These things were examples for us, so we wont crave evil things like they did.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a yele anyãna ɩn kpãafʊ gã, ɩka sɩ taa de a sɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ yelbier pɔ ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ ɩ ɛ.

eng: and man wasnt created for the sake of the woman, but the woman for the sake of the man.
local: Nãaŋmɩn mɩ ba dɔ̃ɔ mɛ daba pɔɔ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ mɛn pɔɔ daba jũu.

eng: However, for us believers, There is one God the Father. All things come from him, and we belong to him. And there is one Lord Jesus Christ. All things exist through him, and we live through him.
local: Tɩchɛ sɩn sɛ̃ 'lɔ, Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen, na ɩ a Sãa bʊ̃'yen, 'lɔ sɛ̃ lɛ a bonsɩ a jaa yi, 'lɔ jũu lɛ sɩ be be, Soro bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ bonsɩ a jaa tu wa, ka sɩ mɩ be be a wʊ jũu.

eng: Because of this a woman should have authority over her head, because of the angels.
local: A nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu nɩ a malakasɩ jũu, a pɔɔ sɛɛn ɩka wʊ tara a tʊ̃ɔfʊ jãnɛ a wʊ ju pɔ.

eng: But not everybody knows this. Some are eating this food as though it really is food sacrificed to a real idol, because they were used to idol worship until now. Their conscience is weak because it has been damaged.
local: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ jaa ba lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a anyãna ɛ. Nɩbɛ bamɩne chɛnɛ na mɩlʊ̃ nɩ a tɩbɛ, bala wa ɔɔrɔ nʊ̃n jaa, ba ma tɩɛr ɩka tɩɩ nʊ̃n lɛ, ka a ba tɩɛr na bal a lɛ jũu, ba ma sɔ̃ɔ naa.

eng: However, woman isnt independent from man, and man isnt independent from woman in the Lord.
local: A sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ, pɔɔ ba so wʊ mãɛ ɛ, daba mɩ ba so wʊ mãɛ ɛ.

eng: Dont worship false gods like some of them did, as it is written, The people sat down to eat and drink and they got up to play .
local: Yɩ taa puoro tɩbɛ nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ puor a tɩɩ ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, A nɩbɛ jɛ̃n na ba di na ba nyũ, tɩ pãa ir sɛ bãnɛ.

eng: Food wont bring us close to God. Were not missing out if we dont eat, and we dont have any advantage if we do eat.
local: Tɩchɛ bʊ̃diir kʊ̃ vɛ̃ ka sɩ gbʊr Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, sɩn di yele jaa ba ɩrɛ sɩ ɛ. Sɩn mɩ baa di ɛ, yele jaa ba ɩrɛ sɩ mɩ ɛ.

eng: Lets not practice sexual immorality, like some of them did, and twenty-three thousand died in one day.
local: Yɩ taa vɛ̃ nɛ ka sɩ wa sɛ̃nɛ nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ sɛ̃ kaar ɛ. A ba nɩbɛ turo lɩjaata dɔ̃ɔ lo kpi bɩbir bʊ̃'yen.

eng: But watch out or else this freedom of yours might be a problem for those who are weak.
local: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃ ka a lɛ yɩn maala nɩ a yɩ mãɛ sofʊ taa lɩɛb kʊsɩr bãraa kʊ a bala na ba kpɛ̃mɛ a ba sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ.

eng: As woman came from man so also man comes from woman. But everything comes from God.
local: Bojũu daba pɔ lɛ a pɔɔ yi, ka pɔɔ mɩ ma dɔɔ daba. Tɩchɛ a yele a jaa yin Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

eng: Suppose someone sees you eating in an idols temple. Wont the person with a weak conscience be encouraged to eat the meat sacrificed to false gods?.
local: Ala wa ɩ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na ba kpɛ̃mɛ a wʊ sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ, wa nyɛ naa a fʊ̃ʊ na tara a bɔ̃ɔfʊ nyãna a fʊ tɩ dire a tɩɩ yir, a mɩ kʊ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ ãkpɛ̃ɔ ka wʊ tɩ dire a ala ban lon a bɔɔr kʊ a tɩbɛ ɛ?.

eng: The weak brother or sister for whom Christ died is destroyed by your knowledge.
