local: Ala lɛ so a sɩ pɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn maal vɩla kpɛ̃ɛ nyã wʊn maal sɩ na wʊ kʊ sɩ a wʊ Binʊ̃nãa.

eng: We have been ransomed through his Sons blood, and we have forgiveness for our failures based on his overflowing grace.
local: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ sɩ nyɛ faafʊ tu a wʊ jãɩ jũu. Sɩ nyɛn vɛ̃ kʊfʊ, an ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ bɛrma naa.

eng: which he poured over us with wisdom and understanding.
local: Wʊ maal sɩn vɩla tɩ põn bar, na wʊ kʊ sɩ par bɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ yɛ̃ a jaa.

eng: God revealed his hidden design to us, which is according to his goodwill and the plan that he intended to accomplish through his Son.
local: An ɩ wʊ vɛ̃n ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔ a yelsɔɔlaa na be a wʊ tɩɛr pɔ, a ala wʊn bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ maal a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: This is what God planned for the climax of all times: to bring all things together in Christ, the things in heaven along with the things on earth.
local: Ka a ɩ sɩrɛ ɩka, wʊn kaal a bonsɩ a jaa na be a saaju nɩ ala na be ka a tẽe lɔ̃ɔ taa ka a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ bʊ̃'yen kaara ba, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: We have also received an inheritance in Christ. We were destined by the plan of God, who accomplishes everything according to his design.
local: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ Nãaŋmɩn ir sɩ, wʊ kãan ir sɩ a lɛ na ɩ a wʊ pʊtɩɛr na wʊn maal yele a jaa ka a ɩ a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ.

eng: We are called to be an honor to Gods glory because we were the first to hope in Christ.
local: A ɩ naa lɛ, ka a sɩn na ɩ a nɩdɔ̃ɔ na tara a Yesu a sɩ tɩɛrtɔ jie ka ban pɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: You too heard the word of truth in Christ, which is the good news of your salvation. You were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit because you believed in Christ.
local: A yɩn mɩ dɔ̃ɔ pʊɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ yɩn wõ a yelmãɛ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ, a 'yɛr nyã na ɩ a yɩ faafʊ 'yɛr. Yɩn wa sɔɔ de wʊ, Nãaŋmɩn den a wʊ Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ tɩr a nɛɛ 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ jãnɛ.

eng: The Holy Spirit is the down payment on our inheritance, which is applied toward our redemption as Gods own people, resulting in the honor of Gods glory.
local: A Sɩɛ nyã lɛ ɩ a tɛlma ɩka sɩn nyɛ naa ala Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ na wʊ faa a bala na ɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ a sɩ pɛɛrɛ wʊ.

eng: Since I heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all Gods people, this is the reason that.
local: A nyã jũu lɛ so, maa na wõ a yɩ yele a lɛ yɩn sɔɔ de a sɩ Soro Yesu nɩ a lɛ yɩn nʊ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ.

eng: I dont stop giving thanks to God for you when I remember you in my prayers.
local: N ma dãna na Nãaŋmɩn a yɩ jũu, naa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ yɩ.

eng: I pray that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, will give you a spirit of wisdom and revelation that makes God known to you.
local: Naa chɛnɛ sʊɔrɔ a tɩɩr Sãa, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na turo a wʊ nɛɛ ɩka wʊ kʊ yɩ a Sɩɛ yɛ̃, na wʊ wiil yɩ a wʊ mãɛ yelwiilsɩ, ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ wʊ jaa chɛchɛ.

eng: I pray that the eyes of your heart will have enough light to see what is the hope of Gods call, what is the richness of Gods glorious inheritance among believers.
local: N sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn ɩka wʊ chɩlʊ̃ a yɩ tɩɛr, ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a tɩɛrtɔ 'lɔ jũu wʊn bʊɔl yɩ, ka yɩ kʊ̃ tara baal ɛ, tɩ na yɩn tɩ de a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nãbomo wʊn tɩr nɛɛ kʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ.

eng: and what is the overwhelming greatness of Gods power that is working among us believers. This power is conferred by the energy of Gods powerful strength.
local: A wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ na gar a jaa kʊ a sɩn na sɔɔ de wʊ, a kpɛ̃ɔ nyãna lɛ wʊ tʊ̃n a kpɛ̃ɔ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

eng: Gods power was at work in Christ when God raised him from the dead and sat him at Gods right side in the heavens.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ wʊ de sãɩn a Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka wʊ jãnɛ a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ jie be a saaju.

eng: far above every ruler and authority and power and angelic power, any power that might be named not only now but in the future.
local: Wʊ gar a tʊ̃ɔfʊ a jaa, nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme, nɩ a sɩgãdaar ba jaa, nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ ba jaa, a ba ɩ a bala na be be a dɩna tɛɛ ɛ, tɩ a bala na wa be be daar kɔ̃ɔ.

eng: God put everything under Christs feet and made him head of everything in the church.
local: Nãaŋmɩn den a bomo a jaa bin a wʊ gbɛɛ pĩlem, na wʊ ir wʊ ka wʊ ɩ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba jaa ju.

eng: which is his body. His body, the church, is the fullness of Christ, who fills everything in every way.
local: na ɩ a wʊ ãgãn, ka ba sɛɛn wʊ jaa, 'lɔ lɛ sɛɛ ba jaa, a jiir a jaa.

eng: At one time you were like a dead person because of the things you did wrong and your offenses against God.
local: Yɩn 'lɔ, yɩ dɔ̃ɔ kpi be a yɩ maal dɛbɛ nɩ a yɩ yeldɛbɛ pɔ.

eng: You used to live like people of this world. You followed the rule of a destructive spiritual power. This is the spirit of disobedience to Gods will that is now at work in persons whose lives are characterized by disobedience.
local: ala pɔ lɛ yɩ dɔ̃ɔ be, na yɩ turo a wɛr nyã sɔɩ nɩ a 'lɔ na di a sɛsɛbɛ nãa Satan. A sɩɛ nyã lɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a bawõnsɩ pɔ.

eng: At one time you were like those persons. All of you used to do whatever felt good and whatever you thought you wanted so that you were children headed for punishment just like everyone else.
local: Sɩ jaa mɩ dɔ̃ɔ be a lɛ a ba kaar maala a lɛ a ãgãn na bʊɔrɔ, na sɩ turo a sɩ tɩɛr nɩ a ãgãn vɔlaa. Ka a Nãaŋmɩn suur mɩ dire nɩ sɩ a ba kaar.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: Tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbaal na waa jũu, ka wʊ nʊ̃ sɩ yɔɔ jaa.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: Wʊ maal sɩn ka sɩ 'mataa ir a Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ an ɩ sɩ dɔ̃ɔ kpi a yeldɛbɛ pɔ, a wʊ wãɛfʊ lɛ wʊ faan sɩ.

eng: And God raised us up and seated us in the heavens with Christ Jesus.
local: Nãaŋmɩn 'mantaa sãɩn sɩ nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto ka sɩ 'mataa jãnɛ nɩ wʊ be a saaju.

eng: God did this to show future generations the greatness of his grace by the goodness that God has shown us in Christ Jesus.
local: A ɩ naa nɩtɔ̃ ɩka a ber ala na waara ka wʊ na wiil sɩ a wʊ wãɛfʊ na bɛr ma nɩ a wʊ maal vɩla a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: You are saved by Gods grace because of your faith. This salvation is Gods gift. Its not something you possessed.
local: Bojũu a wʊ wãɛfʊ lɛ so yɩn nyɛ faafʊ tu a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, a ba yi a yɩ mãɛ sɛ̃ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ lɛ.

eng: Its not something you did that you can be proud of.
local: A ba ɩ yɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ kɔ̃ɔ lɛ ka ãsʊɔ na chɛ nyãa ɛ.

eng: Instead, we are Gods accomplishment, created in Christ Jesus to do good things. God planned for these good things to be the way that we live our lives.
local: Sɩ ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn nũu bʊ̃maalsɩ wʊn mɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka sɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ tʊ̃sʊ̃n ala wʊn de nie chɔɔr bar ka sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃.

eng: So remember that once you were Gentiles by physical descent, who were called uncircumcised by Jews who are physically circumcised.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ tɩɛr kaa a kõro a yɩn na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ka a Juu nɩbɛ bʊɔlɔ yɩ a, yɔrwʊʊr dẽme, tɩ bʊɔlɔ a ba mãɛ a yɔrŋmaar dẽme, na ɩ a ãgãn nyã tɛɛ yele.

eng: At that time you were without Christ. You were aliens rather than citizens of Israel, and strangers to the covenants of Gods promise. In this world you had no hope and no God.
local: Yɩ tɩɛr kaa a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩka yaa bɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto ɛ, ka yɩn yaa mɩ pʊɔ a Isɩral nɩbɛ pɔ ɛ, na yaa pʊɔ a nɛtɩrsɩ ala a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ. Yaa tara tɩɛrtɔ jie ɛ, na yaa lɛ bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

eng: But now, thanks to Christ Jesus, you who once were so far away have been brought near by the blood of Christ.
local: Yɩn bala na dɔ̃ɔ jãa tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, yɩ wa gbʊr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na yɩ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ jãɩ jũu.

eng: Christ is our peace. He made both Jews and Gentiles into one group. With his body, he broke down the barrier of hatred that divided us.
local: Bojũu, a Yesu mãɛ lɛ ɩ a sɩ nyã'maar, na wʊ maal a nɩbʊrsɩ ayi ka ba ɩ bʊ̃'yen, na wʊ ŋmɛr a dachin 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ var a sɩ ɩ a dɔ̃dẽme.

eng: He canceled the detailed rules of the Law so that he could create one new person out of the two groups, making peace.
local: A Juu nɩbɛ nɛbinãa tara na chire yɔɔ, tɩchɛ Kɩrɩsɩto kũu sɔ̃ɔn a jaa. A wʊ bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka wʊ vɛ̃ ka a Juu nɩbɛ nɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɩ nɩpaalaa bʊ̃'yen, lɛ lɛ wʊ maal a nyã'maar.

eng: He reconciled them both as one body to God by the cross, which ended the hostility to God.
local: Wʊ 'maal Nãaŋmɩn kʊ ba ka ba ɩ bʊ̃'yen. A kũu wʊn kpi a daa ju lɛ wʊ de kʊn a ba 'laar taa.

eng: When he came, he announced the good news of peace to you who were far away from God and to those who were near.
local: Wʊ wa mʊɔl naa a nyã'maar 'yɛr kʊ yɩn bala na jãa nɩ a bala na gbʊr.

eng: We both have access to the Father through Christ by the one Spirit.
local: Bojũu a tu naa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka sɩ tara sɔr na ta a Sãa sɛ̃ nɩ a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃.

eng: So now you are no longer strangers and aliens. Rather, you are fellow citizens with Gods people, and you belong to Gods household.
local: A lɛ jũu, yaa lɛ chɛnɛ ɩ sãanba nɩ nɩyʊɔrsɩ go ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ lɔ̃ɔn tẽe na yɩ ɩ a wʊ yir dẽme.

eng: As Gods household, you are built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets with Christ Jesus himself as the cornerstone.
local: Ba mɩ mɛn dɔɔl a dachin par kparaa na ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ nɩ a 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ, ka a Yesu ɩ a sãlsɔɔ wɛɛ.

eng: The whole building is joined together in him, and it grows up into a temple that is dedicated to the Lord.
local: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a yir wʊ jaa choo taa na wʊ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir chɛchɛ 'lɔ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Christ is building you into a place where God lives through the Spirit.
local: Bojũu yɩ jaa ɩ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊɔr, ka wʊ mɩ mɛ yɩ 'matãan a yir nyã pɔ, ka Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kpɩɛrɛ.

eng: This is why I, Paul, am a prisoner of Christ for you Gentiles.
local: Bon nɩ so ka n sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ yɩ lɛ ɩka, n ben pɔɔfʊ die pɔ bojũu ɩn mʊɔl a Yesu yele kʊ a yɩn na ba ɩ Juu nɩbɛ ɛ.

eng: Youve heard, of course, about the responsibility to distribute Gods grace, which God gave to me for you, right?.
local: Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ yɩ wõ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ wʊn kʊ ma a tʊ̃mɔ̃ nyãna a yɩ jũu.

eng: God showed me his secret plan in a revelation, as I mentioned briefly before .
local: A yelsɔɔlaa nyã lɛ wʊ wiil ma ka n bɔ̃ɔ naa de nie sɛb a ŋmaa kʊ yɩ.

eng: when you read this, youll understand my insight into the secret plan about Christ.
local: Yɩn wa kar a ala, yɩn pãa bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ ɩn bɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto yelsɔɔlaa ala nɩrɛ na ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: Earlier generations didnt know this hidden plan that God has now revealed to his holy apostles and prophets through the Spirit.
local: Nãaŋmɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka a kõr dẽme bɔ̃ɔ a anyãna ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã wʊ wiil kʊ a wʊ nɩtʊ̃nsɩ chɛchɛsɩ nɩ a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ chɛchɛsɩ tu a wʊ Sɩɛ pɔ.

eng: This plan is that the Gentiles would be coheirs and parts of the same body, and that they would share with the Jews in the promises of God in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: A yelsɔɔlaa nɩ nyã ɩka a tu naa a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã pɔ, ka a yɩn na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, nɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ na lɔ̃ɔn ŋmabʊ̃'yen, na ba 'mataa a ãgãn bʊ̃'yen pɔ, ka ban 'mataa põ a nɛɛ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: I became a servant of the gospel because of the grace that God showed me through the exercise of his power.
local: N lɩɛb a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ tu a kʊfʊ nyã a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ na wʊ kʊ ma tu a wʊ tʊ̃kpãɛn pɔ.

eng: God gave his grace to me, the least of all Gods people, to preach the good news about the immeasurable riches of Christ to the Gentiles.
local: An ɩ maa lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa bɩr baaraa tɩchɛ ka a wãɛfʊ nyã kʊ ma sɔr ɩka n mʊɔl a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, nɩrɛ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: God sent me to reveal the secret plan that had been hidden since the beginning of time by God, who created everything.
local: ka n vɛ̃ ka a yelsɔɔlaa nyã chaar kʊ nɩrɛ jaa an ɩ a dɔ̃ɔ sɔɔl a kõr jaa a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ na maal a bonsɩ a jaa.

eng: Gods purpose is now to show the rulers and powers in the heavens the many different varieties of his wisdom through the church.
local: A wʊ bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka a pʊ̃pãanyã, wʊ tu a pupuorbiir pɔ wiil a wʊ yɛ̃ ka a tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme, nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme na be a saaju bɔ̃ɔn.

eng: This was consistent with the plan he had from the beginning of time that he accomplished through Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: A anyãna lɛ wʊ tɩɛr a kõr jaa na wʊ wa de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto a sɩ Soro na wʊ maal a wɛr.

eng: In Christ we have bold and confident access to God through faith in him.
local: Tu a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn sɔɔ de wʊ jũu, sɔr gãn kʊ sɩ a sɩn 'la chen a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

eng: So then, I ask you not to become discouraged by what Im suffering for you, which is your glory.
local: A lɛ jũu n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka yɩ ãgãn sal ɩn dire dɔɔyɛ a yɩ jũu ɛ, a ɩ naa a yɩ tɩɩr yele lɛ.

eng: This is why I kneel before the Father.
local: A anyãna jũu lɛ n ma de gbur dumo a Sãa niem.

eng: Every ethnic group in heaven or on earth is recognized by him.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ a balsɩ ba jaa Sãa, a bala na be a saaju nɩ a ba nyã na be ka a wɛr pɔ.

eng: I ask that he will strengthen you in your inner selves from the riches of his glory through the Spirit.
local: N sʊɔrɔ wʊ naa ɩka a yi a wʊ tɩɩr pɔ, ka wʊ de a wʊ Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ ãkpãɛn, a yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ a ãgãn pʊɔm.

eng: I ask that Christ will live in your hearts through faith. As a result of having strong roots in love.
local: ka a Kɩrɩsɩto kpɩɛrɛ a yɩ nyãa pɔ, yɩn sɔɔ de wʊ jũu. A n sʊɔrfʊ lɛ ɩka, yɩ ba nyɩbɛ ara jaa chãchã a nʊ̃fʊ pɔ.

eng: I ask that youll have the power to grasp loves width and length, height and depth, together with all believers.
local: a yɩn nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ na 'mataa nyɛ a lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto nʊ̃fʊ na yalʊ̃, nɩ a wʊ wõo, nɩ a dofʊ, nɩ a lɛ wʊn suu a pĩlem.

eng: I ask that youll know the love of Christ that is beyond knowledge so that you will be filled entirely with the fullness of God.
local: na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a nʊ̃fʊ na gar a bɔ̃ɔfʊsɩ a jaa, a yɩ pãa be a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na be.

eng: Glory to God, who is able to do far beyond all that we could ask or imagine by his power at work within us.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a 'lɔ na ma tʊ̃ɔ maal yele a jaa gar a lɛ sɩn sʊɔr wʊ, bɩɩ a lɛ sɩn tɩɛr nɩtãa lɛ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ na tʊ̃nɔ̃ a sɩ pɔ.

eng: glory to him in the church and in Christ Jesus for all generations, forever and always. Amen.
local: 'lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr a pupuorbiir pɔ, nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: Therefore, as a prisoner for the Lord, I encourage you to live as people worthy of the call you received from God.
local: Ala lɛ so a maa ban pɔɔ a die pɔ a sɩ Soro jũu kpãkpãana yɩ ɩka, yɩ vɛ̃ ka a yɩ kpɛfʊ vɩɛlɛ nyɛtãan lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl yɩ.

eng: Conduct yourselves with all humility, gentleness, and patience. Accept each other with love.
local: Yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ na yɩ bal yɩ mãɛ, na yɩ tara kãnyir, na yɩ diere taa nɩ nʊ̃fʊ.

eng: and make an effort to preserve the unity of the Spirit with the peace that ties you together.
local: Yɩ mɔ̃ na yɩ vɛ̃ ka a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen ɩfʊ 'lɔ pɔ, a yɩ tara taa nɩ nyã'maar.

eng: You are one body and one spirit, just as God also called you in one hope.
local: Bojũu ãgãn bʊ̃'yen lɛ be be, nɩ a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen, nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl yɩ, ka yɩ tara tɩɛrtɔ jie bʊ̃'yen.

eng: There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism.
local: Soro bʊ̃'yen lɛ be be, sɔɔfʊ bʊ̃'yen nɩ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ bʊ̃'yen.

eng: and one God and Father of all, who is over all, through all, and in all.
local: Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ, na wʊ ɩ a sɩ jaa Sãa, na wʊ kaara nɩrɛ jaa, na wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a ba jaa jie, na wʊ be a ba jaa pɔ.

eng: God has given his grace to each one of us measured out by the gift that is given by Christ.
local: Tɩchɛ a sɩ ãsʊɔ jaa nyɛn a wãɛfʊ kʊfʊ dẽdẽme nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na põ.

eng: Thats why scripture says, When he climbed up to the heights, he captured prisoners, and he gave gifts to people .
local: A anyãna lɛ so an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ naa 'yɛr, A lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ do, a wʊ sãma dẽme wʊn nyɔɔr turo wʊ naa, ka wʊ de bomo kʊ nɩbɛ.

eng: What does the phrase he climbed up mean if it doesnt mean that he had first gone down into the lower regions, the earth?.
local: A dofʊ par nɩ bo? Wʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ de nie suu a tẽe pɔ.

eng: The one who went down is the same one who climbed up above all the heavens so that he might fill everything.
local: A 'lɔ na suu, 'lɔ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ do gar a saaju wʊ jaa, na wʊ sɛɛ a bonsɩ a jaa.

eng: He gave some apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ põ a nɩbɛ a tʊ̃mɔ̃, ka bamɩne ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ, ka bamɩne ɩ a 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ, ka a bamɩne ɩ a 'yɛr mʊɔlbɔ, ka bamɩne mɩ kaara a nɩbɛ na ba wile ba.

eng: His purpose was to equip Gods people for the work of serving and building up the body of Christ.
local: Wʊ maal a nɩtɔ̃ ɩka wʊ chɔɔr a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ gun a tʊ̃mɔ̃, ka a Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn na tʊ̃ɔ mɛ.

eng: until we all reach the unity of faith and knowledge of Gods Son. Gods goal is for us to become mature adults—to be fully grown, measured by the standard of the fullness of Christ.
local: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ na vɛ̃ ka sɩ jaa na ɩ bʊ̃'yen a sɔɔfʊ pɔ, na sɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, na sɩ baa tɩ ta a lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na be.

eng: As a result, we arent supposed to be infants any longer who can be tossed and blown around by every wind that comes from teaching with deceitful scheming and the tricks people play to deliberately mislead others.
local: Sɩ kʊ̃ lɛ pãa chɛnɛ ɩ nɩtãa bibiir vavire yʊɔrɔ kɔ̃sɛbɛ kaar ɛ. Na sɩ ma dãdaal chen a puor nɩ a niem wiilfʊ jaa bʊrɔ nɩbɛ na de a ba yɛ̃ na ba bɛlɛ nɩ ɛ.

eng: Instead, by speaking the truth with love, lets grow in every way into Christ.
local: Tɩchɛ sɩn 'yɛrɛ na yelmãɛ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ na sɩn nʊ̃ɔn a yele a jaa pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a ju na ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: who is the head. The whole body grows from him, as it is joined and held together by all the supporting ligaments. The body makes itself grow in that it builds itself up with love as each one does its part.
local: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a ãgãn wʊ jaa choofʊ jiir choo taa, naa tʊ̃ɔ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ a nʊ̃fʊ pɔ, ka ãsʊɔ jaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

eng: So Im telling you this, and I insist on it in the Lord: you shouldnt live your life like the Gentiles anymore. They base their lives on pointless thinking.
local: Lɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ naa de a sɩ Soro yuor kpãkpãana ɩka, yɩ ta lɛ chɛnɛ maala fɩka a bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na maala turo nɩ a ba tɩɛr bur bur ɛ.

eng: and they are in the dark in their reasoning. They are disconnected from Gods life because of their ignorance and their closed hearts.
local: A ba tɩɛr lĩi naa ka baa pʊɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nyɛvʊr pɔ ɛ, bojũu a ba ba bɔ̃ɔfʊ yin a ba nyãkpãɛn ban tara.

eng: They are people who lack all sense of right and wrong, and who have turned themselves over to doing whatever feels good and to practicing every sort of corruption along with greed.
local: Ba ɩ naa ba bãma dẽme, na ba de a ba mãɛ kʊ pepe yele, na ba pãa irɛ a ala a jaa na ba vɩɛl ɛ, tɩ chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ yaa.

eng: But you didnt learn that sort of thing from Christ.
local: Yɩn 'lɔ, a ba ɩ a sɔr nyã lɛ yɩ de bɔ̃ɔn a Kɩrɩsɩto ɛ.

eng: Since you really listened to him and you were taught how the truth is in Jesus.
local: Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ ɩka yɩn wõ a wʊ 'yɛr, ba wiil yɩ naa a yelmãɛ na be a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: change the former way of life that was part of the person you once were, corrupted by deceitful desires.
local: Ba wiil yɩ naa a lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ maala ɩka, yɩ yaa a kõr maalfʊ 'lɔ bar na bɛl yɩ nɩ a wʊ vɔlaa.

eng: Instead, renew the thinking in your mind by the Spirit.
local: tɩ na yɩ ɩ nɩpaalaa a yɩ befʊ nɩ a yɩ tɩɛr pɔ.

eng: and clothe yourself with the new person created according to Gods image in justice and true holiness.
local: Yɩ de a be paalaa 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na maal a wʊ kaar na yɩ su, a ɩ naa yelmãɛ torfʊ nɩ chɛchɛ.

eng: Therefore, after you have gotten rid of lying, Each of you must tell the truth to your neighbor because we are parts of each other in the same body.
local: A lɛ jũu, ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ bar jir ŋmaafʊ tɩ 'yɛrɛ yelmãɛ kʊrɔ a wʊ taaba, bojũu sɩ jaa ben a ãgãn bʊ̃'yen pɔ.

eng: Be angry without sinning. Dont let the sun set on your anger.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ wa nyɛ suur taa maal dɛɛr ɛ. Ta vɛ̃ ka a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ mʊr pɔɔ fʊ nɩ a suur ɛ.

eng: Dont provide an opportunity for the devil.
local: Yɩ taa yuoro sɔr kʊrɔ a Satan a wʊ bɛl yɩ ɛ.

eng: Thieves should no longer steal. Instead, they should go to work, using their hands to do good so that they will have something to share with whoever is in need.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ juro, wʊ ta ma lɛ juro ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma tʊ̃nɔ̃ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala na tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a wʊ nuur na wʊ nyɛ bʊ̃kɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ ir sʊ̃ʊn a nɔ̃n dẽme.

eng: Dont let any foul words come out of your mouth. Only say what is helpful when it is needed for building up the community so that it benefits those who hear what you say.
local: Yɩ taa vɛ̃ ka a 'yɛr sɔ̃ɔnsɩ yire a yɩ nɛɛr pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ 'yɛrsɩ ala na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yɩ taaba ãkpãɛn ala ɩ yele kɔ̃ɔ fɛr ba naa, naa mɩ ɩ sʊ̃ʊfʊ kʊ a bala na chɛlɛ.

eng: Dont make the Holy Spirit of God unhappy—you were sealed by him for the day of redemption.
local: Na yɩ taa vɛ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, 'lɔ wʊn de 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ a jãnɛ gun a faafʊ bɩbir.

eng: Put aside all bitterness, losing your temper, anger, shouting, and slander, along with every other evil.
local: Yɩ ir putuo, pʊɔm 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ suur, tãn taa, nɩ tʊfʊ, nɩ 'laarfʊ 'yɛrbie.

eng: Be kind, compassionate, and forgiving to each other, in the same way God forgave you in Christ.
local: Yɩ maala vɩla na yɩ kaara taa nɩbaal, na yɩ vɛ̃nɛ kʊrɔ taa nɩtãa lɛ Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃ kʊ yɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

eng: Therefore, imitate God like dearly loved children.
local: Yɩ tɔɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn an ɩ yɩ ɩ naa a wʊ binʊ̃nsɩ.

eng: Live your life with love, following the example of Christ, who loved us and gave himself for us. He was a sacrificial offering that smelled sweet to God.
local: na yɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na nʊ̃ sɩ na wʊ de a wʊ mãɛ maal a sɩ bɔɔrlo bon na nyuro vɩla lon a bɔɔr ka a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ pɛl.

eng: Sexual immorality, and any kind of impurity or greed, shouldnt even be mentioned among you, which is right for holy persons.
local: Tɩchɛ a yɩ pɔ, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka ba wa pʊr sɛ̃sɛ̃yele, bɩɩ folaa ɩfʊ, bɩɩ bɔgarfʊ ɛ, bojũu a anyãna ba sɛɛn a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ chɛchɛsɩ ɛ.

eng: Obscene language, silly talk, or vulgar jokes arent acceptable for believers. Instead, there should be thanksgiving.
local: Yɩ taa lɛ 'yɛrɛ vã 'yɛrbie ɛ, bɩɩ jɔl 'yɛr, bɩɩ jɔl dãɛn ɛ, ala po naa, tɩchɛ yɩ dãna Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: Because you know for sure that persons who are sexually immoral, impure, or greedy—which happens when things become gods—those persons wont inherit the kingdom of Christ and God.
local: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a anyãna sɩrɛ jaa ɩka nɩrɛ na sɛ̃nɛ, nɩfolaa, bɔgar sʊɔ, wʊ ɩ naa nɩrɛ na puoro tɩbɛ, na wʊ kʊ̃ nyɛ jie be a Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ.

eng: Nobody should deceive you with stupid ideas. Gods anger comes down on those who are disobedient because of this kind of thing.
local: Yɩ taa vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa bɛl yɩ nɩ 'yɛr pɔrsɩ ɛ, bojũu anyãna lɛ so ka Nãaŋmɩn su tuo waara a bawõnsɩ jie.

eng: So you shouldnt have anything to do with them.
local: A lɛ jũu yɩ taa mara ba ɛ.

eng: You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord, so live your life as children of light.
local: Bojũu yɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ libe, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ ɩ naa chãa a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ. Yɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩtãa a chãa bibiir.

eng: Light produces fruit that consists of every sort of goodness, justice, and truth.
local: A chãa wɔ̃mɔ̃ ɩ naa vɩla maalfʊ, yeltorsɩ nɩ yelmãɛ.

eng: Therefore, test everything to see whats pleasing to the Lord.
local: Yɩ mɔ̃ na yɩ jãn a ala na pɛlɛ a sɩ Soro pʊɔ.

eng: and dont participate in the unfruitful actions of darkness. Instead, you should reveal the truth about them.
local: Na yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa pʊɔrɔ a libe tʊ̃mɔ̃ na ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ yin naa chãa pɔ.

eng: Its embarrassing to even talk about what certain persons do in secret.
local: Bojũu a gba ma ɩrɛ na vã a ala a bawõnsɩ na ma maala a libe pɔ manfʊ.

eng: But everything exposed to the light is revealed by the light.
local: Tɩchɛ bon jaa wa yi chãa pɔ, fʊ ma nyɛn wʊn chaar.

eng: Everything that is revealed by the light is light. Therefore, it says, Wake up, sleeper! Get up from the dead, and Christ will shine on you. .
local: Bojũu chãa lɛ ma vɛ̃ ka fʊ nyɛ bon jaa chɛchɛ. Ala lɛ so a ba 'yɛr, A fʊ̃ʊ gʊ̃ɔ sʊɔ, jɛɔ ir a kũu pɔ, ka a Kɩrɩsɩto chaar 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ.

eng: So be careful to live your life wisely, not foolishly.
local: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃ a lɛ yɩn kpɩɛrɛ, ka a ta ɩ jɔl kpɛfʊ tɩchɛ ka a ɩ yɛ̃ kpɛfʊ.

eng: Take advantage of every opportunity because these are evil times.
local: Na yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir yɩn wa nyɛ jie ka wʊ ta sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, bojũu a bɩbie anyãna ba vɩɛlɛ ɛ.

eng: Because of this, dont be ignorant, but understand the Lords will.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta ɩ jɔlɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a ala a sɩ Soro na bʊɔrɔ.

eng: Dont get drunk on wine, which produces depravity. Instead, be filled with the Spirit in the following ways.
local: Yɩ ta nyũ dãa buu ɛ, an sɔ̃ɔ yɩn ju, tɩ yɩ vɛ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛɛ yɩ.

eng: speak to each other with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; sing and make music to the Lord in your hearts.
local: Na yɩ yiele a Nãaŋmɩn yiel nɩ a ala na ɩ a Sɩɛ yiel kʊrɔ taa, na yɩ yiele dãnfʊ yiel nɩ a yɩ nyãa wʊ jaa kʊrɔ a sɩ Soro.

eng: always give thanks to God the Father for everything in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Yɩ ma dãna a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn yele a jaa pɔ, nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor.

eng: and submit to each other out of respect for Christ.
local: Yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ taa a Kɩrɩsɩto yɩn 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ jũu.

eng: For example, wives should submit to their husbands as if to the Lord.
local: Pɔbɔ, yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a yɩ sɩrbɛ, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro.

eng: A husband is the head of his wife like Christ is head of the church, that is, the savior of the body.
local: Bojũu an ɩ a sɩrɛ lɛ ɩ a pɔɔ ju, nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a pupuorbiir ju, na ɩ a wʊ ãgãn na wʊ ɩ a Fafaara.

eng: So wives submit to their husbands in everything like the church submits to Christ.
local: A lɛ jũu, lɛ a pupuorbiir na siir a ba mãɛ kʊ a Kɩrɩsɩto, lɛ lɛ a pɔbɔ mɩ, yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ kʊ a yɩ sɩrbɛ yele a jaa pɔ.

eng: As for husbands, love your wives just like Christ loved the church and gave himself for her.
local: Sɩrbɛ, yɩ nʊ̃ a yɩ pɔbɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na nʊ̃ a pupuorbiir na wʊ de a wʊ mãɛ kʊ ba.

eng: He did this to make her holy by washing her in a bath of water with the word.
local: wʊ maal ban a lɛ ka ban ɩ chɛchɛ, na wʊ de kʊ̃ɔ pɛɛn ba ka ba vɩɛlɛ nɩ a 'yɛr.

eng: He did this to present himself with a splendid church, one without any sort of stain or wrinkle on her clothes, but rather one that is holy and blameless.
local: Wʊ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka wʊ de a pupuorbiir banyã na vɩɛlɛ kʊ a wʊ mãɛ, na waa tara jãnɛ ɛ, 'mabfʊ jie ɛ, bɩɩ dɛɛr jie jaa ɛ, tɩchɛ a ba ɩ chɛchɛ ba tara yele jaa ɛ.

eng: Thats how husbands ought to love their wives—in the same way as they do their own bodies. Anyone who loves his wife loves himself.
local: A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a yɩn sɩrbɛ, yɩ nʊ̃ a yɩ pɔbɔ, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn nʊ̃ a yɩ mãɛ ãgãma. A 'lɔ na nʊ̃ a wʊ pɔɔ nʊ̃n a wʊ mãɛ.

eng: No one ever hates his own body, but feeds it and takes care of it just like Christ does for the church.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa ba be na 'laar a wʊ mãɛ ãgãn ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma kʊrɔ wʊn bʊ̃diir na wʊ kaara wʊ, lɛ lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto kaara a pupuorbiir.

eng: because we are parts of his body.
local: Bojũu sɩ ɩ naa a wʊ ãgãn jiir.

eng: This is why a man will leave his father and mother and be united with his wife, and the two of them will be one body .
local: A lɛ jũu, daba na bar a wʊ sãa nɩ a wʊ ma, tɩchɛ ka 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ pɔɔ ɩ bʊ̃'yen, ka ba jaa ayi ɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen.

eng: Marriage is a significant allegory, and Im applying it to Christ and the church.
local: A anyã ɩ naa a 'yɛr sɔɔlaa, tɩchɛ maa 'yɛrɛ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a pupuorbiir 'yɛr.

eng: In any case, as for you individually, each one of you should love his wife as himself, and wives should respect their husbands.
local: A yɩn mɩ gba, ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ ma nʊ̃ a wʊ pɔɔ nɩtãa lɛ wʊn nʊ̃ a wʊ mãɛ, ka a pɔɔ mɩ ma 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ sɩrɛ.

eng: As for children, obey your parents in the Lord, because it is right.
local: Bibiir, yɩn be a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ, yɩ wõnõ a yɩ dɔɔrbɔ toor, a lɛ lɛ tor.

eng: The commandment Honor your father and mother is the first one with a promise attached.
local: A lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ kʊ a wʊ nɛɛ, a nɛɛ nyã lɛ ɩ a nɛdɔ̃ɔ wʊn tɩr, 'Yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a fʊ sãa nɩ a fʊ ma.

eng: so that things will go well for you, and you will live for a long time in the land .
local: an ɩn vɩla kʊ fʊ, a fʊ wõ nʊ̃ɔ kor ka a wɛr pɔ.

eng: As for parents, dont provoke your children to anger, but raise them with discipline and instruction about the Lord.
local: Sãamɩne yɩ taa maala a yɩ bibiir ka ba nyɛrɛ suur ɛ, tɩ yɩ guolo ba, na yɩ jãna ba, wile nɩ ba a ala na yi a sɩ Soro sɛ̃.

eng: As for slaves, obey your human masters with fear and trembling and with sincere devotion to Christ.
local: Gbãgbaar yɩ wõnõ a yɩ sorbo toor na yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba tɩ joro ba nɩ a yɩ pʊpɛl nɩtãa lɛ yɩn wõnõ a Kɩrɩsɩto toor.

eng: Dont work to make yourself look good and try to flatter people, but act like slaves of Christ carrying out Gods will from the heart.
local: Yɩ wõnõ a ba toor ka a ta ɩ ban fur nɩbir 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ir nyãa 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ yɩn ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto gbãgbaar na yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

eng: Serve your owners enthusiastically, as though you were serving the Lord and not human beings.
local: Yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ pʊpɛl fɩka a sɩ Soro Yesu yɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ, a ta ɩ nɩsaal lɛ ɛ.

eng: You know that the Lord will reward every person who does what is right, whether that person is a slave or a free person.
local: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩ Soro na yab ãsʊɔ jaa lɛ wʊn tʊ̃ a vɩla jã, ka gbãgbaa lɛ wʊ ɩ bɩɩ waa ɩ gbãgbaa ɛ.

eng: As for masters, treat your slaves in the same way. Stop threatening them, because you know that both you and your slaves have a master in heaven. He doesnt distinguish between people on the basis of status.
local: A yɩn sorbo, yɩ mɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ nɛ kʊrɔ a yɩ gbãgbaar. Yɩ ta pirpire ba ɛ, na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a 'lɔ na ɩ a ba Soro mɩ lɛ ɩ a yɩ Soro na wʊ be a saaju, 'lɔ lɛ ba turo nʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

eng: Finally, be strengthened by the Lord and his powerful strength.
local: A baaraa lɛ ɩka yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ a wʊ tʊ̃ɔfʊ kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ.

eng: Put on Gods armor so that you can make a stand against the tricks of the devil.
local: Yɩ de a Nãaŋmɩn tãjɛbonsɩ a jaa su na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ ara jɛb a tɩɩ nɛbɛr.

eng: We arent fighting against human enemies but against rulers, authorities, forces of cosmic darkness, and spiritual powers of evil in the heavens.
local: Bojũu a ba ɩ sɩn nɩ nɩsaal lɛ jɛɛrɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ jɛɛrɛ nɩ naa a sɩɩr tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme, nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme, nɩ a wɛr nyã libe kpãɛn dẽme, nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ ala na be a saaju.

eng: Therefore, pick up the full armor of God so that you can stand your ground on the evil day and after you have done everything possible to still stand.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ de a Nãaŋmɩn tãjɛbonsɩ a jaa su, ka a bɩbir bier 'lɔ wa vɩɛ, ka yɩ ba gbɛr, na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ jɛb a jɛɛr baar tɩ na yɩ chɛnɛ ara.

eng: So stand with the belt of truth around your waist, justice as your breastplate.
local: Yɩ pãa ara kpɛ̃ɔ, na yɩ de a yelmãɛ ka wʊ ɩ a sɩɛ gãn a yɩ sɛ, na yɩ de torfʊ ka wʊ ɩ a nyãa wɩɛ.

eng: and put shoes on your feet so that you are ready to spread the good news of peace.
local: na yɩ 'mi'mine a nyã'maar 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a ɩ a yɩ gbɛɛ nafɔɔr.

eng: Above all, carry the shield of faith so that you can extinguish the flaming arrows of the evil one.
local: A 'lɔ na pʊɔ a jaa pɔ nɩ nyã ɩka, yɩ de a yɩ bʊ̃piiraa na ɩ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ de kpĩin a dɛɛr sʊɔ pĩme na 'lɩrɛ.

eng: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is Gods word.
local: Yɩ de a kur jupil su, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a yɩ faafʊ, nɩ a sɔkpɛ̃ɛ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛ̃, na wʊ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr.

eng: Offer prayers and petitions in the Spirit all the time. Stay alert by hanging in there and praying for all believers.
local: Na yɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn lɛ a wʊ Sɩɛ na wiil yɩ sɔ̃ɔ jaa, nɩ sʊɔrfʊ jaa bʊrɔ. Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir jʊrɔ na yɩ sʊɔrɔ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ a wʊ nɩbɛ ba jaa.

eng: As for me, pray that when I open my mouth, Ill get a message that confidently makes this secret plan of the gospel known.
local: Yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ma, ka maa wa haara a nɛɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn kʊ ma a wʊ 'yɛrbie ka n taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ, tɩ na n 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã yelsɔɔlaa.

eng: Im an ambassador in chains for the sake of the gospel. Pray so that the Lord will give me the confidence to say what I have to say.
local: A Yesu 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã ɩn ara kʊ jũu lɛ so, ka ba 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ. Yɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ma ka n taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ, tɩ 'yɛrɛ a lɛ na sɛɛ.

eng: Tychicus, my loved brother and faithful servant of the Lord, can inform you about my situation and what Im doing.
local: Tɩchɩkusɩ na ɩ a yɛbɛ nʊ̃ naa na wʊ tara yelmãɛ nɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃. Wʊn man yele jaa kʊ yɩ, ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ ɩn be nɩ a lɛ ɩn ma maala.

eng: Ive sent him for this reason—so that you will know about us. He can reassure you.
local: A anyãna jũu lɛ n tʊ̃n wʊ a yɩ sɛ̃, ka yɩn bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ sɩn be tɩ na wʊ mɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ ãkpãɛn.

eng: May there be peace with the brothers and sisters as well as love with the faith that comes from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩn na ɩ a yɛɛr sɛ̃, nɩ nʊ̃fʊ lɔ̃ɔn sɔɔfʊ na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Wãɛfʊ wʊ be a bala jaa na nʊ̃ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ na ba baaraa ɛ.

eng: From Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus. To all those in Philippi who are Gods people in Christ Jesus, along with your supervisors and servants.
local: Maa Pɔɔl nɩ Timoti na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ, lɛ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ be a Filipai, lɔ̃ɔn a pupuorbiir nɩdierbe nɩ a sʊ̃sʊ̃nbɔ.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: N ma puor a n Nãaŋmɩn yãan, maa wa tɩɛr yɩ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

eng: Im thankful for all of you every time I pray, and its always a prayer full of joy.
local: N ma sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn nɩ pʊpɛl kʊrɔ a yɩ jaa a n Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ.

eng: Im glad because of the way you have been my partners in the ministry of the gospel from the time you first believed it until now.
local: bojũu yɩ mɩ pʊɔ man mʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir tɔtaa a bɩbir dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, tɩ tãn a pʊ̃pãanyã.

eng: Im sure about this: the one who started a good work in you will stay with you to complete the job by the day of Christ Jesus.
local: A nɩtɔ̃ jũu, n tara na sɔɔfʊ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na piel a tʊ̃vɩla a yɩ pɔ, na kãan ka a tɩ baar a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa bɩbir.

eng: I have good reason to think this way about all of you because I keep you in my heart. You are all my partners in Gods grace, both during my time in prison and in the defense and support of the gospel.
local: A tara na sɔr ɩka n tɩɛr a nɩtɔ̃ a yɩ jaa jũu, ɩn tara a yɩ tɩɛr jũu, ka ba lũ man nɩ bɔ̃jɔrsɩ bɩɩ, baa lũ ma ɛ, n chɛnɛ na mana a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩka a ɩn yelmãɛ, yɩ jaa lɔ̃ɔ põn ma a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ.

eng: God is my witness that I feel affection for all of you with the compassion of Christ Jesus.
local: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ɩ a n dãasɩɛ sʊɔ a lɛ ɩn tara a yɩ tɩɛr fɩka a lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na tara a yɩ tɩɛr.

eng: This is my prayer: that your love might become even more and more rich with knowledge and all kinds of insight.
local: Maa Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ nɩ nyã ɩka, a yɩ nʊ̃ taa wʊ lɛ pʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɔɔ jaa, nɩ yɛ̃ nɩ par bɔ̃ɔfʊ.

eng: I pray this so that you will be able to decide what really matters and so you will be sincere and blameless on the day of Christ.
local: Yɩn wa ɩrɛ a lɛ, an sʊ̃ʊ yɩ na ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ bon 'lɔ na ɩ bʊ̃sʊ̃, ka a Kɩrɩsɩto waa bɩbir, ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ tɩ na yɩ ta tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ.

eng: I pray that you will then be filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes from Jesus Christ, in order to give glory and praise to God.
local: na yɩn sɛɛn yeltorsɩ wɔ̃mɔ̃ tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, ka nɩbɛ pɛɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn yuor tɩɩr.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the things that have happened to me have actually advanced the gospel.
local: N yɛɛr, n bʊɔrɔ na ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka a lɛ na ɩ a n sɛ̃, sʊ̃ʊ ma naa ka n mʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir.

eng: The whole Praetorian Guard and everyone else knows that Im in prison for Christ.
local: A lɛ na ɩ jũu, a chaar kʊ a bala na guro a nãa yir nɩ nɩrɛ jaa ɩka, ba 'yɔ̃ɔ ma naa a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

eng: Most of the brothers and sisters have had more confidence through the Lord to speak the word boldly and bravely because of my jail time.
local: A maa ban 'yɔ̃ɔ a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ jũu, a yɛɛr yɔɔ jie na tara sɔɔfʊ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ chɛnɛ na tara ãkpɛ̃ɔ mʊɔlɔ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɩ nyãa ba joro dãbãɛ ɛ.

eng: Some certainly preach Christ with jealous and competitive motives, but others preach with good motives.
local: A ɩn yelmãɛ ɩka, nɩbɛ bamɩne mʊɔlɔ na a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yele ban tara nɩ ma nyuur nɩ nɛchɩrɛ jũu, tɩchɛ bamɩne 'lɔ, mʊɔlɔ na a Kɩrɩsɩto yele na sʊ̃ʊn ma.

eng: They are motivated by love, because they know that Im put here to give a defense of the gospel.
local: Banyãna lɛ mʊɔlɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto yele yin nʊ̃fʊ pɔ, na ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka ba pɔɔ ma naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir mʊɔlfʊ jũu.

eng: the others preach Christ because of their selfish ambition. They are insincere, hoping to cause me more pain while Im in prison.
local: A bala ɩn de nie 'yɛr a ba 'yɛr na mʊɔl a 'yɛr nɩ nyuur, maal a lɛ ɩka a n dɔɔyɛ wʊ lɛ pʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ be a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ.

eng: What do I think about this? Just this: since Christ is proclaimed in every possible way, whether from dishonest or true motives, Im glad and Ill continue to be glad.
local: Tɩchɛ bo lɛ an ɩ? A lɛ na ɩ nɩbijɩɛ lɛ ɩka ba mʊɔl a Yesu yele sɔr jaa pɔ, ka ba sɔɔn ɩka yelmãɛ lɛ bɩɩ, jire lɛ bɩɩ, a nɩtɔ̃ vɛ̃ naa ka n pʊɔ pɛl. Yelmãɛ jaa ɩn chɛnɛ na tara pʊpɛl.

eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: Bojũu n bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka tu a yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sɩɛ sʊ̃ʊfʊ jũu, a lɛ na ɩ a n sɛ̃ ɩn nyɛn faafʊ.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: Bon 'lɔ na ɩ ma nɩbijɩɛ nɩ a n tɩɛrtɔ jie lɛ ɩka, vã wʊ ta kpɛ ma sɔr jaa pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka n tara ãkpɛ̃ɔ ka a Kɩrɩsɩto na nyɛ tɩɩr a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a n nyɛvʊr pɔ lɛ, bɩɩ a n kũu pɔ lɛ.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: Bojũu maa 'lɔ, maa chɛnɛ nyɛvʊr pɔ, n ben be kʊ a Kɩrɩsɩto, ka maa mɩ kpi, ka a ɩ tɔ̃nɔ̃.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: Ala ɩ n chɛnɛ na nyɛvʊr pɔ, ɩn tʊ̃n tʊ̃vɩɛl yɔɔ, tɩchɛ n kaa ir buor? N ba bɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ ɩn na kaa ir ɛ.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: A yelsɩ ayi anyã lũ ma naa, maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka n yi a ka tɩ be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃. A lɛ lɛ vɩla.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: tɩchɛ a chɛnɛ na fɛr kʊ yɩ, ala ɩ ɩn chɛnɛ na a nyɛvʊr pɔ.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: Ɩn be na bɔ̃ɔn a nɩtɔ̃, n bɔ̃ɔn na yelmãɛ jaa ɩka ɩn chɛnɛ na be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃ naa sʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩ ka yɩ sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn, na yɩ tara pʊpɛl a yɩn sɔɔ wʊ jũu.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: A lɛ ɩn lɛ lɛ be a yɩ sɛ̃ go, ka a yɩ pʊpɛl yɩn tara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ pʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: Yele jaa wa ɩ, yɩ nyɔɔ yɩ mãɛ vɩla a lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ na wile. Ka n wan wa nyɛ yɩ bɩɩ, maa ba wa be a yɩ sɛ̃ tɩ wõ a yɩ yele, ɩn bɔ̃ɔn ɩka yɩ ara na kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen, na yɩ tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen a sɔɔfʊ nɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ pɔ.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: na yɩ ta joro dãbãɛ nɩ a bala na 'yɛr ɩka a ba ɩ lɛ lɛ ɛ. A nyã ɩn jãnɛ kʊ ba ɩka ban din dɔɔyɛ, tɩchɛ ka Nãaŋmɩn faa yɩ.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ kʊ yɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ a wʊ wãɛfʊ jũu, a ba ɩ a Yesu yɩn sɔɔ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn lɔ̃ɔn wʊ dire a dɔɔyɛ jũu.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: Ka a dɔɔyɛ nyã yɩn be na dire ɩn a dɔɔyɛ 'lɔ yɩn nyɛ ɩn di, nɩ a dɔɔyɛ yɩn be na chɛnɛ wõnõ ɩn dire.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: Ala ɩ yɩ tara na ãkpɛ̃ɔ, bojũu yɩ ɩn bʊ̃'yen nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto, na yɩ tara ãgãn 'maar a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ pɔ, na yɩ tara nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na yɩ nyɛ vɩla nɩ nɩbaal.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: yɩ pãa vɛ̃n ka a n pʊpɛl sɛɛ, yɩn tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen, na yɩ tara nʊ̃fʊ bʊ̃'yen, na yɩ tara Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen nɩ tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Yɩ ta maal yele 'lɔ na ɩ nyuur yele bɩɩ na yɩ wile yɩ mãɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩbɛ gar a yɩ mãɛ.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ ta bʊɔrɔ a wʊ pʊpɛl bonsɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ ala nɩ na pɛlɛ a yɩ taaba pʊʊr.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus.
local: Yɩ tara a tɩɛr nyã nɩ wʊ ju a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na dɔ̃ɔ tara.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: Wʊn sɔɔ jãtaa nɩ Nãaŋmɩn ka ba ɩ bʊ̃'yen, tɩchɛ waa de a jãtaa nyã mana nɩ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, wʊ den bar.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: tɩchɛ na wʊ siir wʊ mãɛ, na wʊ maal wʊ mãɛ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃, ka ba dɔɔ wʊ ka wʊ tara nɩsaal ãgãn, na wʊ ɩ nɩsaal.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: Wʊ siir wʊ mãɛ nɩsaal kaar tu a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ kpin a daa ju.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: A lɛ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn 'mɔɔ wʊn ka wʊ do gar bon jaa, na wʊ kʊ wʊ yuor na gar a yoe a jaa.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: Nãaŋmɩn maal a nɩtɔ̃ ka a Yesu yuor jũu, gbɛdumo jaa na gbur naa a saaju nɩ a wɛr pɔ, nɩ a tẽe par.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: ka a jãlbie a jaa 'yɛr ɩka, Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ ɩ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn yuor tɩɩr.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: A lɛ jũu, n yɛɛr, nɩtãa a lɛ jaa yɩn ma sɔɔ ma, a ba ɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn maa wa be a yɩ jie tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ sɔɔ ma gar a lɛ ɩn sɔɔ ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ. Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yɩ faafʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ dãbãɛ nɩ mɩrfʊ.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: Bojũu yɩn tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ a lɛ an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ sʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩ ka yɩ tara ãkpɛ̃ɔ na yɩn tʊ̃ a lɛ wʊ̃n bʊɔrɔ.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Yɩ ma maal bon jaa tɩ na yɩ ta ma ɩrɛ gbʊrɔ̃ gbʊrɔ̃ bɩɩ chɩrɛ taa ɛ.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: Ka yɩ kʊ̃ tara chɛfʊ nɩ yele jaa ɛ, na yɩ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bibiir banyã na ba tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ, na yɩ kpɩɛrɛ wɛr nyã pɔ tʊ̃dɛbɛ nɩ yelbe-ɩrbɛ na be na yɩ chaar ŋmɛrbie kaar a wɛr pɔ.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: A lɛ yɩn sɔɔ a nyɛvʊr 'yɛr lɛ na sʊ̃ʊ ma ka a Yesu waa bɩbir ka n na tʊ̃ɔ wiil a n mãɛ ɩka n ba jo pɔrɔ ɛ, bɩɩ a n tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Ala sɔɔ ɩ ɩn din dɔɔyɛ naa pʊɔ a yɩ dɔɔyɛ pɔ yɩn dire yɩn sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn jũu, n pʊɔ pɛl naa nɩ yɩ jaa.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ mɩ pʊɔ ma ka sɩ chɩlɛ.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: Ala ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu wa sɔɔ naa, ɩn tʊ̃n Timoti ka wʊ wa a yɩ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ kɔ̃ɔ ka n wõ a yɩ yele ka a ãgãn 'maa ma.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: N ba tara nɩrɛ jaa na kaara a wʊ kaar ɛ, ka wʊ na tara a yɩ bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ jaa ɛ.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Ba jaa bʊɔrɔ naa a ba pʊpɛl bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ, na baa bʊɔrɔ ala na pɛlɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pʊɔ ɛ.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Tɩchɛ Timoti tɩɛr 'lɔ yɩn bɔ̃ɔn fɩka sãa nɩ wʊ bie, wʊ pʊɔ ma naa ka sɩ mʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: A lɛ jũu, n bʊɔrɔ na ɩka n tʊ̃ wʊ a yɩ sɛ̃, maa wa nyɛ lɛ yelsɩ na ɩrɛ kʊrɔ ma.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: N sɔɔ naa ɩka a sɩ Soro na yuon sɔr kʊ ma ka maa mãɛ wa nyɛ yɩ fɔɔ jaa.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: Bojũu n nyɛn ka a ɩ fɛrfʊ kʊ ma ɩka n tʊ̃ Epafaroditusɩ na ɩ a n yɛbɛ nɩ a n tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ, na wʊ mɩ dire a n dɔɔyɛ tɔ sʊɔ. Wʊ mɩ ɩn a yɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩn tʊ̃ ka wʊ wa maal a n bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ kʊ ma.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: Bojũu wʊ bʊɔrɔ na ɩka wʊ nyɛ yɩ jaa tɩchɛ ka a wʊ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ yɔɔ jaa, bojũu yɩ wõn an ɔɔrɔ wʊ.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: Yelmãɛ, a ɔɔrɔ wʊn nɩbijɩɛ ka wʊ chɛ bãlãa naa kpi. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn wa kãan a wʊ nɩbaal, a ba ɩ 'lɔ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ mɩ kãan a n nɩbaal, ka n ta tara pʊsɔ̃ɔ yɔɔ ɛ.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Bojũu maa lɛ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir ɩka n tʊ̃ wʊ a yɩ sɛ̃, ka a yɩ pʊɔ na pɛl ala ɩ yɩ lɛ nyɛ wʊn go, ka a n ãgãn na 'maa.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: Yɩ sɔɔ de wʊ nɩ pʊpɛl a sɩ Soro jũu, na yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a nɩbɛ banyã taaba.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: bojũu wʊ din dɔɔyɛ a wʊ nyɛvʊr pɔ, na wʊ ta ɩrɛ na kpi a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu ɩka wʊ tʊ̃ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala yɩn ba tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ kʊ ma ɛ.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: N yɛɛr, a baaraa nɩ nyã ɩka yɩ tara pʊpɛl a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ. A ba ɩ tuo kʊ ma ɩn lɛ sɛɛrɛ a yelsɩ ala nɩ a ju kʊrɔ yɩ go ɛ, an ɩn sʊ̃ʊfʊ kʊ yɩ.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃ nɩ a baar banyãna, ba ɩn yelbe-ɩrbɛ na ba ma ŋmara nɩbɛ yɔɩ pɔrɔ.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Bojũu sɩn lɛ ɩ a yɔŋmarba sɩrɛ jaa, na sɩ puoro a Nãaŋmɩn a Sɩɛ pɔ, na sɩ tara tɩɩr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, na saa kaara a ãgãn ɛ.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more.
local: Maa gba tara na mana na tʊ̃ɔ man tu a ãgãn pɔ. Ala ɩ nɩrɛ mɩ tara na yelsɩ amɩne na man, ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ ka wʊ tara sɔɔfʊ a ãgãn pɔ, maa tara na gar wʊ.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Ba ŋmaan a n yʊɔr a ber aniin daar, ka n ɩ a Isɩral nɩrɛ naa ɩ a Benjamin bal nɩrɛ, naa ɩ Heburu, ka ba dɔɔ ma ka ɩ Heburu nɩrɛ. A nɛɛ tufʊ jũu, ka ɩ Farasee.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: N dɔ̃ɔn mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir naa gere a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ, a nɛbinãa yeltorsɩ jũu, n ba tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: Tɩchɛ a ala a jaa ɩn dɔ̃ɔ nyɛ tɩɛr ɩka a tara na tɔ̃nɔ̃, n wa nyɛn ka a ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa kʊ ma ɛ, a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: Bo lɛ gar a nɩtɔ̃, n nyɛn ka bon jaa ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, maa de man ala na tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ala ɩ n bɔ̃ɔ naa a n Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a tɩɩr sʊɔ. A wʊ jũu lɛ n bar bonsɩ a jaa. A ɩn sɔ̃sɔɔr kʊ ma, ɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka n bɔ̃ɔ Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: tɩ naa bʊɔrɔ ɩka n be a wʊ pɔ, naa ta bʊɔrɔ a maa mãɛ yeltorsɩ ala na yi a nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yeltorsɩ ala na yi a Kɩrɩsɩto sɔɔfʊ pɔ. A yeltorsɩ anyã lɛ yi Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ naa ɩ sɔɔfʊ.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: N bʊɔrɔ na ɩka n bɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a wʊ kũu pɔ lɩɛb irfʊ kpɛ̃ɔ, naa lɔ̃ɔn wʊ di a dɔɔyɛ wa kaara a wʊ kaar a wʊ kũu pɔ.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: ka n mɩ wa pʊɔ a bala mɩ na wa lɩɛb ir a kũu pɔ.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: A ba ɩ n tara na a anyãna a jaa ɛ, bɩɩ n ɩn chɛchɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ n mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir ɩka n nyɔɔ kpɛ̃ɔ, ka Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ nyɔɔ ma kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: N yɛɛr, n ba 'yɛr ɩka n nyɔɔn yele jaa baar ɛ. Tɩchɛ yele bʊ̃'yen ɩn ɩ lɛ ɩka, n ĩin a ala na be a puor bar, tɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tɩɛrɛ a ala na be a niem.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: N mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir ɩka n tɩ de a saaju kʊfʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl ma tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: A sɩn bala na baa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ, sɩ mɩ ma tara a bonsɩ a nyãna tɩɛr. Tɩ yɩn wa tɩɛr yelyuo yele jaa pɔ, Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃n ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a yelnyɩnɛ.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka sɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a bonsɩ anyãna sɩn ben tara.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: N yɛɛr, yɩ pʊɔ a yɩ taaba na yɩ turo a lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ maal wiil yɩ, na yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a bala na kpɩɛrɛ a lɛ sɩn wiil yɩ.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: Bojũu n dɔ̃ɔ de nie 'yɛr kʊ yɩ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã nɩbikʊ̃ɔ pɔ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, bamɩne kpɩɛrɛ na fɩka a Kɩrɩsɩto daa ɩn 'laarfʊ kʊ ba.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: A ba baaraa ɩn sɔ̃ɔfʊ, a ba ŋmɩn lɛ ɩ a ba ãgãn bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ. Ba wile na ba mãɛ nɩ yelsɩ ala na ɩ vã nɩ ɩfʊ, a ba tɩɛrsɩ ɩn a wɛr nyã ju bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ tɛɛ tɩɛr.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tɩchɛ sɩn 'lɔ ɩn saaju Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, be lɛ sɩ chɛlɛ a Fafaara na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ka wʊ na yi wa.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: A 'lɔ na tara kpɛ̃ɔ tʊ̃ɔ bon jaa na wʊ pire, wʊn den a kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ lɩɛb a sɩ ãgãma ka a kaara a wʊ mãɛ tɩɩr ãgãn kaar.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: A lɛ jũu, n yɛɛr yɩn ɩn nʊ̃, naa pãa bʊɔrɔ ɩka n nyɛ yɩ, yɩn lɛ ɩ a n pʊpɛl nɩ a nãa jupil, yɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro pɔ n barmɩne.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: N 'maal a Yuodiya nɩ Sɩntachi ɩka ba tara a tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen nyãna a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: Ɔ̃ɔ, n mɩ lɛ sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa, n baraa ɩka fʊ sʊ̃ʊ a pɔbɔ banyãna, ba lɔ̃ɔn man di dɔɔyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ pɔ 'matãan Kɩlɛmɛntɩ, na ɩ a n tʊ̃tʊ̃taaba, a bala yoe na be a nyɛvʊr gãn pɔ.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Yɩ tara pʊpɛl a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔ jaa. N lɛ bɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, yɩ tara pʊpɛl.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa nyɛ lɛ yɩn siir a yɩ mãɛ jã. A sɩ Soro waa ta naa.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka yele jaa wõnõ yɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ, yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan, na yɩ vɛ̃ ka Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔ a bon 'lɔ yɩn bʊɔrɔ.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã'maar na gar a nɩsaal bɔ̃ɔfʊ, na gun a yɩ nyãn, nɩ a yɩ tɩɛrsɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: N yɛɛr, a baaraa nɩ nyã ɩka bon 'lɔ jaa na ɩ yelmãɛ, nɩ bon 'lɔ jaa na ɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ bon 'lɔ jaa na tor, nɩ bon 'lɔ jaa na ɩ chɛchɛ, bon 'lɔ jaa na ɩ nʊ̃fʊ, nɩ bon 'lɔ jaa na ɩ pʊpɛl, ala ɩ bon 'lɔ jaa na ɩ vɩla, nɩ bon 'lɔ jaa na sɛɛn pɛɛfʊ, yɩ tɩɛrɛ a bonsɩ anyãna.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Bon jaa yɩn jãn tɩ na yɩ nyɛ, tɩ na yɩ wõ yi a n sɛ̃, yɩ maala yaa, ka a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ nyã'maar sʊɔ, na ben a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: N tara na pʊpɛl a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ yɩn wiil ɩka yɩ chɛnɛ na tara a n tɩɛr. Yelmãɛ yɩ dɔ̃ɔ tara a n tɩɛr tɩ na yaa tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ sɔr wiil ɛ.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: N ba 'yɛrɛ wile ɩka n bʊɔrɔ na bon jaa ɛ, bojũu n dɔ̃ɔ jãn lɛ ɩn na tara bon ka wʊ sɛɛn ma.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: N bɔ̃ɔn lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ tara jaa pʊʊrbile, naa lɛ bɔ̃ɔ lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ tara yɔɔ. A yelsɔɔlaa nyãna lɛ n jãn naa guolo nɩ a n mãɛ, ka kɔ̃ kpɛ man bɩɩ, ka n tara na na di bɩɩ, ka bãlãa gba lɛ n tara na di, ka n tara na yɔɔ bɩɩ, n ba tara bon jaa ɛ.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: Ɩn tʊ̃ɔ ɩ a anyãna a jaa tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na kʊ ma a kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Tɩchɛ yɩ maal vɩla, yɩn sʊ̃ʊ ma a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn dire a dɔɔyɛ.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Yɩn Filipai nɩbɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa yɩn sɔɔ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ jaa ɩn yi a Masedonɩya, pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba kʊ ma bon ɛ, ka yɩn tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ gba ɩn be a Tɛsalonika, yɩ sʊ̃ʊ man nɩ a n bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ gar gbɛbʊ̃'yen.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: A ba ɩ tɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ n bʊɔrɔ na ɩka yɩ nyɛ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn wʊ yab yɩ na wʊ sʊ̃ʊ yɩ.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: N nyɛn a n sãyar yɔɔ, naa gba nyɛ tɩ põn bar ka a sɛɛn ma, pʊ̃pãanyã n nũu kpɛ naa a kʊfʊ ala yɩn tʊ̃n a Epafaroditusɩ ka wʊ wa kʊ ma, ka a yɩ kʊfʊ anyãna kaar fɩka a bɔɔrlo bomo ala na nyuro nʊ̃ɔ naa pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: A n Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ yɩn a yɩ bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ a jaa tu a wʊ tɩɩr nãbonsɩ ala na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: A sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn wʊ nyɛrɛ tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Yɩ puor a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. A n yɛɛr na be a ka mɩ puoro yɩ naa.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ mɩ ba jaa puoro yɩ naa, ka a bala mɩ na be a nãkpɛ̃ɛ Siisa yir mɩ puoro yɩ.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ sɩɩr pɔ. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa an ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ pɔ nɩ Timoti na ɩ a sɩ yɛbɛ.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ nɩ a yɛɛr na tara a sɔɔfʊ a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ na be a Kolose. Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Sɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sãa, sɩn wa sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ yɩ.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: bojũu sɩ wõn a yɩ sɔɔfʊ yɩn tara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ yɩn tara kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: A yɩ sɔɔfʊ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ na yi a tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie na gã gu yɩ be a saaju a 'lɔ yɩn de nie wõ, a yelmãɛ 'yɛr na ɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: 'lɔ na wa a yɩ sɛ̃. A wɛr wʊ jaa, a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã wɔ̃nɔ̃ na wɔ̃mɔ̃ na a nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩtãa lɛ an ben ɩrɛ a yɩ pɔ, an yi a bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ daar jaa yɩn wõ naa na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ par a yelmãɛ pɔ.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Yɩ jãn a nyã yin Epafaras sɛ̃ na ɩ a sɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ ãsʊɔ. Wʊ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ na de a sɩ jie mʊɔlɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ wa man kʊ sɩ a nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ yɩn tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: A lɛ jũu, an yi a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa sɩn wõ naa, saa dɔ̃ɔ gal ɩka sɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn kʊ yɩ ɛ, na sɩ sʊɔrɔ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn wʊ pʊɔ yɩ a wʊ bɔfʊ yɛ̃, a sɩɛ pɔ yɛ̃, a jaa nɩ par bɔ̃ɔfʊ.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: A sɩ sʊɔrfʊ lɛ ɩka, a yɩ befʊ a vɩɛlɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro, ka a pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ, na yɩ wɔ̃nɔ̃ bisʊ̃n tʊ̃vɩla jaa pɔ, na yɩ baa a Nãaŋmɩn yɛ̃ pɔ.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: Sɩ mɩ ma sʊɔrɔ na ɩka Nãaŋmɩn wʊ maal yɩ ka yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ nɩ a kpãɛn ala a jaa na yi a wʊ tɩɩr kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ, na yɩ nyɔɔrɔ yɩ mãɛ tara kãnyir yele jaa pɔ, nɩ pʊpɛl.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: Na yɩ ma dãna a Sãa, 'lɔ lɛ kaa a yɩ sɛɛ, ka yɩ na põ a Nãaŋmɩn nãbonsɩ nɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ a chãa pɔ.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Bojũu 'lɔ lɛ faa sɩ yin a libe kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ, na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ a wʊ Binʊ̃nãa nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ sɩ nyɛ faafʊ, na sɩ nyɛ yelbier vɛ̃ kʊfʊ.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: A Yesu na wa tɩ wa a wɛr ju, 'lɔ lɛ wiil sɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã sɩn ba nyɛrɛ nɩ a nɩbir ɛ, a lɛ wʊn be. 'Lɔ lɛ tara kpɛ̃ɔ a bonsɩ a jaa pɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na maal.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Bojũu a wʊ pɔ lɛ a bonsɩ a jaa na be a saaju, nɩ a ala na be ka a wɛr pɔ maal, ala sɩn nyɛrɛ, nɩ a ala sɩn ba nyɛrɛ ɛ, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na tara kpɛ̃ɔ ɩ a tʊ̃ɔfʊ sʊɔ, nɩ a malakasɩ ala gba na tara kpɛ̃ɔ, nɩ a kpãɛn bonsɩ, a jaa maal tu a wʊ pɔ, ka a ɩ a wʊ sofʊ.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: A 'lɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ a bonsɩ a jaa be be, a wʊ pɔ lɛ a bonsɩ a jaa 'mataa.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: 'Lɔ mɩ lɛ ɩ a ãgãn ju sʊɔ, a pupuorbiir. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a pielfʊ, nɩ a bidɔ̃ɔ na wʊ de nie ir a kũu pɔ, na waa lɛ kpi go ɛ, ka yele jaa pɔ, ka wʊ ɩ a ju sʊɔ.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ pɛl wʊ naa ka wʊ befʊ wʊ jaa be a wʊ pɔ.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: A tun a wʊ pɔ, ka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ 'maal a bonsɩ a jaa kʊ a wʊ mãɛ, ka a ala na be a saaju bɩɩ a ala na be ka a wɛr pɔ. Wʊ maal ka nyã'maar be be, nɩ a wʊ jãɩ a daa ju wʊn kpi.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: Yɩ dɔ̃ɔ jãan a Nãaŋmɩn na yɩ ɩ a wʊ dɔ̃dẽme, a yɩ yeldɛbɛ ɩfʊ jũu.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, wʊ 'maal yɩn tun a Kɩrɩsɩto na wa ɩ nɩsaal na wʊ kpi. Nãaŋmɩn maal a nɩtɔ̃ ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ a wʊ sɛ̃, na yɩ kʊ tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ, bɩɩ tara 'yɛr dɔɔl ɛ.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: ala ɩ yɩ chɛnɛ na ba gbɛr a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, na yɩ taa tɔɔ yi a tɩɛrtɔ 'lɔ na ɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã yɩn wõ ɛ. A 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã lɛ yɩ wõ ban mʊɔl kʊ nɩrɛ jaa ka a wɛr ju. Ala lɛ a maa Pɔɔl ɩ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n pãa chɩlɛ naa a n dɔɔyɛ ɩn di a yɩ jũu, naa na di a dɔɔyɛ ala a jaa a Kɩrɩsɩto na bʊɔrɔ ɩka n di kʊ a wʊ ãgãn na ɩ a pupuorbiir jũu.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: Nãaŋmɩn maal man ka n ɩ a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a pupuorbiir naa na man a wʊ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ jaa nɛ nɛ nɛ kʊ yɩ.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: A yele nyãna lɛ sɔɔl a kõro jaa a sãakpãmɩne sɔ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ ka a pãa yi chãa pɔ a wʊ nɩbɛ sɛ̃.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kaa ir ɩka wʊ vɛ̃ ka a wʊ nɩbɛ bɔ̃ɔn sɩrɛ jaa a lɛ wʊ tara a tɩɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ ba jaa, ɩka a Kɩrɩsɩto ben a yɩ pɔ, na ɩ a tɩɩr tɩɛrtɔ jie.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: A Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ sɩ mʊɔlɔ, na sɩ kpãana nɩrɛ jaa wile nɩ nɩrɛ jaa nɩ yɛ̃ jaa bʊrɔ, ka sɩ na de nɩrɛ jaa kʊ wʊ ka wʊ ɩ chɛchɛ.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: A nyã jũu lɛ n tʊ̃nɔ̃ hãna dire dɔɔyɛ nɩ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ wʊ jaa wʊn tʊ̃nɔ̃ tun a n 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: N bʊɔrɔ na ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ ɩn mʊɔrɔ a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ a bala na be a Laodisea, nɩ a bala jaa na ba nyɛ a maa mãɛ nɩ nɩbir ɛ.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: Maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka yɩ tara ãkpãɛn a yɩ nyãn pɔ, na yɩ ɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen nʊ̃ taa, ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ ka yɩ tara par bɔ̃ɔfʊ yɔɔ jaa a nãbonsɩ a jaa pɔ, na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yelsɔɔlsɩ, na ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: A wʊ pɔ lɛ a nãbonsɩ, nɩ a yɛ̃, nɩ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ a jaa sɔɔl.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: N 'yɛrɛ na a nɩtɔ̃ kʊrɔ yɩ ka nɩrɛ jaa taa wa bɛl yɩ nɩ nɛchɩrɛ 'yɛr na nyɛtãan yelmãɛ ɛ.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: An sɔɔ ɩ a maa mãɛ na ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ gba ɛ, tɩchɛ n tara na a yɩ tɩɛr. N chɩlɛ na bʊɔrɔ ɩka n nyɛ a lɛ yɩn tara nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ a lɛ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ na kpɛ̃mɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩn de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ka wʊ ɩ a Soro, yɩ chɛnɛ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: Yɩ ba nyɩbɛ na yɩ baa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, na yɩ nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ̃mɛ a sɔɔfʊ pɔ, fɩka a lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ wiil yɩ, na yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Yɩ kaara sʊ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa ta wa de yɩ ka yɩ ɩ gbãgbaar tu a bɛlfʊ ala na ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ pɔ ɛ, nɩ nɩsaal yɛ̃ ɛ, na ɩ a ala na kaara a wɛr nyã ju ban taa kaara a Kɩrɩsɩto wiilfʊ.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn befʊ wʊ jaa ben a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: Yɩ sɛɛ naa bojũu yɩ sɔɔn a Kɩrɩsɩto, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme ba jaa ju sʊɔ.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ba mɩ ŋma yɩn a yɔɩ ka a yelbier 'lɔ na yi a yɩ pɔ, a ba ɩ yuor ŋmaafʊ 'lɔ nɩsaal na de wʊ nũu ŋmaan ɛ, tɩchɛ yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ 'lɔ Kɩrɩsɩto na ŋmaa.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: Ban dɔ̃ɔ so yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, ba ũu yɩn a Kɩrɩsɩto kaar, ka yɩ ir a kũu pɔ fɩka a Kɩrɩsɩto, bojũu yɩ sɔɔn de a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na sãɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ, na tara kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Tɩchɛ a yɩn bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, sɛrɛ tɩ yɩ wa sɔɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto, yɩ dɔ̃ɔ kpi a yɩ sɩɩr pɔ, bojũu yɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yelbe-ɩrbɛ, na yɩ jãan Nãaŋmɩn, bojũu yɩ sɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinsɩ. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ yɩn a nyɛvʊr paalaa a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ vɛ̃ kʊ yɩ.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: Nãaŋmɩn fɔfɔn a sɩ yelbebe ala na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb bin bar. Ala lɛ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr 'yɛr dɔɔl sɩ. Ala lɛ dɔ̃ɔ fɩrɛ sɩ na a ŋmaa sɩ yin, wʊ den bar na wʊ kpa yaa a daa ju.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃ɔn a sɩdɛbɛ nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme, na wʊ maal ba ka a ɩ dãasɩɛ nɩyɔɔ jaa niem. Wʊ tʊ̃ɔ ba naa nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto daa ju kũu.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa tɔɔr a yɩ 'yɛr nɩ bon 'lɔ yɩn dire bɩɩ nyuro ɛ, bɩɩ tun a Juu nɩbɛ lɔ̃ɔ difʊ pɔ ɛ, bɩɩ Chuu Paalaa Dãɛn pɔ ɛ, bɩɩ a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar ɛ.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: A anyã ɩ naa a yelsɩ ala nɩ taa dɔ̃ɔ wa gãagiel, tɩchɛ a yelmãɛ ben a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa kpãkpãan yɩ nɩ jir 'yɛr ɩka, yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ na yɩ puoro a malakasɩ ɛ, a lɛ na vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ a sãyar ɛ. A nɩrɛ nyã tɔ sʊɔ ma vɩɛr kpɛ a yele pɔ tɩɛr ɩka wʊ tara na kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ a ala wʊn nyɛ. A wʊ yelbier tɩɛr ma vɛ̃n ka wʊ wile wʊ mãɛ.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: A nɩrɛ nyã ba nyɔɔ a 'lɔ na ɩ a ju ɛ. Nɩtãa a lɛ a ju na ma wile a ãgãn, ka a jile nʊ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a ãgãn 'mataa a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: An ɩ yɩn nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ 'mataa kpi, a wɛr nyã ju kpãɛn bonsɩ, ba lɛ tara kpɛ̃ɔ a yɩ ju ɛ. Ŋmɩnɛ ka a yɩ kpɛfʊ chɛnɛ kaara fɩka yɩ chɛnɛ na ɩ a wɛr sofʊ?.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: Ta nyɔɔ bon nyã ɛ! Ta lɛm bon nyã kaa ɛ! Ta sɩɩr bon nyã kaa ɛ!.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: A nɛɛr anyãna a jaa tufʊ ɩn yelsɩ na ba lɛ tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa ɛ, bojũu a ɩn nɩsaal nɛbinsɩ nɩ nɩsaal wiilfʊsɩ lɛ.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: A nɛbinsɩ anyãna nyɛntãan fɩka yɛ̃ yele na ɩ a ba mãɛ puorfʊ yele nɩ mãɛ siirfʊ yele nɩ nɩbikõo ãgãn kaafʊ yele. Tɩchɛ a anyãna maa sʊ̃ʊ ba ka ba tʊ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a ba mãɛ a yelbier vɔlaa pɔ ɛ.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: A lɛ jũu, an ɩ yɩn nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'mataa sãɩn a kũu pɔ, yɩ de a yɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a bonsɩ ala na be a saaju, be a Kɩrɩsɩto na jãnɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nũsʊ̃ɔ jie.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Yɩ de a yɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a saaju bonsɩ pɔ, tɩ na yɩ ta de a yɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a wɛr ju bonsɩ pɔ ɛ.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Bojũu yɩ kpi naa, ka a pʊ̃pãanyã ka a yɩ nyɛvʊr sɔɔl a Kɩrɩsɩto a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: An ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ kʊ yɩ a nyɛvʊr paalaa, 'lɔ wa nyɩr, yɩ mɩ na 'mantãan wʊ nyɩr, na yɩ nyɛ a wʊ tɩɩr.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ kʊ a ala na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ na ɩ a wɛr yele. A yelsɩ ala lɛ a anyãna, sɛ̃fʊ yele, dɛɛr yele, vɔldɛɛr, tɩɛr dɛɛr, nɩ bɔgar na nyɛtãan tɩbɛ puorfʊ.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: A bonsɩ anyãna jũu, Nãaŋmɩn suur ire naa.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: A sɔbie anyãna lɛ yɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ turo, a lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ kpɩɛrɛ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ pɔ.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin a yelsɩ anyãna pɔ, suur, putuyele, gefʊ, gagar yele, nɩ 'yɛrbidɛbɛ na ma yire a yɩ nɛgãma pɔ.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Yɩ ta ŋmara jirsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ɛ. Yɩ ta maala a lɛ go ɛ, yɩ yaa a kõro yele nɩ a wʊ maalfʊsɩ bar.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: tɩ na yɩ su a pʊ̃pãanyã yelpaalaa. Nãaŋmɩn maal yɩn ka yɩ ɩ nɩpaalaa, na wʊ maala yɩ, ka yɩ na kaara a wʊ kaar, ka yɩ na bɔ̃ɔ wʊ yelmãɛ jaa.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Bamɩne ba lɛ chɛnɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ bɩɩ ka bamɩne mɩ ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ka bamɩne ŋma yɔɩ bɩɩ ka bamɩne mɩ ba ŋma ɛ, ka bamɩne ɩ sãanba bɩɩ ka bamɩne mɩ ɩ nɩyʊɔrsɩ ɛ, ka bamɩne ɩ gbãgbaar bɩɩ ka bamɩne mɩ ɩ sumɩne ɛ, tɩchɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ ɩ a jaa na wʊ be a jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: A lɛ jũu, an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kaa ir yɩ, ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ na wʊ nʊ̃ yɩ, yɩ pɔɔ a yɩ mãɛ nɩ nɩbaal, vɩla maalfʊ, mãɛ siirfʊ, jomm ɩfʊ nɩ kãnyir.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Yɩ ma tara kãnyir kʊ taa, ãsʊɔ jaa wa tara nɩ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ 'yɛr, yɩ ma vɛ̃ kʊ taa. Yɩ vɛ̃ bar nɩtãa a lɛ a sɩ Soro na ma vɛ̃ bar yɩ.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: A yelkpɛ̃ɛ jaa lɛ ɩka, yɩ de nʊ̃fʊ su. 'Lɔ lɛ ma nyɔɔ bonsɩ a jaa 'mataa ka a tara nɛbʊ̃'yen.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka a Kɩrɩsɩto nyã'maar pire a yɩ nyãn, yɩ jaa pʊɔn a ãgãn jiir pɔ, na wʊ bʊɔl yɩ ka yɩ tara nyã'maar. Yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛrbir di nãa a yɩ pɔ, yɩn wa wile tɩ kpãana taa, nɩ a yɛ̃ wʊ jaa. Yɩ ma yiele Nãaŋmɩn pɛɛfʊ yiel, pʊpɛl yiel, nɩ a yiel na yi a yɩ nyãn pɔ, na yɩ kʊrɔ Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Bon 'lɔ jaa yɩn wa maala, ka 'yɛrbir lɛ bɩɩ, ka maalfʊ pɔ lɛ, yɩ ma maal bon jaa, nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu yuor, na yɩ ma tu a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ puor a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn yãan.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Pɔbɔ, yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ kʊ a yɩ sɩrbɛ, lɛ lɛ vɩɛlɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Sɩrbɛ, yɩ nʊ̃ a yɩ pɔbɔ, na yɩ ta ma pirpire ba ɛ.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Bibiir, yɩ wõnõ a yɩ dɔɔrbɔ toor yele jaa pɔ, lɛ lɛ pɛlɛ a sɩ Soro pʊɔ.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Sãamɩne, yɩ ta ma maala ka a yɩ bibiir suur ire ɛ, a lɛ a ba tɩɛr kʊ̃ gã jibʊ̃'yen ɛ.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Gbãgbaar, yɩ sɔɔrɔ a yɩ nɩbɛrɛ nɛɛ yele jaa pɔ. Yɩ ta ma vɛ̃ ka ba wa fur nɩbir yɔ̃ɔ yɩ, ka yɩ pãa maala a lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ir a yɩ nyãa wʊ jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ, yɩn joro a sɩ Soro dãbãɛ jũu.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Bon jaa yɩn wa maala, yɩ ir a yɩ nyãa 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ ka a kaara fɩka a sɩ Soro lɛ yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ, tɩchɛ a ta ɩ fɩka nɩsaal lɛ yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ ɛ.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka yɩn tɩ den a yɩ nãbonsɩ a sɩ Soro sɛ̃ na ɩ a yɩ sãyar. A sɩ Soro Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa wa maal yelbier, a yelbier sãyar lɛ wʊn tɩ nyɛ. Nãaŋmɩn ba turo nɩbɛ nʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Nɩbɛrɛ, yɩ ma kʊrɔ a yɩ gbãgbaar a lɛ na tor na a sɛɛn, bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka yɩ mɩ tara na nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na be a saaju.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Yɩ de a yɩ mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ. Yɩ kaara sʊ̃ na yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Na yɩ mɩ ma sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ sɩ ka Nãaŋmɩn na yuo sɔr kʊ a sɩ mʊɔlfʊ ka sɩ na mʊɔl a Kɩrɩsɩto yelsɔɔlsɩ. A 'lɔ pɔ lɛ ba 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ka n na mʊɔl jaa chɛ chɛ chɛ a lɛ an sɛɛn.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
