local: Yɩ ɩ yɛ̃n dẽme nɩ a lɛ yɩn maala a bala na ba ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo sɛ̃. Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir, yɩn wa nyɛ jie.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Yɩ ma vɛ̃ ka a yɩ bʊʊr ma ɩ wãɛfʊ 'yɛrbie tɩ nʊ̃mɔ̃ nyaar kaar. Ka yɩ na bɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩn na 'yɛr sɔɔ nɩrɛ 'lɔ wa sʊʊr yɩ 'yɛr.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: Tɩchɩkusɩ na man a maa 'yɛr a jaa kʊ yɩ. Wʊ ɩn a yɛbɛ ɩn nʊ̃ na wʊ mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr nɩ yelmãɛ. Na wʊ ɩ a tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: N tʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ naa a yɩ sɛ̃ ɩka wʊ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a lɛ sɩn ɩrɛ a ka, na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ nyãn ãkpãɛn.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: 'Lɔ nɩ Onɩsɩmɔsɩ lɛ 'mataa waara. Wʊ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ na wʊ ɩ a yɛbɛ sɩn nʊ̃. Wʊ ɩn a yɩ ãsʊɔ. Ban man kʊ yɩ bon jaa na ɩrɛ a ka.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Aristakus mɩ ban 'mataa pɔɔn ma puoro yɩ naa, lɛ lɛ a Maakɩ mɩ na ɩ a Banabasɩ yɛbɛ mɩ puoro yɩ. Yɩ dɔ̃ɔ wõ a wʊ kpãafʊ yele, ala ɩ wʊ wa wan a yɩ sɛ̃, yɩ tuor de wʊ.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Yesu mɩ ban bʊɔlɔ Jusɩtusɩ mɩ puoro yɩ naa. A nɩbɛ banyãna tɛɛ lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ a n tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ pɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ jũu. Ba tara na ãgãn 'maar kʊ ma.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Epafaras na ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ na wʊ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃, puoro yɩ naa. Wʊ ma sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn nɩbijɩɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ka yɩ na ara kpɛ̃ɔ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: N din a wʊ dãasɩɛ ɩka wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ na kʊrɔ yɩ nɩ a bala na be a Laodisea nɩ a Hɩrapolis tẽn pɔ.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: A sɩ yɛbɛ sɩn nʊ̃, Luka na ɩ a tɩtɩlɛ nɩ Demas puoro yɩ naa.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Puor Nɩmfa nɩ a pupuorbiir bala na ma tuor a wʊ yir na be a Laodisea.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Bala wa kar a gãn nyãna kʊ a yɩn Kolose dẽme, yɩ mɔ̃ ka ba mɩ kar wʊ be a Laodisea pupuorbiir pɔ. Yɩ mɔ̃ na yɩ mɩ kar a gãn 'lɔ ɩn sɛb kʊ a Laodisea pupuorbiir.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: 'Yɛr kʊ Archipus, Mɔ̃ tɩ na fʊ baa baar a tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala fʊn nyɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Maa Pɔɔl lɛ sɛɛrɛ a puorfʊ nyã nɩ a maa mãɛ nũu. Yɩ tɩɛr a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ ban 'yɔ̃ɔ ma. Wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Pɔɔl, Silasɩ nɩ Timoti lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ Tɛsalonika pupuorbiir na be a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
local: Sɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan sɔ̃ɔ jaa kʊ yɩ, tɩ ma tara a yɩ tɩɛr a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Sɔ̃ɔ jaa lɛ sɩ ma tɩɛr a yɩ sɔɔfʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃, a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ a kãnyir yɩn tara chɛlɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: Bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka, n yɛɛr a yɩn a Nãaŋmɩn na nʊ̃, 'lɔ lɛ kaa ir yɩ.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: Bojũu a sɩ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ na wa a yɩ sɛ̃, ba ɩ 'yɛrbir tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ tara na kpɛ̃ɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na ba ɩ baal ɛ. Yɩ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ sɩn be a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ yɩ a yɩ jũu.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: Yɩ ɩ naa a sɩn nɩ a Soro tɔtɔɔrbɔ, bojũu dɔɔyɛ kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ lɛ yɩ tu tɩ de a 'yɛrbie nɩ pʊpɛl a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na tɩr.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: lɛ lɛ, yɩn ɩ bʊ̃mansɩ kʊ a bala na sɔɔ de a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ be a Masedonɩya nɩ a Akaya tẽn pɔ.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Yɩn lɛ yaar a sɩ Soro 'yɛrbie, a ba ɩ a Masedonɩya nɩ a Akaya tẽn pɔ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yaar jie jaa. A lɛ yɩn sɔɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yaar jie jaa.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: Ba mãɛ lɛ man a lɛ yɩn tuor de sɩ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn wa a yɩ sɛ̃, nɩ a lɛ yɩn lɩɛb wa a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, tɩ bar a tɩbɛ tɩ wa puoro a nyɛvʊr nɩ a yelmãɛ Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: tɩ chɛlɛ a wʊ Bie ka wʊ yi saaju wa, a 'lɔ wʊn vɛ̃ ka wʊ lɩɛb ir a kũu pɔ, Yesu a 'lɔ na faa sɩ yɩn a Nãaŋmɩn suur 'lɔ na waara pɔ.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: N yɛɛr, yɩn mãɛ jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a yɩ sɛ̃ waa ba ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: sɩn gba na dɔ̃ɔ di dɔɔyɛ a ba ge sɩ be a Filipai tẽe pɔ, nɩtãa yɩn mãɛ na bɔ̃ɔn, tɩchɛ sɩ chɛnɛ na tara nyãa a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn pɔ, tɩ man a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ jaa chɛchɛ kʊ yɩ, an sɔɔ ɩ baa sɔɔ de a 'yɛr ɛ.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Bojũu a sɩ sʊɔrfʊ ba yi jir, bɛlfʊ nɩ tɩɛr dɛɛr pɔ ɛ.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kaa ir sɩ ka sɩ ɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ wiwiilbe. A lɛ jũu lɛ sɩ 'yɛr ɩka, a ba ɩ ka sɩ pɛl nɩsaal pʊɔ ɛ, tɩ sɩ pɛl Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, a 'lɔ na ma kaara a sɩ pʊtɩɛr.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn na ɩka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ɩ a sɩ dãasɩɛ sʊɔ, saa dɔ̃ɔ wa 'yɛr jir 'yɛr bɩɩ ŋmaa jir nyɛ bon ɛ.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others.
local: Saa bʊɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩsaal sɛ̃ ɛ, a yɩn mãɛ sɛ̃n bɩɩ a sɩ taaba sɛ̃ ɛ, bɩɩ bʊɔrɔ bonsɩ sɩn ɩ Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nsɩ jũu ɛ.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: tɩchɛ sɩ siir a sɩ mãɛ a yɩ pɔ, lɛ pɔɔ na ma kaara a wʊ bibiir.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩn kaara sɩ lɛ so ka saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ põn yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ tɛɛ ɛ, na sɩ lɔ̃ɔn a sɩ mãɛ jaa bojũu a sɩ nʊ̃fʊ ben a yɩ sɛ̃ yɔɔ jaa.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: Sɩrɛ jaa n yɛɛr, yɩ tɩɛr a sɩ kãnyir tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ a dɔɔyɛ. Sɩ tʊ̃n tãsɔɔ gbulo, nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃gbulo, ka sɩ ta kʊ nɩrɛ jaa tuor ɛ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊrɔ yɩ ɛ.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Yɩn lɛ di dãasɩɛ, nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn mɩ na ɩ a Chɛchɛ Sʊɔ nɩ nɩtor tɩ ba tara yele jaa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, a sɩ maalfʊ chaar naa a yɩn na ɩ a sɔɔfʊ dẽme.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ ma maal vɩla kʊ a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa lɛ sãa na ma maal vɩla kʊ a wʊ bibiir.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: na sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ ãkpãɛn, 'maala yɩ tɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩ kpɩɛrɛ a lɛ na pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, a 'lɔ na bʊɔl yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ tɩɩr pɔ.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Ala lɛ so ka sɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, bojũu yɩ sɔɔn de a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr yɩn wõ a sɩ sɛ̃, yaa sɔɔ de yaa nɩsaal 'yɛr kaar ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ sɔɔn de yaa Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr kaar, ka a tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yɩ bala na sɔɔ de pɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: Bojũu n yɛɛr, yɩn 'lɔ, yɩ ɩ naa tɔtɔɔrbɔ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ a Judiya, yɩ din dɔɔyɛ a bonsɩ pɔ, a yɩ mãɛ yelsɩ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ ban tʊ̃ kʊ a Juu dẽme.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: a bala na kʊ a sɩ Soro Yesu nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ tɩ dii sɩ bar. Ba sɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ tɩ ba sɔɔ nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr ɛ.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: tɩ ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ 'yɛrɛ nɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ka ban nyɛ faafʊ ɛ. Ba kpɛ̃n a yeldɛbɛ pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ kɔkɔɛ. Nãaŋmɩn suur ir naa ka wʊn ge ba.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: Tɩchɛ n yɛɛr, a kor bãlãa sɩn ba lɛ nyɛ taa ɛ, tɩchɛ saa vɛ̃ a yɩ tɩɛr ɛ. Sɩ mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir ɩka sɩ nyɛ yɩ, na sɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka a sɩn mãɛ sɩ tɩ nyɛ yɩ.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: A la lɛ so ka sɩ ta bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ wa a yɩ sɛ̃, tɩ maa Pɔɔl ta mʊɔrɔ na bʊɔrɔ, tɩchɛ ka Satan pii a sɩ sɔr.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: Bo lɛ ɩ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie, bɩɩ a pʊpɛl bɩɩ a nyɛvʊr tɩɩr jupil kʊ sɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu waa daar? A ba ɩ yɩn lɛ ɛ?.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: Yelmãɛ yɩn lɛ ɩ a sɩ tɩɩr nɩ a sɩ pʊpɛl.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Lɛ an wa gar sɩ a sɩ faa tɩ jãnɛ a be Atensɩ tẽe pɔ.

eng: and we sent you Timothy, who is our brother and Gods coworker in the good news about Christ. We sent him to strengthen and encourage you in your faithfulness.
local: Sɩ tʊ̃n a sɩ yɛbɛ Timoti mɩ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ ãsʊɔ na wʊ mʊɔlɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ ɩka wʊ tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ ãkpɛ̃ɔ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: a lɛ ka yɩ taa wa joro dãbãɛ nɩ a bɛɛr kaa nyã pɔ ɛ. Yɩn mãɛ jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a dɔɔyɛ nyã lɛ sɩn di.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Yelmãɛ, sɩn dɔ̃ɔ be a yɩ sɛ̃, lɛ lɛ sɩ 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka sɩn din dɔɔyɛ. Ka a lɛ mɩ ɩ.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: A lɛ jũu, ɩn kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ lɛ so, ka tʊ̃ nɩrɛ ɩka wʊ tɩ kaa a lɛ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ na be, n dabãɛ lɛ ɩka a bɛɛr kaa wʊ taa bɛɛr yɩ kaa, kaa sɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: Tɩchɛ Timoti yin a yɩ sɛ̃ wa 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ sɩ, a lɛ yɩn tara a sɔɔfʊ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ. Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ sɩ ɩka yɩ ma tara sɩn nɩ tɩɛr vɩla sɔ̃ɔ jaa na yɩ ma bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ nyɛ sɩ nɩtãa lɛ sɩn mɩ na ma bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ nyɛ yɩ.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: N yɛɛr, a lɛ jũu, a pʊsɔ̃ɔ nɩ a bɛɛr kaa anyã pɔ, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn ãkpɛ̃ɔ tun a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ yɩn tara jũu.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: Bojũu pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ pãa na ben be yɩn ara kpɛ̃ɔ kʊ a sɩ Soro.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ sɩn ɩrɛ wa puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan ka a sɛɛ, a pʊpɛl nyã sɩn nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃?.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ jaa lɛ sɩ ma sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɩka sɩ lɛ nyɛ yɩ go, na sɩ lɛ chɔɔr bon 'lɔ jaa na ba pʊɔ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ sʊɔrɔ naa a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu ɩka, ba yuo sɔr ka sɩ lɛ wa nyɛ yɩ.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: A sɩ Soro wʊ vɛ̃ ka yɩ waa na yɩ nʊ̃nɔ̃ taa, tɩ na yɩ nʊ̃ nɩrɛ jaa nɩtãa lɛ sɩn nʊ̃ yɩ.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: Wʊ vɛ̃ ka yɩ ɩ nɩsʊ̃n na yɩ taa tara dɛɛr jaa a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ na waan a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ.

eng: We dont need to write to you about the timing and dates, brothers and sisters.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ n yɛɛr, a ba fɛr ɩka sɩ sɛb bon jaa 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a daar naa sɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: You know very well that the day of the Lord is going to come like a thief in the night.
local: Bojũu yɩn mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩ Soro Yesu bɩbir na wa naa fɩka nãnyie na ma wa tãsɔɔ kaar.

eng: When they are saying, There is peace and security, at that time sudden destruction will attack them, like labor pains start with a pregnant woman, and they definitely wont escape.
local: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban wa 'yɛr ɩka, Nyã'maar ben be, dãbãɛ ba lɛ be be ɛ, sɔ̃ɔfʊ na pãa wa naa, a ba sɛ̃, fɩka pɔɔ pʊɔ dɔɔfʊ na dũu wʊ, tɩ ba kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ faa a ba mãɛ ɛ.

eng: But you arent in darkness, brothers and sisters, so the day wont catch you by surprise like a thief.
local: Tɩchɛ yɩn a n yɛɛr, yaa be libe pɔ ɛ, ka a bɩbir nyã na wa dũu yɩ a nãnyie kaar ɛ.

eng: All of you are children of light and children of the day. We dont belong to night or darkness.
local: Yɩ jaa ãn chãa nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ bibiir, saa ɩ tãsɔɔ bɩɩ, libe pɔ nɩbɛ ɛ.

eng: So then, lets not sleep like the others, but lets stay awake and stay sober.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ pãa ta vɛ̃ a sɩ guro nɩbɛ bamɩne kaar ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ jɛɔ na sɩ nyɔɔrɔ sɩ mãɛ.

eng: People who sleep sleep at night, and people who get drunk get drunk at night.
local: Bojũu a bala na ma guro, ma gur tãsɔɔ, ka a bala na buu, mɩ ma buu tãsɔɔ.

eng: Since we belong to the day, lets stay sober, wearing faithfulness and love as a piece of armor that protects our body and the hope of salvation as a helmet.
local: Tɩchɛ an ɩ a chãa lɛ so sɩ, yɩ vɛ̃ ka sɩ nyɔɔrɔ sɩ mãɛ, na sɩ de sɔɔfʊ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ su, fɩka a nyãa wɩɛ nɩ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie na ɩ a sɩ faafʊ kur jupil.

eng: God didnt intend for us to suffer his wrath but rather to possess salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ba ir sɩ ɩka sɩ di dɔɔyɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka sɩ nyɛ faafʊ tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Jesus died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we will live together with him.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ kpi kʊ sɩ, a lɛ jũu, ka sɩ chɛnɛ na nɩbir bɩɩ, sɩ gur naa, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ na 'mataa be be.

eng: So continue encouraging each other and building each other up, just like you are doing already.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔn taa ãkpãɛn na yɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ taa nɩtãa a lɛ yɩn ben tʊ̃nɔ̃.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we ask you to respect those who are working with you, leading you, and instructing you.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã n yɛɛr, sɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bala na ɩ a yɩ nɩbɛrɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yɩ sɛ̃, bala lɛ sʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩ a sɩ Soro sɔr pɔ, na ba kpãana yɩ.

eng: Think of them highly with love because of their work. Live in peace with each other.
local: Yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba nɩ nʊ̃fʊ a ba tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu, na yɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ nyã'maar nɩ nɩrɛ jaa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we urge you to warn those who are disorderly. Comfort the discouraged. Help the weak. Be patient with everyone.
local: N yɛɛr n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka, yɩ kpãana a bala na ɩ a yãan dẽme tɩ na yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bala na sɩɩr a ba mãɛ, na yɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ a nɩbaalsɩ tara kãnyir nɩ nɩrɛ jaa.

eng: Make sure no one repays a wrong with a wrong, but always pursue the good for each other and everyone else.
local: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, ka nɩrɛ jaa ta de yelbier yãan yelbier sãn ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ma maala vɩla kʊrɔ taa nɩ nɩrɛ jaa.

eng: Rejoice always.
local: Yɩ ma tara pʊpɛl sɔ̃ɔ jãa.

eng: Pray continually.
local: Yɩ ma sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

eng: Give thanks in every situation because this is Gods will for you in Christ Jesus.
local: Na yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan yele jaa pɔ, bojũu anyã lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Dont suppress the Spirit.
local: Yɩ ta kpĩin a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bũu ɛ.

eng: Dont brush off Spirit-inspired messages.
local: Yɩ ta kpɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ wiilfʊ ɛ.

eng: but examine everything carefully and hang on to what is good.
local: Yɩ bɛɛr yele jaa kaa na yɩ nyɔɔ bon 'lɔ na vɩla.

eng: Avoid every kind of evil.
local: Tɔɔ yi yele jaa na ɩ bier pɔ.

eng: Now, may the God of peace himself cause you to be completely dedicated to him; and may your spirit, soul, and body be kept intact and blameless at our Lord Jesus Christs coming.
local: Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ na ɩ a nyã'maar sʊɔ wʊ chɔɔr yɩ ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ. Wʊ maal a yɩ sɩɩr nɩ a yɩ kpɛfʊ nɩ a yɩ ãgãma ka a ɩ chɛchɛ tɩ ta tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa sɔ̃ɔ.

eng: The one who is calling you is faithful and will do this.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã na bʊɔl yɩ tara na yelmãɛ, wʊ̃n maal a lɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, pray for us.
local: N yɛɛr, yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ sɩ.

eng: Greet all the brothers and sisters with a holy kiss.
local: Yɩ puor a yɛɛr naa yɛpɔbɔ ba jaa nɩ nʊ̃fʊ puorfʊ.

eng: By the Lords authority, I order all of you to have this letter read aloud to all the brothers and sisters.
local: N kpãkpãana yɩ naa a sɩ Soro yuor 'yɔ̃ɔ, ɩka yɩ kar a gãn nyã kʊ a yɛɛr ba jaa.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Ka a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: N yɛɛr, a baaraa nɩ nyã, sɩ kpãana yɩ naa a lɛ a yɩ kpɛfʊ na tʊ̃ɔ pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn ben kpɩɛrɛ. Pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa na sɩ kpãkpãana yɩ nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu ɩka yɩ maala a lɛ pʊɔrɔ.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn wiilfʊ 'lɔ sɩn wiil yɩ tun a sɩ Soro Yesu pɔ.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: A ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ lɛ wʊn ir yɩ ka yɩ ɩ nɩtorsɩ. A lɛ jũu, yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: Ka nɩrɛ jaa tʊ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a wʊ mãɛ vɩla, na wʊ ɩ chɛchɛ tɩ tara 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: na yɩ ta bʊɔrɔ pʊpɛl bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ fɩka a nɩbɛ bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa wʊ ta maal dɛɛr bɩɩ ŋmɔɔl a wʊ yɛbɛ anyã pɔ ɛ, a sɩ Soro na gen nɩrɛ jaa na maala a anyãna nɩtãa a lɛ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ, tɩ na sɩ kpãa yɩ.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn ba bʊɔl sɩ ɩka sɩ tara vɔldɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ bʊɔrɔ na ɩka sɩ vɛ̃ ka a sɩ kpɛfʊ vɩɛlɛ.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na tɔr a wiilfʊ nyã, ba tɔr nɩsaal ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ na kʊ sɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: A ba lɛ fɛr ɩka, sɩ lɛ sɛb kʊ yɩ a lɛ yɩn na nʊ̃ taa ɛ, bojũu yɩn mãɛ jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka, Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr naa ɩka, yɩ nʊ̃ taa.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: Sɩrɛ jaa yɩ nʊ̃n a yɛɛr na be a Masedonɩya paal pɔ, tɩchɛ sɩ chɛnɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ yɩ ãkpãɛn ɩka, yɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka a ɩ yɩ nʊ̃ɔ ka a yɩ kpɛfʊ vɩɛlɛ, na yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a yɩ mãɛ tʊ̃mɔ̃ na yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a yɩ nuur nɩtãa a lɛ sɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: Yɩ maal a nɩtɔ̃ ka a yɩ kpɛfʊ na vɩɛlɛ kʊ a bala na ba puor ɛ, na yɩ taa bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩbɛ ba guolo yɩ ɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: N yɛɛr, saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka a lɩɩ yɩ ɛ, nɩ a bala na gur ɛ, na yɩ taa wa tara pʊsɔ̃ɔ fɩka a bala na ba tara tɩɛrtɔ jie kaar ɛ.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: Sɩ sɔɔn ɩka Yesu kpi naa, tɩ na wʊ lɩɛb ir a kũu pɔ. A lɛ lɛ sɩ sɔɔ, ɩka Nãaŋmɩn na 'mantaa waan a Yesu nɩ a bala na gur.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: Sɩ den a sɩ Soro 'yɛrbie 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a sɩn bala na chɛnɛ vʊrɔ, tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro waa daar, kʊ̃ dɔ̃ɔ a bala na gur nyɛ wʊ ɛ.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Bojũu a sɩ Soro mãɛ lɛ na yi a saaju wa tãna 'yɛrɛ, ka a malaka kpɛ̃ɛ bʊɔlɔ nɩ nɛkpɛ̃ɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn ɩlɛ pɛɛlɛ ɩrɛ gɔ̃mɔ̃, ka a bala na sɔɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto tɩ kpi, de nie ir.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: A anyã puor, a sɩn bala na chɛnɛ vʊrɔ, a Nãaŋmɩn pãa 'mɔɔr sɩ, ka sɩ lɔ̃ɔtaa tuor a sɩ Soro be julõjuur pɔ, na sɩ tɩ be a wʊ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ãkpãɛn naa 'yɛrbie anyãna.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Pɔɔl, Silasɩ nɩ Timoti lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a Tɛsalonika pupuorbiir na be a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jie, a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: N yɛɛr, sɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan kʊ yɩ, a mɩ vɩɛl lɛ na a lɛ, bojũu a yɩ sɔɔfʊ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, ka a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ yɩn nʊ̃ taa mɩ lɛ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: A lɛ jũu, sɩ ma wile na sɩ mãɛ pɛɛrɛ yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn pupuorbiir gbulsɩ pɔ, lɛ yɩn tara kãnyir ara kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ a sɔɔfʊ yɩn tara a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban 'yɛr 'yɛrdɛbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ, nɩ a dɔɔyɛ yɩn nyɛrɛ.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: A ɩn yelmãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ tor naa, na wʊ bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ maal yɩ ka yɩ sɛɛn a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ, a 'lɔ pɔ yɩn mɩ na dire a dɔɔyɛ.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Nãaŋmɩn tor naa. Wʊn lɩɛb yab a bala na 'yɛr 'yɛrdɛbɛ, 'yɔ̃ɔ ba gefʊ, tɩ kʊ a bala ban 'yɛr.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: 'yɛrdɛbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ, pɛ̃nfʊ, nɩ a sɩn mãɛ. A nɩtɔ̃ na ɩ naa, Nãaŋmɩn na wa ir a sɩ Soro Yesu wiil a saaju nɩ a wʊ kpãɛn malakasɩ, fɩka bũu dagel.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: Wʊn gen a bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, na baa sɔɔ de a sɩ Soro Yesu 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Bala lɛ na nyɛ gefʊ 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Wʊn oor ban yɩn a sɩ Soro niem, nɩ a wʊ tɩɩr kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: 'Lɔ wa wa a bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, wʊn nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ pɔ. An ɩn nʊ̃ɔ kʊ a bala jaa na sɔɔ de wʊ. Yɩ mɩ pʊɔ naa, bojũu yɩ sɔɔn de a sɩ dãasɩɛ sɩn di a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: A anyã tɩɛr sɩn tara jũu, sɩ ma sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka wʊ vɛ̃ ka yɩ sɛɛn a wʊ bʊɔlfʊ, ka a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka a yi tɩɛr vɩɛlsɩ nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ jaa na yi a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: A anyãna lɛ sɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn ɩka a sɩ Soro Yesu yuor wʊ nyɛ tɩɩr a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka wʊ mɩ pɛɛ yɩ, a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ jũu.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: A lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa sɔ̃ɔ nɩ a lɛ sɩn na lɔ̃ɔ taa a wʊ sɛ̃, sɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa, n yɛɛr.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: ɩka yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a sɔb yɩ nɩbir a nɩbɛ bamɩne na 'yɛrɛ ɩka sɩn lɛ 'yɛr bɩɩ, sɛb ɩka a Yesu wan baar.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
local: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa bɛl yɩ a sɔr nyã pɔ ɛ, a bɩbir 'lɔ kʊ̃ wa ɛ, ka a bawõnsɩ ba de nie ir ɛ. Ka a 'lɔ na ba sɔɔ de a nɛbinãa mɩ yi chãa pɔ, 'lɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na sɔ̃ɔ.

eng: He is the opponent of every so-called god or object of worship and promotes himself over them. So he sits in Gods temple, displaying himself to show that he is God.
local: Wʊ ma chɩrɛ naa tɩ na wʊ ma 'mɔɔrɔ, wʊ mãɛ gar Nãaŋmɩn, bɩɩ bon jaa ban puoro, a lɛ lɛ wʊ jãnɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir maal a wʊ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: You remember that I used to tell you these things while I was with you, dont you?.
local: Yaa lɩɛb tɩɛr ɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a bonsɩ anyãna a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ?.

eng: Now you know what holds him back so that he can be revealed when his time comes.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a bon 'lɔ na pii wʊ a sɔr a wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ yɩ chãa pɔ ɛ, a wʊ sɔ̃ɔ baa wa ta ɛ.

eng: The hidden plan to live without any law is at work now, but it will be secret only until the one who is holding it back is out of the way.
local: A wʊ yelsɔɔlaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ na tʊ̃mɔ̃, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na pii a sɔr yi be.

eng: Then the person who is lawless will be revealed. The Lord Jesus will destroy him with the breath from his mouth. When the Lord comes, his appearance will put an end to him.
local: Ka a bala na ba sɔɔ de a nɛbinãa ɛ na yin chãa pɔ, a bala a Soro Yesu nɩ naa sɔ̃ɔn a wʊ nɛɛ vʊʊr, sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yele 'lɔ na ɩrɛ a wʊ waa sɔ̃ɔ.

eng: When the person who is lawless comes, it will happen through Satans effort, with all kinds of fake power, signs, and wonders.
local: A bala na ba sɔɔ de a nɛbinãa ɛ, na wa naa an ɩ a Satan tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ, a 'lɔ na de kpɛ̃ɔ, jãnsɩ nɩ jire, nɛ'maa yelsɩ.

eng: It will happen with every sort of wicked deception of those who are heading toward destruction because they have refused to love the truth that would allow them to be saved.
local: nɩ yelbier jaa bʊrɔ bɛlfʊ sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ a nɩbɛ bala na wɛrɛ, ba wɛrɛ naa, bojũu ba tɔr naa ɩka ba nʊ̃ a yelmãɛ na ba nyɛ faafʊ.

eng: This is why God will send them an influence that will mislead them so that they will believe the lie.
local: A lɛ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn na sɔɔ naa ka yele kɔ̃ɔ bɛl ba, nɩ lɛ ban sɔɔ de bon 'lɔ na ɩ jire.

eng: The result will be that everyone will be judged who is not convinced by the truth but is happy with injustice.
local: A lɛ jũu, bala jaa na ba sɔɔ de a yelmãɛ a ãgãn vɔlaa jũu, nɩ a bon 'lɔ na ba tor ɛ, na nyɛn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ.

eng: But we always must thank God for you, brothers and sisters who are loved by God. This is because he chose you from the beginning to be the first crop of the harvest. This brought salvation, through your dedication to God by the Spirit and through your belief in the truth.
local: Tɩchɛ sɩn 'lɔ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan kʊrɔ yɩ, n yɛɛr, a yɩn a sɩ Soro na nʊ̃, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn kãan ir yɩ a pielfʊ daar ka yɩn nyɛ faafʊ, ka a wʊ Sɩɛ pɛɛrɛ yɩ a yɩ sɔɔ de a yelmãɛ.

eng: God called all of you through our good news so you could possess the honor of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ bʊɔl yɩ a anyãna pɔ, a lɛ yɩn wõ sɩn mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ yɩ. Lɛ lɛ ka yɩn lɔ̃ɔ põn a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɩɩr.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold on to the traditions we taught you, whether we taught you in person or through our letter.
local: A lɛ jũu, n yɛɛr yɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ na yɩ nyɔɔ a sɩ wiilfʊ sɩn wiil yɩ, ka 'yɛrbir lɛ bɩɩ, nɛɛ lɛ bɩɩ, gãn pɔ lɛ.

eng: Our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father loved us and through grace gave us eternal comfort and a good hope.
local: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto mãɛ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a sɩ Sãa na nʊ̃ sɩ tun a wʊ wãɛfʊ pɔ, na 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn ãkpɛ̃ɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, nɩ tɩɛrtɔ vɩla.

eng: May he encourage your hearts and give you strength in every good thing you do or say.
local: wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ ãkpãɛn a yɩ nyãa pɔ nɩ vɩla jaa nɩ a 'yɛrbie pɔ.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us so that the Lords message will spread quickly and be honored, just like it happened with you.
local: N yɛɛr, a baarfʊ nɩ nyã, yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ sɩ, ka a sɩ Soro 'yɛrbie tʊ̃ɔ yaar fɔɔ tɩ nyɛ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ jie jaa nɩtãa lɛ an be a yɩ pɔ.

eng: Pray too that we will be rescued from inappropriate and evil people since everyone that we meet wont respond with faith.
local: Na yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ka sɩ na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ faafʊ yin a putudẽme nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ dẽme nuur pɔ, bojũu nɩrɛ jaa baa tara a sɔɔfʊ ɛ.

eng: But the Lord is faithful and will give you strength and protect you from the evil one.
local: Tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ, wʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩn ãkpɛ̃ɔ tɩ gu yɩ a dɛɛr sʊɔ nuur pɔ.

eng: We are confident about you in the Lord—that you are doing and will keep doing what we tell you to do.
local: Sɩ tara na sɔɔfʊ a sɩ Soro yuor 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ pɔ ɩka, yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ na, na yɩn chɛnɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a ala sɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ.

eng: May the Lord lead your hearts to express Gods love and Christs endurance.
local: A sɩ Soro wʊ vɛ̃ a yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃ yɩ naa nɩ lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na tara nɩ yɩ a kãnyir.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we command you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to stay away from every brother or sister who lives an undisciplined life that is not in line with the traditions that you received from us.
local: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor pɔ, sɩ kpãana yɩ naa n yɛɛr ɩka yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin a bala na ɩ koro dẽme pɔ, nɩ ban ba turo a lɛ sɩn wiil yɩ ɩka yɩ turo ɛ.

eng: You yourselves know how you need to imitate us because we were not undisciplined when we were with you.
local: Yɩn mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɛɛ naa ɩka yɩ tɔɔrɔ sɩ, saa dɔ̃ɔ yʊɔrɔ pɔrɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ.

eng: We didnt eat anyones food without paying for it. Instead, we worked night and day with effort and hard work so that we would not impose on you.
local: bɩɩ saa dɔ̃ɔ di nɩrɛ jaa bʊ̃diir tɩ na saa yab ɛ. Sɩ ma tʊ̃n tʊ̃kpãɛn tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ, ka sɩ ta tuo a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa tuor ɛ.

eng: We did this to give you an example to imitate, not because we didnt have a right to insist on financial support.
local: A nyã ba wiil ɩka saa tara sɔr na ɩ a lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ kaa ɩ wiilfʊ kʊ yɩ ka yɩ tɔɔrɔ.

eng: Even when we were with you we were giving you this command: If anyone doesnt want to work, they shouldnt eat.
local: Sɩ gba na dɔ̃ɔ be a yɩ sɛ̃, sɩ kpãkpãan yɩ naa a yele nyãna ɩka, nɩrɛ jaa ba wa tʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, wʊ taa dire ɛ.

eng: We hear that some of you are living an undisciplined life. They arent working, but they are meddling in other peoples business.
local: Sɩ wõn ban 'yɛr ɩka nɩbɛ bamɩne ben a yɩ pɔ tara koro na ba yʊɔrɔ pɔrɔ, na baa tara tʊ̃mɔ̃ jaa ɛ, tɩ ma kpɩɛrɛ a ba taaba yelsɩ pɔ.

eng: By the Lord Jesus Christ, we command and encourage such people to work quietly and put their own food on the table.
local: A nɩbɛ banyãna taa ba, sɩ 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor pɔ ɩka, ba tʊ̃ a ba tʊ̃mɔ̃ jaa jomm na ba nyɛ a ba mãɛ bonsɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont get discouraged in doing what is right.
local: N yɛɛr, yɩn 'lɔ yɩ taa wa bal nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ 'lɔ na tor pɔ ɛ.

eng: Take note of anyone who doesnt obey what we have said in this letter. Dont associate with them so they will be ashamed of themselves.
local: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ ba wa sɔɔ de a lɛ sɩn 'yɛr a gãn nyã pɔ ɛ, yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ yele sʊ̃ na yɩ taa tara nɩ wʊ nɛbʊ̃'yen ɛ, ka vã kpɛ wʊ.

eng: Dont treat them like enemies, but warn them like you would do for a brother or sister.
local: Yɩ ta de wʊ ka wʊ ɩ dɔ̃sʊɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ kpãa wʊ wʊn ɩ a yɩ wʊn ɩ a yɛbɛ jũu.

eng: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɩ Soro na ɩ nyã'maar sʊɔ wʊ kʊ yɩ nyã'maar sɔ̃ɔ jaa, a sɔɩ a jaa pɔ. A sɩ Soro wʊ be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting with my own hand. This verifies that the letter is from me, as in every letter of mine. This is how I write.
local: Maa Pɔɔl lɛ sɛb a puorfʊ nyã nɩ a maa mãɛ nũu. A jãnɛ naa nyã ɩn ma 'yɔ̃ɔ gãn jaa pɔ ɩn ma sɛb.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

eng: From Paul, who is an apostle of Jesus Christ by the command of God our savior and of Christ Jesus our hope.
local: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa, nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ Fafaara Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔ jie.

eng: To Timothy, my true child in the faith. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: N sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ a Timoti na ɩ a n binʊ̃nãa sɔɔfʊ jũu. Wãɛfʊ, nɩ nɩbaal, nɩ nyã'maar na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, a be a fʊ sɛ̃.

eng: When I left for Macedonia, I asked you to stay behind in Ephesus so that you could instruct certain individuals not to spread wrong teaching.
local: A lɛ ɩn chen a Masedonɩya, n kpãkpãan fʊ naa ɩka fʊ jãnɛ a Efesus na fʊ wile a nɩbɛ bamɩne a ba taa wile wiil yuo go ɛ.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to myths and endless genealogies. Their teaching only causes useless guessing games instead of faithfulness to Gods way of doing things.
local: Wiilfʊ ba ka ba ta de ba mãɛ kʊ jir wiilfʊ ɛ, nɩ a sãakpãmɩne tutaa na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. A anyãna lɛ waara nɩ nɛchɩrɛ, ban naa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ nɩ sɔɔfʊ.

eng: The goal of instruction is love from a pure heart, a good conscience, and a sincere faith.
local: Tɩchɛ a wiilfʊ nyã lɛ waara nɩ nʊ̃fʊ na yi nyãvɩla pɔ, tɩɛr vɩla pɔ nɩ yelmãɛ sɔɔfʊ pɔ.

eng: Because they missed this goal, some people have been distracted by talk that doesnt mean anything.
local: Nɩbɛ bamɩne bar naa a anyã tɩ na ba 'yɛrɛ 'yɛr vorsɩ.

eng: They want to be teachers of Law without understanding either what they are saying or what they are talking about with such confidence.
local: Ba bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka ba ɩ a nɛɛ wiwiilbe, na baa bɔ̃ɔ a par a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ ɛ, bɩɩ na a bonsɩ ala ban 'yɛr ɩka a sɛɛ naa ɛ.

eng: Now we know that the Law is good if used appropriately.
local: Faa nyɛ, sɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a nɛbinãa vɩla na, ala ɩ nɩrɛ tun a lɛ an wile.

eng: We understand this: the Law isnt established for a righteous person but for people who live without laws and without obeying any authority. They are the ungodly and the sinners. They are people who are not spiritual, and nothing is sacred to them. They kill their fathers and mothers, and murder others.
local: Sɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka, a nɛbinãa ba bin kʊ a nɩtorsɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ bin kʊ a bala na sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a nɛɛ, nɩ a bawõnsɩ, nɩ a bala na ba turo lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔr ɛ, yelbe-ɩrbɛ, nɩ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn yuor, nɩ a bala na kʊrɔ a ba sãamɩne, nɩ a ba mamɩne na ba ɩ nɩkʊrbɔ.

eng: They are people who are sexually unfaithful, and people who have intercourse with the same sex. They are kidnappers, liars, individuals who give false testimonies in court, and those who do anything else that is opposed to sound teaching.
local: nɩ a sɛ̃sɛ̃nbɛ, nɩ a bala na lɩɛb bʊɔr taa, nɩ a bala na lɩɛb daara a ba taaba, nɩ a jir ŋmarba, nɩ a bala na ŋmara jir pɔrɔ nɩ, nɩ yele jaa na chɩrɛ nɩ a yelmãɛ wiilfʊ.

eng: Sound teaching agrees with the glorious gospel of the blessed God that has been trusted to me.
local: A wiilfʊ anyã yire na a dãnfʊ Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a tɩɩr sʊɔ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ wʊn de kʊ ma sɛ̃.

eng: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me strength because he considered me faithful. So he appointed me to ministry.
local: N puor naa a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yãan, wʊn kʊ ma kpɛ̃ɔ bojũu wʊ nyɛn a n sɔɔfʊ, na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

eng: even though I used to speak against him, attack his people, and I was proud. But I was shown mercy because I acted in ignorance and without faith.
local: N gba na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn yosɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, gere a nɩbɛ, naa ɩ jɛbʊɔrɔ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn wa kãan a n nɩbaal, bojũu n ɩn a lɛ ɩn ba sɔɔ de nɩ babɔ̃ɔfʊ jũu.

eng: Our Lords favor poured all over me along with the faithfulness and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro wãɛfʊ waa naa, nɩ a sɔɔfʊ, nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ ala na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—and Im the biggest sinner of all.
local: A yelmãɛ 'yɛr nɩ nyã, na a ɩ yelmãɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ sɔɔ de. Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wan a wɛr pɔ ɩka wʊ wa faa yelbe-ɩrbɛ, tɩchɛ maa lɛ gar ba jaa.

eng: But this is why I was shown mercy, so that Christ Jesus could show his endless patience to me first of all. So Im an example for those who are going to believe in him for eternal life.
local: Tɩchɛ a lɛ jũu lɛ so ka Nãaŋmɩn kaa n nɩbaal, ka a na tʊ a n pɔ, a maa na ɩ a yelbe-ɩrɛ gar ba jaa, ka Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wiil a wʊ kãnyir na ba tara baarfʊ kʊ ma, ka n ɩ wiilfʊ kʊ a bala na wa sɔɔ wʊ nyɛ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baar fʊ ɛ.

eng: Now to the king of the ages, to the immortal, invisible, and only God, may honor and glory be given to him forever and always! Amen.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã a Nãa 'lɔ na ba tara pielfʊ ɛ, a 'lɔ na ba kpire ɛ, a 'lɔ sɩn ba nyɛrɛ ɛ, a Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, wʊ nyɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: Timothy, my child, Im giving you these instructions based on the prophecies that were once made about you. So if you follow them, you can wage a good war.
local: N bie Timoti, n kʊrɔ fʊ naa a wiilfʊ anyãna tun a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a fʊ 'yɛr, ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ turo a lɛ, fʊn jɛb a jɛb vɩla 'lɔ.

eng: because you have faith and a good conscience. Some people have ruined their faith because they refused to listen to their conscience.
local: Tara sɔɔfʊ nɩ pʊtɩvɩla, bojũu nɩbɛ bamɩne tɔr naa a vɩla 'lɔ maalfʊ bar ka a ba sɔɔfʊ bʊ̃bʊr.

eng: such as Hymenaeus and Alexander. Ive handed them over to Satan so that they can be taught not to speak against God.
local: A ba pɔ lɛ Hɩmɩnayas nɩ Aleksanda, bala lɛ n de kʊ a Satan ka ba na jãn ta fere sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn yuor ɛ.

eng: First of all, then, I ask that requests, prayers, petitions, and thanksgiving be made for all people.
local: A lɛ jũu, a ala na de nie nɩ nyã, n kpãkpãan yɩn ɩka yɩ sʊɔrɔ, Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ, na yɩ ma sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ taa, tɩ na yɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan kʊ nɩrɛ jaa.

eng: Pray for kings and everyone who is in authority so that we can live a quiet and peaceful life in complete godliness and dignity.
local: Yɩ mɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ a nãmɩne nɩ a bala na ɩ a kpãɛn dẽme, ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ ka sɩn jɛ̃n ãgãn 'maar nɩ nyã'maar na sɩ maala a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

eng: This is right and it pleases God our savior.
local: A nyã lɛ tor, naa pɛlɛ a sɩ Fafaara Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ.

eng: who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ jaa wʊ nyɛ faafʊ, na wʊ wa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ.

eng: There is one God and one mediator between God and humanity, the human Christ Jesus.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ be be, nɩ 'ma'maala bʊ̃'yen na be a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a nɩsaalba chara pɔ, 'lɔ lɛ a nɩrɛ Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: who gave himself as a payment to set all people free. This was a testimony that was given at the right time.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ de a wʊ nyɛvʊr yab faan nɩrɛ jaa. A 'yɛr nyã lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ sɩ ɩka sɩ mʊɔl a pʊ̃pãanyã.

eng: I was appointed to be a preacher and apostle of this testimony—Im telling the truth and Im not lying! Im a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
local: A lɛ lɛ so ka Nãaŋmɩn ir ma ka ɩ mʊmʊɔlɔ nɩ a nɩtʊ̃nãa. Yelmãɛ jaa lɛ n 'yɛrɛ, n ba ŋmara jir ɛ, ɩka n ɩ a wiwile kʊ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, sɔɔfʊ nɩ yelmãɛ pɔ.

eng: Therefore, I want men to pray everywhere by lifting up hands that are holy, without anger or argument.
local: Maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka jie jaa, a dɔɔr wa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn, ba jɛɛr a ba nuur puoro, na ba maala a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, na ba ta tara suur nɩ nɛchɩrɛ ɛ.

eng: In the same way, I want women to enhance their appearance with clothing that is modest and sensible, not with elaborate hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothes.
local: Lɛ lɛ a pɔbɔ mɩ, ba ma su bon pɔɔ a ãgãn, tɩ na ba ta ma mal pir a jukɔɔl nɩ a sɛlma nɩ a lɛrsɩ bɩɩ a fɔɔr ala daa na ɩ tuo ɛ.

eng: They should make themselves attractive by doing good, which is appropriate for women who claim to honor God.
local: tɩchɛ tʊ̃sʊ̃n lɛ sɛɛn a pɔbɔ bala na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: A wife should learn quietly with complete submission.
local: Pɔbɔ ba ma jãn ɩ gbul na ba siir ba mãɛ chɛlɛ a lɛ a nɩdierbe na wile.

eng: I dont allow a wife to teach or to control her husband. Instead, she should be a quiet listener.
local: N ba bar sɔr ɩka pɔɔ jaa wʊ wile bɩɩ tara kpɛ̃ɔ daba ju ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma ɩ gbul.

eng: Adam was formed first, and then Eve.
local: Bojũu Adama lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn de nie mɛ tɩ na wʊ wa mɛ a Hawa tu.

eng: Adam wasnt deceived, but rather his wife became the one who stepped over the line because she was completely deceived.
local: Satan ba dɔ̃ɔ nie bɛl Adama ɛ, tɩchɛ a Hawa lɛ wʊ bɛl ka wʊ sɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ.

eng: But a wife will be brought safely through childbirth, if they both continue in faith, love, and holiness, together with self-control.
local: Tɩchɛ a pɔbɔ na nyɛn faafʊ tu bie dɔɔfʊ pɔ, ala ɩ ba chɛnɛ na tara sɔɔfʊ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ na ba ɩ chɛchɛ nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ vɩla.

eng: This saying is reliable: if anyone has a goal to be a supervisor in the church, they want a good thing.
local: A 'yɛr ɩn yelmãɛ ɩka, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ ɩ a pupuorbiir nɩdiere, wʊ bʊɔrɔ na tʊ̃sʊ̃.

eng: So the churchs supervisor must be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, sober, modest, and honest. They should show hospitality and be skilled at teaching.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a pupuorbiir nɩdiere wʊ ta tara mabfʊ jaa ɛ, na wʊ tara pɔɔ bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, na wʊ nyɔɔrɔ wʊ mãɛ, na wʊ ɩ nɩ'yɔ̃ɔ naa, na wʊ diere sãanba, na wʊ bɔ̃ɔ wiilfʊ.

eng: They shouldnt be addicted to alcohol or be a bully. Instead, they should be gentle, peaceable, and not greedy.
local: Wʊ ta ɩ dãburo ɛ, wʊ ta ɩ gɔ̃bʊɔr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ siir a wʊ mãɛ, na wʊ ta ɩ jɛbʊɔrɔ ɛ, na wʊ ta nʊ̃ libie ɛ.

eng: They should manage their own household well—they should see that their children are obedient with complete respect.
local: A sɛɛn ɩka wʊ tʊ̃ɔ kaara a wʊ mãɛ yir vɩla, ka a wʊ bibiir wõnõ a wʊ toor, na ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ wʊ.

eng: because if they dont know how to manage their own household, how can they take care of Gods church?.
local: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ a wʊ mãɛ yir kaa ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ wʊn ɩ tʊ̃ɔ kaa a pupuorbiir?.

eng: They shouldnt be new believers so that they wont become proud and fall under the devils spell.
local: Wʊ ta ɩ nɩrɛ nyã na kpɛ a puorfʊ pɔ paal ɛ, na wʊn wa bʊɔrɔ yuor na wʊ mɩ faa lo a gefʊ pɔ nɩtãa a Satan.

eng: They should also have a good reputation with those outside the church so that they wont be embarrassed and fall into the devils trap.
local: Wʊ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, ka lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, ban 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊn vã ka wʊ lo a Satan bɛraa pɔ.

eng: In the same way, servants in the church should be dignified, not two-faced, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
local: A sʊ̃sʊ̃nbɔ, ba mɩ tara nɩbijɩɛ na ba ta tara nɛɛr ayi ɛ, na ba ta maal ba mãɛ dãnyurbo ɛ, na ba ta ɩ nɩfɔlbɔ ɛ.

eng: They should hold on to the faith that has been revealed with a clear conscience.
local: Ba nyɔɔ a sɔɔfʊ wiilfʊ yelsɔɔlaa kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ tɩɛr vɩla.

eng: They should also be tested and then serve if they are without fault.
local: Yɩ de nie bɛɛr ba kaa. Ka bala pãa baa tara 'mabfʊ jaa ɛ, yɩ vɛ̃ ka ba ɩ a sʊ̃sʊ̃nbɔ.

eng: In the same way, women who are servants in the church should be dignified and not gossip. They should be sober and faithful in everything they do.
local: A pɔbɔ mɩ, ba tara 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, na ba ta sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa yoe ɛ, tɩchɛ ba nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ, tɩ tara yelmãɛ yele jaa pɔ.

eng: Servants must be faithful to their spouse and manage their children and their own households well.
local: A sʊ̃sʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ tara pɔɔ bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, na wʊ tʊ̃ɔ kaara a wʊ bibiir, na wʊ tʊ̃ɔ kaara a wʊ yir vɩla.

eng: Those who have served well gain a good standing and considerable confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: A sʊ̃sʊ̃nbɔ bala na tʊ̃ vɩla, na nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ a ba mãɛ, nɩ a 'lafʊ nɩ sɔɔfʊ 'lɔ ban tara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ.

eng: I hope to come to you quickly. But Im writing these things to you so that.
local: N bʊɔrɔ na ɩka n wa a fʊ sɛ̃ a pʊ̃pãanyã, tɩchɛ n sɛɛrɛ na a kpãafʊ anyã kʊrɔ fʊ.

eng: if Im delayed, youll know how you should behave in Gods household. It is the church of the living God and the backbone and support of the truth.
local: Lɛ lɛ, maa baa tʊ̃ɔ wa fɔɔ ɛ, ka fʊ bɔ̃ɔ lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka a pupuorbiir ba nyɔɔrɔ a ba mãɛ, bala lɛ puoro a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ vʊr na ba tɩɛ a yelmãɛ a luur kaar.

eng: Without question, the mystery of godliness is great: he was revealed as a human, declared righteous by the Spirit, seen by angels, preached throughout the nations, believed in around the world, and taken up in glory.
local: Baal ba be be ɛ, a yelsɔɔlaa a sɩ puorfʊ pɔ bɛrma naa. Yesu nyɩr a ãgãn pɔ. Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ir wiil ɩka wʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bie. A malakasɩ nyɛ wʊ naa. Ba mʊɔl 'yɛr a wʊ 'yɛr a paalsɩ pɔ, ka ba sɔɔ de wʊ a wɛr wʊ jaa. Nãaŋmɩn de wʊn don be a tɩɩr pɔ.

eng: The Spirit clearly says that in latter times some people will turn away from the faith. They will pay attention to spirits that deceive and to the teaching of demons.
local: Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'yɛr ka a gã chãa pɔ ɩka a baaraa, bamɩne na bar a ba sɔɔfʊ tɩ chɛlɛ a sɩdɛbɛ bɛlfʊ, nɩ a lɛ a sɩdɛbɛ na wile.

eng: They will be controlled by the pretense of lying, and their own consciences will be seared.
local: A wiilfʊ nyã yi naa a nɛɛr ayi dẽme na ma ŋmara a jirsɩ ka a sɔ̃ɔ a ba tɩɛr fɩka kur tʊl ban 'mon bon 'yɔ̃ɔ jãnɛ.

eng: They will prohibit marriage and eating foods that God created—and he intended them to be accepted with thanksgiving by those who are faithful and have come to know the truth.
local: Ba wile na nɩbɛ ɩka ba ta kultaar ɛ, na ba wile ba ɩka ba chire bʊ̃diir amɩne. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn na maal a kultaa nɩ a bʊ̃diir a jaa ɩka a bala na sɔɔ tɩ bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ, ba ma de tɩ puor wʊ yãan.

eng: Everything that has been created by God is good, and nothing that is received with thanksgiving should be rejected.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃maalaa jaa vɩɛlɛ na, ka a ba sɛɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ tɔr bon jaa bar ɛ, ala ɩ sɩ ma den nɩ yãan puorfʊ.

eng: These things are made holy by Gods word and prayer.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ maal yaa naa ka a ɩ bʊ̃sʊ̃.

eng: If you point these things out to the believers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus who has been trained by the words of faith and the good teaching that youve carefully followed.
local: Ala ɩ fʊ den a kpãafʊ nyã na fʊ wiil a yɛɛr, fʊn ɩn a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃vɩla sʊɔ, na fʊn guolo a fʊ mãɛ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɩ a sɔɔfʊ wiil vɩla 'lɔ fʊn turo.

eng: But stay away from the godless myths that are passed down from the older women. Train yourself for a holy life!.
local: Tɔr a jirsɩ ala ban ma ŋmara nɩ a pɔɔnyɔ̃n fuolsɩ, tɩ na fʊ wile a fʊ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr pɔ.

eng: While physical training has some value, training in holy living is useful for everything. It has promise for this life now and the life to come.
local: Bojũu fʊ̃ʊ jãn a fʊ ãgãn ka wʊ kpɛ̃mɛ, a vɩla na, tɩ wʊ kʊ̃ kor ɛ, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr tufʊ vɩla na a sɔɩ a jaa pɔ, bojũu wʊ tɩr nɛɛ kʊ sɩ a nyɛvʊr nyã sɩn tara a dɩna nɩ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na waara daar kɔ̃ɔ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves complete acceptance.
local: A 'yɛr nyã ɩn yelmãɛ ɩka, nɩrɛ jaa wʊ sɔɔ de.

eng: We work and struggle for this: Our hope is set on the living God, who is the savior of all people, especially those who believe.
local: A lɛ jũu lɛ sɩ mʊɔrɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ tʊ̃kpãɛn, bojũu a sɩ tɩɛrtɔ ben a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ vʊr pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a nɩbɛ bala jaa na sɔɔ wʊ Fafaara.

eng: Command these things. Teach them.
local: Kpãkpãana na fʊ wile ba a yelsɩ anyãna a jaa.

eng: Dont let anyone look down on you because you are young. Instead, set an example for the believers through your speech, behavior, love, faith, and by being sexually pure.
local: Ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa kaa fʊ pɔrɔ fʊn chɛnɛ ɩ pɔlbile jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊ ɩ wiilfʊ kʊ a bala na tara sɔɔfʊ, nɩ a fʊ 'yɛr, nɩ a fʊ maalfʊ, nɩ a fʊ nʊ̃fʊ, nɩ a fʊ sɔɔfʊ, nɩ a fʊ chɛchɛ ɩfʊ pɔ.

eng: Until I arrive, pay attention to public reading, preaching, and teaching.
local: Sɛrɛ tɩchɛ ka n wa, mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir kara a Nãaŋmɩn gãn a nɩyɔɔ pɔ, na fʊ mʊɔlɔ tɩ wile nɩ ba.

eng: Dont neglect the spiritual gift in you that was given through prophecy when the elders laid hands on you.
local: Ta mel a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn kʊ fʊ ɛ, a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a nɩdierbe na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr tɩ dɔɔl fʊ a ba nuur.

eng: Practice these things, and live by them so that your progress will be visible to all.
local: De a yelsɩ a nyã tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃, na fʊ de fʊ mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, ka nɩrɛ jaa nyɛ lɛ a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ na chiine niem.

eng: Focus on working on your own development and on what you teach. If you do this, you will save yourself and those who hear you.
local: Bɔ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a fʊ mãɛ nɩ a wiilfʊ ɩrɛ a lɛ nɛ, na fʊ tara kãnyir. Fʊn faan a fʊ mãɛ nɩ a bala na chɛlɛ a fʊ 'yɛr.

eng: Dont correct an older man, but encourage him like hes your father; treat younger men like your brothers.
local: Ta 'yɛr 'yɛrbikpãɛn kʊ danyɔ̃n ɛ, tɩchɛ 'yɛr baalʊ̃ʊ kʊ wʊ fʊ sãa tɔ sʊɔ kaar, 'yɛr kʊ pɔlbil a fʊ yɛɛr kaar.

eng: treat older women like your mother, and treat younger women like your sisters with appropriate respect.
local: 'Yɛrɛ nɩ a pɔɔnyɔ̃n a fʊ mamɩne kaar, nɩ a pɔɔsarbil a fʊ yɛpɔbɔ kaar, nɩ chɛchɛ ɩfʊ pɔ.

eng: Take care of widows who are truly needy.
local: 'Yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a pɔɔkɔɛ bala na ɩ pɔɔkɔɛ, tɩ ba tara bon jaa ɛ.

eng: But if a particular widow has children or grandchildren, they should first learn to respect their own family and repay their parents, because this pleases God.
local: Ala ɩ a pɔɔkɔnyɩnɛ tara na bibiir bɩɩ yɔ̃n, bala lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka ba turo a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ, na ba kaara a ba dɔɔrbɔ a yie pɔ fɩka a lɛ a ba dɔɔrbɔ na dɔ̃ɔ kaa ba. Lɛ lɛ pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ.

eng: A widow who is truly needy and all alone puts her hope in God and keeps on going with requests and prayers, night and day.
local: Pɔɔkʊɔr 'lɔ na ba tara bon jaa ɛ, ma den a wʊ tɩɛr wʊ jaa kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, tɩ na wʊ ma sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ a wʊ bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: But a widow who tries to live a life of luxury is dead even while she is alive.
local: tɩchɛ a pɔɔkʊɔr 'lɔ na bʊɔrɔ ãgãn vɔlaa, wʊ kpin tɩ yʊɔrɔ.

eng: Teach these things so that the families will be without fault.
local: Kʊ ba a kpãafʊ anyãna, ka nɩrɛ ta nyɛ a ba 'mabfʊ ɛ.

eng: But if someone doesnt provide for their own family, and especially for a member of their household, they have denied the faith. They are worse than those who have no faith.
local: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ baa sʊ̃ʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ ɛ, bɩɩ a wʊ yir dẽme ɛ, a kaara fɩka wʊ tɔr naa a sɔɔfʊ, tɩ ɩrɛ dɛɛr gar nyã na ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ.

eng: Put a widow on the list who is older than years old and who was faithful to her husband.
local: A pɔɔkʊɔr 'lɔ na ba ta yuom lɩjaata sɛrɛ ɛ, taa ɩrɛ wa 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ yuor a pɔɔkɔɛ gãn pɔ ɛ. Wʊ ɩ pɔɔkʊɔr 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ kul sɩr bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, ka a sɩrɛ wa kpi tɩ chɛ wʊ bar, tɩ wʊ chɛnɛ nyɔɔrɔ wʊ mãɛ ba kul sɩrɛ go ɛ.

eng: She should have a reputation for doing good: raising children, providing hospitality to strangers, washing the feet of the saints, helping those in distress, and dedicating herself to every kind of good thing.
local: Nɩbɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ wʊ a wʊ tʊ̃ vɩla jũu, nɩ a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ guol a wʊ bibiir, na wʊ ma sɔɔ diere sãanba, na wʊ ma pɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ gbɛɛ, sʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a nɩbaalsɩ, tɩ maala vɩla jaa bʊrɔ.

eng: But dont accept younger widows for the list. When their physical desires distract them from Christ, they will want to get married.
local: Tɩchɛ ta 'yɔ̃ɔ pɔɔkɔ'yɔlɔ yuor a pɔɔkɔɛ gãn pɔ ɛ, bojũu sɩrɛ kulfʊ vɔlaa wa gar a lɛ ban nʊ̃ a Kɩrɩsɩto, ban bʊɔrɔ na sɩrɛ kulfʊ.

eng: Then they will be judged for setting aside their earlier commitment.
local: A lɛ ban lon Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ pɔ, bojũu ba sɔ̃ɔn a nɛɛ ban põl'yɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto bar.

eng: Also, they learn to be lazy by going from house to house. They are not only lazy, but they also become gossips and busybodies, talking about things they shouldnt.
local: A lɛ puor, ba ma bʊɔrɔ na ɩka ba yʊɔrɔ pɔrɔ tulo yie yʊɔrɔ, a ba ɩ yie tuulfʊ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩ ba ɩn gagarsɩ, na ba kpɩɛrɛ nɩbɛ 'yɛr 'yɛrsɩ pɔ 'yɛrɛ a lɛ na ba sɛɛ ɩka ba 'yɛrɛ ɛ.

eng: So I want younger widows to marry, have children, and manage their homes so that they wont give the enemy any reason to slander us. .
local: A lɛ jũu, n bʊɔrɔ na ɩka pɔɔkɔɛ na chɛnɛ kpãɛn, ba kul sɩrbɛ, na ba dɔɔ bibiir, na ba tʊ̃ɔ ɩ pɔɔ mɩn kaara a ba yie, na ba ta kʊ a dɔ̃sʊɔ sɔr ka wʊ sɔ̃ɔ a sɩ yuor ɛ.

eng: Some have already turned away to follow Satan.
local: Bamɩne lɩɛb sɩrɛ jaa turo a Satan puor.

eng: If any woman who is a believer has widows in her family, she should take care of them and not burden the church, so that it can help other widows who are truly needy.
local: Ala ɩ pɔɔ nyã jaa na puoro tara yir dẽme ka ba ɩ pɔɔkɔɛ, wʊ kaara ba tɩ ta kʊ a pupuorbiir wõm ɛ. A pupuorbiir ba kaara pɔɔkɔɛ bala tɛɛ na ba tara nɩrɛ jaa, ka wʊn kaa ba ɛ.

eng: Elders who lead well should be paid double, especially those who work with public speaking and teaching.
local: A nɩdierbe bala na tʊ̃nɔ̃ vɩla, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba, tɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ ba nɩ bonsɩ, bala lɛ mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr tɩ wile.

eng: The scripture says, Dont put a muzzle on an ox while it treads grain , and Workers deserve their pay .
local: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn gãn 'yɛr ɩka, Ta lũ a nadar nɛɛ 'lɔ wa vara a chi ɛ. A tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ jaa sɛɛn na a wʊ sãyar.

eng: Dont accept an accusation made against an elder unless it is confirmed by two or three witnesses.
local: Taa ɩrɛ wa sɔɔrɔ nɩbʊ̃'yen 'yɛr wʊn 'yɛr dɔɔl a nɩdiere ju ka bala ba ta ayi bɩɩ ata ɛ.

eng: Discipline those who are sinning in front of everyone so that all the others will be afraid.
local: A bala na ma maala a yeldɛbɛ, wiil ba a ba sɔ̃ɔnaa a nɩyɔɔ niem, ka a ba taaba na chɛ na joro dãbãɛ.

eng: I charge you before God and Christ Jesus and the elect angels to follow these practices without bias, and without playing favorites.
local: N kpãana yɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a malakasɩ bala wʊn ir niem ɩka, yɩ gu yɩ mãɛ a kpãafʊ anyãna pɔ, na yɩ ta oor ɛ. Yɩ taa turo nɩbɛ nʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

eng: Dont rush to commission anyone to leadership, and dont participate in the sins of others. Keep yourself morally pure.
local: Ta pɔɔ ir nɩrɛ ka wʊ ɩ nɩdiere ɛ, ta pʊɔ a nɩbɛ bamɩne yeldɛbɛ pɔ ɛ, gu fʊ mãɛ.

eng: Dont drink water anymore, but use a little wine because of your stomach problems and your frequent illnesses.
local: Ta nyuro kʊ̃ɔ tɛɛ ɛ, ma nyũ dãa bãlãa a fʊ pʊɔ baal jũu, a fʊn maa yaar tɩ ɩ baal ɛ.

eng: The sins of some people are obvious, and the sins are judged before the people must face judgment, but the sins of other people show up later.
local: Nɩbɛ bamɩne yeldɛbɛ gãn chãa pɔ, na a dɔ̃ɔ ba nie chen a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ jie, tɩchɛ ka bamɩne yeldɛbɛ ma tu ba chen a be.

eng: In the same way, the good that people do is also obvious and cant be hidden.
local: Lɛ lɛ a tʊ̃vɩɛl amɩne ma gãn chãa pɔ, a ala gba na ba yi ɛ, kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ sɔɔl ɛ.

eng: Those who are under the bondage of slavery should consider their own masters as worthy of full respect so that Gods name and our teaching wont get a bad reputation.
local: Bala jaa na be a gbãgbaar tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bala na tʊ̃ɔ ba, ka nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn yuor 'yɛrdɛɛr ɛ, nɩ a sɩ wiilfʊ ɛ.

eng: And those who have masters who are believers shouldnt look down on them because they are brothers. Instead, they should serve them more faithfully, because the people who benefit from your good service are believers who are loved. Teach and encourage these things.
local: A gbãgbaar bala na tara a nɩbɛrɛ a ba ɩ Yesu turbo, ba ta vɛ̃ ba 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ, ban 'mataa puoro jũu ɛ, ba ir nyãa 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ ba, bojũu ba puoro naa ka ba nʊ̃ ba. Wile a anyãna na fʊ kpãkpãana ba.

eng: If anyone teaches anything different and doesnt agree with sound teaching about our Lord Jesus Christ and teaching that is consistent with godliness.
local: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ wiil wiil yor na ba tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wiilfʊ ɛ, nɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbie na 'yɛr ɛ.

eng: that person is conceited. They dont understand anything but have a sick obsession with debates and arguments. This creates jealousy, conflict, verbal abuse, and evil suspicions.
local: a nɩbɛ nyã wile na wʊ mãɛ, na waa bɔ̃ɔ bon jaa ɛ. Wʊ ma chɩrɛ na nɩ a 'yɛrbie, bojũu a nyɛntãan fɩka a wʊ tɩɛr sɔ̃ɔ naa. A lɛ vɛ̃ naa ka wʊ tara nyuur na wʊ ma jɛɛrɛ, na wʊ ma tʊrɔ a wʊ taaba, na wʊ ma tara tɩɛr dɛɛr nɩ a wʊ taaba.

eng: There is constant bickering between people whose minds are ruined and who have been robbed of the truth. They think that godliness is a way to make money!.
local: Na ba pãa ma chɩrɛ taa nɩ tɩɛr sɔ̃ɔnsɩ. Baa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ ɛ, na ba tɩɛr ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ ɩn lefʊ yele lɛ.

eng: Actually, godliness is a great source of profit when it is combined with being happy with what you already have.
local: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn sɔr tufʊ ɩn lefʊ bon, ala ɩ a ala fʊn tara sɛɛn fʊ naa.

eng: We didnt bring anything into the world and so we cant take anything out of it.
local: Bojũu saa waan bon jaa a wɛr nyã pɔ ɛ, na sɩ kʊ̃ lɛ de bon jaa yin a wɛr pɔ ɛ.

eng: well be happy with food and clothing.
local: A lɛ jũu, ala ɩ sɩ tara na bʊ̃diir nɩ bʊ̃sursɩ, sɩ vɛ̃ ka a sɛɛn sɩ.

eng: But people who are trying to get rich fall into temptation. They are trapped by many stupid and harmful passions that plunge people into ruin and destruction.
local: A bala na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba ɩ tara dẽme, ma lon bɛɛr kaa chɛbaa pɔ, ka jɔl tɩɛr nɩ vɔldɛbɛ ma tɔɔ a nɩbɛ chiine sɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a wɛfʊ jie.

eng: The love of money is the root of all kinds of evil. Some have wandered away from the faith and have impaled themselves with a lot of pain because they made money their goal.
local: Bojũu libie nʊ̃fʊ ɩ naa yelbier jaa bʊrɔ nyɩɩr, ka a bamɩne na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba le, ba tɔɔn jãan a yelmãɛ, na ba kpɛ wõm pɔ.

eng: But as for you, man of God, run away from all these things. Instead, pursue righteousness, holy living, faithfulness, love, endurance, and gentleness.
local: Tɩchɛ a fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ na ɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩrɛ, tɔɔ yi a anyãna a jaa pɔ, na fʊ turo yeltorsɩ, na fʊ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩrɛ, tara sɔɔfʊ na fʊ tara nʊ̃fʊ, na fʊ tara kãnyir, na fʊ ɩ nɩ hɛ lɛ lɛ lɛ.

eng: Compete in the good fight of faith. Grab hold of eternal life—you were called to it, and you made a good confession of it in the presence of many witnesses.
local: Jɛb a sɔɔfʊ jɛɛr na fʊ nyɔɔ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ taa lɛɛ. 'Lɔ pɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔl fʊ a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ fʊn chiir a fʊ pʊɔ a nɩyɔɔ niem.

eng: I command you in the presence of God, who gives life to all things, and Christ Jesus, who made the good confession when testifying before Pontius Pilate.
local: N kpãkpãana fʊ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na kʊrɔ a bonsɩ a jaa nyɛvʊr niem, nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na 'yɛr a wʊ yelmãɛ na wʊ chiir a wʊ pʊɔ a nãa Pontius Pilate niem.

eng: Obey this order without fault or failure until the appearance of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: n kpãkpãana fʊ naa ɩka fʊ bɔ̃ɔ tara a Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinsɩ ka a ta tara dɛɛr, bɩɩ 'mabfʊ ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa daar.

eng: The timing of this appearance is revealed by God alone, who is the blessed and only master, the King of kings and Lord of lords.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na waan a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ. Nãaŋmɩn tɛɛ lɛ sɛɛn dãnfʊ nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ, na wʊ ɩ a nãmɩne ba jaa Nãa, nɩ a sorbo ba jaa Soro.

eng: He alone has immortality and lives in light that no one can come near. No human being has ever seen or is able to see him. Honor and eternal power belong to him. Amen.
local: 'Lɔ tɛɛ lɛ be be ba kpire ɛ, na wʊ be chãa 'lɔ pɔ nɩrɛ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ gbʊr ɛ, a 'lɔ nɩrɛ na ba nyɛrɛ ɛ, bɩɩ na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ wʊ ɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ sɛɛn sɔ̃ɔ jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: Tell people who are rich at this time not to become egotistical and not to place their hope on their finances, which are uncertain. Instead, they need to hope in God, who richly provides everything for our enjoyment.
local: A bala na ɩ a taraa dẽme a pʊ̃pãanyã, kpãa ba ɩka ba ta wile ba mãɛ bɩɩ de a ba tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a bʊ̃tarsɩ ala pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ba dɩɛl Nãaŋmɩn nyã na kʊ sɩ a bʊ̃bʊrɔ bʊrɔsɩ a jaa a sɩ de chɩlɛ nɩ.

eng: Tell them to do good, to be rich in the good things they do, to be generous, and to share with others.
local: Kpãa ba a ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ vɩla na ba nʊ̃ɔ a vɩla tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, na ba ɩ yɛ̃bɔ̃ɔnbɔ põnõ a ba bonsɩ.

eng: When they do these things, they will save a treasure for themselves that is a good foundation for the future. That way they can take hold of what is truly life.
local: A lɛ ban bine na nãbonsɩ guro nɩ a nɩdaar, ka ba na nyɛ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ɩ a yelmãɛ nyɛvʊr.

eng: Timothy, protect what has been given to you in trust. Avoid godless and pointless discussions and the contradictory claims of so-called knowledge.
local: A fʊ̃ʊ Timoti, gu a ala ban de 'yɔ̃ɔ a fʊ nũu pɔ, na fʊ bar a 'yɛrvor nɩ a nɛchɩrɛ ala na ba tara par ɛ, ban bʊɔlɔ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ.

eng: When some people adopted this false knowledge, they missed the goal of faith. May grace be with you all.
local: bamɩne na kpãkpãana nɩ a yelsɩ anyãna, ba bar a sɔɔfʊ sɔr. Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, to promote the promise of life that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa tu a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ pɔ, nɩ a nɛɛ wʊn tɩr kʊ sɩ a nyɛvʊr nyã na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: To Timothy, my dear child. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: sɛɛrɛ naa a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a fʊ̃ʊ Timoti na ɩ a n binʊ̃nãa. Wãɛfʊ, nɩ nɩbaal, nɩ nyã'maar na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jie wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃.

eng: Im grateful to God, whom I serve with a good conscience as my ancestors did. I constantly remember you in my prayers day and night.
local: N ma puor a Nãaŋmɩn nyã ɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ yãan nɩ a n tɩɛr wʊ jaa nɩtãa a lɛ a n sãakpãmɩne na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ, n maa ĩin a fʊ yele ɛ, naa ma tɩɛr fʊ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ fʊ tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ.

eng: When I remember your tears, I long to see you so that I can be filled with happiness.
local: N ma lɩɛb tɩɛr a fʊ nɩbikʊ̃ɔ fʊn ŋma, naa bʊɔrɔ ɩka n nyɛ fʊ ka a n pʊɔ pɛl.

eng: Im reminded of your authentic faith, which first lived in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice. Im sure that this faith is also inside you.
local: N lɩɛb tɩɛr a fʊ yelmãɛ sɔɔfʊ, a 'lɔ a fʊ makʊ̃ma Loisɩ nɩ a a fʊ ma Yunɩsɩ na dɔ̃ɔ tara, lɛ lɛ n mɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka fʊ mɩ tara wʊ naa.

eng: Because of this, Im reminding you to revive Gods gift that is in you through the laying on of my hands.
local: A lɛ jũu, n lɩɛb tɩɛr fʊ ɩka fʊ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir fire a Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ 'lɔ na be a fʊ pɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ dɔɔl fʊ a n nuur ka fʊ nyɛ.

eng: God didnt give us a spirit that is timid but one that is powerful, loving, and self-controlled.
local: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ wʊn kʊ sɩ ba ɩ dãbãɛ Sɩɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ Sɩɛ 'lɔ na kʊ sɩ kpɛ̃ɔ ka sɩ tara nʊ̃fʊ, nɩ mãɛ nyɔɔfʊ.

eng: So dont be ashamed of the testimony about the Lord or of me, his prisoner. Instead, share the suffering for the good news, depending on Gods power.
local: Taa joro vã nɩ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr mʊɔlfʊ ɛ, bɩɩ a maa ban pɔɔ a die pɔ a wʊ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊɔ ma a sɩ 'mataa dire a dɔɔyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ pɔ, na fʊ dɩɛl a Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: God is the one who saved and called us with a holy calling. This wasnt based on what we have done, but it was based on his own purpose and grace that he gave us in Christ Jesus before time began.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ faa sɩ na wʊ bʊɔl sɩ ɩka sɩ ɩ chɛchɛ, a ba ɩ a sɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ bɔfʊ nɩ a wʊ wãɛfʊ jũu lɛ. Sɩ nyɛn a wãɛfʊ nyã a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ tɩchɛ ka a wɛr wa maal.

eng: Now his grace is revealed through the appearance of our savior, Christ Jesus. He destroyed death and brought life and immortality into clear focus through the good news.
local: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, Nãaŋmɩn wiil sɩn a wãɛfʊ nyã tu a sɩ Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa a wɛr pɔ, na wʊ wa tʊ̃ɔ kũu tɩ na wʊ de a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ wiil sɩ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

eng: I was appointed a messenger, apostle, and teacher of this good news.
local: A 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna jũu lɛ wʊ ir ma ɩka n ɩ mʊmʊɔlɔ nɩ nɩtʊ̃nãa nɩ wiwile.

eng: This is also why Im suffering the way I do, but Im not ashamed. I know the one in whom Ive placed my trust. Im convinced that God is powerful enough to protect what he has placed in my trust until that day.
local: A anyãna jũu lɛ n dire a dɔɔyɛ, tɩchɛ vã ba kpɛ ma ɛ, bojũu n bɔ̃ɔn a nɩrɛ 'lɔ ɩn sɔɔ naa bɔ̃ɔn ɩka wʊn gu ma naa tɩ tãn a bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a ala wʊn de 'yɔ̃ɔ a n nuur pɔ.

eng: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching that you heard from me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Nyɔɔ a 'yɛr sʊ̃ ala a lɛ nɛ fʊn wõ yi a n sɛ̃, a sɔɔfʊ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ ala na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Protect this good thing that has been placed in your trust through the Holy Spirit who lives in us.
local: Gu a yelmãɛ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na de 'yɔ̃ɔ a fʊ nuur pɔ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sʊ̃ʊfʊ 'lɔ na be a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: You know that everyone in Asia has turned away from me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.
local: Fʊ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a bala ba jaa na be a Asɩya tɔr man bar, Fɩgɛlusɩ nɩ Hɛmogɛnusɩ gba mɩ pʊɔ ba naa.

eng: May the Lord show mercy to Onesiphorus household, because he supported me many times and he wasnt ashamed of my imprisonment.
local: Nãaŋmɩn wʊ maal vɩla kʊ a Onesiforusɩ nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme, bojũu 'lɔ lɛ ma 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ma ãkpɛ̃ɔ, vã ba kpɛ wʊ ɩn be a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ jũu ɛ.

eng: After I arrived in Rome, he quickly looked for me and found me.
local: Wʊ gba na wa wa a Worom, wʊ yɔ bɔ man nɩbijɩɛ tɩ nyɛ ma.

eng: May the Lord allow him to find his mercy on that day .
local: A sɩ Soro wʊ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ a wʊ nyɛ maal vɩla a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ bɩbir daar. Fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ wʊn sʊ̃ʊ ma jã be a Efesus.

eng: So, my child, draw your strength from the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ na ɩ a n bie, pãa kpɛ̃mɛ a wãɛfʊ 'lɔ na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Take the things you heard me say in front of many other witnesses and pass them on to faithful people who are also capable of teaching others.
local: A lɛ fʊn wõ a n sɛ̃ a nɩyɔɔ bala niem, de wiil a yelmãɛ dẽme mɩ nɩ na tʊ̃ɔ wiil a ba taaba.

eng: Accept your share of suffering like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
local: A fʊ̃ʊ mɩ, pʊɔ sɩ dire a dɔɔyɛ nɩtãa Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto soja mãɛ.

eng: Nobody who serves in the military gets tied up with civilian matters, so that they can please the one who recruited them.
local: A soja 'lɔ na be a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, ma bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka a wʊ maalfʊ a pɛlɛ a 'lɔ na de wʊ a tʊ̃mɔ̃, maa lɛ tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ bere a bɩbir jaa yelbʊɔrsɩ pɔ ɛ.

eng: Also in the same way, athletes dont win unless they follow the rules.
local: Ala ɩ a bala na joro chɩrɛ taa bʊɔrɔ na ɩka ba dɔ̃ɔ a ba taaba, ba ma jon tu a lɛ ban wile.

eng: A hardworking farmer should get the first share of the crop.
local: A kʊɔraa 'lɔ na ba joro yãan ɛ, lɛ ma de a bʊ̃dɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Think about what Im saying; the Lord will give you understanding about everything.
local: Tɩɛr kaa a lɛ ɩn 'yɛrɛ, bojũu a sɩ Soro na kʊ fʊ naa a jaa par bɔ̃ɔfʊ.

eng: Remember Jesus Christ, who was raised from the dead and descended from David. This is my good news.
local: Tɩɛr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ir a kũu pɔ, na yi a David bala pɔ. A anyãna lɛ ɩ a maa 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ.

eng: This is the reason Im suffering to the point that Im in prison like a common criminal. But Gods word cannot be imprisoned.
local: a pɔ lɛ n dire a dɔɔyɛ, a ba wa lũ ma nɩ bɔ̃jɔrsɩ nɩdɛɛr kaar. Tɩchɛ baa tʊ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr lũ ɛ.

eng: This is why I endure everything for the sake of those who are chosen by God so that they too may experience salvation in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
local: A lɛ jũu lɛ so, ka nyɔɔ n mãɛ a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na ir jũu ka ba mɩ na nyɛ a faafʊ 'lɔ na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr.

eng: This saying is reliable: If we have died together, we will also live together.
local: A 'yɛr na ɩ yelmãɛ nɩ nyã ɩka, ala ɩ sɩn nɩ 'lɔ lɛ 'mataa kpi, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ lɛ na 'mataa tara a nyɛvʊr.

eng: If we endure, we will also rule together. If we deny him, he will also deny us.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ nyɔɔn sɩ mãɛ, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ lɛ na 'mataa di a nãa. Ala ɩ sɩ chiir wʊ naa, wʊ mɩ na chiir sɩ naa.

eng: If we are disloyal, he stays faithful because he cant be anything else than what he is.
local: Ala ɩ sɩn baa tara yelmãɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ 'lɔ chɛnɛ na tara yelmãɛ, bojũu wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ chiir a wʊ mãɛ ɛ.

eng: Remind them of these things and warn them in the sight of God not to engage in battles over words that arent helpful and only destroy those who hear them.
local: Mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tɩɛrɛ ba a anyãna, na fʊ kpãana ba a Nãaŋmɩn niem ɩka, ba ta chɩrɛ taa nɩ a 'yɛrbie ɛ. A ba maala vɩla jaa ɛ, tɩchɛ a ma sɔ̃ɔn a bala na chɛlɛ tɩɛr.

eng: Make an effort to present yourself to God as a tried-and-true worker, who doesnt need to be ashamed but is one who interprets the message of truth correctly.
local: Mɔ̃ na fʊ de fʊ mãɛ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, an ɩ a 'lɔ mãɛ lɛ pɛɛ fʊ, na fʊ ɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ 'lɔ na ba joro vĩ ɛ, na fʊ wile a yelmãɛ 'yɛr na tor.

eng: Avoid their godless discussions, because they will lead many people into ungodly behavior.
local: Bar a nɛchɩrɛ ala na ba tara par ɛ, bojũu a lɛ na jãn nɩbɛ bar ka ba kʊ̃ lɛ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ɛ.

eng: and their ideas will spread like an infection. This includes Hymenaeus and Philetus.
local: A ba wiilfʊ na yɔɔn gbõtor kaar. Hɩmɩnayas nɩ Filetusɩ mɩ pʊɔ ba naa.

eng: who have deviated from the truth by claiming that the resurrection has already happened. This has undermined some peoples faith.
local: Ba bar a yelmãɛ tɩ 'yɛr ɩka kũu pɔ ir fʊ po naa, na ba sɔ̃ɔn bamɩne sɔɔfʊ.

eng: Gods solid foundation is still standing with this sign: The Lord knows the people who belong to him, and Everyone who confesses the Lords name must avoid wickedness. .
local: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr par kparaa ara na, ka a sɛbie anyã sɛb a wʊ pɔ, A sɩ Soro bɔ̃ɔn a bala jaa na ɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ. Na wʊ lɛ 'yɛr, Vɛ̃ ka a bala jaa na bʊɔlɔ a sɩ Soro yuor, tɔɔ yɩ putuyele pɔ.

eng: In a mansion, there arent just gold and silver bowls but also some bowls that are made of wood and clay. Some are meant for special uses, some for garbage.
local: A yir kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ, bʊ̃dimaal bomo ma ben be, ka amɩne ɩ sɛlma, nɩ kpãna, tɩchɛ ka amɩne mɩ ɩ daar nɩ yɔɔraa, ka amɩne ɩ bʊ̃'yɔ̃ɔnsɩ, ka amɩne ɩ babãma bomo.

eng: So if anyone washes filth off themselves, they will be set apart as a special bowl. They will be useful to the owner of the mansion for every sort of good work.
local: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ jaa na pɛɛn wʊ mãɛ a bonsɩ anyã ɩn bʊɔl kaar, wʊn kaara na bʊ̃dimaal bomo na tara 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ na wʊ oo wʊ mãɛ tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a yir sʊɔ, ka wʊn tʊ̃ɔ de maal tʊ̃vɩla jaa bʊrɔ.

eng: Run away from adolescent cravings. Instead, pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace together with those who confess the Lord with a clean heart.
local: Tɔɔ yɩ a pɔlbil ãgãn bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ pɔ, na fʊ turo yeltorsɩ, na fʊ tara sɔɔfʊ, nɩ nʊ̃fʊ, nɩ nyã'maar, 'matãan a bala na puoro a sɩ Soro nɩ a nyã chɛchɛ.

eng: Avoid foolish and thoughtless discussions, since you know that they produce conflicts.
local: Tɔr a jɔl yele nɩ a nɛchɩrɛ na ba tara par ɛ, bojũu a maa yaara tɩ waan jɛɛr ɛ.

eng: Gods slave shouldnt be argumentative but should be kind toward all people, able to teach, patient.
local: A ba sɛɛ ɩka a sɩ Soro tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ bʊɔrɔ jɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ maala vɩla kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa, na wʊ tʊ̃ɔ wile, na wʊ tara kãnyir.

eng: and should correct opponents with gentleness. Perhaps God will change their mind and give them a knowledge of the truth.
local: A bala na chɩrɛ, wiil ba jomm, amɩne Nãaŋmɩn na wa sɔɔ naa ka ba lɩɛb a ba tɩɛr, na ba wa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ.

eng: They may come to their senses and escape from the devils trap that holds them captive to do his will.
local: Lɛ lɛ a ba tɩɛr na yuo a ba faa ba mãɛ yin a Satan chɛbaa pɔ, a lɛ wʊn nyɔɔr ba a ba ɩrɛ a wʊ bɔfʊ.

eng: Understand that the last days will be dangerous times.
local: Tɩchɛ bɔ̃ɔn a yele nyãna ɩka a bɩbir baaraa daar, dɔɔyɛ na ben be.

eng: People will be selfish and love money. They will be the kind of people who brag and who are proud. They will slander others, and they will be disobedient to their parents. They will be ungrateful, unholy.
local: Nɩbɛ na nʊ̃n a ba mãɛ, libinʊ̃nbɔ, mãɛ 'mɔɔfʊ, ba kʊ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩbɛ ɛ, na ba kʊ̃ wõnõ a ba dɔɔrbɔ toor ɛ, ka bon maa sɛɛ ba ɛ, na ba kʊ̃ ɩ chɛchɛ ɛ.

eng: unloving, contrary, and critical. They will be without self-control and brutal, and they wont love what is good.
local: Ba maa tara nɩrɛ tɩɛr ɛ, ba maa vɛ̃ kʊ nɩrɛ ɛ, na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa yoe, baa nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ ɛ, na ba 'yɛrɛ 'yɛrbikpãɛn, na ba chire yelvɩla.

eng: They will be people who are disloyal, reckless, and conceited. They will love pleasure instead of loving God.
local: Ban ɩn gagarsɩ, na ba ɩ jukpãɛn dẽme, na ba bʊɔrɔ yuor, ban nʊ̃n bʊ̃vɩɛlsɩ gar ban nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: They will look like they are religious but deny Gods power. Avoid people like this.
local: ba maal ba mãɛ Nãaŋmɩn puorbo kaar, tɩ chiir a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ. Ta gbɛɛrɛ ba ɛ.

eng: Some will slither into households and control immature women who are burdened with sins and driven by all kinds of desires.
local: A ba pɔ lɛ a bamɩne ma fara kpɩɛrɛ a yie pɔ na ba yʊɔrɔ bɛlɛ a pɔbɔ bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ a ba tɩɛr gaa jie ɛ, ka a ba yeldɛbɛ dɔl taa, ka a yeldɛbɛ jaa vɔlaa ma nyɔɔ ba.

eng: These women are always learning, but they can never arrive at an understanding of the truth.
local: Ba ma jãna na bɩbir jaa tɩ ba maa tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ ɛ.

eng: These people oppose the truth in the same way that Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses. Their minds are corrupt and their faith is counterfeit.
local: Nɩtãa lɛ a Janɩsɩ nɩ Jãbɩrɛsɩ na ba sɔɔ a Mosesɩ ɛ, lɛ mɩ lɛ a nɩbɛ banyãna mɩ tɔr a yelmãɛ, baa tara tɩɛr vɩla ɛ, a sɔɔfʊ yele jũu, ba ɩn faa.

eng: But they wont get very far. Their foolishness will become obvious to everyone like those others.
local: A ba yele kʊ̃ chen tɛɛr ɛ, a lɛ an kaara a nɩbɛ ayi banyãna. Nɩrɛ jaa na nyɛn a lɛ ban jɔl jã.

eng: But you have paid attention to my teaching, conduct, purpose, faithfulness, patience, love, and endurance.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ gba jaa nyɛn a n wiilfʊ bɔ̃ɔ, lɛ a n beraa na kaara, bon 'lɔ ɩn bʊɔrɔ a n nyɛvʊr pɔ, a n sɔɔfʊ, a n kãnyir, a n nʊ̃fʊ lɛ ɩn ara kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: You have seen me experience physical abuse and ordeals in places such as Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I put up with all sorts of abuse, and the Lord rescued me from it all!.
local: a dɔɔyɛ ɩn di, nɩ a lɛ ban ge ma. Fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ na pɔɔ ma a Antiok, nɩ a Ikoniyum, nɩ a Lɩstɩra tẽn pɔ, tɩchɛ ka a sɩ Soro faa ma yin a jaa pɔ.

eng: In fact, anyone who wants to live a holy life in Christ Jesus will be harassed.
local: Sɩrɛ jaa, a bala jaa na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba turo a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr, na ba pɛlɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pʊɔ, na nyɛn gefʊ.

eng: But evil people and swindlers will grow even worse, as they deceive others while being deceived themselves.
local: tɩchɛ a putudẽme nɩ a bala na maal ba mãɛ nɩmɩn kaar, na kpɛ̃n sɔ̃ɔnaa pɔ, na ba wɛ, ba bɛlɛ naa ba taaba, ka ba kpɛ taa bɛlfʊ pɔ.

eng: But you must continue with the things you have learned and found convincing. You know who taught you.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ, mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a lɛ fʊn jãn na fʊ sɔɔ de, bojũu fʊ bɔ̃ɔn a nɩrɛ 'lɔ sɛ̃ fʊn jãn.

eng: Since childhood you have known the holy scriptures that help you to be wise in a way that leads to salvation through faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: nɩ lɛ a fʊ bibile sɔ̃ɔ jaa fʊn bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn, na tʊ̃ɔ sʊ̃ʊ fʊ ka fʊ tara yɛ̃, nyɛ faafʊ, fʊn sɔɔ de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

eng: Every scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching, for showing mistakes, for correcting, and for training character.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn gãma a jaa yi naa a wʊ sɛ̃, na a sɛɛ wiilfʊ, na a wile 'mabfʊ nɩ chɔɔrfʊ, naa na wiil nɩrɛ ka wʊ ɩ nɩtor.

eng: so that the person who belongs to God can be equipped to do everything that is good.
local: Lɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩrɛ na bɔ̃ɔ na wʊ kpɛ̃mɛ kʊ tʊ̃vɩla jaa bʊrɔ.
