eng: Im giving you this commission in the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who is coming to judge the living and the dead, and by his appearance and his kingdom.
local: N kpãana fʊ naa a Nãaŋmɩn niem nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa tɔɔr a kũn nɩ a vʊɛ 'yɛr, a wʊ waa daar, nɩ a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ.

eng: Preach the word. Be ready to do it whether it is convenient or inconvenient. Correct, confront, and encourage with patience and instruction.
local: Mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr sɔ̃ɔ jaa, ka sɔr yuon bɩɩ ka sɔr ba yuo ɛ, kpãana ba, na fʊ wile, na fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba ãkpãɛn, na fʊ tara kãnyir wile nɩ.

eng: There will come a time when people will not tolerate sound teaching. They will collect teachers who say what they want to hear because they are self-centered.
local: Bojũu sɔ̃ɔ waara ka nɩbɛ kʊ̃ lɛ chɛlɛ a wiilfʊ ala na tor ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a ba tobo jɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba 'yɛryor wõfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka ba bʊɔl wiwiilyɔɔ lɔ̃ɔtaar ka ba wile ba lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ.

eng: They will turn their back on the truth and turn to myths.
local: Ban pãa lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ na ba chɛlɛ a wiilfʊ ala na ɩ jire.

eng: But you must keep control of yourself in all circumstances. Endure suffering, do the work of a preacher of the good news, and carry out your service fully.
local: Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, na fʊ tara kãnyir a fʊ dɔɔyɛ pɔ, na fʊ mʊɔlɔ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, na fʊ tʊ̃ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

eng: Im already being poured out like a sacrifice to God, and the time of my death is near.
local: Bojũu a n nyɛvʊr nɩ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ ma ben baaraa ka n kʊ̃ yaar tɩ kpi ɛ.

eng: I have fought the good fight, finished the race, and kept the faith.
local: Maa jɛb a jɛbvɩla, naa jo baar tun a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, naa tara a sɔɔfʊ.

eng: At last the champions wreath that is awarded for righteousness is waiting for me. The Lord, who is the righteous judge, is going to give it to me on that day. Hes giving it not only to me but also to all those who have set their heart on waiting for his appearance.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɩ Soro na ɩ a yelmãɛ tɔ tɔɔrɔ bin naa a nyɛvʊr nãa jupil gun ma, wʊn na kʊ ma a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, maa tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala jaa na nʊ̃ a wʊ waa.

eng: Do your best to come to me quickly.
local: Mɔ̃ wa a n sɛ̃ fɔfɔɔ jaa.

eng: Demas has fallen in love with the present world and has deserted me and has gone to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
local: Bojũu Demas na nʊ̃ a dɩna wɛr jũu tɔr ma naa tɩ chen a Tɛsalonika, ka a Kɩrɩsɩn mɩ chen Galatiya ka Titusɩ mɩ chen Dalmatiya.

eng: Only Luke is with me. Get Mark, and bring him with you. He has been a big help to me in the ministry.
local: Luka tɛɛ lɛ be a n sɛ̃. Yɔbɔ Maakɩ ka yɩ 'mataa wa, bojũu wʊ tara na tɔ̃nɔ̃ na wʊn sʊ̃ʊ ma a tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

eng: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
local: N tʊ̃n Tɩchɩkusɩ be a Efesus.

eng: When you come, bring along the coat I left with Carpus in Troas. Also bring the scrolls and especially the parchments.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ wa waara, de a fuuvɛɛ 'lɔ ɩn bar be a Toroyas be a Kapusɩ sɛ̃ nɩ a gãma na fʊ 'mataa den a sɛɛr ala ban sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a pɛr gãn pɔ waan.

eng: Alexander, the craftsman who works with metal, has really hurt me. The Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
local: Aleksanda na ɩ a sãakuro maal man dɛɛr, a sɩ Soro na yab wʊn a lɛ wʊn maal ma.

eng: But watch out for him, because he opposes our teaching.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ mɩ, bɔ̃ɔ a wʊ yele sʊ̃, bojũu wʊ chɩrɛ naa a lɛ sɩn 'yɛrɛ.

eng: No one took my side at my first court hearing. Everyone deserted me. I hope that God doesnt hold it against them!.
local: A dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ n 'yɛr faa a n mãɛ, nɩrɛ jaa ba wa pʊɔ ma ɛ, tɩchɛ ba jaa tɔr man bar. Nãaŋmɩn wʊ ta de a lɛ yãan ba sãma ɛ.

eng: But the Lord stood by me and gave me strength, so that the entire message would be preached through me and so all the nations could hear it. I was also rescued from the lions mouth!.
local: Tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro ara na gu ma na wʊ kʊ ma kpɛ̃ɔ, ka a na tu a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a 'yɛrbir tʊ̃ɔ mʊɔl, ka a bala na ba puor ɛ, wõ naa. Lɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn faa ma a jukpɛ̃ɛ nɛɛ pɔ.

eng: The Lord will rescue me from every evil action and will save me for his heavenly kingdom. To him be the glory forever and always. Amen.
local: A sɩ Soro na faa man yin yelbier a jaa pɔ, na wʊ chiin ma a wʊ saaju nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila and the household of Onesiphorus.
local: Puor Pɩrɩsɩla nɩ Akuila, nɩ a Onesiforusɩ yir dẽme ba jaa.

eng: Erastus stayed in Corinth, and I left Trophimus in Miletus because of his illness.
local: Erastus chɛnɛ na be Korɩntɩ. Torofimusɩ an ɔɔrɔ ka n bar wʊ be Miletusɩ.

eng: Try hard to come to me before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers and sisters say hello.
local: Mɔ̃ tɩ na fʊ wa tɩchɛ ka ɔɔr daar ta. Yubulus puoro fʊ naa nɩ Pudɛnsɩ nɩ Linus nɩ Kɩlaudiya nɩ a yɛɛr ba jaa.

eng: The Lord be with your spirit. Grace be with you all.
local: A sɩ Soro wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃, ka a wʊ wãɛfʊ be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

eng: From Paul, a slave of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. Im sent to bring about the faith of Gods chosen people and a knowledge of the truth that agrees with godliness.
local: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa, Nãaŋmɩn ir man tʊ̃ ɩka n tɩ sʊ̃ʊ a wʊ nɩchɛl irsɩ sɔɔfʊ ka ba bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ tɩ turo a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba turo.

eng: Their faith and this knowledge are based on the hope of eternal life that God, who doesnt lie, promised before time began.
local: Ala lɛ ɩ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔn, a Nãaŋmɩn na ba ŋmaara jir ɛ, na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ sɩ a nyɛvʊr nyã yele sɛrɛ tɩ bon jaa wa piel.

eng: God revealed his message at the appropriate time through preaching, and I was trusted with preaching this message by the command of God our savior.
local: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ na sɛɛ na wa ta, Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃ naa ka a wʊ 'yɛr gã chãa pɔ, ka n 'yɛrɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a sɩ Fafaara na de kʊ ma ɩka n 'yɛr.

eng: To Titus, my true child in a common faith. Grace and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our savior.
local: N sɛɛrɛ na a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a fʊ̃ʊ Titusɩ na sɔɔ a Yesu jũu, fʊ ɩ naa a n bie. Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ sɩ Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jie, a be a fʊ sɛ̃.

eng: The reason I left you behind in Crete was to organize whatever needs to be done and to appoint elders in each city, as I told you.
local: Lɛ na so ka n bar fʊ a Kɩrete paal nɩ nyã, ɩka fʊ baar maal a ala na chɛ ka a tor, tɩ na fʊ ir nɩbɛrɛ a tẽn ala nɩ tãa lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ wiil fʊ.

eng: Elders should be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, and have faithful children who cant be accused of self-indulgence or rebelliousness.
local: A nɩdiere wʊ ta ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ nɩbɛ na nyɛrɛ yeldɛbɛ a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, wʊ ɩ pɔɔ bʊ̃'yen sʊɔ, na wʊ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ a wʊ bibiir na sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn, na ba ta ɩ bigãlsɩ nɩ bibawõnsɩ ɛ.

eng: This is because supervisors should be without fault as Gods managers: they shouldnt be stubborn, irritable, addicted to alcohol, a bully, or greedy.
local: A nɩdiere an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ wʊ kaara jũu, wʊ ta ɩ tuor kʊ a nɩbɛ ɛ, wʊ ta ɩ nɩrɛ suur na ire fɔfɔɔ ɛ, na wʊ mɩ ta ɩ dãnburo ɛ, wʊ ta ɩ nɩrɛ na jɛɛrɛ, bɩɩ bʊɔrɔ libie na ba tu sɔr ɛ.

eng: Instead, they should show hospitality, love what is good, and be reasonable, ethical, godly, and self-controlled.
local: Wʊ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na diere sãanba, na wʊ nʊ̃ vɩla maalfʊ, na wʊ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nyɔɔrɔ wʊ mãɛ, na wʊ ma ɩrɛ a lɛ na tor, na wʊ ɩ nɩchɛchɛ, tɩ kpãana wʊ mãɛ.

eng: They must pay attention to the reliable message as it has been taught to them so that they can encourage people with healthy instruction and refute those who speak against it.
local: Wʊ nyɔɔ a yelmãɛ 'yɛr nyã tara kpɛ̃ɔ nɩtãa lɛ an wiil. Lɛ lɛ wʊn tʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a bamɩne ãkpãɛn nɩ a yelmãɛ wiilfʊ tɩ dɛn a bala na kpɛrɛ.

eng: In fact, there are many who are rebellious people, loudmouths, and deceivers, especially some of those who are Jewish believers.
local: Bojũu a ba yɔɔ bala na ɩ a bawõnsɩ nɩ 'yɛr pɔrsɩ nɩ bɛ̃bɛlbɛ bala na yi a yɔŋmarba jie.

eng: They must be silenced because they upset entire households. They teach what they shouldnt to make money dishonestly.
local: A sɛɛ naa ɩka fʊ ŋmaa ba sɔr, bojũu ba tu naa a ba bɔdɛbɛ bɛl yir gbulo nɩbɛ na ba wile yelsɩ ala na ba sɛɛ ɩka ba wile ɛ.

eng: Someone who is one of their own prophets said, People from Crete are always liars, wild animals, and lazy gluttons.
local: A ba yɛ̃ sʊɔ kɔ̃ɔ gba dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a ba 'yɛr, Yɩn Kɩrete dẽme ɩn jir ŋmarba. Yɩ kaara fɩka dʊ̃dɛbɛ, koro dẽme na bʊɔrɔ bʊ̃diir tɛɛ.

eng: This statement is true. Because of this, correct them firmly, so that they can be healthy in their faith.
local: A dãasɩɛ nyã ɩn sɩrɛ, a lɛ jũu, kpãa ba nɩbijɩɛ ka a ba sɔɔfʊ kpɛ̃mɛ a yelmãɛ wiilfʊ pɔ.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to Jewish myths and commands from people who reject the truth.
local: ka ba ta chɛlɛ a Juu nɩbɛ fuolsɩ nɩ a bala na bar a yelmãɛ ɛ. Ba tɔr a ba wiilfʊ.

eng: Everything is clean to those who are clean, but nothing is clean to those who are corrupt and without faith. Instead, their mind and conscience are corrupted.
local: Bala jaa na tara pʊtɩvɩla, yele jaa vɩla na kʊ ba, tɩchɛ bala na tara pʊtɩdɛɛr, na baa sɔɔ de ɛ, yele jaa ɩn dɛɛr a ba sɛ̃. Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ, a ba pʊtɩɛrsɩ dɛɛ naa.

eng: They claim to know God, but they deny God by the things that they do. They are detestable, disobedient, and disqualified to do anything good.
local: Ba mɩ ɩka ba bɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn tɩchɛ a ba maalfʊ pɔ, ba tɔr wʊ naa. Ba ɩn nɩ'laarsɩ, bawõnsɩ na ba sɛɛn vɩla maalfʊ ɛ.

eng: But you should talk in a way that is consistent with sound teaching.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ Titusɩ, wile a nɩbɛ a lɛ na ɩ a yelmãɛ wiilfʊ.

eng: Tell the older men to be sober, dignified, sensible, and healthy in respect to their faith, love, and patience.
local: Wile a danyɔ̃n ka ba bal nɩbir, lɛ na vɛ̃ naa ka nɩbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba na ba nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ, ka a ba sɔɔfʊ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ nɩ kãnyir tarfʊ chaar kʊ a nɩbɛ.

eng: Likewise, tell the older women to be reverent in their behavior, teaching what is good, rather than being gossips or addicted to heavy drinking.
local: Lɛ mɩ lɛ, wile a pɔɔnyɔ̃n ka ba joro Nãaŋmɩn dãbãɛ na ba ta ɩ gagarsɩ ɛ, bɩɩ de ba ju 'yɔ̃ɔ dãa pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka ba wile a lɛ na vɩla.

eng: That way they can mentor young women to love their husbands and children.
local: Bala wa be a nɩtɔ̃, ban tʊ̃ɔn wile a pɔɔbil nɩ yɛ̃ ka ba nʊ̃ a ba sɩrbɛ nɩ a ba bibiir.

eng: and to be sensible, morally pure, working at home, kind and submissive to their own husbands, so that Gods word wont be ridiculed.
local: tɩ nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ nɩ pʊpɛl, tɩ ɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ a yir na ba maala vɩla, tɩ turo a ba sɩrbɛ nɛɛ, ka nɩrɛ jaa ta nyɛ yeldɛɛr a ba Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr pɔ ɛ.

eng: Likewise, encourage the younger men to be sensible.
local: Lɛ mɩ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ, 'yɔ̃ɔ a pɔlbil ãkpãɛn ka ba nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ.

eng: in every way. Offer yourself as a role model of good actions. Show integrity, seriousness.
local: Yele jaa pɔ, vɛ̃ ka ba nyɛ a fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ maal vɩla jãnɛ. Vɛ̃ ka ba nyɛ a fʊ nɩbijɩɛ nɩ yelmãɛ a fʊ wiilfʊ pɔ.

eng: and a sound message that is above criticism when you teach, so that any opponent will be ashamed because they wont find anything bad to say about us.
local: a fʊ 'yɛr na tor jũu, fʊ yuor kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, ka a vĩ kpɛ a bala na kpɛrɛ fʊ, bojũu baa nyɛ 'yɛrdɛɛr jaa na 'yɛr a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: Tell slaves to submit to their own masters and please them in everything they do. They shouldnt talk back.
local: Wiil a gbãgbaar ka ba turo a ba nɩbɛrɛ nɛɛ yele jaa pɔ, na yɩ pɛl a ba pʊʊr na yɩ ta lɩɛrɛ ba nɛɛ ɛ.

eng: or steal. Instead, they should show that they are completely reliable in everything so that they might make the teaching about God our savior attractive in every way.
local: Ba tara yelmãɛ yele jaa pɔ, na ba ta juro a ba puor ɛ. Yɩn be ɩrɛ a lɛ, yele jaa yɩn maala, ban nyɛ naa a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a sɩ yeldɛɛr Fafaara 'yɛr nʊ̃mɔ̃ a ba sɛ̃.

eng: The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all people.
local: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn wiil sɩ naa a wʊ wãɛfʊ ka nɩrɛ jaa na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ faafʊ.

eng: It educates us so that we can live sensible, ethical, and godly lives right now by rejecting ungodly lives and the desires of this world.
local: A wile sɩ naa ka sɩ na tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a ala Nãaŋmɩn na 'laar, bɩɩ vɛ̃ ka a wɛr nyã vɔlaa dib sɩ ɛ, tɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ mãɛ nyɔɔfʊ nɩ yeltorsɩ nɩ yelmãɛ a dɩna wɛr nyã pɔ.

eng: At the same time we wait for the blessed hope and the glorious appearance of our great God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: A lɛ sɩn chɛnɛ chɛlɛ ka a wɛr nyã pɔ, sɩ chɛnɛ na chɛlɛ a bɩbir kpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ Fafaara na lɩɛb wa nɩ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: He gave himself for us in order to rescue us from every kind of lawless behavior, and cleanse a special people for himself who are eager to do good actions.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ kpi a sɩ jũu na wʊ da sɩ faa sɩ yin a putuyele nyã pɔ, na wʊ pɛɛ a sɩ dɛbɛ bar ka sɩ ɩ wʊ mãɛ nɩbɛ, ka vɩla maalfʊ ɩ sɩ vɔlaa.

eng: Talk about these things. Encourage and correct with complete authority. Dont let anyone disrespect you.
local: Wile a anyãna, na fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn ba ãkpãɛn tɩ kpãana ba nɩbijɩɛ. Ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa kaa fʊ pɔrɔ ɛ.

eng: From Paul, who is a prisoner for the cause of Christ Jesus, and our brother Timothy. To Philemon our dearly loved coworker.
local: Maa Pɔɔl ban pɔɔ die pɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu nɩ Timoti na ɩ a sɩ yɛbɛ, lɛ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a Filemon na ɩ a sɩ badatuo na wʊ ɩ a sɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ ãsʊɔ.

eng: Apphia our sister, Archippus our fellow soldier, and the church that meets in your house.
local: na sɩ mɩ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ Afɩya na ɩ a sɩ yɛpɔɔ, nɩ Archipus na ɩ a sɩ soja ãsʊɔ, nɩ a pupuorbiir bala na ma 'lɔɔ a fʊ yir puor.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, a be a fʊ sɛ̃.

eng: Philemon, I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: N ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan sɔ̃ɔ jaa, naa ma pʊrɔ a fʊ yuor a n Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ.

eng: because Ive heard of your love and faithfulness, which you have both for the Lord Jesus and for all Gods people.
local: bojũu n wõn a fʊ sɔɔfʊ fʊn tara a sɩ Soro Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ, nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ fʊn tara nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa.

eng: I pray that your partnership in the faith might become effective by an understanding of all that is good among us in Christ.
local: N sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn ɩka fʊ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir fʊ̃ʊ wa mana a sɔɔfʊ 'yɛr, na fʊ tara par bɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a yelvɩɛl ala sɩn tara a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: I have great joy and encouragement because of your love, since the hearts of Gods people are refreshed by your actions, my brother.
local: N yɛbɛ, a fʊ nʊ̃fʊ vɛ̃n ka n chɩlɛ, na a 'yɔ̃ɔ ma ãkpɛ̃ɔ, bojũu fʊ 'maan a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ nyãn.

eng: Therefore, though I have enough confidence in Christ to command you to do the right thing.
local: A lɛ jũu, ɩn naa tʊ̃ɔ chɛ nyãa a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ gba naa kpãa fʊ ɩka fʊ tʊ̃ a lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka fʊ tʊ̃.

eng: I would rather appeal to you through love. I, Paul—an old man, and now also a prisoner for Christ Jesus.
local: tɩchɛ n sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa a nʊ̃fʊ jũu. Maa Pɔɔl pãa ɩn danyɔ̃ɔ, naa ɩ nɩrɛ ban pɔɔ die pɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

eng: appeal to you for my child Onesimus. I became his father in the faith during my time in prison.
local: N sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa a Onɩsɩmɔsɩ na ɩ a maa bie, 'lɔ lɛ lɩɛb a n bie a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ban 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ.

eng: He was useless to you before, but now he is useful to both of us.
local: A sɔ̃ɔ kɔ̃ɔ, waa dɔ̃ɔ tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ fʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã wʊ tara na tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a fʊ̃ʊ nɩ a maa.

eng: Im sending him back to you, which is like sending you my own heart.
local: N tʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ naa, wʊ ɩn a maa mãɛ nyãa ɩka wʊ lɩɛb wa a fʊ sɛ̃.

eng: I considered keeping him with me so that he might serve me in your place during my time in prison because of the gospel.
local: Ɩn taa nʊ̃n ɩka wʊ be a n sɛ̃ na wʊ ta de a fʊ jie sʊ̃nɔ̃ ma ban 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ jũu.

eng: However, I didnt want to do anything without your consent so that your act of kindness would occur willingly and not under pressure.
local: tɩchɛ n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n maal yele jaa ka maa ba sʊʊr fʊ kaa ɛ, ka a vɩla jaa na yi a fʊ nyãa pɔ naa taa ɩ fɩrfʊ ɛ.

eng: Maybe this is the reason that Onesimus was separated from you for a while so that you might have him back forever.
local: Amɩne sɛ̃, ala lɛ tɔ̃ɔ so ka wʊ ŋmaa yi a fʊ sɛ̃ a bãlãa, tɩchɛ na wʊn lɛ wa be a fʊ sɛ̃ jaa kpo kpo.

eng: no longer as a slave but more than a slave—that is, as a dearly loved brother. He is especially a dearly loved brother to me. How much more can he become a brother to you, personally and spiritually in the Lord!.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã waa lɛ chɛnɛ ɩ gbãgbaa ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ɩn gar gbãgbaa, na wʊ ɩ yɛbɛ kʊ fʊ. Wʊ ɩn nɩrɛ ɩn nʊ̃ ka fʊ mɩ gba nʊ̃, wʊn ɩ nɩrɛ nɩ yɛbɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: So, if you really consider me a partner, welcome Onesimus as if you were welcoming me.
local: A lɛ jũu, ala ɩ fʊ nyɛ man ka n ɩ a fʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ, de wʊ nɩtãa a lɛ fʊn taa sɔɔ de ma.

eng: If he has harmed you in any way or owes you money, charge it to my account.
local: Ala ɩ wʊ wa maal fʊn dɛɛr bɩɩ wʊ di fʊn sãn, de pʊɔ a maa sãn pɔ.

eng: I, Paul, will pay it back to you . Of course, I wont mention that you owe me your life.
local: Maa Pɔɔl lɛ sɛɛrɛ a yele nyã nɩ a maa mãɛ nũu. Ɩ̃n yab fʊ naa. N kʊ̃ 'yɛr 'yɛr jaa ɩka a fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ gba mɩ di man sãn ɛ.

eng: Yes, brother, I want this favor from you in the Lord! Refresh my heart in Christ.
local: Ɔ̃ɔ, n yɛbɛ, vɛ̃ ka n nyɛ a tɔ̃nɔ̃ nyã yin a fʊ sɛ̃ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ, 'maa a n nyãa a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Im writing to you, confident of your obedience and knowing that you will do more than what I ask.
local: N bar tɩɛr a fʊ nɛɛ tufʊ jũu, naa sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka fʊn maal gar a lɛ ɩn sʊɔr fʊ ɩka fʊ maal.

eng: Also, one more thing—prepare a guest room for me. I hope that I will be released from prison to be with you because of your prayers.
local: Yele bʊ̃'yen na chɛ, chɔɔr sãan gaa jie bar ma. A yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ jũu, n tɩɛr ɩka wʊn sɔɔ naa ka a nɩbɛ banyãna yuo ma a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ, ka n wa a yɩ sɛ̃.

eng: Epaphras, who is in prison with me for the cause of Christ Jesus, greets you.
local: Epafaras na ɩ a n tɔ sʊɔ ban 'mataa pɔɔ a die pɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu, puoro fʊ naa.

eng: as well as my coworkers Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke.
local: Ka Maakɩ mɩ nɩ Aristakus nɩ Demas nɩ Luka na ɩ a n taaba tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ, mɩ puoro fʊ naa.

eng: May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit.
local: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃.

eng: Remind them to submit to rulers and authorities. They should be obedient and ready to do every good thing.
local: Tɩɛr a Yesu turbo ɩka ba turo a ba nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme nɛɛ tɩ turo a lɛ jaa ban 'yɛr, na ba chɔɔr gu vɩla jaa maalfʊ.

eng: They shouldnt speak disrespectfully about anyone, but they should be peaceful, kind, and show complete courtesy toward everyone.
local: Ba ta ma ŋmara taa poe ɛ, tɩchɛ ba tara nyã'maar nɩ nɩrɛ jaa na ba tɩɛrɛ taa yele. Ba siir ba mãɛ sɩrɛ jaa ka nɩbɛ nyɛ.

eng: We were once foolish, disobedient, deceived, and slaves to our desires and various pleasures too. We were spending our lives in evil behavior and jealousy. We were disgusting, and we hated other people.
local: Sɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ jɔlɔ a ba kaar nɩ bawõnsɩ ka a Satan bɛl sɩ ka a wɛr nyã bonsɩ a jaa ma ɩrɛ sɩ vɔlaa, ka sɩ lɩɛb gbãgbaar, na sɩ pãa kpɩɛrɛ nɩ ger nɩ nyuur, ka ba 'laar sɩ, ka sɩ mɩ 'laar 'laar taa.

eng: But when God our saviors kindness and love appeared.
local: Tɩchɛ a sɔ̃ɔ na wa ta, a sɩ Fafaara Nãaŋmɩn maal vɩla nɩ a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ na wa wa.

eng: he saved us because of his mercy, not because of righteous things we had done. He did it through the washing of new birth and the renewing by the Holy Spirit.
local: wʊ faa sɩ naa, a ba ɩ a sɩ yelvɩɛl sɩn maal jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ nɩbaal jũu lɛ. Wʊ faa sɩ naa na wʊ pɛɛ sɩ tu a dɔɔfʊ gbɛɛ ayi ka a wʊ Sɩɛ maal sɩ a sɩ ɩ nɩpaalaa.

eng: which God poured out upon us generously through Jesus Christ our savior.
local: a Sɩɛ nyã lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tu a Yesu na ɩ a sɩ Fafaara 'yɔ̃ɔ kʊ sɩ.

eng: So, since we have been made righteous by his grace, we can inherit the hope for eternal life.
local: A lɛ lɛ, wʊn ben maal sɩ ka sɩ tor a wʊ wãɛfʊ jũu, sɩ ɩn a wʊ bʊ̃dirbe, na sɩ lɔb yãan bar guro nɩ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

eng: This saying is reliable. And I want you to insist on these things, so that those who have come to believe in God might give careful attention to doing good. These things are good and useful for everyone.
local: Yelmãɛ 'yɛr nɩ nyã, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka fʊ do ara a yelsɩ anyãna pɔ wile nɩbijɩɛ, a lɛn vɛ̃ naa ka a bala na sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn, de a ba sɔ̃ɔ nɩ a ba tɩɛr ɩrɛ nɩ yelvɩɛlsɩ tɛɛ. A lɛ vɩɛlɛ naa tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ nɩrɛ jaa.

eng: Avoid stupid controversies, genealogies, and fights about the Law, because they are useless and worthless.
local: Tɩchɛ ta chɛlɛ a jɔl chiirfʊ nɩ lɛ a sãakpãmɩne na tu taa mana bɩɩ jɛɛrɛ a nɛɛ 'lɔ ban bin a kõro jaa ɛ, bojũu a anyãna ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

eng: After a first and second warning, have nothing more to do with a person who causes conflict.
local: Kpãa nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ooro gbɛbʊ̃'yen, 'lɔ wa tɔr, lɛ kpãa wʊ a gbɛɛ ayi sʊɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ wa tɔr, fʊ ir nũu tɩchɛ wʊ bar.

eng: because you know that someone like this is twisted and sinful—so they condemn themselves.
local: Fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a nɩrɛ nyã tɔ sʊɔ lo naa, wʊ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka wʊ ɩn dɛɛr.

eng: When I send Artemas or Tychicus to you, try to come to me in Nicopolis, because Ive decided to spend the winter there.
local: N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n tʊ̃ Atɩmasɩ bɩɩ Tɩchɩkusɩ a fʊ sɛ̃, ãsʊɔ jaa na wa tɩ, mɔ̃ tɩ na fʊ tuor ma a be a Nikopolis, bojũu be lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɩka n chen a ɔɔr sɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Help Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey with enthusiasm so that they wont need anything.
local: Mɔ̃ na fʊ sʊ̃ʊ a 'yɛr tɔɔrɔ Jenasɩ nɩ Apolosɩ ka ba ta faa bon jaa a sɔr pɔ ɛ.

eng: But our people should also learn to devote themselves to doing good in order to meet pressing needs so they arent unproductive.
local: Vɛ̃ ka a sɩ nɩbɛ jãn vɩla maalfʊ ka ban tʊ̃ɔ maal a ala ban bʊɔrɔ na ba ta ɩ nɩhayasɩ ɛ.

eng: Everyone with me greets you; greet those who love us faithfully. Grace be with all of you.
local: Bala jaa na be ka a n sɛ̃, puoro fʊ naa. Puor a bala na nʊ̃ sɩ a sɔɔfʊ jũu. A wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

eng: In the past, God spoke through the prophets to our ancestors in many times and many ways.
local: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ po, Nãaŋmɩn tun a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ sɛ̃ na wʊ 'yɛr 'yɛr dẽdẽme kʊ a sɩ sãamɩne sɔɩ yɔɔ jaa pɔ.

eng: In these final days, though, he spoke to us through a Son. God made his Son the heir of everything and created the world through him.
local: tɩchɛ a ber baaraa anyã 'lɔ, wʊ 'yɛr 'yɛr kʊ sɩ tun a wʊ Bie wʊn ir ka wʊn ɩ a bonsɩ a jaa bʊ̃dire. 'Lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ tu maal a wɛr wʊ jaa.

eng: The Son is the light of Gods glory and the imprint of Gods being. He maintains everything with his powerful message. After he carried out the cleansing of people from their sins, he sat down at the right side of the highest majesty.
local: A Bie lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr chãa, na wʊ kaara a Nãaŋmɩn kaar jaa chɔ̃, ka a wʊ 'yɛr na tara kpɛ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ tɩɛn a bonsɩ a jaa taalɛ. A lɛ wʊn wa pɛɛ a yelbier baar, wʊ don tɩ jãnɛ a Tɩɩr Sʊɔ nũsʊ̃ɔ jie be a saaju.

eng: And the Son became so much greater than the other messengers, such as angels, that he received a more important title than theirs.
local: Lɛ lɛ wʊ pãa gar a malakasɩ ba jaa, ka a yuor 'lɔ wʊn nyɛ, mɩ gar a ba bon.

eng: After all, when did God ever say to any of the angels: You are my Son. Today I have become your Father? Or, even, I will be his Father, and he will be my Son? .
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ a malaka ãsʊɔ jaa ɩka, Fʊ ɩn a n Bie, dɩna n lɩɛb a fʊ Sãa, bɩɩ 'yɛr go ɩka, Ɩn ɩ naa a wʊ Sãa, ka wʊ mɩ ɩ a n Bie?.

eng: But then, when he brought his firstborn into the world, he said, All of Gods angels must worship him. .
local: A nɩ mɩ go, a lɛ wʊn waara nɩ a wʊ Bidadɔ̃ɔ ka a wɛr pɔ, wʊ 'yɛr naa, Vɛ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn malakasɩ ba jaa gbur dumo puor wʊ.

eng: He talks about the angels: Hes the one who uses the spirits for his messengers and who uses flames of fire as ministers. .
local: A malakasɩ 'lɔ, nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn 'yɛr a ba 'yɛr, Nãaŋmɩn maal a malakasɩ sɛsɛbɛ kaar. Ba ɩn a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ kaara fɩka bũu 'lɩraa kaar.

eng: But he says to his Son, God, your throne is forever and your kingdoms scepter is a rod of justice. .
local: Tɩchɛ, nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn mɩ 'yɛr a Bie 'yɛr, Nãaŋmɩn, a fʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ na ben be bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa, ka a torfʊ ɩ a fʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ dãgbal.

eng: You loved righteousness and hated lawless behavior. That is why God, your God, has anointed you more than your companions with the oil of joy. .
local: Fʊ nʊ̃n torfʊ tɩ na fʊ 'laar putuyele. A lɛ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a fʊ Nãaŋmɩn, 'mɔɔ fʊ naa ka fʊ do gar a fʊ taaba ba jaa, a lɛ wʊn pʊr a pʊpɛl kãa 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ.

eng: And he says, You, Lord, laid the earths foundations in the beginning, and the heavens are made by your hands. .
local: A Nãaŋmɩn gãn lɛ 'yɛr naa, A pielfʊ daar a fʊ̃ʊ Soro, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ kpar a tẽe par, ka a saaju wʊ jaa ɩ a fʊ nuur tʊ̃mɔ̃.

eng: They will pass away, but you remain. They will all wear out like old clothes. .
local: A jaa na wa sɔ̃ɔ naa, tɩchɛ ka fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ be be, a jaa na wa koraa naa chɩɛr fɔbaa kaar.

eng: You will fold them up like a coat. They will be changed like a person changes clothes, but you stay the same, and the years of your life wont come to an end. .
local: Fʊn pilãa naa fɩka fuu, naa lɩɛb fɔɔr kaar. Tɩchɛ ka a fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ chɛnɛ a lɛ nɛ, ka a fʊ yuomo ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

eng: When has he ever said to any of the angels, Sit at my right side until I put your enemies under your feet like a footstool? .
local: Malaka buor sʊɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ɔ wa 'yɛr kʊ ɩka, Jãnɛ a n nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, ka n wa de a fʊ dɔ̃dẽme ka ba ɩ a fʊ gbɛɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie?.

eng: Arent all the angels ministering spirits who are sent to serve those who are going to inherit salvation?.
local: A ba ɩ a malakasɩ ba jaa ɩ naa a sɩtʊ̃nsɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na ma ir tʊ̃, ka ba wa sʊ̃nɔ̃ a bala na nyɛ a faafʊ ɛ?.

eng: This is why its necessary for us to pay more attention to what we have heard, or else we may drift away from it.
local: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔ chɛlɛ sʊ̃, a lɛ jũu ka a bon 'lɔ sɩn wõ, ka sɩ taa sal lo ɛ.

eng: If the message that was spoken by angels was reliable, and every offense and act of disobedience received an appropriate consequence.
local: Bojũu ala ɩ a malakasɩ 'yɛr ban dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩn yelmãɛ, ka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na jɛb a 'yɛr bɩɩ tɔr a 'yɛr, ma nyɛn a toor tɔɔfʊ 'lɔ na tor.

eng: how will we escape if we ignore such a great salvation? It was first announced through the Lord, and then it was confirmed by those who heard him.
local: ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a sɩn mɩ na ɩ chãɛ, ala ɩ sɩ kaa naa a faa kpɛ̃ɛ nyã pɔrɔ? A sɩ Soro lɛ dɔ̃ɔ nie 'yɛr a faafʊ nyã 'yɛr, ka a bala na wõ naa pãa mɩ man jaa nɛ nɛ nɛ kʊ sɩ.

eng: God also vouched for their message with signs, amazing things, various miracles, and gifts from the Holy Spirit, which were handed out the way he wanted.
local: Nãaŋmɩn mɩ sɔɔ naa na wʊ de jãnsɩ, nɩ tʊ̃fɛrsɩ, nɩ nɛ'maa tʊ̃dẽdẽme, nɩ a lɛ wʊn kʊ sɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ, na wʊ kʊ ãsʊɔ jaa a lɛ na ɩ a wʊ bɔfʊ.

eng: God didnt put the world that is coming under the angels control.
local: A ba ɩ a malakasɩ lɛ na so a wɛr 'lɔ na waara ɛ, a 'lɔ 'yɛr sɩn ben 'yɛrɛ ɛ.

eng: Instead, someone declared somewhere, What is humanity that you think about them? Or what are human beings that you care about them? .
local: Tɩchɛ a jie ãsʊɔ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ mɩ 'yɛr naa, Bo lɛ nɩrɛ ɩ, ka fʊ tara a wʊ tɩɛr, bɩɩ nɩsaal bie mɩ ɩ ka fʊn tara a wʊ tɩɛr?.

eng: For a while you made them lower than angels. You crowned human beings with glory and honor. .
local: Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ maal wʊ, a wʊ ɩ jaa pʊʊr ka a malakasɩ gar wʊ, fʊ den tɩɩr nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ wʊ.

eng: You put everything under their control. When he puts everything under their control, he doesnt leave anything out of control. But right now, we dont see everything under their control yet.
local: Na fʊ de bonsɩ a jaa bin a wʊ gbɛɛ pĩlem. Nãaŋmɩn den bonsɩ a jaa kʊ wʊ, bon jaa ba be be ka waa tʊ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ. Tɩchɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã, saa nyɛ bonsɩ a jaa na siir ba mãɛ kʊ wʊ ɛ.

eng: However, we do see the one who was made lower in order than the angels for a little while—its Jesus! Hes the one who is now crowned with glory and honor because of the suffering of his death. He suffered death so that he could taste death for everyone through Gods grace.
local: Tɩchɛ sɩ nyɛn a Yesu wʊn vɛ̃ ka wʊ ɩ jaa pʊʊr ka a malakasɩ gar wʊ, wʊ den tɩɩr nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ wʊ, bojũu wʊ din a kũu dɔɔyɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ vɛ̃ a wʊ lɛm kũu kaa kʊ nɩrɛ jaa.

eng: It was appropriate for God, for whom and through whom everything exists, to use experiences of suffering to make perfect the pioneer of salvation. This salvation belongs to many sons and daughters whom hes leading to glory.
local: Wʊn waara nɩ dabil yɔɔ a wʊ tɩɩr pɔ, a sɛɛn kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, a 'lɔ na so bonsɩ a jaa, nɩ a 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ bon jaa na tu be be, ka wʊ maal a ba nɩdɔ̃ɔn 'lɔ na faara ba ka wʊ ɩ chɛchɛ tu a wʊ dɔɔyɛ difʊ pɔ.

eng: This is because the one who makes people holy and the people who are being made holy all come from one source. That is why Jesus isnt ashamed to call them brothers and sisters when he says.
local: Ka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na maala a nɩbɛ ka ba ɩrɛ chɛchɛ, nɩ a bala mɩ na ɩ a chɛchɛ ɩ sãa bʊ̃'yen bibiir. A lɛ jũu, vã ba kʊrɔ a Yesu wʊn bʊɔlɔ ba yɛɛr ɛ.

eng: I will publicly announce your name to my brothers and sisters. I will praise you in the middle of the assembly. .
local: na wʊ 'yɛrɛ, Ɩn pʊr a fʊ yuor kʊ a n yɛɛr, naa yiel yiel pɛɛn fʊ a bala na duo puoro fʊ niem.

eng: He also says, I will rely on him. And also, Here I am with the children whom God has given to me. .
local: A nɩ mɩ go, Ɩn dɩɛl a n Nãaŋmɩn. Na wʊ lɛ 'yɛr go, Maa nɩ nyã nɩ a bibiir bala a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ ma.

eng: Therefore, since the children share in flesh and blood, he also shared the same things in the same way. He did this to destroy the one who holds the power over death—the devil—by dying.
local: A bibiir na tara a ãgãn nɩ a jãɩ jũu, ba mɩ dɔɔn a Yesu ka wʊ ɩ a ba ãsʊɔ, wʊ maal a lɛ, ka a wʊ kũu na tʊ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔ a Satan nyã na tara a kũu kpɛ̃ɔ bar.

eng: He set free those who were held in slavery their entire lives by their fear of death.
local: na wʊn faa a bala jaa bar ban dɔɔ, ka a kũu dãbãɛ maal ba a ba lɩɛb gbãgbaar.

eng: Of course, he isnt trying to help angels, but rather hes helping Abrahams descendants.
local: Yelmãɛ jaa a ba ɩ a malakasɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ waan a sʊ̃ʊfʊ nyã ɛ, tɩchɛ a Abraham yɔ̃n 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ.

eng: Therefore, he had to be made like his brothers and sisters in every way. This was so that he could become a merciful and faithful high priest in things relating to God, in order to wipe away the sins of the people.
local: Nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu lɛ so, ka a Nãaŋmɩn maal wʊ a wʊ nyɛtãan a wʊ yɛɛr. Ka a lɛ vɛ̃ a wʊ ɩ nɩbaal kaara na wʊ ɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na tara yelmãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, na wʊn tʊ̃ɔ de a wʊ mãɛ lon a bɔɔr ka a nɩbɛ yeldɛɛr baar.

eng: Hes able to help those who are being tempted, since he himself experienced suffering when he was tempted.
local: Bojũu a wʊ mãɛ mɩ din tuo a bɛɛr kaa pɔ, wʊ mɩ na tʊ̃ɔn sʊ̃ʊ a bala jaa a bɛɛr kaa na nyɔɔ.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters who are partners in the heavenly calling, think about Jesus, the apostle and high priest of our confession.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɛɛr na ba tara chɛfʊ ɛ, na yɩ pʊɔ a saaju bʊɔlfʊ pɔ, yɩ yuo a yɩ tɩɛr kʊ a Yesu, a nɩtʊ̃nãa nɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyã 'yɛr sɩn 'yɛrɛ.

eng: Jesus was faithful to the one who appointed him just like Moses was faithful in Gods house.
local: Wʊ tara na yelmãɛ kʊ a 'lɔ na ir wʊ, nɩtãa lɛ a Mosesɩ mɩ na dɔ̃ɔ tara yelmãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn yir wʊ jaa pɔ.

eng: But he deserves greater glory than Moses in the same way that the builder of the house deserves more honor than the house itself.
local: Yesu nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ na sɛɛ na wʊ gar a Mosesɩ, nɩtãa lɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na mɛ a yir na ma nyɛ a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ gar a yir mãɛ.

eng: Therefore, since the promise that we can enter into rest is still open, lets be careful so that none of you will appear to miss it.
local: A lɛ jũu, an ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ a wʊ pɛ̃nfʊ pɔ kpɛfʊ na chɛnɛ be be, yɩ ɩ a sɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, ka a ãsʊɔ jaa taa wa kpɛ faa ɛ.

eng: We also had the good news preached to us, just as the Israelites did. However, the message they heard didnt help them because they werent united in faith with the ones who listened to it.
local: Bojũu a sɩn mɩ, ba mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ sɩ, nɩtãa lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ ba. Tɩchɛ a 'yɛr ban dɔ̃ɔ mʊɔl kʊ ba, ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, bojũu a 'yɛr tɛɛ lɛ ba wõ, baa de sɔɔfʊ pʊɔ ɛ.

eng: We who have faith are entering the rest. As God said, And because of my anger I swore: They will never enter into my rest! And yet Gods works were completed at the foundation of the world.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɩn bala na sɔɔ de kpɛ̃n a pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, N nyɛn suur naa pɔ 'yɛr, baa be jaa na wa kpɛ a n pɛ̃nfʊ pɔ go ɛ. Tɩchɛ wʊ tʊ̃n a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ baar yi a wɛr pielfʊ daar jaa.

eng: Then somewhere he said this about the seventh day of creation: God rested on the seventh day from all his works. .
local: Bojũu a jie ãsʊɔ wʊ 'yɛr naa a ber ayopõi daar 'yɛr, A ber ayopõi daar, Nãaŋmɩn bar a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ a jaa tɩ pɛ̃n.

eng: But again, in the passage above, God said, They will never enter my rest! .
local: A 'yɛrbie anyãna nɩ a ju pɔ, wʊ lɛ 'yɛr naa, Baa be jaa na wa kpɛ a n pɛ̃nfʊ pɔ ɛ.

eng: Therefore, its left open for some to enter it, and the ones who had the good news preached to them before didnt enter because of disobedience.
local: Sɔr chɛnɛ na yuo ka bamɩne na kpɛ a pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, ka a bala ban de nie mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã kʊ, ba tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ɛ, bojũu bawõnsɩ lɛ ba ɩ.

eng: Just as it says in the passage above, God designates a certain day as today, when he says through David much later, Today, if you hear his voice, dont have stubborn hearts. .
local: A lɛ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ir bɩbir ãsʊɔ na wʊ bʊɔlɔ wʊ dɩna, a kor lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩchɛ a wʊ lɛ wa tu a Nãa David 'yɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a lɛ nɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, Dɩna yɩn wa wõ a Nãaŋmɩn kɔkɔr, yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa kpɛ̃mɛ a yɩ nyãn ɛ.

eng: If Joshua gave the Israelites rest, God wouldnt have spoken about another day later on.
local: Bojũu ala ɩ a Josua dɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃ɔn a nɩbɛ kpɛ̃n a pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ naa lɛ 'yɛr bɩbir ãsʊɔ 'yɛr go ɛ.

eng: Every house is built by someone, but God is the builder of everything.
local: Bojũu a yir jaa, nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ lɛ ma mɛ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ mɛ a bonsɩ a jaa.

eng: So you see that a sabbath rest is left open for Gods people.
local: A ber Ayopõi 'Lɔ Pɛ̃nfʊ chɛnɛ na be be kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ.

eng: The one who entered Gods rest also rested from his works, just as God rested from his own.
local: Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa na wa kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, wʊ mɩ ma pɛ̃n naa a wʊ mãɛ tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ na pɛ̃n a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

eng: Moses was faithful in all Gods house as a servant in order to affirm the things that would be spoken later.
local: Mosesɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ na tara yelmãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn yir wʊ jaa pɔ, na wʊ dire a ala wʊn wa 'yɛr daar kɔ̃ɔ dãasɩɛ.

eng: Therefore, lets make every effort to enter that rest so that no one will fall by following the same example of disobedience.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ɩ a sɩ mʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ kpɛ a pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, ka nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa taa ɩ bawõno a ba kaar na wʊ bãr lo ɛ.

eng: because Gods word is living, active, and sharper than any two-edged sword. It penetrates to the point that it separates the soul from the spirit and the joints from the marrow. Its able to judge the hearts thoughts and intentions.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩn bʊ̃nɩbir, na wʊ ma pɩlpɩlɛ, na wʊ dire gar sɔbʊraa. Wʊ ma ŋmaan jaa kpɛ tɩ gbem a sɩɛ, na wʊ 'mar a kɔɔr, na wʊ wɛl a choofʊ jiir tɩ tãn a kɔɔr kãa pɔ. Wʊ ma tɔɔr tɩɛr nɩ befʊsɩ a jaa na be nɩrɛ nyãa pɔ 'yɛr.

eng: But Jesus was faithful over Gods house as a Son. We are his house if we hold on to the confidence and the pride that our hope gives us.
local: Tɩchɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, wʊ tara na yelmãɛ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn yir. Sɩn lɛ ɩ a wʊ yir, ala ɩ sɩ nyɔɔn nyãa nɩ a tɩɛrtɔfʊ 'lɔ sɩn bʊɔrɔ nɩ a yuor.

eng: No creature is hidden from it, but rather everything is naked and exposed to the eyes of the one to whom we have to give an answer.
local: Bon jaa ba be ka a bʊ̃maalsɩ pɔ naa sɔɔl a Nãaŋmɩn niem ɛ. Bon jaa ba pɔɔ ɛ, a jaa dɩɛl a wʊ niem. 'Lɔ lɛ sɩn wa man a yele a jaa kʊ.

eng: Also, lets hold on to the confession since we have a great high priest who passed through the heavens, who is Jesus, Gods Son.
local: A lɛ jũu, sɩn ben tara a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na gar a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ ba jaa a wʊ do a be a saaju, Yesu na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, yɩ ɩ a sɩ ba gbɛr a sɩ sɔɔfʊ nyã sɩn sɔɔ pɔ.

eng: So, as the Holy Spirit says, Today, if you hear his voice, .
local: Lɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, Dɩna ala ɩ fʊ wõn a Nãaŋmɩn kɔkɔr.

eng: because we dont have a high priest who cant sympathize with our weaknesses but instead one who was tempted in every way that we are, except without sin.
local: Bojũu, saa tara a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ kaa a sɩ balfʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ tara na a 'lɔ mɩ a bɛɛr kaa bʊrɔ bʊrɔ na dɔ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a sɩn mɩ kaar, tɩchɛ waa ɩ yelbier ɛ.

eng: Finally, lets draw near to the throne of favor with confidence so that we can receive mercy and find grace when we need help.
local: Yɩ ɩ a sɩ daa yi a wʊ wãɛfʊ nãa dakɔɔ par nɩ nyãa, na sɩ tɩ de a wʊ nɩbaal na sɩ nyɛ wãɛfʊ, ka a sʊ̃ʊ sɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ an wa wõnõ sɩ.

eng: dont have stubborn hearts as they did in the rebellion, on the day when they tested me in the desert. .
local: yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa kpɛ̃mɛ a yɩ nyãa nɩtãa lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ chɩɩr wʊ ɛ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ bɛɛrɛ wʊ kaara be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ.

eng: That is where your ancestors challenged and tested me, though they had seen my work for forty years. .
local: Be lɛ a yɩ sãakpãmɩne bɛɛr ma kaa na ba mɔ̃n ma lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ tãn yuom lɩjaayi, na ba nyɛ a lɛ ɩn ɩ.

eng: So I was angry with them. I said, Their hearts always go off course, and they dont know my ways. .
local: Ala lɛ so ka n nyɛn a nɩbɛ bala suur naa 'yɛr, A ba tɩɛrsɩ ma yɛ̃yɛlɛ naa. Baa bɔ̃ɔ a n sɔɩ ɛ.

eng: Because of my anger I swore: They will never enter my rest! .
local: Lɛ lɛ, n nyɛn suur naa pɔ 'yɛr, Baa be jaa na wa kpɛ a n pɛ̃nfʊ pɔ go ɛ. .

eng: Watch out, brothers and sisters, so that none of you have an evil, unfaithful heart that abandons the living God.
local: N yɛɛr, yɩ bɔ̃ɔ gu yɩ mãɛ ka ãsʊɔ jaa taa tara yeldɛɛr bɩɩ nyãa na ba sɔɔ de ɛ, na wʊ lɩɛb a wʊ mãɛ yin a Nãaŋmɩn na ba kpire sɛ̃ ɛ.

eng: Instead, encourage each other every day, as long as its called today, so that none of you become insensitive to God because of sins deception.
local: Tɩchɛ yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ãkpãɛn bɩbir jaa, nɩtãa a bɩbir na chɛnɛ ka ba bʊɔlɔ a dɩna, ka yelbier taa bɛl ãsʊɔ jaa ka wʊ kpɛ̃mɛ a wʊ nyãa ɛ.

eng: We are partners with Christ, but only if we hold on to the confidence we had in the beginning until the end.
local: Sɩ wa naa ka a sɩn nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto na wa lɔ̃ɔ põ, ala ɩ sɩ ban gbɛr tɩ tãn a baaraa, a lɛ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ bar tɩɛr.

eng: When it says, Today, if you hear his voice, dont have stubborn hearts as they did in the rebellion. .
local: fɩka a lɛ an ben 'yɛr, Dɩna, yɩn wa wõ a Nãaŋmɩn kɔkɔr, yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa kpɛ̃mɛ a yɩ nyãa ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ chɩɩr wʊ ɛ.

eng: Who was it who rebelled when they heard his voice? Wasnt it all of those who were brought out of Egypt by Moses?.
local: Ba boo lɛ dɔ̃ɔ wõ tɩ chɩrɛ? A ba ɩ a bala Mosesɩ na dɔ̃ɔ tara yin a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ lɛ ɛ?.

eng: And with whom was God angry for forty years? Wasnt it with the ones who sinned, whose bodies fell in the desert?.
local: Ba boo mɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ɔ nyɛn a suur a yuom lɩjaayi? A ba ɩ a bala na maal a dɛɛr ɛ, na ba lo kpi be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ lɛ ɛ?.

eng: And against whom did he swear that they would never enter his rest, if not against the ones who were disobedient?.
local: Ba boo mɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pɔ 'yɛr ɩka ba kʊ̃ kpɛ a wʊ pɛ̃nfʊ jie ɛ, a ba ɩ a bala na dɔ̃ɔ tɔr a wʊ nɛɛ tufʊ bar lɛ ɛ?.

eng: We see that they couldnt enter because of their lack of faith.
local: Lɛ lɛ, sɩ nyɛn ban ba tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ɛ, bojũu baa tara sɔɔfʊ ɛ.

eng: Every high priest is taken from the people and put in charge of things that relate to God for their sake, in order to offer gifts and sacrifices for sins.
local: A Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, ba ma kãan ir wʊ a nɩbɛ pɔ, na ba ir wʊ a wʊ ma ara kʊ ba nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn sãlsɔɔ, na wʊ ma de a ba kʊfʊsɩ nɩ a ba bɔɔrlo bonsɩ loro nɩ a ba yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr.

eng: The high priest is able to deal gently with the ignorant and those who are misled since he himself is prone to weakness.
local: Wʊ ma tʊ̃ɔn 'mʊ̃ɔn a bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩ chiine a jiyuo, bojũu a 'lɔ mãɛ mɩ ba tara kpɛ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: Because of his weakness, he must offer sacrifices for his own sins as well as for the people.
local: A anyãna jũu lɛ so a wʊ ma de nie lo a wʊ mãɛ tulfʊ bɔɔr baar, tɩ pãa 'matãan a nɩbɛ ba jaa yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr.

eng: No one takes this honor for themselves but takes it only when they are called by God, just like Aaron.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa maa bʊ̃n kaa ir a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nyãna kʊ a wʊ mãɛ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ma bʊɔl wʊ, nɩtãa lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔl a Aaron.

eng: In the same way Christ also didnt promote himself to become high priest. Instead, it was the one who said to him, You are my Son. Today I have become your Father .
local: Lɛ mɩ lɛ, a Kɩrɩsɩto ba de a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nyã kʊ a wʊ mãɛ ɛ, na wʊ wa lɩɛb a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ ɛ. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn mɩ lɛ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a n Bie, dɩna n lɩɛb a fʊ Sãa.

eng: as he also says in another place, You are a priest forever, according to the order of Melchizedek. .
local: A lɛ 'yɛr a jie ãsʊɔ go, Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ a bɔɔrlo kpo kpo, nɩtãa a Melkijedek kaar.

eng: During his days on earth, Christ offered prayers and requests with loud cries and tears as his sacrifices to the one who was able to save him from death. He was heard because of his godly devotion.
local: A lɛ daar a Yesu na be ka a tẽe pɔ, wʊ den sʊɔrfʊ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn kõn nɩbikʊ̃ɔ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na tʊ̃ɔ faa wʊ a kũu pɔ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn wõ a wʊ sʊɔrfʊ, bojũu wʊ den 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ siir a wʊ mãɛ.

eng: Although he was a Son, he learned obedience from what he suffered.
local: Wʊ gba na ɩ a bie, wʊ jãn nɛɛ tufʊ yi a wʊ wõm pɔ.

eng: After he had been made perfect, he became the source of eternal salvation for everyone who obeys him.
local: Wʊn wa maal a lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka wʊ maal baar, wʊ lɩɛb a faafʊ sʊɔ kʊ a bala jaa na sɔɔ tu a wʊ nɛɛ.

eng: He was appointed by God to be a high priest according to the order of Melchizedek.
local: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ir wʊ a wʊ ɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ a Melkijedek kaar.

eng: We have a lot to say about this topic, and its difficult to explain, because you have been lazy and you havent been listening.
local: Sɩ tara na yɔɔ naa 'yɛr tun a yele anyãna pɔ, tɩchɛ ka a par wiilfʊ kpɛ̃mɛ, bojũu a yɩ bɔ̃ɔfʊ ba tal tɛɛr ɛ.

eng: Although you should have been teachers by now, you need someone to teach you an introduction to the basics about Gods message. You have come to the place where you need milk instead of solid food.
local: Yelmãɛ, a sɛɛ naa a sɔ̃ɔ nyãna pɔ, ka yɩn taa ɩ wiwiilbe, tɩ yɩ chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ nɩrɛ ɩka wʊ wiil yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbidɔ̃ɔ ala go. Bɩr lɛ yɩ chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ, yaa ta saa difʊ ɛ.

eng: Everyone who lives on milk is not used to the word of righteousness, because they are babies.
local: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa na chɛnɛ 'yɛnɛ bɩr, wʊ chɛnɛ na ɩ bipɩla. A wʊ yɛ̃ ba tal tɛɛr a wʊn tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a yeltorsɩ ban wile par ɛ.

eng: But solid food is for the mature, whose senses are trained by practice to distinguish between good and evil.
local: Tɩchɛ nɩbɛrɛ bon lɛ saa, bala 'lɔ din nyɛ ka a mɩl ba, ka ba bɔ̃ɔ vɩla nɩ dɛɛr.

eng: So lets press on to maturity, by moving on from the basics about Christs word. Lets not lay a foundation of turning away from dead works, of faith in God.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ɩ a sɩ bar a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr pielfʊ yele, tɩ chiine niem lɩɛrɛ nɩbɛrɛ. Yɩ ta lɛ vɛ̃ ka sɩ pʊrɔ a tɩɛr lɩɛbfʊ yuor go ɛ, nɩ tʊ̃dɛɛr jaa bʊrɔ na chiine kũu pɔ ɛ, nɩ lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka fʊ tara a Nãaŋmɩn sɔɔfʊ.

eng: of teaching about ritual ways to wash with water, laying on of hands, the resurrection from the dead, and eternal judgment—all over again.
local: nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ wiilfʊ, nɩ nuur dɔɔlfʊ yele, nɩ kũu pɔ irfʊ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ yele.

eng: Were going to press on, if God allows it.
local: Ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn sɔɔ naa, sɩn ɩn a lɛ.

eng: Because its impossible to restore people to changed hearts and lives who turn away once they have seen the light, tasted the heavenly gift, become partners with the Holy Spirit.
local: An ɩn tuo kʊ a bala na dɔ̃ɔ nyɛ a chãa, a bala na lɛm a saaju kʊfʊ kaa, na ba 'mataa põn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ.

eng: and tasted Gods good word and the powers of the coming age.
local: a bala na lɛm a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr vɩla kaa, nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ na waara a baaraa daar.

eng: They are crucifying Gods Son all over again and exposing him to public shame.
local: Ala ɩ ba faan lo, an ɩn tuo ka ba lɛ waan ba a ba wa nyɛ tɩɛr lɩɛbfʊ, bojũu a ba bɔrfʊ lɛ kpara naa a Nãaŋmɩn Bie a daa ju go, na ba lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka a nɩyɔɔ lɛ wuolo wʊ.

eng: The ground receives a blessing from God when it drinks up the rain that regularly comes and falls on it and yields a useful crop for those people for whom it is being farmed.
local: A lɛ a tẽe na ma nyũ a sabie kʊ̃ɔ na ma loro na wʊ bul a bonsɩ ala na tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a bala na kɔ, ma nyɛn a Nãaŋmɩn sʊ̃ʊfʊ.

eng: But if it produces thorns and thistles, its useless and close to being cursed. It ends up being burned.
local: Tɩchɛ a tẽe 'lɔ na ma bul a gʊʊr nɩ a mɔ-ur, waa tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ be pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ. A baarfʊ daar bũu lɛ na di wʊ.

eng: But we are convinced of better things in your case, brothers and sisters, even though we are talking this way—things that go together with salvation.
local: Sɩ gban 'yɛrɛ a anyãna, barmɩne, sɩ bar tɩɛr a yɩ jie, na sɩ bɔ̃ɔn yɩn tara bʊ̃sʊ̃n, bʊ̃sʊ̃n ala na lɔ̃ɔn a faafʊ.

eng: God isnt unjust so that he forgets your efforts and the love you have shown for his names sake when you served and continue to serve Gods holy people.
local: Nãaŋmɩn ba ɩ nɩbur bur ɛ. Wʊ kʊ̃ ĩin a yɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ yɩn wiil kʊ wʊ ɛ, na yɩ sʊ̃ʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ tɩ chɛnɛ sʊ̃nɔ̃ ba.

eng: But we desperately want each of you to show the same effort to make your hope sure until the end.
local: Sɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir maala a lɛ nɛ tɩ tãn a baaraa, na yɩ kʊ̃ baala a yɩ tɩɛrtɔ jie ɛ.

eng: This is so you wont be lazy but follow the example of the ones who inherit the promises through faith and patience.
local: Saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ ɩ koro dẽme ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ tɔɔrɔ a bala na tu a sɔɔfʊ pɔ tara kãnyir nyɛn a bonsɩ ala a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ.

eng: When God gave Abraham his promise, he swore by himself since he couldnt swear by anyone greater.
local: Lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩrɛ a nɛɛ kʊrɔ a Abraham, nɩrɛ jaa na ba be be gar wʊ a wʊn pɔn jũu, wʊ pɔn naa a wʊ mãɛ.

eng: He said, I will certainly bless you and multiply your descendants. .
local: na wʊ 'yɛrɛ, Yelmãɛ jaa lɛ, ɩn sʊ̃ʊ fʊ naa, naa vɛ̃ ka a fʊ bal par paal.

eng: So Abraham obtained the promise by showing patience.
local: Lɛ lɛ a Abraham tara a kãnyir na wʊ chɛl lɛ̃ɛɛ wa de a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ wʊ.

eng: People pledge by something greater than themselves. A solemn pledge guarantees what they say and shuts down any argument.
local: Nɩrɛ ma den a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na gar wʊ yuor pɔn, ka a lɛ wʊn ma tɩr a nɛɛ ɩ yelmãɛ, ka a wɩlɛwɩlɛ maa lɛ be be go ɛ.

eng: When God wanted to further demonstrate to the heirs of the promise that his purpose doesnt change, he guaranteed it with a solemn pledge.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka wʊ maal a wʊ befʊ 'lɔ na ba lɩɛrɛ ɛ, ka a chaar kʊ a bala na wa de a ala wʊn tɩr a nɛɛ. Wʊ tɩr nɛɛ ɩka wʊn maal a lɛ.

eng: So these are two things that dont change, because its impossible for God to lie. He did this so that we, who have taken refuge in him, can be encouraged to grasp the hope that is lying in front of us.
local: Nãaŋmɩn maal a nɩtɔ̃ ɩka, a bonsɩ ayi anyã na ba tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ lɩɛrɛ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ŋmaa jire ɛ, ka a sɩn bala na jo tɩ nyɔɔ a tɩɛrtɔfʊ nyã wʊn kʊ sɩ a pɔrɔ taalɛ, ka a na 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ ãkpãɛn.

eng: This hope, which is a safe and secure anchor for our whole being, enters the sanctuary behind the curtain.
local: A tɩɛrtɔfʊ nyã lɛ sɩ tara, naa ɩ a nɛbikur na ma lũ a sɩ sɩɛ a wʊ chɩm ba dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ. Wʊ põn kpɛ be a diniem a fɔbaa 'lɔ ban lũ var puor.

eng: Thats where Jesus went in advance and entered for us, since he became a high priest according to the order of Melchizedek.
local: Be lɛ a Yesu de nie chen a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, wʊ kpɛ naa a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. Wʊ ɩ naa a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ kpo kpo nɩtãa a Melkijedek kaar.

eng: This Melchizedek, who was king of Salem and priest of the Most High God, met Abraham as he returned from the defeat of the kings, and Melchizedek blessed him.
local: A Melkijedek nyã lɛ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a Salem nãa nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na do gar a saaju bɔɔrloro. 'Lɔ lɛ tuor a Abraham na wʊ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ, a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ jɛb a nãmɩne bala tʊ̃ɔ tɩ lɩɛb waara.

eng: Abraham gave a tenth of everything to him. His name means first king of righteousness, and then king of Salem, that is, king of peace.
local: Ka a Abraham ir a bonsɩ ala wʊn waara nɩ a jaa pɔ pie, bʊ̃'yen kʊ wʊ. A wʊ yodɔ̃ɔ par nɩ nyã, torfʊ nãa, a nɩ mɩ, Salem nãa, a par lɛ, nyã'maar nãa.

eng: He is without father or mother or any family. He has no beginning or end of life, but hes like Gods Son and remains a priest for all time.
local: Waa tara sãa ɛ, bɩɩ ma ɛ, nɩrɛ jaa ba bɔ̃ɔ a wʊ dɔɔfʊ daar ɛ, bɩɩ bɔ̃ɔ a wʊ bal par ɛ, bɩɩ a wʊ kũu daar ɛ. Wʊ kaara naa a Nãaŋmɩn Bie kaar, na wʊ ɩ a bɔɔrlo kpo kpo.

eng: See how great Melchizedek was! Abraham, the father of the people, gave him a tenth of everything he captured.
local: Yɩ tɩɛr kaa a lɛ wʊn bɛrma jã. A sɩ sãakpã Abraham gba mɩ dɔ̃ɔ kʊ wʊ a bonsɩ ala wʊn fa pɔ pie jaa pɔ bʊ̃'yen.

eng: The descendants of Levi who receive the office of priest have a commandment under the Law to collect a tenth of everything from the people who are their brothers and sisters, though they also are descended from Abraham.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a Mosesɩ nɛɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ bin 'yɛr naa ɩka, a Levi bal par pɔ lɛ a bɔɔrloro na ma yi, 'lɔ lɛ na ma de a pie jaa pɔ bʊ̃'yen yin a Isɩral nɩbɛ ba jaa sɛ̃, a wʊ mãɛ yɛɛr sɛ̃, a ba yɛɛr gba mɩ na ɩ a Abraham bal nɩbɛ sɛ̃.

eng: But Melchizedek, who isnt related to them, received a tenth of everything from Abraham and blessed the one who had received the promises.
local: Tɩchɛ a daba nyã baa gba bɩɛr a wʊ tɩ yi a Levi bal par pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ den a pie pɔ bʊ̃'yen yi a Abraham sɛ̃, na wʊ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ tɩr a nɛɛr kʊ.

eng: Without question, the less important person is blessed by the more important person.
local: Baal ba be be ɛ, ɩka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bɛrmɛ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ na ba jã bon ɛ.

eng: In addition, in one case a tenth is received by people who die, and in the other case, the tenth is received by someone who continues to live, according to the record.
local: A yele ãsʊɔ nɩ nyã ɩka, a bala na kpire lɛ ma de a pie pɔ jaa bʊ̃'yen, tɩchɛ a sɔr ãsʊɔ pɔ, a Melkijedek 'lɔ na ba kpire ɛ, de naa.

eng: It could be said that Levi, who received a tenth, paid a tenth through Abraham.
local: Ɩ̃sʊɔ gba mɩ na 'yɛr ɩka, a Levi nɩrɛ na ma de a pie jaa pɔ bʊ̃'yen, ba yab a pie jaa pɔ bʊ̃'yen tu a Abraham sɛ̃.

eng: because he was still in his ancestors body when Abraham paid the tenth to Melchizedek.
local: bojũu a lɛ a Melkijedek na dɔ̃ɔ tuor a Abraham, a Levi chɛnɛ na be a wʊ sãakpã pʊɔm.

eng: So if perfection came through the levitical office of priest , why was there still a need to speak about raising up another priest according to the order of Melchizedek rather than one according to the order of Aaron?.
local: Ala ɩ a Levi bal nɩrɛ, a bɔɔrlo tʊ̃mɔ̃ ma ta vɛ̃n ka wʊ tor jaa dẽ dẽ, a nɛbinãa 'lɔ ban kʊ a nɩbɛ, bo lɛ so ka ba lɛ bʊɔrɔ a bɔɔrloro ãsʊɔ ɩka wʊ wa, na wʊ kaara a Melkijedek kaar na waa ɩ a Aaron kaar ɛ?.

eng: When the order of the priest changes, there has to be a change in the Law as well.
local: Bojũu bala wa lɩɛr a bɔɔrloro, ba mɩ ma lɩɛr a nɛbinãa.

eng: The person we are talking about belongs to another tribe, and no one ever served at the altar from that tribe.
local: A 'lɔ ban 'yɛrɛ na so a yele anyãna, wʊ ɩn bal yuo, ka nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa ba yi a bala nyãna pɔ na wʊ tɩ tʊ̃ tʊ̃mɔ̃ be a bɔɔr lofʊ jie ɛ.

eng: Its clear that our Lord came from the tribe of Judah, but Moses never said anything about priests from that tribe.
local: Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩ Soro ɩn a Juda bal nɩrɛ, ka a bala nyã pɔ, Mosesɩ mɩ ba pʊr a yuor ɩka nɩrɛ na yin a bala nyã pɔ tɩ ɩ a bɔɔrloro ɛ.

eng: And its even clearer if another priest appears who is like Melchizedek.
local: Ka a lɛ sɩn 'yɛr gba gãn chãa pɔ, ɩka ala ɩ a bɔɔrloro ãsʊɔ na kaara a Melkijedek kaar wa wa naa.

eng: He has become a priest by the power of a life that cant be destroyed, rather than a legal requirement about physical descent.
local: a 'lɔ na wa ɩ a bɔɔrloro 'lɔ na ba tu a lɛ a nɛbinãa na 'yɛr tun a wʊ sãakpã loor ɛ, tɩchɛ a tun a lɛ a kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ na yi a nyɛvʊr na ba tara sɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ.

eng: This is confirmed: You are a priest forever, according to the order of Melchizedek. .
local: Bojũu a sɛb ɩka, Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a bɔɔrlo kpo kpo na ba tara tɛɛfʊ ɛ, nɩtãa a Melkijedek.

eng: On the one hand, an earlier command is set aside because it was weak and useless.
local: Ba tɔɔn a kõro binfʊ lan bar, bojũu wʊ bal naa na waa ɩ bʊ̃joraa go ɛ.

eng: . On the other hand, a better hope is introduced, through which we draw near to God.
local: Bojũu a nɛbinãa nyã maa tʊ̃ɔ maal bon ka wʊ tor jaa dẽ dẽ ɛ, ka a tɩɛrtɔ yuo na ɩ gar wʊ wa, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka sɩ tɔɔ gbʊr Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: And this was not done without a solemn pledge! The others have become priests without a solemn pledge.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn nɛtɩraa dɔ̃ɔ be be, bamɩne lɩɛb a bɔɔrlorbo ka a nɛtɩraa ba pʊɔ ɛ.

eng: but this priest was affirmed with a solemn pledge by the one who said, The Lord has made a solemn pledge and will not change his mind: You are a priest forever. .
local: tɩchɛ 'lɔ lɩɛb a bɔɔrloro ka a nɛtɩraa pʊɔ, a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, A sɩ Soro pɔn 'yɛr, na wʊ kʊ̃ wa puur a kʊ̃ɔ bar jaa ɛ. Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a bɔɔrlo kpo kpo.

eng: As a result, Jesus has become the guarantee of a better covenant.
local: A pɔ binfʊ nyãna jũu, Yesu lɛ wʊ de bin a nɛɛ ka wʊ ɩ a nɛtɩraa na gar.

eng: The others who became priests are numerous because death prevented them from continuing to serve.
local: A kõro a bɔɔrlorbo bala ma dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yɔɔ, bojũu kũu maa sɔɔ ka ba be be a tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ kor ɛ.

eng: In contrast, he holds the office of priest permanently because he continues to serve forever.
local: Tɩchɛ a Yesu 'lɔ na ben be jaa kpo kpo, a wʊ bɔɔrlo tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba tara lɩɛrfʊ ɛ.

eng: This is why he can completely save those who are approaching God through him, because he always lives to speak with God for them.
local: A lɛ jũu, wʊ ma tʊ̃ɔn faa a bala na tu a wʊ jie waara a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Bojũu wʊ ma ben be sɔ̃ɔ jaa 'maala a Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ba.

eng: Its appropriate for us to have this kind of high priest: holy, innocent, incorrupt, separate from sinners, and raised high above the heavens.
local: A bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyãna lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ sɩn bʊɔrɔ, wʊ ɩn chɛchɛ, waa tara chɛfʊ ɛ, waa bʊɔrɔ yeldɛɛr ɛ, na wʊ oo wʊ mãɛ yin yelbe-ɩrbɛ pɔ, na wʊ do gar a saaju.

eng: He doesnt need to offer sacrifices every day like the other high priests, first for their own sins and then for the sins of the people. He did this once for all when he offered himself.
local: Waa kaara fɩka a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ banyã ɛ, naa ba lɛ sɛɛ ɩka wʊ loro a bɔɔr a bɩbie a jaa ɛ, na wʊn ma de nie lo a wʊ mãɛ tulo bɔɔr, tɩ pãa mɩ lo a nɩbɛ mɩ bon ɛ. Wʊ mãɛ lɛ sɔɔ na wʊ lɩɛb a bɔɔrlo dʊ̃ɔ lo a ba yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr a dẽdẽe daa ka a baar.

eng: The Law appoints people who are prone to weakness as high priests, but the content of the solemn pledge, which came after the Law, appointed a Son who has been made perfect forever.
local: Bojũu a nɛbinãa lɛ ma ir a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ, ka ba ɩ nɩbɛ na bal, tɩchɛ a pɔfʊ nyã na tu a nɛbinãa puor wa, a Bie lɛ Nãaŋmɩn ir, 'lɔ lɛ maal a lɛ jaa a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ maal.

eng: Now the main point of what we are saying is this: We have this kind of high priest. He sat down at the right side of the throne of the majesty in the heavens.
local: A 'yɛrɛ sɩn 'yɛrɛ nɩ nyã, sɩn tara na a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyã na jãnɛ be a saaju kpɛ̃ɔ wʊ jaa sʊɔ nũsʊ̃ɔ jie.

eng: Hes serving as a priest in the holy place, which is the true meeting tent that God, not any human being, set up.
local: Be lɛ wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a dinie sʊɔ na ɩ a yelmãɛ Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir a sɩ Soro mãɛ na maal, a ba ɩ a gãn yir 'lɔ a nɩrɛ na maal a wʊ nũu ɛ.

eng: Every high priest is appointed to offer gifts and sacrifices. So its necessary for this high priest also to have something to offer.
local: Bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ jaa ba ma ir wʊ naa ka wʊ ma diere a kʊfʊsɩ nɩ a bɔɔrlo bonsɩ loro nɩ a bɔɔr, ala lɛ so ka a nyã mɩ na de bon kɔ̃ɔ lon a bɔɔr.

eng: If he was located on earth, he wouldnt be a priest because there are already others who offer gifts based on the Law.
local: Ala ɩ wʊ ta ben ka a tẽe pɔ, wʊ kʊ̃ naa ta ɩ bɔɔrloro ɛ, bojũu nɩbɛ den nie be ka, na ba ma diere a kʊfʊsɩ turo nɩ a lɛ a nɛbinãa na man.

eng: They serve in a place that is a copy and shadow of the heavenly meeting tent. This is indicated when Moses was warned by God when he was about to set up the meeting tent: See that you follow the pattern that I showed you on the mountain in every detail .
local: Ban tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir chɛchɛ nyã pɔ na ɩ a 'lɔ na be a saaju gãagiel ban tɔɔr maal. A anyãna jũu lɛ so ka a Nãaŋmɩn kpãkpãana a Mosesɩ a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ maal a gãn yir, na wʊ 'yɛr, Kaara sʊ̃, na fʊ maal wʊ a lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju ɩn wiil fʊ be a tɔ̃ɔ ju.

eng: But now, Jesus has received a superior priestly service just as he arranged a better covenant that is enacted with better promises.
local: Tɩchɛ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ 'lɔ a Yesu na nyɛ, gar a ba bon jaa bamm na ɩ a nɛtɩraa 'ma'maala na gar a bʊ̃koraa, bojũu a nɛbin paalaa na ɩ gar pɔ lɛ wʊ maal.

eng: If the first covenant had been without fault, it wouldnt have made sense to expect a second.
local: Bojũu ala ɩ a nɛtɩr koraa 'lɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ tara chɛfʊ ɛ, jie kʊ̃ naa be be a ba lɛ bʊɔrɔ bʊ̃yuo ɛ.

eng: But God did find fault with them, since he says, Look, the days are coming, says the Lord, when I will make a covenant with the house of Israel, and I will make a new covenant with the house of Judah. .
local: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn nyɛn a lɛ a nɩbɛ na 'mab, na wʊ 'yɛr, nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr, Bɩbir kɔ̃ɔ na wa vɩɛ naa, ka n tɩr nɛtɩr paalaa bin kʊ a Isɩral yir dẽme nɩ a Juda yir dẽme.

eng: It will not be like the covenant that I made with their ancestors on the day I took them by the hand to lead them out of the land of Egypt, because they did not continue to keep my covenant, and I lost interest in them, says the Lord. .
local: A kʊ̃ lɛ nyɛtãan a nɛɛ 'lɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ tɩr kʊ a ba sãakpãmɩne a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩn nyɔɔ ba a nũu tɔɔ yin a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ ɛ. Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr, bojũu baa sɔɔ ara a lɛ ɩn tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ ba ɛ, ka n mɩ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ ba.

eng: This is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, says the Lord. I will place my laws in their minds, and write them on their hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people. .
local: A anyãna lɛ ɩ a nɛtɩraa ɩn na tɩr kʊ a Isɩral yir dẽme, a bɩbir 'lɔ wa vɩɛ baar. Lɛ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr. Ɩn de naa a n nɛɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba tɩɛrsɩ pɔ, na n sɛb dɔɔl a ba nyãn ju. Ka n ɩ a ba Nãaŋmɩn, ka ba mɩ ɩ a n nɩbɛ.

eng: And each person wont ever teach a neighbor or their brother or sister, saying, Know the Lord, because they will all know me, from the least important of them to the most important; .
local: Nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ lɛ wiil a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ ɛ, bɩɩ ka nɩrɛ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ yɛbɛ ɩka, Bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro ɛ. Bojũu ba jaa na bɔ̃ɔ ma naa, yi a bil pɔ tɩ tãn a bɛrɛ pɔ.

eng: because I will be lenient toward their unjust actions, and I wont remember their sins anymore. .
local: Ɩn vɛ̃n a ba putuyele bar. N kʊ̃ lɛ tɩɛr a ba yeldɛbɛ jaa go ɛ.

eng: When it says new, it makes the first obsolete. And if something is old and outdated, its close to disappearing.
local: Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔlɔ a nɛtɩraa anyãna bʊ̃paalaa, wʊ maal a 'lɔ na de nie ka wʊ ɩ bʊ̃jʊɔlaa, ka bon mɩ na jʊɔl, wʊ maa yaara tɩ kpi ɛ.

eng: So then the first covenant had regulations for the priests service and the holy place on earth.
local: Faa nyɛ, a nɛtɩr dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ tara na a puorfʊ chirsɩ nɩ a jichɛchɛ 'lɔ ban dɔ̃ɔ maal ka a tẽe pɔ.

eng: They pitched the first tent called the holy place. It contained the lampstand, the table, and the loaves of bread presented to God.
local: A gãn yir nyã ban dɔ̃ɔ maal baar, a di yɛ̃yɛ̃ pɔ lɛ ba bin a fãtɩnsɩ dɔɔlfʊ jie nɩ a tɛɛbʊl 'lɔ ju ban ma dɔɔl a paanʊ̃chɛchɛ ala. A jie nyã lɛ ba bʊɔlɔ, Jichɛchɛ.

eng: There was a tent behind the second curtain called the holy of holies.
local: A dinie sʊɔ ban lũ a fɔbaa var, ba bʊɔlɔ naa a be, Chɛchɛ wʊ jaa Chɛchɛ Jie.

eng: It had the gold altar for incense and the chest containing the covenant, which was covered with gold on all sides. In the chest there was a gold jar containing manna, Aarons rod that budded, and the stone tablets of the covenant.
local: Be lɛ a bɔɔr lofʊ jie be na ɩ sɛlma a ba ma chʊnɔ̃ a tãɩ nyũu vɩla ala nɩ a nɛtɩraa daka ban maal tɩ waar sɛlma pɔɔ. A daka nyãna pɔ lɛ a sɛlma dulo ban 'yɔ̃ɔ a maana nɩ a Aaron dãgbal 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ 'mʊr a puul nɩ a kʊsɩr pɛ̃rsɩ ala ban dɔ̃ɔ sɛb a nɛbinãa 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Above the chest there were magnificent winged creatures casting their shadow over the seat of the chest, where sin is taken care of. Right now we cant talk about these things in detail.
local: A daka nyã ju lɛ ba maal a malakasɩ bala na wile a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr ka ba ara kʊ a malakasɩ bala ban bʊɔlɔ a cherubim, ka ba ger pɔɔ a faafʊ bɔɔr lofʊ jie. Tɩchɛ sɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ man a yelsɩ anyãna tu tu taa a pʊ̃pãanyã ɛ.

eng: When these things have been prepared in this way, priests enter the first tent all the time as they perform their service.
local: Lɛ a yelsɩ anyãna ban wa chɔɔr a nɩtɔ̃ baar, a bɔɔrlorbo pãa ma kpɩɛrɛ na a di yɛ̃yɛ̃ sʊɔ pɔ, bɩbir jaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a ba tʊ̃mɔ̃.

eng: But only the high priest enters the second tent once a year. He never does this without blood, which he offers for himself and for the sins the people committed in ignorance.
local: Tɩchɛ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ tɛɛ lɛ ma kpɛ a dinie sɔɔ gbɛbʊ̃'yen yuon jaa, wʊ maa faa dʊ̃ɔ jãɩ ɛ. Ala lɛ wʊ ma kpɛ̃n a be tɩ lon a wʊ mãɛ bɔɔr, nɩ a nɩbɛ mɩ yeldɛbɛ ban ba bɔ̃ɔn ɛ, tɩ faa tul maal bɔɔr.

eng: With this, the Holy Spirit is showing that the way into the holy place hadnt been revealed yet while the first tent was standing.
local: Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ wiil a anyãna ɩka, a sɔr na kpɩɛrɛ a Jichɛchɛ 'Lɔ Wʊ Jaa Chɛchɛ Jie chɛnɛ na ba yuo ɛ, a gãn yir koro na chɛnɛ ara jũu.

eng: This is a symbol for the present time. It shows that the gifts and sacrifices that are being offered cant perfect the conscience of the one who is serving.
local: A anyãna dɔ̃ɔ wile a dɩna sɔ̃ɔ, naa wile ɩka a kʊfʊsɩ nɩ a bɔɔrlo bonsɩ ala ban ma lon a bɔɔr, maa tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka a 'lɔ na wa a puorfʊ jie tɩɛr chaar ɛ.

eng: These are superficial regulations that are only about food, drink, and various ritual ways to wash with water. They are regulations that have been imposed until the time of the new order.
local: A ɩ naa bʊ̃diir tɛɛ yele, nɩ nyũfʊ yele, nɩ bʊ̃pɛɛrsɩ yelsɩ, ala lɛ ba mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir maala tɩ tãn a yelpaalaa na lɩɛr.

eng: But Christ has appeared as the high priest of the good things that have happened. He passed through the greater and more perfect meeting tent, which isnt made by human hands .
local: Lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyã kaar, nɩ a yelsʊ̃n ala na de nie be ka, wʊ kpɛ̃n tu a jikpɛ̃ɛ nɩ a puorfʊ yir 'lɔ na ɩ chɛchɛ an ba ɩ nɩrɛ nũu lɛ maal ɛ, ka sɩ 'yɛr ɩka waa pʊɔ a bʊ̃mɩɛrsɩ pɔ ɛ.

eng: He entered the holy of holies once for all by his own blood, not by the blood of goats or calves, securing our deliverance for all time.
local: Waa de bʊɔ bɩɩ narbil jãɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ kpɛ naa a Jichɛchɛ Wʊ Jaa Chɛchɛ nyã pɔ, gbɛbʊ̃'yen kʊ nɩrɛ jaa nɩ a wʊ mãɛ jãɩ, a sɩ tɔ̃ɔ nyɛ a faafʊ a kpo kpo.

eng: If the blood of goats and bulls and the sprinkled ashes of cows made spiritually contaminated people holy and clean.
local: A bʊʊr jãɩ nɩ a nadai jãɩ nɩ a nasarbil tãpɩɛl ban ma ɔ̃ɔ mɩr a bala na sɔ̃ɔ, ka a ba ãgãma yi ɩ bʊ̃sʊ̃n.

eng: how much more will the blood of Jesus wash our consciences clean from dead works in order to serve the living God? He offered himself to God through the eternal Spirit as a sacrifice without any flaw.
local: Ŋmɩnɛ pãa lɛ, a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jãɩ a 'lɔ na tu a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na ɩ nyɛvʊr, a wʊ mãɛ na ba tara chɛfʊ ɛ, lon bɔɔr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na wʊ pɛɛ a sɩ tɩɛr nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ jaa na chiine nɩ sɩ kũu pɔ, ka sɩn tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn vʊr.

eng: This is why hes the mediator of a new covenant : so that those who are called might receive the promise of the eternal inheritance on the basis of his death. His death occurred to set them free from the offenses committed under the first covenant.
local: Bojũu a anyãna lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ɩ a nɛtɩr paalaa 'ma'maala, ka a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl, na nyɛ a bʊ̃sʊ̃n ala na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Pʊ̃pãanyã wʊ kpi naa na wʊ faa ba yin a yeldɛbɛ ala ban dɔ̃ɔ maal a nɛtɩr koraa 'lɔ pɔ.

eng: When there is a will, you need to confirm the death of the one who made the will.
local: Nɩrɛ wa tɩr nɛɛ ɩka 'lɔ wa kpi baar, a kũu lɛ wʊ ma wa kpi, ka a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr pãa yi chãa pɔ.

eng: This is because a will takes effect only after a death, since its not in force while the one who made the will is alive.
local: bojũu ala ɩ fʊ tɩr nɛɛ ɩka fʊ̃ʊ wa kpi baar. Fʊ̃ʊ wa chɛnɛ a ba ɩ yele ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊn wa kpi baar lɛ a pãa ɩ yele.

eng: So not even the first covenant was put into effect without blood.
local: A anyãna jũu lɛ so gba, ka a nɛtɩr dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ maa ɩ bon jaa ka a jãɩ ba pʊɔ ɛ.

eng: Moses took the blood of calves and goats, along with water, scarlet wool, and hyssop, and sprinkled both the Law scroll itself and all the people after he had proclaimed every command of the Law to all the people.
local: Lɛ a Mosesɩ na wa man a nɛbinãa 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ ba jaa baar, wʊ den a nelpɔlɔ jãɩ na wʊ de kʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ de pɛr kɔɔl jɩɛ na wʊ vʊ̃ɔ urbanyũu na wʊ tun mɩr a gãn pilãa 'lɔ nɩ a nɩbɛ ba jaa.

eng: While he did it, he said, This is the blood of the covenant that God established for you. .
local: Tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr, A anyãna lɛ ɩ a nɛtɩraa jãɩ, a Nãaŋmɩn na kpãkpãana yɩ ɩka yɩ turo.

eng: And in the same way he sprinkled the meeting tent and also all the equipment that would be used in the priests service with blood.
local: Lɛ nɩ ju mɩ lɛ wʊ de a jãɩ mɩr a gãn puorfʊ yir nɩ a bonsɩ a jaa ban ma de maala nɩ a be.

eng: Almost everything is cleansed by blood, according to the Laws regulations, and there is no forgiveness without blood being shed.
local: Yelmãɛ jaa a nɛbinãa 'yɛr ɩka, ba ma de a jãɩ mɩɩl a bonsɩ a jaa. Ka jãɩ ba wa kpaar ɛ, yelbier vɛ̃ kʊfʊ ba be be ɛ.

eng: So it was necessary for the copies of the heavenly things to be cleansed with these sacrifices, but the heavenly things had to be cleansed with better sacrifices than these.
local: A tara na sɔr ka ba chɔɔr a saaju bʊ̃tɔɔr maalaa nɩ a bɔɔrlo bonsɩ anyãna, tɩchɛ a saaju bonsɩ mãɛ 'lɔ, a ba bɔɔrlo bon gar naa anyãna.

eng: Christ didnt enter the holy place made by human hands, but into heaven itself, so that he now appears in Gods presence for us.
local: Bojũu Kɩrɩsɩto ba kpɛ a nɩrɛ nũu bʊ̃maalaa jichɛchɛ nyã pɔ, na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a saaju bon sʊ̃ 'lɔ ban dɔ̃ɔ tɔɔr maal ɛ. A saaju mãɛ lɛ wʊ tɩ kpɛ, na wʊ tɩ ara a Nãaŋmɩn niem a pʊ̃pãanyã a sɩ jũu.

eng: He didnt enter to offer himself over and over again, like the high priest enters the earthly holy place every year with blood that isnt his.
local: A ba ɩ wʊ kpɛ̃n be a saaju na wʊn lɛ tɩ loro a bɔɔr bɩbir jaa ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nãa na ma kpɛ a Jichɛchɛ 'Lɔ Wʊ Jaa Chɛchɛ pɔ, a yuon nɩ a jãɩ na ba ɩ a wʊ mãɛ jãɩ ɛ.

eng: If that were so, then Jesus would have to suffer many times since the foundation of the world. Instead, he has now appeared once at the end of the ages to get rid of sin by sacrificing himself.
local: Ala ɩ lɛ lɛ a ta ɩ, Kɩrɩsɩto naa pãan din dɔɔyɛ sɔ̃ɔ jaa yi a wɛr pielfʊ daar jaa. Tɩchɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã, wʊ wa daan yi a bɩbir baaraa daar na wʊ maal yele a jaa baar, ɩka wʊ wa de a wʊ mãɛ lɩɛb a bɔɔrlo bon diin a yelbier bar.

eng: People are destined to die once and then face judgment.
local: Nɩtãa lɛ ban dɔɔ nɩrɛ ka wʊn kpi daar kɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ tɩ tuor 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ.

eng: In the same way, Christ was also offered once to take on himself the sins of many people. He will appear a second time, not to take away sin but to save those who are eagerly waiting for him.
local: lɛ lɛ, a Kɩrɩsɩto lon a bɔɔr kpo kpo kʊ nɩyɔɔ. Wʊn lɩɛb wa a gbɛɛ ayi sɔ̃ɔ, a ba ɩ fɩka a wʊ wa de a yelbier bar ɛ, tɩchɛ ka wʊ waan faafʊ wa kʊ a bala jaa na chɛlɛ wʊ.

eng: The Law is a shadow of the good things that are coming, not the real things themselves. It never can perfect the ones who are trying to draw near to God through the same sacrifices that are offered continually every year.
local: A nɛbinãa dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a bʊ̃sʊ̃ 'lɔ na waara gãagiel, a ba ɩ a bon mãɛ lɛ ɛ. A nɩtɔ̃ jũu, a kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ɩ a bɔɔrlo bʊ̃bʊ̃'yen ban ma lo yuon jaa ka a tʊ̃ɔ chɔɔr a bala na ma wa tɔɔ gbʊr a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: Otherwise, wouldnt they have stopped being offered? If the people carrying out their religious duties had been completely cleansed once, no one would have been aware of sin anymore.
local: Ala ɩ a ta tʊ̃ɔn chɔɔr ba, ba kʊ̃ naa bar a bɔɔrlo bomo ir fʊ ɛ? Bojũu a bala na ma ta wa a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ jie, a ba yelbier naa baar naa, ka ba kʊ̃ ma lɛ tɩɛr tɔ a ba yeldɛbɛ go ɛ.

eng: Instead, these sacrifices are a reminder of sin every year.
local: Tɩchɛ a ba yuon jaa bɔɔrlo bonsɩ anyãna ma tɩɛrɛ ba naa a ba yeldɛbɛ.

eng: because its impossible for the blood of bulls and goats to take away sins.
local: bojũu a nadai nɩ a bʊʊr jãɩ maa tʊɔrɔ ire a yeldɛbɛ bara ɛ.

eng: Therefore, when he comes into the world he says, You didnt want a sacrifice or an offering, but you prepared a body for me; .
local: A lɛ jũu, a Kɩrɩsɩto na waara ka a wɛr pɔ, nɩtɔ̃ lɛ wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn, A bɔɔrlo bonsɩ nɩ a bʊ̃kʊrsɩ, faa bʊɔraa ɛ, tɩchɛ ãgãn lɛ fʊ chɔɔr kʊ ma.

eng: you werent pleased with entirely burned offerings or a sin offering. .
local: A bɔɔrlo bonsɩ ban chʊnɔ̃ nɩ a ba 'mabfʊ bʊ̃kʊrsɩ, fʊ pʊɔ maa pɛl yaa ɛ.

eng: So then I said, Look, Ive come to do your will, God. This has been written about me in the scroll. .
local: Ka n pãa 'yɛr, maa nɩ nyã, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a n yele a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ. N Nãaŋmɩn, n wa naa ɩka n wa ɩ a fʊ bɔfʊ.

eng: He says above, You didnt want and you werent pleased with a sacrifice or an offering or with entirely burned offerings or a purification offering, which are offered because the Law requires them.
local: Wʊ den nie 'yɛr, A bɔɔrlo bonsɩ nɩ a kʊfʊsɩ nɩ a dʊ̃n ala ban ma kʊ chʊm nɩ a ba tulo kʊfʊsɩ ala, faa bʊɔraa ɛ, fʊ pʊɔ ba pɛl ɛ, an sɔɔ ɩ ɩka a nɛbinãa lɛ 'yɛr ɩka ba ɩ a lɛ.

eng: Then he said, Look, Ive come to do your will . He puts an end to the first to establish the second.
local: A wʊ pãa 'yɛr, Maa nɩ nyã, n wa naa ɩka n wa ɩ a fʊ bɔfʊ. Wʊ tɔɔn a 'lɔ na de nie bar, tɩ de a ayi sʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a jie.

eng: We have been made holy by Gods will through the offering of Jesus Christs body once for all.
local: A nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn maal sɩ, a sɩ ɩ nɩsʊ̃n a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na de a wʊ ãgãn lon a bɔɔr kpo kpo kʊ sɩ.

eng: Every priest stands every day serving and offering the same sacrifices over and over, sacrifices that can never take away sins.
local: A Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrloro, bɩbir jaa lɛ wʊ ma ara tɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a ba puorfʊ tʊ̃bie. Waa gala a bɔɔr lofʊ nyã na maa tʊ̃ɔ de yelbier bar ɛ.

eng: But when this priest offered one sacrifice for sins for all time, he sat down at the right side of God.
local: Tɩchɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa lo a bɔɔr kpo kpo nyã baar a yelbier jũu, wʊ pãa tɩ jãnɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nũsʊ̃ɔ jie.

eng: Since then, hes waiting until his enemies are made into a footstool for his feet.
local: An yi a lɛ daar jaa, wʊ chɛlɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn na wa de a wʊ dɔ̃dẽme kʊ wʊ a ba lɩɛb a wʊ gbɛɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie.

eng: because he perfected the people who are being made holy with one offering for all time.
local: bojũu gbɛbʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ wʊ lo a bɔɔr, ka a sɛɛ kʊ a bala wʊn maal ka ba ɩ chɛchɛ.

eng: The Holy Spirit affirms this when saying.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ mɩ 'yɛr yelmãɛ jaa kʊ sɩ nɩ a yele nyã, wʊ den nie 'yɛr.

eng: This is the covenant that I will make with them. After these days, says the Lord, I will place my laws in their hearts and write them on their minds. .
local: Nyã lɛ ɩ a nɛtɩraa nyã ɩn wa tara nɩ ba, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wa po baar. Lɛ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr. Ɩn den a n nɛbinsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba nyãn pɔ, naa sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba tɩɛrsɩ pɔ.

eng: And I wont remember their sins and their lawless behavior anymore. .
local: Na wʊ pãa lɛ 'yɛr pʊɔ, A ba yelbier nɩ a ba chɛfʊsɩ tʊ̃bie, n kʊ̃ lɛ tɩɛraa go ɛ.

eng: When there is forgiveness for these things, there is no longer an offering for sin.
local: Nãaŋmɩn na wa vɛ̃ a yelbier anyãna kʊ nɩrɛ, yelbier bɔɔr lofʊ ba lɛ be be go ɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have confidence that we can enter the holy of holies by means of Jesus blood.
local: A lɛ jũu n yɛɛr, sɩn ben tara a 'lafʊ nyã na tɩ kpɛ a Jichɛchɛ Wʊ Jaa Chɛchɛ Jie a Yesu jãɩ jũu.

eng: through a new and living way that he opened up for us through the curtain, which is his body.
local: na wʊ yuo a yelmãɛ sɔr nɩbir paalaa na 'mar tu a fɔvaraa 'lɔ pɔ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a wʊ ãgãn.

eng: and we have a great high priest over Gods house.
local: na sɩ be tara a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyã na kaara a Nãaŋmɩn yir.

eng: Therefore, lets draw near with a genuine heart with the certainty that our faith gives us, since our hearts are sprinkled clean from an evil conscience and our bodies are washed with pure water.
local: yɩ ɩ a sɩ tɔɔ gbʊr Nãaŋmɩn nɩ nyãa nyã na vɩɛlɛ, nɩ a sɔɔfʊ na tɩrɛ. Bojũu wʊ mɩr a sɩ nyãn, na wʊ fɩɛl sɩ yin a tɩɛr sɔ̃ɔnaa pɔ, na wʊ pɛɛ a sɩ ãgãma nɩ a kɔ̃sʊ̃ɔ ala.

eng: Lets hold on to the confession of our hope without wavering, because the one who made the promises is reliable.
local: Yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ nyɔɔ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ nyã sɩn sɔɔ jaa chãchã tara, bojũu a 'lɔ na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ sɩ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ.

eng: And let us consider each other carefully for the purpose of sparking love and good deeds.
local: Yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ kpãkpãana taa mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nʊ̃fʊ nɩ vɩla maalfʊ pɔ.

eng: Dont stop meeting together with other believers, which some people have gotten into the habit of doing. Instead, encourage each other, especially as you see the day drawing near.
local: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa vɛ̃ ka sɩ ma bara taa sɛ̃ lɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na ma ɩrɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ãkpãɛn, na sɩ ma maala a lɛ sɔ̃ɔ jaa, an ɩ a Bɩbir tɔɔrɔ na gbʊrɔ.

eng: If we make the decision to sin after we receive the knowledge of the truth, there isnt a sacrifice for sins left any longer.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ chɛnɛ na bɔ̃ɔn jaa tɩ ma maala a yelbier sɩn wa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ baar, yelbier bɔɔrlo bon jaa ba lɛ be be go ɛ.

eng: Theres only a scary expectation of judgment and of a burning fire thats going to devour Gods opponents.
local: tɩchɛ dãbãɛ tɛɛ lɛ sɩ chɛlɛ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ, nɩ a bũu dagel 'lɔ na wa di a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃dẽme.

eng: When someone rejected the Law from Moses, they were put to death without mercy on the basis of the testimony of two or three witnesses.
local: Nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wa dɔ̃ɔ tɔr a lɛ a Mosesɩ na 'yɛr bin, ka a nɩbɛ ayi bɩɩ nɩbɛ ata wa di dãasɩɛ ɩka yelmãɛ lɛ wʊ ɩ a lɛ, ba ma kʊ naa a nɩnyɩnɛ tɩ maa kaa wʊ nɩbaal ɛ.

eng: How much worse punishment do you think is deserved by the person who walks all over Gods Son, who acts as if the blood of the covenant that made us holy is just ordinary blood, and who insults the Spirit of grace?.
local: Ge buor lɛ yɩ tɩɛr Nãaŋmɩn na ge a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie nyã nɩ gbɛɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ na maal fɩka waa ɩ bʊ̃chɛchɛ ɛ, a jãɩ nyã na ɩ a nɛtɩraa na maal wʊ a wʊ tor, ka wʊ tʊ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ Sɩɛ?.

eng: We know the one who said, Judgment is mine; I will pay people back. And he also said, The Lord will judge his people. .
local: Bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn a 'lɔ na 'yɛr, Maa lɛ so a sãn yaafʊ, ɩn lɩɛb yaa a sãn, wʊ lɛ bɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr go, A sɩ Soro na tɔɔr a wʊ nɩbɛ 'yɛr.

eng: Its scary to fall into the hands of the living God!.
local: A ɩn dãbãyele, ala ɩ fʊ faan lo a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbir nyã nũu pɔ.

eng: But remember the earlier days, after you saw the light. You stood your ground while you were suffering from an enormous amount of pressure.
local: Yɩ tɩɛr kaa a lɛ daar yɩn dɔ̃ɔ be be, tɩ wa nyɛ a chãa, a lɛ yɩn ba gbɛr tuor a dɔɔyɛ yɔɔ ala.

eng: Sometimes you were exposed to insults and abuse in public. Other times you became partners with those who were treated that way.
local: Sɔ̃ɔ kɔ̃ɔ, chãa pɔ jaa lɛ ba ma tʊrɔ yɩ na ba gere nɩ yɩ. Daar kɔ̃ɔ, yɩ ma 'mantãan a bala mɩ ban gere a lɛ.

eng: You even showed sympathy toward people in prison and accepted the confiscation of your possessions with joy, since you knew that you had better and lasting possessions.
local: Yɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ tara nɩbaal nɩ a bala ban nyɔɔr pɔɔ a die pɔ, na yɩ mɩ tara pʊpɛl an ba bã yɩ ɛ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban fa a yɩ bʊ̃tarsɩ, bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka yɩ mãɛ tara naa bʊ̃tarsɩ na ɩ gar a anyãna na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

eng: So dont throw away your confidence—it brings a great reward.
local: A lɛ jũu, yɩ taa lɔb a tɩɛr sʊ̃ nyã bar ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn na yab yɩn gar a lɛ.

eng: You need to endure so that you can receive the promises after you do Gods will.
local: Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tara kãnyir na yɩ maala a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, yɩn wa nyɛn a lɛ wʊn tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ.

eng: In a little while longer, the one who is coming will come and wont delay; .
local: Bojũu a chɛn bãlãa ka a, 'Lɔ na waara, wʊn wa naa. Wʊ kʊ̃ kor ɛ.

eng: but my righteous one will live by faith, and my whole being wont be pleased with anyone who shrinks back. .
local: Tɩchɛ a maa torfʊ sʊɔ 'lɔ, na kpɩɛrɛ naa nɩ sɔɔfʊ. 'Lɔ wa lɩɛb puor 'lɔ, n pʊɔ kʊ̃ pɛl wʊ ɛ.

eng: But we arent the sort of people who timidly draw back and end up being destroyed. Were the sort of people who have faith so that our whole beings are preserved.
local: Tɩchɛ sɩn ba ɩ a bala na lɩɛrɛ a puor sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ ɩn a bala na sɔɔ de, na sɩ nyɛ faafʊ.

eng: Faith is the reality of what we hope for, the proof of what we dont see.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɔɔfʊ nyã vɛ̃ naa ka saa 'lɔɔrɔ gbɛr ɛ, yelmãɛ jaa a bon 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn tara a tɩɛr tɩ ba nyɛn nɩbir ɛ.

eng: The elders in the past were approved because they showed faith.
local: A sɔɔfʊ nyã lɛ a kõr dẽme dɔ̃ɔ tara, ka a Nãaŋmɩn dãn ba.

eng: By faith we understand that the universe has been created by a word from God so that the visible came into existence from the invisible.
local: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ a ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ɔ de a wʊ nɛɛ 'yɛrbie maal a tẽe, nɩ a saaju wʊ jaa, ka a bonsɩ sɩn ben nyɛrɛ, a ba ɩ a dɔ̃ɔ be be ka wʊ de maal ɛ.

eng: By faith Abel offered a better sacrifice to God than Cain, which showed that he was righteous, since God gave approval to him for his gift. Though he died, hes still speaking through faith.
local: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Abel bɔɔrlo bonsɩ wʊn de kʊ Nãaŋmɩn ɩ gar a Kain bɔɔrlo bonsɩ. Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn dãn wʊ 'yɛr ɩka a wʊ yele tor naa, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a Abel kʊfʊsɩ nyã 'yɛr, wʊn sɔɔ kpi gba, tɩchɛ a sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃n ka wʊ chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ.

eng: By faith Enoch was taken up so that he didnt see death, and he wasnt found because God took him up. He was given approval for having pleased God before he was taken up.
local: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka Nãaŋmɩn wa de a Enok bʊ̃nɩbir. 'Lɔ ba kpi bɔ̃ɔ kũu ɛ, baa lɛ wa nyɛ wʊ jaa go ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ lɛ wa de wʊ. Bojũu sɛrɛ tɩchɛ ka wʊ wa chen, Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr a ɩka a Enok yele nʊ̃mɔ̃ wʊ naa.

eng: Its impossible to please God without faith because the one who draws near to God must believe that he exists and that he rewards people who try to find him.
