local: A anyãna jũu, yɩ mɔ̃ na yɩ de vɩla maalfʊ pʊɔ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, na yɩ de bɔ̃ɔfʊ mɩ pʊɔ a vɩla maalfʊ pɔ.

eng: and to knowledge, self-control; and to self-control, endurance; and to endurance, godliness.
local: ka a mãɛ nyɔɔfʊ mɩ pʊɔ a vɩla maalfʊ pɔ, ka a nɩbir mʊɔfʊ pʊɔ a mãɛ nyɔɔfʊ pɔ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn puor vɩla pʊɔ a nɩbir mʊɔfʊ pɔ.

eng: and to godliness, affection for others; and to affection for others, love.
local: ka a yɛɛr maal vɩla pʊɔ a Nãaŋmɩn puor vɩla pɔ, na yɩ de nʊ̃fʊ pʊɔ a yɛɛr maal vɩla pɔ.

eng: If all these are yours and they are growing in you, theyll keep you from becoming inactive and unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Bojũu ala ɩ yɩ tara naa anyãna a jaa ka a pʊɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, an sʊ̃ʊ yɩ naa ka yɩ kʊ̃ tara yãan na yaa tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ wɔ̃nɔ̃ wɔ̃mɔ̃ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ yɩn bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ɛ.

eng: Whoever lacks these things is shortsighted and blind, forgetting that they were cleansed from their past sins.
local: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ nɩrɛ baa tara a anyãna ɛ, waa nyɛrɛ ɛ, na wʊ ɩ jɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ ĩin ɩka Nãaŋmɩn pɛɛn a wʊ kõro jaa yeldɛbɛ bar.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, be eager to confirm your call and election. Do this and you will never ever be lost.
local: A lɛ jũu n yɛɛr, yɩ ba gbɛr ka a yɩ bʊɔlfʊ nɩ a yɩ chɛl irfʊ ɩ yelmãɛ. Ala ɩ yɩn maala a anyãna, yaa be jaa na wa lo ɛ.

eng: In this way you will receive a rich welcome into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Ka a sɔr yuo kʊ yɩ a yɩ kpɛ a sɩ Soro nɩ a Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nãalʊ̃ʊ na ba tara baarfʊ pɔ.

eng: So Ill keep reminding you about these things, although you already know them and stand secure in the truth you have.
local: A lɛ ɩn ma jɛɔ yɩ naa a yelsɩ anyãna, yɩ gba na bɔ̃ɔ yaa ka yɩ ba gbɛr ara a yelmãɛ yɩn tara pɔ.

eng: I think its right that I keep stirring up your memory, as long as Im alive.
local: A tara na sɔr ka n jɛɔ a yɩ tɩɛr ɩn chɛnɛ vʊrɔ a ãgãn vaar pɔ.

eng: After all, our Lord Jesus Christ has shown me that I am about to depart from this life.
local: bojũu n bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ tɩchɛ ka n kpi ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na man kʊ ma.

eng: Im eager for you always to remember these things after my death.
local: Ɩn ɩ naa lɛ jaa ɩn na tʊ̃ɔ, maa wa sɔɔ kpi, tɩ ka yɩ ma chɛnɛ tʊ̃ɔ tɩɛrɛ a yelsɩ anyãna.

eng: We didnt repeat crafty myths when we told you about the powerful coming of our Lord Jesus Christ. Quite the contrary, we witnessed his majesty with our own eyes.
local: A ba ɩ fuol nɩ yɛ̃ 'yɛr lɛ sɩ de 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩn mãɛ lɛ nyɛ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɛ nɩ nɩbir.

eng: He received honor and glory from God the Father when a voice came to him from the magnificent glory, saying, This is my dearly loved Son, with whom I am well-pleased.
local: Wʊ nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ tɩɩr yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ lɛ a kɔkɔr na yi a tɩɩr jikpɛ̃ɛ jie wa a wʊ sɛ̃ 'yɛrɛ, Nyã lɛ ɩ a n Bie 'lɔ ɩn nʊ̃, a wʊ yele pɛl naa n pʊɔ.

eng: We ourselves heard this voice from heaven while we were with him on the holy mountain.
local: Sɩn mãɛ wõn a kɔkɔr nyãna na yi a saaju wa, an ɩ sɩn nɩ 'lɔ jaa lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be a tɔ̃chɛchɛ par.

eng: In addition, we have a most reliable prophetic word, and you would do well to pay attention to it, just as you would to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns and the morning star rises in your hearts.
local: Sɩn lɛ tara a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na dɔ̃ɔ be be 'yɛr na chaar, yɩ yuo toor chɛlɛ a 'yɛr. A kaara naa fɩka chãa na chaara libe pɔ, tɩ tãn a wɛr na chaar ka a bivɩɛ ŋmɛrbir pur 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ nyãn pɔ.

eng: Most important, you must know that no prophecy of scripture represents the prophets own understanding of things.
local: A yelkpɛ̃ɛ lɛ ɩka, yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ de a wʊ yɛ̃ wiil a ala na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ par ɛ.

eng: because no prophecy ever came by human will. Instead, men and women led by the Holy Spirit spoke from God.
local: Bojũu nɩrɛ maa kpu 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ ma 'yɛr a lɛ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, an ɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ lɛ tara ba.

eng: My dear friends, this is now my second letter to you. I have written both letters to stir up your sincere understanding with a reminder.
local: N barmɩne, a gãma ayi sʊɔ lɛ anyã ɩn sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ. A jaa ayi pɔ, n sɛb ɩka n lɛ jɛɔ yɩ tɩɛr 'lɔ na tor pɔ.

eng: But false prophets also arose among the people. In the same way, false teachers will come among you. They will introduce destructive opinions and deny the master who bought them, bringing quick destruction on themselves.
local: Tɩchɛ a jir ŋmarba 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ be be a nɩbɛ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a jir ŋmarba wiwiilbe na wa be a yɩ pɔ. Ban sɔɔl wiil sɔ̃ɔfʊ 'yɛr, na ba chɩɩr a Tʊ̃ɔfʊ Sʊɔ na da ba na ba waan sɔ̃ɔfʊ wa 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba mãɛ.

eng: I want you to recall what the holy prophets foretold as well as what the Lord and savior commanded through your apostles.
local: N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ lɩɛb tɩɛr a 'yɛrbie ala a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrchɛchɛ bala na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a sɩ Soro nɩ a Fafaara na dɔ̃ɔ man ba tu a wʊ nɩtʊ̃nsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Many will follow them in their unrestrained immorality, and because of these false teachers the way of truth will be slandered.
local: Nɩyɔɔ na turo naa a ba vã sɔɩ anyãna, tɩ na ba kpɛrɛ a yelmãɛ sɔr.

eng: Most important, know this: in the last days scoffers will come, jeering, living by their own cravings.
local: Yɩ de nie bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a ber baaraa sɔ̃ɔ, nɩlaarba na turo a ba ãgãn vɔlaa na wa naa wa laara yɩ.

eng: In their greed they will take advantage of you with lies. The judgment pronounced against them long ago hasnt fallen idle, nor is their destruction sleeping.
local: A bɔgar wiwiilbe banyãna na 'mʊ̃ɔn yɩ naa nɩ a ba nɛnʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrbie. Nãaŋmɩn guor naa a ba 'yɛr kõro jaa ka a ba sɔ̃sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba guro ɛ.

eng: and saying, Where is the promise of his coming? After all, nothing has changed—not since the beginning of creation, nor even since the ancestors died.
local: Ban wa sʊrɔ yɩ naa, Nyɩnɛ lɛ a 'lɔ na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ yɩ ɩka wʊn wa naa? A lɛ daar jaa a sɩ sãamɩne na kpi a yelsɩ a jaa mɩ chɛnɛ na chiine a lɛ nɛ an piel.

eng: God didnt spare the angels when they sinned but cast them into the lowest level of the underworld and committed them to chains of darkness, keeping them there until the judgment.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ bar a malakasɩ bala na maal a dɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ban a bɔɔ fulom libe 'lɔ pɔ bar chɛlɛ nɩ a ba 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ daar.

eng: But they fail to notice that, by Gods word, heaven and earth were formed long ago out of water and by means of water.
local: Tɩchɛ ba bɔ̃ɔn naa tɩ maala fɩka ba ĩin naa a kõro jaa an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbie lɛ wʊ maal a saaju, nɩ a tẽe a kʊ̃ɔ ju, nɩ a kʊ̃ɔ par.

eng: And it was through these that the world of that time was flooded and destroyed.
local: A tẽkor, kʊ̃ɔ mɩ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ paal pɔɔ a wɛr a wʊ sɔ̃ɔ.

eng: And he didnt spare the ancient world when he brought a flood on the world of ungodly people, even though he protected Noah, a preacher of righteousness, along with seven others.
local: Waa dɔ̃ɔ bar a kõr nɩbɛ ɛ, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka a kʊ̃ɔ wa paal pɔɔ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, tɩ na wʊ faa a Nowa na ɩ yeltorsɩ 'yɛr mʊɔlɔ nɩ nɩbɛ ayopõi.

eng: God condemned the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah to total destruction, reducing them to ashes as a warning to ungodly people.
local: Nãaŋmɩn den bũu chʊm a Sodom nɩ a Gomora nɩbɛ ka a di lɩɛb tãpɩɛl, a nɩtɔ̃ wiil ɩka lɛ lɛ na ɩ a bala na ba puoro ɛ.

eng: But by the same word, heaven and earth are now held in reserve for fire, kept for the Judgment Day and destruction of ungodly people.
local: A 'yɛr nyãna nɩ wʊ ju lɛ wʊ bar a saaju, nɩ a tẽe go gun a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ, na wʊn sɔ̃ɔn a bala na ba puoro ɛ, nɩ bũu.

eng: And he rescued righteous Lot, who was made miserable by the unrestrained immorality of unruly people. .
local: Wʊ mɩ faa naa Lotɩ na ɩ a nɩtor a wʊ pʊɔ na ma sɔ̃ɔn a bala na tʊ̃nɔ̃ a dɛbɛ.

eng: Dont let it escape your notice, dear friends, that with the Lord a single day is like a thousand years and a thousand years are like a single day.
local: Tɩchɛ yɩ ta ĩin a yelbʊ̃'yen nyãna ɛ, n barmɩne. A sɩ Soro sɛ̃, bɩbir bʊ̃'yen kaara naa fɩka yuon tur, ka a yuon tur kaara fɩka bɩbir bʊ̃'yen a wʊ sɛ̃.

eng: While that righteous man lived among them he felt deep distress every day on account of the immoral actions he saw and heard.
local: Bojũu a nɩtor nyãna lɔ̃ɔn kpɩɛrɛ nɩ ba bɩbir jaa, ka a wʊ tɩɛr ma sɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊn ma nyɛ tɩ wõ ban ɩrɛ.

eng: The Lord isnt slow to keep his promise, as some think of slowness, but he is patient toward you, not wanting anyone to perish but all to change their hearts and lives.
local: A sɩ Soro ba baala nɩ a wʊ nɛɛ wʊn tɩr ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na 'yɛr ɩka a kor naa ɛ. Wʊ din kãnyir kʊ yɩ, wʊn ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ wɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ lɩɛb a yɩ tɩɛr.

eng: These things show that the Lord knows how to rescue the godly from their trials, and how to keep the unrighteous for punishment on the Judgment Day.
local: An ɩ nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a be, a sɩ Soro bɔ̃ɔn lɛ wʊn pãa na ɩ faa a bala na puoro yin a wõm pɔ, tɩ tara a bala na ba puoro ɛ, a ba be a ba gefʊ pɔ tɩ tãn a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ bɩbir.

eng: But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. On that day the heavens will pass away with a dreadful noise, the elements will be consumed by fire, and the earth and all the works done on it will be exposed.
local: A sɩ Soro bɩbir na wa naa fɩka lɛ nãnyie na ma wa, ka a saaju pɔɔn gɔ̃mɔ̃ wʊ jaa, na wʊ po chen. A bonsɩ ala na be a saaju ka a bũu nyɩl na wʊ pãa yuo yele a jaa a nɩbɛ na maala ka a gã chãa pɔ.

eng: This is especially true for those who follow after the corrupt cravings of the sinful nature and defy the Lords authority. These reckless, brash people arent afraid to insult the glorious ones.
local: A anyãna ɩn yelmãɛ a bala na turo a ba ãgãn sɔ̃ɔnaa nyã dɛɛr vɔlaa, baa turo a kpãɛn dẽme nɛɛ ɛ. Ba ɩn jukpãɛn dẽme na ba 'mɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ, baa joro dãbãɛ ɛ, tɩ ma kpɛrɛ a saaju bʊ̃maalsɩ.

eng: Since everything will be destroyed in this way, what sort of people ought you to be? You must live holy and godly lives.
local: An ɩ a bonsɩ a jaa na wa sɔ̃ɔn a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃, nɩbotɔ lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka yɩ ɩ? A sɛɛ naa ka a yɩ maalfʊ ɩ chɛchɛ, na yɩ puoro Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: yet angels, who are stronger and more powerful, dont use insults when pronouncing the Lords judgment on them.
local: Tɩchɛ a malakasɩ gba na ɩ gãdaar na ba tara kpãɛn, ba maa 'la kpɛ a bʊ̃maalsɩ anyãna a sɩ Soro niem ɛ.

eng: waiting for and hastening the coming day of God. Because of that day, the heavens will be destroyed by fire and the elements will melt away in the flames.
local: nɩtãa lɛ yɩn ben kaara a Nãaŋmɩn waa bɩbir na yɩ 'mi'mine nɩ a wʊ waa. A bɩbir nyãna na waan nɩ sɔ̃ɔfʊ, a saaju wʊ jaa na di naa, ka a bonsɩ a jaa mɩ nyɩl nɩ a tʊl.

eng: But according to his promise we are waiting for a new heaven and a new earth, where righteousness is at home.
local: Tɩchɛ sɩn chɛlɛ naa tẽpaalaa nɩ a saaju paalaa na ɩ a nɩtorsɩ tẽe, 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ.

eng: These false teachers are like irrational animals, mere creatures of instinct, born to be captured and destroyed. They slander what they dont understand and, like animals, they will be destroyed.
local: Tɩchɛ a nɩbɛ banyãna ma fere naa nɩ a bonsɩ ala ban ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ. Ba kaara naa mɔdʊ̃n kaar bʊ̃maalaa na ba tara tɩɛrɛ, ba dɔɔ ba naa na nyɔɔr ba kʊ, ba mɩ kaara a mɔdʊ̃n kaar na ba mɩ na wɛ.

eng: In this way, they will receive payment for their wrongdoing. They even enjoy unruly parties in broad daylight. They are blots and blemishes, taking delight in their seductive pleasures while feasting with you.
local: A dɛɛr ala ban maal, a dɛɛr ala lɛ ban yãan ba a sãn. A ba tɩɛr vɔlaa ban ma maala a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ, a nʊ̃mɔ̃ ba naa, ban lɔ̃ɔn dire nɩ yɩ na ban sɔ̃ɔ a yɩ befʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ vã.

eng: They are always looking for someone with whom to commit adultery. They are always on the lookout for opportunities to sin. They ensnare people whose faith is weak. They have hearts trained in greed. They are under Gods curse.
local: A ba nɩbie sɛɛn naa a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele, a ba maa bar dɛɛr ɩfʊ ɛ. Ba ma bɛlɛ naa a bala na bal na ba ɩ bɔgar dẽme, ba ben pɔ'yɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, while you are waiting for these things to happen, make every effort to be found by him in peace—pure and faultless.
local: A lɛ n barmɩne, yɩn pãa na chɛlɛ a anyãna jũu, yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir na yɩ taa tara chɛfʊ nɩ mabfʊ jie ɛ, na yɩ tara wʊ nɩ nyã'maar.

eng: Leaving the straight path, they have gone off course, following the way of Balaam son of Bosor, who loved the payment of doing wrong.
local: Ba bar a sɔr dẽ dẽ 'lɔ tɩ bɔr, na ba tu a Balaam na ɩ a Beor bidaba sɔr. 'Lɔ lɛ nʊ̃ sãyar na ba ɩ ɛ.

eng: Consider the patience of our Lord to be salvation, just as our dear friend and brother Paul wrote to you according to the wisdom given to him.
local: Yɩ tɩɛr a anyã ɩka a sɩ Soro kãnyir ɩ naa a yɩ faafʊ lɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ yɛbɛ Pɔɔl mɩ na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb kʊ yɩ nɩ a yɛ̃ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ wʊ.

eng: But Balaam was rebuked for his wrongdoing. A donkey, which has no voice, spoke with a human voice and put a stop to the prophets madness.
local: tɩchɛ wʊ nyɛn a wʊ bawõno tɔ̃nɔ̃, bʊ̃ɔ na ɩ dʊ̃ɔ den nɩrɛ kɔkɔr 'yɛr 'yɛr na wʊ ŋmaan a 'yɛ'yɛrɛ nyãna dãbol yele sɔr.

eng: speaking of these things in all his letters. Some of his remarks are hard to understand, and people who are ignorant and whose faith is weak twist them to their own destruction, just as they do the other scriptures.
local: A wʊ gãma a jaa pɔ, a 'yɛr bʊ̃'yen lɛ wʊ sɛb, na wʊ 'yɛrɛ a yelsɩ anyãna. A wʊ gãma pɔ yelsɩ ben be na ɩ tuo a par bɔ̃ɔfʊ, ka a ba bɔ̃ɔ nɩ a a bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ ara dẽme lɩɛb a bur bur nɩtãa lɛ ban lɩɛr a Nãaŋmɩn gãma amɩne, ka a na ɩ ba mãɛ sɔ̃ɔfʊ.

eng: These false teachers are springs without water, mists driven by the wind. The underworld has been reserved for them.
local: A nɩbɛ banyãna ɩ naa fɩka kʊlsɩ na ba tara kʊ̃ɔ ɛ, bɩɩ uul sɛsɛbɛ na furo chiine. Libe jaa gbɛb lɛ guro ba.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, since you have been warned in advance, be on guard so that you arent led off course into the error of sinful people, and lose your own safe position.
local: A lɛ jũu, n barmɩne, yɩn ben de nie bɔ̃ɔn a nɩtɔ̃, yɩ guro a yɩ mãɛ ka a ba bɛlfʊ ta wa vɛ̃ ka yɩ faa lo tɩ bar a yɩ gbɛr bafʊ jie ɛ.

eng: With empty, self-important speech, they use sinful cravings and unrestrained immorality to ensnare people who have only just escaped life with those who have wandered from the truth.
local: Bojũu yobɔ 'yɛr pɔrsɩ lɛ ba ma 'yɛrɛ, na ba bʊɔlɔ a ãgãn vɔldɛɛr, na ba bɛlɛ nɩ a nɩbɛ bala na faa joro a bala na bɔr sɛ̃.

eng: Instead, grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ. To him belongs glory now and forever. Amen.
local: Tɩchɛ yɩ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ a sɩ Soro nɩ a Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ nɩ a wʊ bɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr a pʊ̃pãanyã, nɩ bɩbir, nɩ a bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: These false teachers promise freedom, but they themselves are slaves of immorality; whatever overpowers you, enslaves you.
local: Ba ma tɩr nɛɛ kʊ ba ɩka ban faa ban a gbãgbayele pɔ, tɩchɛ ka a bala mãɛ ɩ a yelsɔ̃ɔnsɩ gbãgbaar, bojũu nɩrɛ ɩn gbãgbaa kʊ bon 'lɔ jaa na tʊ̃ɔ wʊ.

eng: If people escape the moral filth of this world through the knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ, then get tangled up in it again and are overcome by it, they are worse off than they were before.
local: Ala ɩ ba faan ba mãɛ yin a wɛr nyã bɔdɛɛr pɔ, ban wa bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro nɩ a Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɩ na ba lɛ tɩ kpɛ a ala pɔ ka a tʊ̃ɔ ba, a ba baarfʊ na ɩn dɛɛr gar a lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ be.

eng: It would be better for them never to have known the way of righteousness than, having come to know it, to turn back from the holy commandment entrusted to them.
local: An taa sa naa ala ɩ baa ta bɔ̃ɔ a sɔr toraa ɛ, gar ban ben bɔ̃ɔn tɩ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɛbin chɛchɛ 'lɔ ban de kʊ ba.

eng: They demonstrate the truth of the proverb: A dog returns to its own vomit, and a washed sow wallows in the mud.
local: Bala 'lɔ, a sʊkpa nyã ɩn yelmãɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ lɔb ɩka, baa lɩɛb tɩ di a ala wʊn ti bar, ka a dobaa ban so kʊ̃ɔ mɩ lɩɛb tɩ mamar a mɛmɛrɛ.

eng: We announce to you what existed from the beginning, what we have heard, what we have seen with our eyes, what we have seen and our hands handled, about the word of life.
local: Maa Jɔɔn sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ a yɩn na turo a Yesu. A 'yɛr na dɔ̃ɔ be be a wɛr pielfʊ daar, 'lɔ lɛ sɩ wõ a wʊ yele na sɩ nyɛ wʊ. Sɩ nyɛ wʊ naa nɩ a sɩ nɩbie na sɩ sɩɩr wʊ nɩ a sɩ mãɛ nuur. A 'yɛr nyã lɛ ɩ a nyɛvʊr.

eng: The life was revealed, and we have seen, and we testify and announce to you the eternal life that was with the Father and was revealed to us.
local: A nyɛvʊr nyã lɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ka wʊ de wiil sɩ a sɩ nyɛ wʊ, 'lɔ lɛ sɩ dire a wʊ dãasɩɛ na sɩ mʊɔlɔ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, ka wʊ wa ir wʊ wiil sɩ.

eng: What we have seen and heard, we also announce it to you so that you can have fellowship with us. Our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son, Jesus Christ.
local: Sɩ 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ a lɛ a sɩn mãɛ na nyɛ tɩ wõ, ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ ka sɩn nɩ yɩn na tara nɛbʊ̃'yen, ka a sɩn nɩ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn 'matãan a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tara a nɛbʊ̃'yen.

eng: We are writing these things so that our joy can be complete.
local: A nyã lɛ sɩ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ kaa sɩ chɩlfʊ na sɛɛ.

eng: This is the message that we have heard from him and announce to you: God is light and there is no darkness in him at all.
local: A 'yɛr wʊn kʊ sɩ ka sɩ mʊɔlɔ kʊrɔ yɩ nɩ nyã, Nãaŋmɩn ɩn chãa ka libe ba be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ jaa ɛ.

eng: If we claim, We have fellowship with him, and live in the darkness, we are lying and do not act truthfully.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ 'yɛr naa ɩka sɩn nɩ 'lɔ tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen tɩ chɛnɛ chiine a libe pɔ, sɩ ɩn jir ŋmarba na saa turo a yelmãɛ ɛ.

eng: But if we live in the light in the same way as he is in the light, we have fellowship with each other, and the blood of Jesus, his Son, cleanses us from every sin.
local: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ sɩ chiine naa a chãa pɔ nɩtãa lɛ a 'lɔ na be a chãa pɔ, sɩn tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen ka a wʊ Bie Yesu jãɩ pɛɛ a sɩ yeldɛbɛ a jaa bar.

eng: If we claim, We dont have any sin, we deceive ourselves and the truth is not in us.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ 'yɛr ɩka saa tara yeldɛɛr jaa ɛ, sɩ bɛlɛ na sɩ mãɛ, na saa tara yelmãɛ ɛ.

eng: But if we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins and cleanse us from everything weve done wrong.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ 'yɛr naa a sɩ yeldɛbɛ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, wʊn vɛ̃n kʊ sɩ, tɩ pɛɛ a sɩ yeldɛbɛ a jaa bar, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ nɩ nɩtor.

eng: If we claim, We have never sinned, we make him a liar and his word is not in us.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ 'yɛr naa ɩka saa maal yeldɛɛr jaa ɛ, sɩ bʊɔlɔ na Nãaŋmɩn jir ŋmara, na saa de a wʊ 'yɛr a sɩ nyãa pɔ ɛ.

eng: My little children, Im writing these things to you so that you dont sin. But if you do sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous one.
local: N bibiir, n sɛɛrɛ naa anyã kʊrɔ yɩ ka yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa taa wa ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ ala ɩ ãsʊɔ wa ɩn yeldɛɛr, sɩ tara na po pire na be a Sãa sɛ̃. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a Torfʊ Sʊɔ.

eng: He is Gods way of dealing with our sins, not only ours but the sins of the whole world.
local: 'Lɔ lɛ lo a sɩ yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr kʊ sɩ, a ba ɩ sɩn tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a wɛr wʊ jaa.

eng: This is how we know that we know him: if we keep his commandments.
local: A nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka sɩ be naa a wʊ sɛ̃, sɩn turo a wʊ nɛbinsɩ jũu.

eng: The one who claims, I know him, while not keeping his commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in this person.
local: Nɩrɛ 'yɛr ɩka wʊ bɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn tɩ ba ɩrɛ a lɛ wʊn bin a nɛɛ ɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ ɩn jir ŋmara na waa tara yelmãɛ ɛ.

eng: But the love of God is truly perfected in whoever keeps his word. This is how we know we are in him.
local: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ jaa na turo a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, sɩrɛ jaa Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ sɛɛn a wʊ pɔ. Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka sɩ be naa a wʊ pɔ.

eng: The one who claims to remain in him ought to live in the same way as he lived.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa na 'yɛr ɩka wʊ be naa Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ, wʊ chiine a lɛ a Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ chen.

eng: Dear friends, Im not writing a new commandment to you, but an old commandment that you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the message you heard.
local: N barmɩne, a ba ɩ nɛbin paalaa lɛ n sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bʊ̃koraa 'lɔ yɩn tara yi a pielfʊ lɛ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a nɛkoraa yɩn wõ.

eng: On the other hand, I am writing a new commandment to you, which is true in him and in you, because the darkness is passing away and the true light already shines.
local: Tɩchɛ wʊ ɩn bʊ̃paalaa, bojũu a ɩn sɩrɛ a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ, naa mɩ ɩ sɩrɛ a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, bojũu a libe tɔɔn 'laa, ka a sɩrɛ chãa chaara.

eng: The one who claims to be in the light while hating a brother or sister is in the darkness even now.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa wa 'yɛr ɩka maa ben chãa pɔ, tɩ 'laar a wʊ yɛbɛ, wʊ chɛnɛ na be a libe pɔ.

eng: The person loving a brother and sister stays in the light, and there is nothing in the light that causes a person to stumble.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na nʊ̃ a wʊ yɛbɛ ben a chãa pɔ, ka bon jaa ba be be na vɛ̃ ka wʊ ŋme gbɛr ɛ.

eng: But the person who hates a brother or sister is in the darkness and lives in the darkness, and doesnt know where to go because the darkness blinds the eyes.
local: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na 'laar a wʊ yɛbɛ ben a libe pɔ, na wʊ yʊɔrɔ a libe pɔ, na waa bɔ̃ɔ a jie wʊn chiine ɛ, bojũu a libe jɔ̃ɔ wʊ naa.

eng: Little children, Im writing to you because your sins have been forgiven through Jesus name.
local: N bibiir, n sɛɛrɛ na a gãn nyã kʊrɔ yɩ bojũu Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃ naa a yɩ yeldɛbɛ kʊ yɩ a lɛ a Yesu na ɩ kʊ yɩ jũu.

eng: Parents, Im writing to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, Im writing to you because you have conquered the evil one.
local: Sãamɩne, n sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ bojũu, yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a 'lɔ na yi a wɛr pielfʊ. Pɔlbil, n sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ bojũu yɩ tʊ̃ɔn a dɛɛr sʊɔ. Naa mɩ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a yɩn bibiir bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: Little children, I write to you because you know the Father. Parents, I write to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, I write to you because you are strong, the word of God remains in you, and you have conquered the evil one.
local: N sɛb kʊ a yɩn sãamɩne bojũu, yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a 'lɔ na yi a wɛr pielfʊ daar. N sɛb kʊ a yɩn pɔlbil a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ jũu, yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ na, na yɩ jɛb tʊ̃ɔ a dɛɛr sʊɔ.

eng: Dont love the world or the things in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in them.
local: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa nʊ̃nɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃dɔ̃mɔ̃sɩ bɩɩ bon jaa ban tara ɛ. Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wa nʊ̃n a lɛ, a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ ba be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: Everything that is in the world—the craving for whatever the body feels, the craving for whatever the eyes see and the arrogant pride in ones possessions—is not of the Father but is of the world.
local: Bojũu a bonsɩ anyã sɩn nyɛ ɩ naa a ãgãn nyã vɔlaa nɩ a nɩbie vɔlaa bɩɩ tara jã jɩɩr nɩ bʊ̃tarsɩ. A nyãna a jaa wʊn na ɩrɛ ba yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yi naa dɔ̃dɔ̃mɔ̃sɩ sɛ̃.

eng: And the world and its cravings are passing away, but the person who does the will of God remains forever.
local: A bɔdɛbɛ anyã mɩ poro na chiine, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ɩrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ na ben be sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

eng: Little children, it is the last hour. Just as you have heard that the antichrist is coming, so now many antichrists have appeared. This is how we know it is the last hour.
local: N bibiir, a wɛr baarfʊ ta naa, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ wõ ɩka a bala na 'laar a Kɩrɩsɩto na wa naa, ba yɔɔ lɛ a banyãna na be ka gba. Ala lɛ sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a baraa sɔ̃ɔ lɛ.

eng: They went out from us, but they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But by going out from us, they showed they all are not part of us.
local: A nɩbɛ banyãna dɔ̃ɔ be a sɩ sɛ̃ tɩ wa yi. Ka a ba yifʊ wiil ɩka baa tara sɩ nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen ɛ, sɩn nɩ bala ta ɩ bʊ̃'yen, ban taa be naa sɩ sɛ̃, tɩchɛ a ba yifʊ wiil ɩka baa pʊɔ sɩ ɛ.

eng: But you have an anointing from the holy one, and all of you know the truth.
local: Tɩchɛ yɩn 'lɔ, Yesu kʊ yɩ naa a wʊ Sɩɛ ka yɩ jaa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ.

eng: I dont write to you because you dont know the truth but because you know it. You know that no lie comes from the truth.
local: N ba sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ bojũu yɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ lɛ. Bojũu yɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn a jir na tɛɛ nɩ yelmãɛ.

eng: Who is the liar? Isnt it the person who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This person is the antichrist: the one who denies the Father and the Son.
local: An lɛ ɩ a jir ŋmara? Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'yɛr ɩka a Yesu ba ɩ a Nɩ-iraa ɛ, a nɩrɛ 'lɔ lɛ 'laar a Kɩrɩsɩto. A nɩnyɩnɛ tɔr naa a Sãa nɩ a Bie jaa.

eng: Everyone who denies the Son does not have the Father, but the one who confesses the Son has the Father also.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tɔr a Bie mɩ tɔr a Sãa, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'yɛr chãa pɔ ɩka Yesu lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: As for you, what you heard from the beginning must remain in you. If what you heard from the beginning remains in you, you will also remain in relationship to the Son and in the Father.
local: Yɩ chɛnɛ tara a lɛ nɛ yɩn wõ a Yesu 'yɛr a pielfʊ, yɩn wa chɛnɛ tara a lɛ, yɩn tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ a Sãa nɩ a wʊ Bie.

eng: This is the promise that he himself gave us: eternal life.
local: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩka wʊn ɩ naa wʊn vɛ̃ naa ka sɩ tara nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

eng: I write these things to you about those who are attempting to deceive you.
local: N sɛɛrɛ na a anyãna kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃ nɩ a bala na bar yɩ tɩ yi, ba bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka ba bɛl yɩ yin.

eng: As for you, the anointing that you received from him remains on you, and you dont need anyone to teach you the truth. But since his anointing teaches you about all things , remain in relationship to him just as he taught you.
local: A yɩn 'lɔ, ba kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɛl yɩ ɛ, bojũu Yesu kʊ yɩ naa a Sɩɛ ka wʊ be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. A Sɩɛ na ɩ yelmãɛ na wile yɩ jũu, yaa lɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ wiil yɩ a yelmãɛ go ɛ, tɩchɛ a Sɩɛ a Yesu na kʊ yɩ vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ, ka ala mɩ a Sɩɛ na wile ɩ yelmãɛ, jir jaa ba be be ɛ. A lɛ jũu, yɩ chɛnɛ tara a Yesu nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩtãa lɛ a Sɩɛ na 'yɛr yɩ.

eng: And now, little children, remain in relationship to Jesus, so that when he appears we can have confidence and not be ashamed in front of him when he comes.
local: A lɛ jũu n bibiir, yɩ chɛnɛ tara a Yesu nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen, ka 'lɔ wa yi a saaju lɩɛb waara a wɛr pɔ, sɩn tara na nyãa ka dãbãɛ kʊ̃ kʊrɔ sɩ a wʊ tuorfʊ ɛ.

eng: If you know that he is righteous, you also know that every person who practices righteousness is born from him.
local: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a Yesu yele tor naa, nɩrɛ jaa mɩ na maala a lɛ, mɩ ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn bie.

eng: See what kind of love the Father has given to us in that we should be called Gods children, and that is what we are! Because the world didnt recognize him, it doesnt recognize us.
local: Nyɛ lɛ a sɩ Sãa na nʊ̃ sɩ jã. Wʊ sɔɔn bʊɔlɔ sɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, ka sɩ mɩ sɩr ɩ! A lɛ jũu, a wɛr nɩbɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ, ala lɛ so ban ba bɔ̃ɔ sɩ ɛ.

eng: Dear friends, now we are Gods children, and it hasnt yet appeared what we will be. We know that when he appears we will be like him because well see him as he is.
local: N barmɩne, pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, saa bɔ̃ɔ lɛ sɩn na be daar kɔ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka, a Yesu wa lɩɛb wa a wɛr nyã pɔ, sɩn nyɛ naa a lɛ wʊn na be, na sɩ kaara a wʊ kaar.

eng: And all who have this hope in him purify themselves even as he is pure.
local: Yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa na tara a tɩɛrtɔ nyãna a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ, wʊ ir wʊ mãɛ yin dɛɛr pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Yesu na ɩ chɛchɛ.

eng: Every person who practices sin commits an act of rebellion, and sin is rebellion.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr, a nɩnyɩnɛ sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinsɩ ala wʊn bin, bojũu waa tara Nãaŋmɩn nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen ɛ.

eng: You know that he appeared to take away sins, and there is no sin in him.
local: Tɩchɛ yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka Yesu ba maal dɛɛr ɛ, a lɛ ka wʊ wa ɩka wʊ wa de a sɩ dɛbɛ bar.

eng: Every person who remains in relationship to him does not sin. Any person who sins has not seen him or known him.
local: A lɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na tara Yesu nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen, wʊ maa lɛ chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr go ɛ, tɩchɛ a nɩnyɩnɛ wa chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr, waa bɔ̃ɔ a Yesu nɩ a nɩnyɩnɛ wʊn ɩ ɛ.

eng: Little children, make sure no one deceives you. The person who practices righteousness is righteous, in the same way that Jesus is righteous.
local: N bibiir yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, ka nɩrɛ jaa taa bɛlɛ yɩ ɛ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na maala a lɛ na tor, wʊ ɩ naa nɩtor nɩtãa lɛ Yesu na ɩ nɩtor.

eng: The person who practices sin belongs to the devil, because the devil has been sinning since the beginning. Gods Son appeared for this purpose: to destroy the works of the devil.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr yi naa a tɩɩ sɛ̃, bojũu 'lɔ lɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛbɛ yi a wɛr pielfʊ. Ala lɛ so ka Yesu na ɩ Nãaŋmɩn Bie wa ɩka wʊ wa sɔ̃ɔ a tɩɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

eng: Those born from God dont practice sin because Gods DNA remains in them. They cant sin because they are born from God.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na wa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bie, maa lɛ sɛɛ ɩka wʊ lɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛbɛ go ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn befʊ be naa a wʊ yɔ̃ɔ. Wʊ kʊ̃ lɛ chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛbɛ go ɛ, bojũu wʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bie.

eng: This is how Gods children and the devils children are apparent: everyone who doesnt practice righteousness is not from God, including the person who doesnt love a brother or sister.
local: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir nɩ a Tɩɩ bibiir. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ba wa turo a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ 'lɔ wʊn bin bɩɩ na waa lɛ nʊ̃ a wʊ yɛɛr, waa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bie ɛ.

eng: This is the message that you heard from the beginning: love each other.
local: An yi a daar 'lɔ jaa yɩn piel sɔɔ Yesu, yɩ wõ naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr bie na 'yɛr ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ taa.

eng: Dont behave like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and murdered his brother. And why did he kill him? He killed him because his own works were evil, but the works of his brother were righteous.
local: Yɩ ta ɩ a sɩ kaara a Kain kaar ɛ, wʊ tara na a dɛɛr sʊɔ tɩɛr na wʊ kʊ a wʊ yɛbile. Bo lɛ so wʊn kʊ a yɛbile? Bojũu a Kain tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn dɛɛr, tɩchɛ ka a wʊ yɛbile tʊ̃mɔ̃ tor.

eng: Dont be surprised, brothers and sisters, if the world hates you.
local: N yɛɛr, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a fɛr yɩ ala ɩ a nɩbɛ na be a wɛr pɔ wa 'laar yɩ naa ɛ.

eng: We know that we have transferred from death to life, because we love the brothers and sisters. The person who does not love remains in death.
local: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn nara ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ naa a sɩ taaba. A wiil ɩka sɩ yin kũu pɔ, tɩ kpɛ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ pɔ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba nʊ̃ a wʊ yɛbɛ ɛ, wʊ chɛnɛ na be kũu pɔ.

eng: Everyone who hates a brother or sister is a murderer, and you know that murderers dont have eternal life residing in them.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na 'laar a wʊ yɛɛr ɩn nɩkʊrɔ a wʊ nyãa pɔ, ka yɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka nɩkʊrɔ ba tara nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

eng: This is how we know love: Jesus laid down his life for us, and we ought to lay down our lives for our brothers and sisters.
local: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn lɛ a nʊ̃fʊ na be, bojũu Yesu sɔɔn kpi kʊ sɩ, ka a mɩ sɛɛ ɩka, sɩ mɩ sɔɔ kpi kʊ a sɩ yɛɛr.

eng: But if someone has material possessions and sees a brother or sister in need but refuses to help—how can the love of God dwell in a person like that?.
local: Ala ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ tara naa ka a sɛɛn wʊ, tɩ nyɛ a wʊ taa yɛɛr an wõnõ ka wʊ lɩɛb puor yɔ̃ɔ ba, a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ be a wʊ sʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: Little children, lets not love with words or speech but with action and truth.
local: N bibiir, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka sɩ nʊ̃fʊ ɩ 'yɛrbie nɩ jãlbir 'yɛrbie ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ɩ ka sɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ taa nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na nʊ̃ sɩ sɩrɛ jaa.

eng: This is how we will know that we belong to the truth and reassure our hearts in Gods presence.
local: A sɩ befʊ pɔ lɛ sɩn bɔ̃ɔ ɩka sɩ be naa a yelmãɛ pɔ sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ jaa sɩn wa ara a Nãaŋmɩn niem sʊɔrɔ wʊ, sɩ kʊ̃ lɛ joro dãbãɛ ɛ.

eng: Even if our hearts condemn us, God is greater than our hearts and knows all things.
local: ala gba ɩ a sɩ tɩɛr 'yɛr ɩka sɩ maal dɛɛr. Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔn yele jaa a sɩ nyãn pɔ, na wʊ bɔ̃ɔ yele jaa sɩn ɩrɛ.

eng: Dear friends, if our hearts dont condemn us, we have confidence in relationship to God.
local: N barmɩne, ala ɩ sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a sɩ tɩɛr pɔ, ɩka sɩ maa chɛnɛ maala dɛɛr ɛ, sɩn wa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn, sɩ kʊ̃ joro dãbãɛ ɛ.

eng: We receive whatever we ask from him because we keep his commandments and do what pleases him.
local: sɩn nyɛn bon jaa sɩn sʊɔr yi a wʊ sɛ̃, bojũu sɩ turo naa a wʊ nɛɛ na sɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ na pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ.

eng: This is his commandment, that we believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love each other as he commanded us.
local: Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ wʊn bin nɩ nyã, ɩka sɩ sɔɔ a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor na sɩ nʊ̃ a sɩ taaba, nɩtãa a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr sɩ.

eng: Those who keep his commandments dwell in God and God dwells in them. This is how we know that he dwells in us, because of the Spirit he has given us.
local: Bala jaa na turo a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ wʊn bin, ba ben a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka wʊ mɩ be a ba 'yɔ̃ɔ. Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka wʊ ben a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, a Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn de kʊ sɩ jũu.

eng: Dear friends, dont believe every spirit. Test the spirits to see if they are from God because many false prophets have gone into the world.
local: N barmɩne, yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa sɔɔ nɩrɛ jaa na 'yɛr ɩka wʊ tara na a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ bɛɛr a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ kaa, ka ala ɩ a 'yɛr wʊn 'yɛrɛ yin a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Bojũu jir 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ yi naa jie jaa na ba 'yɛrɛ ɩka a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ ba.

eng: This is how you know if a spirit comes from God: every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come as a human is from God.
local: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ yɩn de bɔ̃ɔn a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, nɩrɛ 'lɔ nɩ wa 'yɛr ɩka Yesu wa naa a wɛr pɔ nɩtãa nɩsaal, a nɩrɛ 'lɔ lɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

eng: and every spirit that doesnt confess Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist, which you have heard is coming and is now already in the world.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa wa tɔr a lɛ ba yi Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ, a nɩrɛ nyã lɛ 'laar a Kɩrɩsɩto, a 'lɔ yɩn wõ ɩka wʊn wa naa, 'lɔ lɛ be be a wɛr pɔ a pʊ̃pãanyã.

eng: You are from God, little children, and you have defeated these people because the one who is in you is greater than the one who is in the world.
local: N bibiir, yɩn 'lɔ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ ba, bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ na be a yɩ pɔ, bɛrma naa gar a dɛɛr sʊɔ 'lɔ na be a wɛr pɔ.

eng: They are from the world. So they speak from the worlds point of view and the world listens to them.
local: A jir dẽme banyãna na 'yɛr ɩka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ ba a wiilfʊ anyãna ɩ naa a wɛr nyã nɩbɛ. Ka a ba wiilfʊ ɩ a wɛr nyã pɔ wiilfʊ, ka a bala na ba ɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ɛ, ma sɔɔ a ba wiilfʊ.

eng: We are from God. The person who knows God listens to us. Whoever is not from God doesnt listen to us. This is how we recognize the Spirit of truth and the spirit of error.
local: Sɩn 'lɔ ɩn naa a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn, ma sɔɔ naa a lɛ sɩn wile, tɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, maa sɔɔ a lɛ sɩn wile ɛ. Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩn tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔn ka a nɩnyɩnɛ na 'yɛrɛ tara naa Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ na ɩ a yelmãɛ, bɩɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na yi a Satan sɛ̃ na ɩ a jir ŋmara.

eng: Dear friends, lets love each other, because love is from God, and everyone who loves is born from God and knows God.
local: N barmɩne, yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ wile taa nʊ̃fʊ. N 'yɛr naa a nɩtɔ̃ bojũu Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ma vɛ̃ a sɩ ma tʊ̃ɔ nʊ̃ taa. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na wa nʊ̃ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ, a wiil ɩka Nãaŋmɩn bie lɛ wʊ ɩ na wʊ bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn.

eng: The person who doesnt love does not know God, because God is love.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na baa wa nʊ̃ a wʊ taaba ɛ, ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn befʊ wʊ jaa ɩn nʊ̃fʊ.

eng: This is how the love of God is revealed to us: God has sent his only Son into the world so that we can live through him.
local: A sɔr nyã lɛ Nãaŋmɩn tu wiil a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ kʊ sɩ. Wʊ vɛ̃n a wʊ Bibʊ̃'yen tɛɛ ka wʊ wa a wɛr pɔ, a wʊ jũu, sɩ tara na a yelmãɛ nyɛvʊr.

eng: This is love: it is not that we loved God but that he loved us and sent his Son as the sacrifice that deals with our sins.
local: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a nʊ̃fʊ be, a ba ɩ sɩn lɛ nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, tɩchɛ 'lɔ lɛ nʊ̃ sɩ, na wʊ tʊ̃ a wʊ Bie ka wʊ wa lo a sɩ yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr kʊ sɩ.

eng: Dear friends, if God loved us this way, we also ought to love each other.
local: N barmɩne, an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ nʊ̃ sɩ a nɩtɔ̃, a mɩ sɛɛ naa ɩka, sɩ mɩ nʊ̃ taa.

eng: No one has ever seen God. If we love each other, God remains in us and his love is made perfect in us.
local: Nɩrɛ jaa ba nyɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ wʊn be ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩn wa nʊ̃ taa, sɩn nɩ Nãaŋmɩn tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen. Ka a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ na be a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ chaar kʊ a nɩbɛ.

eng: This is how we know we remain in him and he remains in us, because he has given us a measure of his Spirit.
local: Nãaŋmɩn kʊ sɩ naa a wʊ Sɩɛ, a lɛ jũu lɛ sɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka, Nãaŋmɩn ben a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka sɩ mɩ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ala lɛ so sɩn nɩ Nãaŋmɩn na tara nɛbʊ̃'yen.

eng: We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son to be the savior of the world.
local: Sɩ nyɛ naa na sɩ mɩ di dãasɩɛ ɩka a Sãa tʊ̃ naa a wʊ Bie ka wʊ wa faa a wɛr nɩbɛ.

eng: If any of us confess that Jesus is Gods Son, God remains in us and we remain in God.
local: Nãaŋmɩn tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ nɩrɛ nyã na 'yɛr chãa pɔ, tɩ sɔɔ ɩka Yesu ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn Bie, ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a nɩnyɩnɛ tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen.

eng: We have known and have believed the love that God has for us. God is love, and those who remain in love remain in God and God remains in them.
local: A lɛ sɩn 'lɔ, sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa na sɩ sɔɔ de ɩka, Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃ sɩn sɔ̃ɔ jaa. Nãaŋmɩn ɩn nʊ̃fʊ sʊɔ. Nɩrɛ mɩ na nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a wʊ taaba, wʊ ben Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka Nãaŋmɩn mɩ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: This is how love has been perfected in us, so that we can have confidence on the Judgment Day, because we are exactly the same as God is in this world.
local: Sɩn 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ chaara a sɩ pɔ, ka dãbãɛ kʊ̃ kʊrɔ sɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn wa ara a wʊ niem a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ daar ɛ. Bojũu a wɛr nyã pɔ sɩ kaar naa nɩtãa Yesu.

eng: There is no fear in love, but perfect love drives out fear, because fear expects punishment. The person who is afraid has not been made perfect in love.
local: Dãbãɛ ba be nʊ̃fʊ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ nʊ̃fʊ na chaar ma diin dãbãɛ bar, bojũu dãbãɛ ma kpɛ̃n nɩrɛ wʊn joro gefʊ. Nʊ̃fʊ mɩ na chaar, ba joro dãbãɛ ɛ.

eng: We love because God first loved us.
local: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn lɛ de nie nʊ̃ sɩ, ala lɛ so a sɩ mɩ nʊ̃ wʊ.

eng: Those who say, I love God and hate their brothers or sisters are liars. After all, those who dont love their brothers or sisters whom they have seen can hardly love God whom they have not seen!.
local: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ 'yɛr ɩka wʊ nʊ̃n Nãaŋmɩn, tɩ chɛnɛ 'laar a wʊ yɛɛr, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩn jir ŋmara. Bojũu nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ba nʊ̃ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ wʊn nyɛn nɩbir, kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn wʊn ba nyɛn nɩbir ɛ.

eng: This commandment we have from him: Those who claim to love God ought to love their brother and sister also.
local: A nɛɛ lɛ a nyã a Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr bin, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na nʊ̃ a 'lɔ Nãaŋmɩn sɛɛ naa ɩka wʊ nʊ̃ a wʊ taaba.

eng: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born from God. Whoever loves someone who is a parent loves the child born to the parent.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ ɩka Yesu lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa, ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn bie. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nʊ̃ a sãa mɩ nʊ̃ naa a bie.

eng: This is how we know that we love the children of God: when we love God and keep Gods commandments.
local: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩn de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ naa a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir ala ɩ sɩ nʊ̃n a Nãaŋmɩn na sɩ turo a wʊ nɛɛ wʊn bin.

eng: This is the love of God: we keep Gods commandments. Gods commandments are not difficult.
local: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩn de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka sɩ nʊ̃n Nãaŋmɩn sɩrɛ jaa, ala ɩ sɩ tun a lɛ jaa wʊn 'yɛr ka sɩ tu. A ba ɩ tuo ka sɩ na tu a lɛ jaa wʊn 'yɛr ɩka sɩ tu ɛ.

eng: because everyone who is born from God defeats the world. And this is the victory that has defeated the world: our faith.
local: Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa na ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bie ma lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɔr dɛbɛ ala a nɩbɛ na turo. A lɛ vɛ̃ naa, ka wʊ ma tʊ̃ɔ tɔr a sɔr dɛbɛ ala a nɩbɛ na turo, Yesu wʊn sɔɔ jũu.

eng: Who defeats the world? Isnt it the one who believes that Jesus is Gods Son?.
local: An lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a wɛr? Nɩrɛ 'lɔ tɛɛ na sɔɔ ɩka Yesu lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie.

eng: This is the one who came by water and blood: Jesus Christ. Not by water only but by water and blood. And the Spirit is the one who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth.
local: A Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nyã lɛ wa a ba so wʊ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ nɩ a wʊ jãɩ. Waa so a kʊ̃ɔ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩ wʊ kpi naa na wʊ kpaar a wʊ jãɩ, ka a Sɩɛ mɩ di a wʊ dãasɩɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ma 'yɛrɛ naa yelmãɛ.

eng: The three are testifying.
local: Bojũu dãasɩɛsɩ ata lɛ be be.

eng: the Spirit, the water, and the blood—and the three are united in agreement.
local: a Sɩɛ, nɩ a kʊ̃ɔ, nɩ a jãɩ, ka a jaa ata dãasɩɛ ɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen.

eng: If we receive human testimony, Gods testimony is greater, because this is what God testified: he has testified about his Son.
local: Ala ɩ sɩ ma sɔɔ naa nɩsaal dãasɩɛ, sɩn sɔɔ naa Nãaŋmɩn dãasɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn di a wʊ Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn dãasɩɛ bɛrma naa gar nɩsaal dãasɩɛ.

eng: The one who believes in Gods Son has the testimony within; the one who doesnt believe God has made God a liar, because that one has not believed the testimony that God gave about his Son.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, a dãasɩɛ nyã be naa a wʊ nyãa pɔ. Nɩrɛ nyã jaa na ba wa sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, wʊ bʊɔl wʊn jir ŋmara bojũu waa sɔɔ a dãasɩɛ wʊn di a wʊ Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

eng: And this is the testimony: God gave eternal life to us, and this life is in his Son.
local: A dãasɩɛ nɩ nyã, Nãaŋmɩn kʊ sɩ naa nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, ka a nyɛvʊr nyã be a wʊ Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: The one who has the Son has life. The one who doesnt have Gods Son does not have life.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara a Bie, tara na nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba wa tara a Bie ɛ, ba tara nyɛvʊr ɛ.

eng: I write these things to you who believe in the name of Gods Son so that you can know that you have eternal life.
local: N sɛb kʊ a yɩn bala na sɔɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie yuor, ka yɩn bɔ̃ɔ ɩka yɩ tara na nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

eng: This is the confidence that we have in our relationship with God: If we ask for anything in agreement with his will, he listens to us.
local: A 'lafʊ nyã lɛ sɩ tara ɩka, sɩn wa sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ, wʊn wõ naa naa.

eng: If we know that he listens to whatever we ask, we know that we have received what we asked from him.
local: Ka ala ɩ sɩ bɔ̃ɔn na ɩka Nãaŋmɩn wõ naa a lɛ sɩn ma sʊɔr wʊ, sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ tara na bon jaa sɩn sʊɔr wʊ.

eng: If anyone sees a brother or sister committing a sin that does not result in death, they should pray, and God will give life to them—that is, to those who commit sins that dont result in death. There is a sin that results in death—Im not saying that you should pray about that.
local: Ala ɩ yɩ wa nyɛ naa a yɩ tɔ sʊɔ na ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr kɔ̃ɔ na kʊ̃ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ ɛ, yɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn ka wʊ vɛ̃ kʊ wʊ. Tɩchɛ yeldɛbɛ amɩne ben be fʊn na ɩ ka Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ vɛ̃ kʊ fʊ ɛ, n ba 'yɛr ɩka yɩ sʊɔr a ala ɛ.

eng: Every unrighteous action is sin, but there is a sin that does not result in death.
local: Yeldɛbɛ a jaa ɩn yelbier, tɩchɛ yelbier a jaa baa kʊrɔ kũu ɛ.

eng: We know that everyone born from God does not sin, but the ones born from God guard themselves, and the evil one cannot touch them.
local: Sɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na wa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bie, kʊ̃ lɛ chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn Bie na gu ba naa ka a dɛɛr sʊɔ kʊ̃ sɩɩr ba ɛ.

eng: We know we are from God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.
local: Sɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, ka a wɛr wʊ jaa be a dɛɛr sʊɔ tʊ̃ɔfʊ pɔ.

eng: We know that Gods Son has come and has given us understanding to know the one who is true. We are in the one who is true by being in his Son, Jesus Christ. This is the true God and eternal life.
local: Sɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn Bie wa naa, 'lɔ lɛ vɛ̃ ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a yelmãɛ. Sɩ be naa a Nãaŋmɩn nyã nɩ a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a yelmãɛ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

eng: Little children, guard yourselves from idols!.
local: N bibiir, yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin bʊtɩbɛ jaa pɔ.

eng: From the elder. To the chosen gentlewoman and her children, whom I truly love.
local: Maa nɩkpɛ̃ɛ lɛ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a fʊ̃ʊ pɔɔ nyã Nãaŋmɩn na ir nɩ a fʊ bibiir. N nʊ̃ fʊ naa nɩ a yelmãɛ, a ba ɩ maa tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ bala jaa mɩ na bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ mɩ nʊ̃ fʊ naa.

eng: because of the truth that remains with us and will be with us forever.
local: An ɩ a yelmãɛ ben a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ jũu, na wʊn be a sɩ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

eng: Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, will be ours who live in truth and love.
local: Wãɛfʊ, nɩ nɩbaal, nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto a be a sɩn bala na be a yelmãɛ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ pɔ.

eng: From the elder. To my dear friend Gaius, whom I truly love.
local: Maa na ɩ a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ lɛ sɛb a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a fʊ̃ʊ Gayus na ɩ a n baraa, ɩn nʊ̃ a yelmãɛ jũu.

eng: I was overjoyed to find some of your children living in the truth, just as we had been commanded by the Father.
local: Nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma naa ɩn nyɛ a fʊ bibiir bamɩne na chiine a yelmãɛ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Sãa na bin a nɛɛ kʊ sɩ.

eng: Now, dear friends, I am requesting that we love each other. Its not as though Im writing a new command to you, but its one we have had from the beginning.
local: Pʊ̃pãanyã n yɛpɔɔ, a ba ɩ nɛbin paalaa lɛ n sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bʊ̃koraa 'lɔ lɛ na 'yɛr ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ taa.

eng: This is love: that we live according to his commands. This is the command that you heard from the beginning: live in love.
local: A nʊ̃fʊ nɩ nyã ɩka sɩ turo a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bin a wʊ nɛɛ kʊ sɩ. Wʊ 'yɛr ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ taa nɩtãa lɛ sɩn wõ yi a pielfʊ, sɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ nɛ.

eng: Many deceivers have gone into the world who do not confess that Jesus Christ came as a human being. This kind of person is the deceiver and the antichrist.
local: Bɛ̃bɛlbɛ sɛɛn a wɛr, bala lɛ ba sɔɔ ɩka Yesu wan a wɛr pɔ nɩtãa nɩsaal ɛ. A nɩbɛ banyãna lɛ ɩ a bɛ̃bɛlbɛ tɩ 'laar a Kɩrɩsɩto.

eng: Watch yourselves so that you dont lose what weve worked for but instead receive a full reward.
local: Yɩ guro yɩ mãɛ ka a yɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ta lo ɛ, tɩchɛ ka yɩ nyɛ a yɩ sãyar.

eng: Anyone who goes too far and does not continue in the teaching about Christ does not have God. Whoever continues in this teaching has both the Father and the Son.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba wa turo a lɛ a Yesu na wiil ɛ, waa tara nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, tɩ fʊ̃ʊ nyã na turo a lɛ wʊn wiil, tara naa Sãa nɩ a Bie.

eng: Whoever comes to you who does not affirm this teaching should neither be received nor welcomed into your home.
local: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ wa wa naa a yɩ sɛ̃, tɩ ba tara a wiilfʊ nyã ɛ, yɩ ta sɔɔ ka wʊ kpɛ a yɩ yir bɩɩ puor wʊ ɛ.

eng: because welcoming people like that is the same thing as sharing in their evil actions.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na puor a nɩnyɩnɛ nyãna mɩ pʊɔ naa a wʊ tʊ̃dɛɛr pɔ.

eng: Dear friend, Im praying that all is well with you and that you enjoy good health in the same way that you prosper spiritually.
local: N baraa, n sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn ɩka a fʊ ãgãn wʊ kpɛ̃mɛ ka a yele a jaa ɩ vɩla kʊ fʊ, nɩtãa lɛ a fʊ sɩɛ na kpɛ̃mɛ.

eng: I have a lot to tell you. I dont want to use paper and ink, but I hope to visit you and talk with you face-to-face, so that our joy can be complete.
local: N chɛnɛ na tara yelyɔɔ ɩn taa sɛb kʊ fʊ, tɩchɛ ɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka n wa a yɩ sɛ̃ jũu, maa wa wa sɩn 'mataa jãnɛ 'yɛrɛ ka nʊ̃ɔ nyɔɔ sɩ.

eng: I was overjoyed when the brothers and sisters arrived and spoke highly of your faithfulness to the truth, shown by how you live according to the truth.
local: Nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma naa lɛ a yɛɛr bamɩne na wa 'yɛr a lɛ fʊn turo a yelmãɛ na fʊ chiine a yelmãɛ pɔ.

eng: I have no greater joy than this: to hear that my children are living according to the truth.
local: Bon jaa maa ɩ ma nʊ̃ɔ jã ɩn maa wõ ɩka a n bibiir chiine naa a yelmãɛ pɔ.

eng: Your chosen sisters children greet you.
local: A yɛpɔɔ nyã mɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na ir bibiir mɩ puor fʊ naa.

eng: Dear friend, you act faithfully in whatever you do for our brothers and sisters, even though they are strangers.
local: N baraa, fʊ tara na yelmãɛ a lɛ fʊn maala kʊrɔ a yɛɛr, ba gba na ɩ sãanba a fʊ sɛ̃.

eng: They spoke highly of your love in front of the church. You all would do well to provide for their journey in a way that honors God.
local: Ban wa, ba wa 'yɛr naa a fʊ nʊ̃fʊ kʊ a pupuorbiir a ka. Mɔ̃ na fʊ ma bar ba a sɔr a lɛ nɛ, lɛ lɛ pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ.

eng: because they left on their journey for the sake of Jesus Christ without accepting any support from the Gentiles.
local: Yesu yuor jũu lɛ ba chiine, na ba maa sɔɔ de bon jaa a bala na ba ɩ a Yesu turbo sɛ̃ ɛ.

eng: Therefore, we ought to help people like this so that we can be coworkers with the truth.
local: Sɩn lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka sɩ sʊ̃ʊ ba na sɩ pʊɔ ba 'mataa tʊ̃ kʊ a yelmãɛ.

eng: I wrote something to the church, but Diotrephes, who likes to put himself first, doesnt welcome us.
local: N sɛb sɛbile kʊ a pupuorbiir na be a fʊ sɛ̃, tɩchɛ a Diotɩrefes na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ ɩ a nɩdiere, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ ba tara nɛbʊ̃'yen ɛ.

eng: Because of this, if I come, I will bring up what he has done—making unjustified and wicked accusations against us. And as if that were not enough, he not only refuses to welcome the brothers and sisters but stops those who want to do so and even throws them out of the church!.
local: Ala lɛ so, maa wa tɩ ɩn 'yɛr yɩ naa a lɛ wʊn yʊɔrɔ hũhũnõ ŋmara a jirsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sɩ. A lɛ tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ, tɩ wʊ maa sɔɔ de a sɩ yɛɛr ɛ. Wʊ ma ŋmaan a bala na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba de ba sɔr tɩ ma dii ba bar a puorfʊ jie.

eng: Dear friend, dont imitate what is bad but what is good. Whoever practices what is good belongs to God. Whoever practices what is bad has not seen God.
local: N baraa, ta tɔɔr yeldɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ tɔɔrɔ yelvɩla, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na maala vɩla bɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn. Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na maala dɛɛr ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

eng: Everyone speaks highly of Demetrius, even the truth itself. We also speak highly of him, and you know that what we say is true.
local: Demetirus, nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr a wʊ vɩla maalfʊ 'yɛr, a yelmãɛ mɩ din a wʊ dãasɩɛ. Sɩn mɩ din a wʊ vɩla dãasɩɛ, ka yɩn mɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a sɩ dãasɩɛ ɩn sɩrɛ.

eng: I have a lot to say to you, but I dont want to use pen and ink.
local: N chɛnɛ na tara yelyɔɔ ɩn taa sɛb kʊ fʊ, tɩchɛ n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n sɛb ɛ.

eng: I hope to see you soon, and we will speak face-to-face.
local: A kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n nyɛ fʊ a sɩ jãnɛ 'yɛr.

eng: Peace be with you. Your friends here greet you. Greet our friends there by name.
local: Nyã'maar wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃. A sɩ barmɩne na be ka puor fʊ naa, mɩ puor a sɩ barmɩne na be a be bʊ̃'yen 'yen.

eng: Jude, a slave of Jesus Christ and brother of James. To those who are called, loved by God the Father and kept safe by Jesus Christ.
local: Maa Judɩ na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto gbãgbaa, naa mɩ ɩ a Jemesɩ yɛbɛ, lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a yɩn bala a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl a yɩ be a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ pɔ ka wʊ gu yɩ taa lɛɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

eng: May you have more and more mercy, peace, and love.
local: Nɩbaal nɩ nyã'maar nɩ nʊ̃fʊ a dɔɔlɔ yɩ taa.

eng: Dear friends, I wanted very much to write to you concerning the salvation we share. Instead, I must write to urge you to fight for the faith delivered once and for all to Gods holy people.
local: N barmɩne, n dɔ̃ɔ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir ɩka n sɛb a faafʊ nyã sɩ jaa na põ, naa nyɛ ɩka a sɛɛ naa ka n sɛb kpãkpãan yɩ a yɩ mʊɔrɔ nɩ a sɔɔfʊ 'yɛr 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na de kʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ.

eng: Godless people have slipped in among you. They turn the grace of our God into unrestrained immorality and deny our only master and Lord, Jesus Christ. Judgment was passed against them a long time ago.
local: Nɩbɛ bamɩne sɔ̃ɔfʊ yele na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb bin kõr jaa sɔɔl naa na ba fʊɔl kpɛ a yɩ pɔ. Baa puoro ɛ, ba nyɔɔn a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ yele lɩɛb na ba nyɛ sɔr sɛ̃nɛ tɩ na ba tɔr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɛɛ na ɩ a sɩ Tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ a sɩ Soro.

eng: I want to remind you of something you already know very well. The Lord, who once saved a people out of Egypt, later destroyed those who didnt maintain their faith.
local: Yɩ gba den nie bɔ̃ɔn a anyãna, tɩ n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n lɛ jɛɔ yɩ ɩka, a sɩ Soro faan a wʊ nɩbɛ yin a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ, tɩchɛ wʊ lɛ wa nyʊɔl a bala jaa na ba sɔɔ ɛ.

eng: I remind you too of the angels who didnt keep their position of authority but deserted their own home. The Lord has kept them in eternal chains in the underworld until the judgment of the great day.
local: A malakasɩ bala na ba ara a ba tʊ̃ɔfʊ araa jie ɛ, tɩchɛ na ba tɔr a ba mãɛ yir bar, bala lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn lũn a bɔ̃jɔr kpãɛn 'yɔ̃ɔ be a libe pɔ chɛlɛ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ bɩbir kpɛ̃ɛ daar.

eng: In the same way, Sodom and Gomorrah and neighboring towns practiced immoral sexual relations and pursued other sexual urges. By undergoing the punishment of eternal fire, they serve as a warning.
local: A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, a Sodom nɩ a Gomora, nɩ a tẽchɛɛlsɩ ala na jilʊ̃ de a ba mãɛ kʊ a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele, ka dɔɔr gãna nɩ taa, ka a bũu na ba kpĩine ɛ, di ba, naa ɩ yelmanaa gã.

eng: Yet, even knowing this, these dreamers in the same way pollute themselves, reject authority, and slander the angels.
local: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, a jãna dẽme banyãna sɔ̃ɔn a ba ãgãma, baa turo a sɩ Soro binfʊ ɛ. Ba ma kpɛrɛ naa a saaju bʊ̃maalsɩ.

eng: The archangel Michael, when he argued with the devil about Moses body, did not dare charge him with slander. Instead, he said, The Lord rebuke you.
local: Tɩchɛ a Maɩkɩl gba na ɩ a malakasɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ a 'lɔ naa Tɩɩ na dɔ̃ɔ chɩrɛ taa nɩ Mosesɩ ãgãn yele, waa 'la tu a Tɩɩ bɩɩ kpɛ wʊ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr, A sɩ Soro lɛ na kpãa fʊ.

eng: But these people slander whatever they dont understand. They are destroyed by what they know instinctively, as though they were irrational animals.
local: Tɩchɛ a nɩbɛ banyãna ma kpɛrɛ naa a bonsɩ ala ban ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ, ka a yelsɩ ala ban ba bɔ̃ɔ yi a ba dɔɔfʊ daar, kaara fɩka dʊ̃n na ba tara tɩɛr ɛ, a yelsɩ anyãna lɛ na sɔ̃ɔ ba.

eng: They are damned, for they follow in the footsteps of Cain. For profit they give themselves over to Balaams error. They are destroyed in the uprising of Korah.
local: Nɛbier nyɔɔ ba naa, bojũu ba den a Kain sɔr. Tɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu a ba far kpɛ a Balaam bɔrfʊ pɔ. A nɛchɩrɛ jũu, ba mɩ nyʊɔl naa a Kora kaar.

eng: These people are like jagged rocks just below the surface of the water waiting to snag you when they join your love feasts. They feast with you without reverence. They care only for themselves. They are waterless clouds carried along by the winds; fruitless autumn trees, twice dead, uprooted.
local: A nɩbɛ banyãna kaara fɩka bʊ̃sɔ̃ɔnsɩ na jɛr yɩ a yɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen lɔ̃ɔ di daar. Ba maa bɛɛ nɩrɛ ɛ, ba mãɛ lɛ ba kaara. Ba ɩn julõjuur na ba tara kʊ̃ɔ ɛ, ka a sɛsɛbɛ furo yʊɔrɔ nɩ. Ba kaara fɩka kpãchãan tɩɩr na ba tara wɔ̃mɔ̃ ɛ, ka ba vɔ̃ dɩɛl bar ka a kpi.

eng: wild waves of the sea foaming up their own shame; wandering stars for whom the darkness of the underworld is reserved forever.
local: Ba kaara na fɩka a man kpɛ̃ɛ a sɛsɛkpɛ̃ɛ na furo ka a ba vã furo a kʊ̃ɔ fuul kaar, na ba kaara fɩka ŋmarbie bɔrɔ yʊɔrɔ ka a Nãaŋmɩn chɔɔr jilibe jaa gbɛb guro nɩ ba.

eng: Enoch, who lived seven generations after Adam, prophesied about these people when he said, See, the Lord comes with his countless holy ones.
local: Enok na ɩ a Adama yɔ̃ɔ suulaa ayopõi sʊɔ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a nɩbɛ banyãna 'yɛr, Nyɛ, a sɩ Soro waara naa nɩ a wʊ nɩchɛchɛsɩ turo turo.

eng: to execute judgment on everyone and to convict everyone about every ungodly deed they have committed in their ungodliness as well as all the harsh things that sinful ungodly people have said against him.
local: Wʊn wa tɔɔr nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr, na wʊ 'yɛr a lɛ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, a lɛ jaa ban tʊ̃ nɩ a lɛ ban maal tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a 'yɛr bikpãɛn ala ban 'yɛr dɔɔl wʊ.

eng: These are faultfinding grumblers, living according to their own desires. They speak arrogant words and they show partiality to people when they want a favor in return.
local: A nɩbɛ banyãna lɛ ma ɩrɛ gbʊrɔ̃ gbʊrɔ̃, na ba nyɛrɛ a ba taaba bɔrfʊ. Ba ma turo naa a ba mãɛ vɔldɛɛr, a ba mãɛ yobɔ 'yɛr lɛ ba ma 'yɛrɛ bɛlɛ nɩ a ba taaba tɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu.

eng: But you, dear friends, remember the words spoken beforehand by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tɩchɛ n barmɩne, yɩ tɩɛr a lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nsɩ na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr.

eng: They said to you, In the end time scoffers will come living according to their own ungodly desires.
local: Ba 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka, A ber baaraa sɔ̃ɔ, nɩlaarba na turo a ba ãgãn vɔlaa na wa naa.

eng: These people create divisions. Since they dont have the Spirit, they are worldly.
local: A nɩbɛ banyãna lɛ ma waan ootaa, na ba turo a ãgãn bɔfʊ na baa tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ.

eng: But you, dear friends: build each other up on the foundation of your most holy faith, pray in the Holy Spirit.
local: Tɩchɛ a yɩn n barmɩne, yɩ mɛ a yɩ mãɛ dɔɔl a yɩ sɔɔfʊ chɛchɛ ju, na yɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ.

eng: keep each other in the love of God, wait for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ, who will give you eternal life.
local: Yɩ sɔɔl yɩ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ pɔ na yɩ chɛlɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩbaal, a wʊ waan a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, wa kʊ yɩ.

eng: Have mercy on those who doubt.
local: Yɩ tara a bala na baala nɩ nɩbaal.

eng: Save some by snatching them from the fire. Fearing God, have mercy on some, hating even the clothing contaminated by their sinful urges.
local: Yɩ vʊ̃ɔ a bamɩne yin a bũu pɔ na yɩ faa ba. Na yɩ mɩ kaa a bamɩne nɩbaal tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ jʊ̃mɔ̃, na yɩ taa maal a ba dɛɛr ala ban maala ɛ.

eng: To the one who is able to protect you from falling, and to present you blameless and rejoicing before his glorious presence.
local: A 'lɔ na gu yɩ ka yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ lo ɛ, na wʊn wa waan yɩ a wʊ tɩɩr niem a yɩ kʊ̃ tara chɛfʊ ɛ, ka a nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ̃ɛ kpɛ yɩ.

eng: to the only God our savior, through Jesus Christ our Lord, belong glory, majesty, power, and authority, before all time, now and forever. Amen.
local: A Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen nyã tɛɛ lɛ ɩ a sɩ Fafaara, wʊ nyɛ tɩɩr, nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ kpɛ̃ɔ, nɩ tʊ̃ɔfʊ tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ sɛrɛ tɩ wʊ wa maal a wɛr nɩ pʊ̃pãanyã bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa! A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: A revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave him to show his servants what must soon take place. Christ made it known by sending it through his angel to his servant John.
local: A yelwiilsɩ ala a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ɩka wʊ wiil kʊ a wʊ gbãgbaa ala kʊ̃ yaar tɩ ɩ ɛ. Yesu tʊ̃ naa a wʊ malaka ɩka wʊ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ gbãgbaa Jɔɔn.

eng: who bore witness to the word of God and to the witness of Jesus Christ, including all that John saw.
local: Jɔɔn mɩ man naa a ala a jaa wʊn nyɛ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɩ lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na 'yɛr.

eng: Favored is the one who reads the words of this prophecy out loud, and favored are those who listen to it being read, and keep what is written in it, for the time is near.
local: Pʊpɛl sʊɔ lɛ a 'lɔ na kar a gãn nyã. Pʊpɛl dẽme mɩ lɛ a bala na wõ tɩ de 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba nyãn pɔ, lɛ an sɛb a gãn nyã pɔ, bojũu a bɩbir gbʊr naa.

eng: John, to the seven churches that are in Asia: Grace and peace to you from the one who is and was and is coming, and from the seven spirits that are before Gods throne.
local: Maa Jɔɔn lɛ sɛb a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a yɩn pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ayopõi na be Asɩya paal pɔ. Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ, 'lɔ lɛ be be, nɩ 'lɔ lɛ na wa, naa yi a Sɩɩr ayopõi na ara a Nãaŋmɩn dakɔɔ niem.

eng: and from Jesus Christ—the faithful witness, the firstborn from among the dead, and the ruler of the kings of the earth. To the one who loves us and freed us from our sins by his blood.
local: naa yi a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a yelmãɛ dãasɩɛ sʊɔ, na wʊ ɩ a bidɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ na ir a kũu pɔ ɩ vʊr, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a nãmɩne ba jaa nãkpɛ̃ɛ na be ka a wɛr pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ nʊ̃ sɩ na wʊ de a wʊ jãɩ pɛɛ sɩ yin a sɩ yeldɛɛr pɔ na wʊ faa sɩ.

eng: who made us a kingdom, priests to his God and Father—to him be glory and power forever and always. Amen.
local: na wʊ maal sɩ a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ nɩbɛ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔr lorbo ka sɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a wʊ Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a Sãa, 'lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ a bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa! A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: Look, he is coming with the clouds! Every eye will see him, including those who pierced him, and all the tribes of the earth will mourn because of him. This is so. Amen.
local: Yɩ nyɛ, wʊn yi naa a sajulõjuur pɔ waara, ka a nɩbɛ ba jaa nyɛ wʊ lɔ̃ɔn a bala na chɔr wʊ, a nɩbʊrsɩ na be ka a tẽe na kõnõ naa a wʊ waa jũu. Lɛ lɛ an ɩ! A ɩ a lɛ.

eng: I am the Alpha and the Omega, says the Lord God, the one who is and was and is coming, the Almighty.
local: A sɩ Soro Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ jaa sʊɔ 'yɛr naa, Maa lɛ a Pielfʊ nɩ a Baaraa. Maa lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be be. Maa lɛ chɛnɛ be be. Maa lɛ na wa.

eng: I, John, your brother who shares with you in the hardship, kingdom, and endurance that we have in Jesus, was on the island called Patmos because of the word of God and my witness about Jesus.
local: Maa Jɔɔn na ɩ a yɩ yɛbɛ, n pʊɔ yɩ naa a dɔɔyɛ pɔ a Yesu tufʊ jũu. Maa nɩ yɩn jaa ben a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ tɩ chɛnɛ tara kãnyir. N ben a man dõdol pɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Patimosɩ bojũu n 'yɛr naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr naa di a Yesu dãasɩɛ.

eng: I was in a Spirit-inspired trance on the Lords day, and I heard behind me a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
local: A sɩ Soro Bɩbir Daar, Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ir ma naa ka n wõ nɛkpɛ̃ɛ na tãn a n puor fɩka ɩɩl ban pɛɛl.

eng: It said, Write down on a scroll whatever you see, and send it to the seven churches: to Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.
local: ka a kɔkɔr 'yɛr, Sɛb a ala a jaa fʊn nyɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a gãn pɔ, na fʊ tɩr kʊ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ayopõi. Efesus, Semena, Pergamum, Tayatira, Saadisɩ, Feladelfiya nɩ Laodisea.

eng: I turned to see who was speaking to me, and when I turned, I saw seven oil lamps burning on top of seven gold stands.
local: N lɩɛb ɩka n kaa an lɛ 'yɛrɛ a lɛ kʊrɔ ma. Ɩn wa lɩɛb, n nyɛn sɛlma fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie jiir ayopõi.

eng: In the middle of the lampstands I saw someone who looked like the Human One. He wore a robe that stretched down to his feet, and he had a gold sash around his chest.
local: A fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jiir anyãna sãlsɔɔ, n nyɛn nɩrɛ na kaara fɩka Nɩsaal Bie na wʊ su fuu wõo ka wʊ ta a gbɛɛ pɔ, tɩ a sɛlma gãn bãbã a wʊ nyãa ju.

eng: His head and hair were white as white wool—like snow—and his eyes were like a fiery flame.
local: A wʊ jukɔɔl pɛl fɩka gõn, ka a nɩbie kaara fɩka bũu na 'lɩrɛ.

eng: His feet were like fine brass that has been purified in a furnace, and his voice sounded like rushing water.
local: Ka a gbɛɛ nyɩlɛ fɩka kur jɩɛ ban juu ir sãa pɔ, ka a kɔkɔr wʊn 'yɛrɛ nyɛtãan kɔ̃kpɛ̃ɛ na joro.

eng: He held seven stars in his right hand, and from his mouth came a sharp, two-edged sword. His appearance was like the sun shining with all its power.
local: Ŋmɛrbie ayopõi be naa a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ, ka a sɔbʊraa na dire a jiir a jaa ayi, yi a wʊ nɛɛ pɔ. Ka a wʊ nie nyɩlɛ fɩka mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na ara gar ju sãlsɔɔ.

eng: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead man. But he put his right hand on me and said, Dont be afraid. Im the first and the last.
local: Ɩ̃n wa nyɛ a lɛ, ka n lo kpa a wʊ niem gã fɩka kũu. Ka wʊ pãa dɔɔl ma a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ ma, Ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ. Maa lɛ a Pielfʊ nɩ a Baaraa.

eng: and the living one. I was dead, but look! Now Im alive forever and always. I have the keys of Death and the Grave.
local: Maa lɛ ɩ a Nyɛvʊr Sʊɔ. Nyɛ, n dɔ̃ɔ kpi, tɩchɛ n ir naa ɩ vʊr, n kʊ̃ lɛ kpi go ɛ. Maa lɛ tara a kũu nɩ a kpĩisɩ tẽe pãn bir.

eng: So write down what you have seen, both the scene now before you and the things that are about to unfold after this.
local: A lɛ juu sɛb a ala fʊn nyɛ na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ nɩ a pʊ̃pãanyã, nɩ a ala na wa ɩ daar kɔ̃ɔ.

eng: As for the mystery of the seven stars that you saw in my right hand and the seven gold lampstands, here is what they mean: the seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the seven lampstands are the seven churches.
local: A yelsɔɔlaa 'lɔ na be a ŋmɛrbie ayopõi ala fʊn nyɛ a n nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ nɩ a sɛlma fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie jiir ayopõi par nɩ nyã. A ŋmɛrbie ayopõi ala ɩ naa a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ayopõi malakasɩ, fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie jiir ayopõi mɩ ɩ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ayopõi.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Ephesus: These are the words of the one who holds the seven stars in his right hand and walks among the seven gold lampstands.
local: Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Efesus pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ na tara a ŋmɛrbie ayopõi a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ na wʊ chiine a sɛlma fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie jiir ayopõi sãlsɔɔ 'yɛr lɛ a anyãna.

eng: I know your works, your labor, and your endurance. I also know that you dont put up with those who are evil. You have tested those who say they are apostles but are not, and you have found them to be liars.
local: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a lɛ fʊn be, naa bɔ̃ɔ a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ a fʊ kãnyir. N bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ fʊn ba 'maa nɩbir kʊ a putudẽme ɛ, ala lɛ so ka fʊ bɛɛr a bala na 'yɛr ɩka Yesu nɩtʊ̃nsɩ lɛ ba ɩ na fʊ nyɛ ka ba ɩ jir ŋmarba.

eng: You have shown endurance and put up with a lot for my names sake, and you havent gotten tired.
local: Fʊ tara na kãnyir na fʊ di dɔɔyɛ a n yuor jũu, tɩ faa bal ɛ.

eng: But I have this against you: you have let go of the love you had at first.
local: Tɩchɛ n chɛnɛ na tara fʊ nɩ 'yɛr. Fʊ bar naa a fʊ dɔ̃ɔ nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ.

eng: So remember the high point from which you have fallen. Change your hearts and lives and do the things you did at first. If you dont, Im coming to you. I will move your lampstand from its place if you dont change your hearts and lives.
local: Tɩɛr kaa a lɛ fʊn dɔ̃ɔ be tɩ wa lo! Lɩɛb a fʊ tɩɛr na fʊ be a lɛ fʊn dɔ̃ɔ be. Ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ ba wa lɩɛb a fʊ tɩɛr ɛ, ɩn wa naa wa 'lɔɔ a fʊ fãtɩn dɔɔlfʊ jie bar.

eng: But you have this in your favor: you hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, which I also hate.
local: Tɩchɛ a lɛ fʊn ba nʊ̃ nɩ nyã, fʊ 'laar naa a Nikolayitɩ nɩbɛ maalfʊ, n mɩ 'laar naa a ba maalfʊ.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. I will allow those who emerge victorious to eat from the tree of life, which is in Gods paradise.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor wʊ chɛlɛ a ala a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ. A 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, ɩn kʊ wʊn sɔr ka wʊ kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn jɔɔ pɔ pɔr a nyɛvʊr tɩɛ wɔ̃mɔ̃ na wʊ di.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Smyrna: These are the words of the one who is the first and the last, who died and came back to life.
local: Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Semena pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ na ɩ a Pielfʊ nɩ a Baaraa, a 'lɔ na kpi tɩ ir ɩ vʊr 'yɛr lɛ a anyãna.

eng: I know your hardship and poverty . I also know the hurtful things that have been spoken about you by those who say they are Jews .
local: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ wõm nɩ a fʊ nɔ̃ɔ tɩchɛ fʊ ɩn taraa sʊɔ! N bɔ̃ɔ naa a gagarsɩ bala na 'yɛr ɩka Juu nɩbɛ lɛ ba ɩ tɩ na baa ɩ ɛ, ba ɩ naa Satan lɔ̃ɔfʊ dẽme.

eng: Dont be afraid of what you are going to suffer. Look! The devil is going to throw some of you into prison in order to test you. You will suffer hardship for ten days. Be faithful even to the point of death, and I will give you the crown of life.
local: Taa joro dãbãɛ a dɔɔyɛ na wa a fʊ sɛ̃ ɛ. Nyɛ, a tɩɩ na vɛ̃ naa ka ba nyɔɔr a yɩ bamɩne 'yɔ̃ɔ pɔɔfʊ die pɔ, bɛɛr yɩ kaa, ka yɩ di dɔɔyɛ ber pie. Ala ɩ yɩn kpin gba, yɩ taa bara a yɩ sɔɔfʊ ɛ, ka ɩn kʊ yɩ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na kaara a nãa jupil kaar.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. Those who emerge victorious wont be hurt by the second death.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor wʊ chɛlɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, a gbɛɛ ayi kũu kʊ̃ lɛ sɩɩr wʊ go ɛ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Pergamum: These are the words of the one who has the sharp, two-edged sword.
local: Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Pergamum pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ a sɔbʊraa na dire a jiir a jaa ayi 'yɛr lɛ anyãna.

eng: I know that you are living right where Satans throne is. You are holding on to my name, and you didnt break faith with me even at the time that Antipas, my faithful witness, was killed among you, where Satan lives.
local: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a jie fʊn kpɩɛrɛ, be lɛ ɩ a Satan dʊʊ, tɩ faa vɛ̃ a n yuor bʊɔlfʊ ɛ. Fʊ chɛnɛ na sɔɔ a n yuor. Fʊ gba na wa nyɛ a Antipasɩ na dire a n dãasɩɛ ka ba kʊ wʊ a yɩ tẽe pɔ be a Satan dʊʊ na be.

eng: But I have a few things against you, because you have some there who follow Balaams teaching. Balaam had taught Balak to trip up the Israelites so that they would eat food sacrificed to idols and commit sexual immorality.
local: Tɩchɛ n chɛnɛ na tara fʊ nɩ 'yɛr. Fʊ chɛnɛ na tara nɩbɛ ka ba turo a Balaam wiilfʊ, 'lɔ lɛ wiil a Balak ɩka wʊ bɛr a Isɩral nɩbɛ nɛɛ ka ba maal dɛɛr na wʊ ɩka ba di a bʊtɩbɛ bʊ̃diir na ba gãna nɩ taa.

eng: In the same way, you have some who follow the Nicolaitans teaching.
local: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ fʊ mɩ chɛnɛ tara a nɩbɛ na turo a Nikolayitɩ nɩbɛ wiilfʊ.

eng: So change your hearts and lives. If you dont, I am coming to you soon, and I will make war on them with the sword that comes from my mouth.
local: Lɩɛb a fʊ tɩɛr, ka lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, ɩn wan fɔɔ wa jɛb a nɩbɛ bala nɩ a sɔbʊraa 'lɔ na yi a n nɛɛ pɔ.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. I will give those who emerge victorious some of the hidden manna to eat. I will also give to each of them a white stone with a new name written on it, which no one knows except the one who receives it.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ. A 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, ɩn kʊ wʊn a maana ala na sɔɔl. Naa lɛ kʊ wʊ kusɩr pɩla ban sɛb yopaalaa dɔɔl nɩrɛ jaa na ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, a 'lɔ na so lɛ bɔ̃ɔ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Thyatira: These are the words of Gods Son, whose eyes are like a fiery flame, and whose feet are like fine brass.
local: Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Tayatira pupuorbiir ɩka, a Nãaŋmɩn Bie 'yɛr lɛ a anyãna. A 'lɔ nɩbie na kaara a bũu 'lɩraa kaar ka a wʊ gbɛɛ nyɛtãan fɩka kur jɩɛ na be bũu pɔ.

eng: I know your works, your love and faithfulness, your service and endurance. I also know that the works you have done most recently are even greater than those you did at first.
local: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃, a fʊ nʊ̃fʊ, a fʊ sɔɔfʊ nɩ a fʊ kãnyir. A lɛ fʊn tʊ̃nɔ̃ a pʊ̃pãanyã gar a lɛ fʊn dɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃.

eng: But I have this against you: you put up with that woman, Jezebel, who calls herself a prophet. You allow her to teach and to mislead my servants into committing sexual immorality and eating food sacrificed to idols.
local: Tɩchɛ n chɛnɛ na tara fʊ nɩ 'yɛr. Fʊ bal kʊ a pɔɔ 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ a Jejebɛl 'lɔ na bʊɔlɔ a wʊ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ. Wʊ wile naa a n tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ ka ba sɛ̃nɛ na ba ɔɔrɔ nɩ a bʊtɩbɛ nʊ̃nɔ̃.

eng: I gave her time to change her heart and life, but she refuses to change her life of prostitution.
local: N kʊ wʊn sɔ̃ɔ ɩka wʊ lɩɛb a wʊ tɩɛr yin a wʊ sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ, tɩchɛ waa sɔɔrɔ ɛ.

eng: Look! Im throwing her onto a sickbed. I am casting those who have committed adultery with her into terrible hardship—if they dont change their hearts from following her practices.
local: Lɛ ɩn vɛ̃n ka baal nyɔɔ wʊ ka bala naa 'lɔ na sɛ̃nɛ, ka bala baa lɩɛb bar a wʊ sɔr ɛ.

eng: and I will even put her children to death with disease. Then all the churches will know that Im the one who examines minds and hearts, and that I will give to each of you what your actions deserve.
local: Ɩn kʊ naa a bala na turo wʊ, ka a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka maa lɛ bɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ tɩɛr nɩ nɩrɛ nyãa naa na yab ãsʊɔ jaa nɩ wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

eng: As for the rest of you in Thyatira—those of you who dont follow this teaching and havent learned the so-called deep secrets of Satan—I wont burden you with anything else.
local: Tɩchɛ a yɩn na chɛ a be a Tayatira na ba de a pɔɔ wiilfʊ bɩɩ jãn a Satan yelsɔɔlsɩ ɛ, n chɛnɛ na tara 'yɛr na 'yɛr kʊ yɩ. N kʊ̃ de yele jaa dɔɔl yɩ ɛ.

eng: Just hold on to what you have until I come.
local: Yɩ chɛnɛ nyɔɔ a lɛ nɛ wa tãn a daar 'lɔ ɩn na wa.

eng: To those who emerge victorious, keeping my practices until the end, I will give authority over the nations.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ na wʊ ɩrɛ a lɛ ɩn bʊɔrɔ, ɩn kʊ wʊn kpɛ̃ɔ ka wʊ tʊ̃ɔ a paalsɩ ba jaa.

eng: to rule the nations with an iron rod and smash them like pottery.
local: Wʊn kaara ba naa nɩ kur dãgbal na wʊ ma ŋmɛr ba lamɩɛr kaar. Nɩtãa lɛ ɩn nyɛ a kpɛ̃ɔ yin a n Sãa sɛ̃.

eng: just as I received authority from my Father. I will also give them the morning star.
local: N mɩ na kʊ wʊ naa a bivɩɛ ŋmɛrbir.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor wʊ chɛlɛ a ala Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Sardis: These are the words of the one who holds Gods seven spirits and the seven stars: I know your works. You have the reputation of being alive, and you are in fact dead.
local: Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Saadisɩ pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɩr ayopõi nɩ a ŋmɛrbie ayopõi, n bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃. A fʊ yuor yire na ɩka fʊ ɩn bʊ̃vʊr tɩchɛ bʊ̃kũu lɛ fʊ ɩ.

eng: Wake up and strengthen whatever you have left, teetering on the brink of death, for Ive found that your works are far from complete in the eyes of my God.
local: Jɛɔ ir! Na fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a bala na chɛ na kpire ãkpãɛn, bojũu n jʊʊr nyɛ ka a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba sɛɛ a n Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ.

eng: So remember what you received and heard. Hold on to it and change your hearts and lives. If you dont wake up, I will come like a thief, and you wont know what time I will come upon you.
local: Tɩɛr tɔ a ala fʊn de tɩ wõ, turo a ala tɩ na fʊ lɩɛb a tɩɛr. Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ ba jɛɔ ir ɛ, ɩn wan nãnyie kaar ka fʊ kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn na wa a fʊ sɛ̃ ɛ.

eng: But you do have a few people in Sardis who havent stained their clothing. They will walk with me clothed in white because they are worthy.
local: Tɩchɛ fʊ chɛnɛ na tara nɩbɛ bãlãa a ba be a Saadisɩ ka a ba fɔɔr ba nyɔɔr dɛbɛ ɛ. Bala nɩ maa na 'mantaa chiine, ka ba su bʊ̃pɩɛl, bojũu ba sɛɛn naa.

eng: Those who emerge victorious will wear white clothing like this. I wont scratch out their names from the scroll of life, but will declare their names in the presence of my Father and his angels.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ a ba kaar mɩ na sun a bʊ̃pɩɛl. N kʊ̃ kpĩin a wʊ yuor bar a nyɛvʊr gãn pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ɩn pʊr a wʊ yuor a n Sãa nɩ a wʊ malakasɩ niem.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ a ala a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: These are the words of the one who is holy and true, who has the key of David. Whatever he opens, no one will shut; and whatever he shuts, no one opens.
local: Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Feladelfiya pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ na ɩ a chɛchɛ sʊɔ nɩ a yelmãɛ sʊɔ 'yɛr lɛ a anyã, 'lɔ lɛ tara a Nãkpɛ̃ɛ David pãn bir. 'Lɔ wa yuo, nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ pɔɔ ɛ, 'lɔ mɩ wa pɔɔ, nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ yuo ɛ.

eng: I know your works. Look! I have set in front of you an open door that no one can shut. You have so little power, and yet you have kept my word and havent denied my name.
local: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ a jaa. Nyɛ, n yuo naa a pãn bar, nɩrɛ jaa na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ pɔɔ ɛ. N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ kpɛ̃ɔ na ba jã bon ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊ chɛnɛ na tara a n 'yɛr na faa chiir a n yuor ɛ.

eng: Because of this I will make the people from Satans synagogue —I will make them come and bow down at your feet and realize that I have loved you.
local: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a bala na ɩ a Satan lɔ̃ɔfʊ dẽme tɩ na ba 'yɛr ɩka Juu nɩbɛ lɛ ba ɩ, jir ŋmarba lɛ ba ɩ. Ɩn vɛ̃ naa ka ba wa gbur dumo a yɩ niem na ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka n nʊ̃ yɩ naa.

eng: Because you kept my command to endure, I will keep you safe through the time of testing that is about to come over the whole world, to test those who live on earth.
local: A lɛ fʊn tu a n 'yɛr na fʊ di kãnyir, ɩn gu fʊ naa a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a dɔɔyɛ na wa a nɩbɛ ba jaa jie na kpɩɛrɛ ka a wɛr pɔ.

eng: Im coming soon. Hold on to what you have so that no one takes your crown.
local: N kʊ̃ kor tɩ wa ɛ. Nyɔɔ a lɛ nɛ fʊn tara, ka nɩrɛ jaa taa faa a fʊ nãa jupil ɛ.

eng: As for those who emerge victorious, I will make them pillars in the temple of my God, and they will never leave it. I will write on them the name of my God and the name of the city of my God, the New Jerusalem that comes down out of heaven from my God. I will also write on them my own new name.
local: A 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, ɩn maal wʊn a luur a n Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir. Wʊ kʊ̃ lɛ vʊ̃ɔ go ɛ. Ɩn sɛb naa a n Nãaŋmɩn yuor nɩ a n Nãaŋmɩn tẽe yuor na ɩ a Jerusalɛm paalaa wʊn bar ka wʊ yire a saaju suro waara mar wʊ, naa mɩ lɛ sɛb a n yopaalaa mar wʊ.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Laodicea: These are the words of the Amen, the faithful and true witness, the ruler of Gods creation.
local: Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Laodisea pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ 'yɛrbie na ɩ A Ɩ A Lɛ, a yelmãɛ dẽ dẽ sʊɔ nɩ a yelmãɛ dãasɩɛ sʊɔ, 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tu mɛ bomo a jaa.

eng: I know your works. You are neither cold nor hot. I wish that you were either cold or hot.
local: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃, faa 'maa ɛ, faa lɛ tʊlɔ mɩ ɛ. An taa nʊ̃mɔ̃ ma naa ala ɩ fʊ ta 'maa naa bɩɩ tʊlɔ.

eng: So because you are lukewarm, and neither hot nor cold, Im about to spit you out of my mouth.
local: A lɛ fʊn ben ɩ a ʊlɔ ʊlɔ jũu, faa tʊlɔ ɛ, faa mɩ lɛ 'maa ɛ, ɩn chɩr fʊn bar a n nɛɛ pɔ.

eng: After all, you say, Im rich, and Ive grown wealthy, and I dont need a thing. You dont realize that you are miserable, pathetic, poor, blind, and naked.
local: Fʊ 'yɛr ɩka taraa sʊɔ lɛ fʊ ɩ, na fʊ tara nãbonsɩ na faa faa bon jaa ɛ. Tɩchɛ faa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊ ɩn nɩkɔ̃ɔ nɩ nɩbaal nɩrɛ, nɩ nɔ̃ɔ sʊɔ, na fʊ ɩ jɔ̃ɔ nɩ sal'mʊɔr.

eng: My advice is that you buy gold from me that has been purified by fire so that you may be rich, and white clothing to wear so that your nakedness wont be shamefully exposed, and ointment to put on your eyes so that you may see.
local: N sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa ɩka fʊ da sɛlma a n sɛ̃ ɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ bũu pɔ maal na fʊ ɩ tara sʊɔ. Na fʊ mɩ da fɔpɩla a n sɛ̃ pɔɔ a fʊ sal'mʊɔr vĩ, na fʊ lɛ da a nɩbie tãɩ mɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɩbie pɔ nyɛrɛ.

eng: I correct and discipline those whom I love. So be earnest and change your hearts and lives.
local: N ma gɔ̃ naa a bala ɩn nʊ̃, naa tɔɔ ba toor. A lɛ mɔ̃ nɩbijɩɛ lɩɛb a fʊ tɩɛr.

eng: Look! Im standing at the door and knocking. If any hear my voice and open the door, I will come in to be with them, and will have dinner with them, and they will have dinner with me.
local: Nyɛ, n ara naa dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ bʊɔlɔ, ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wa wõ naa a n kɔkɔr na wʊ yuo a pãn, ɩn kpɛ naa ka a maa naa nɩnyɩnɛ a sɩ tɩ 'mataa dire.

eng: As for those who emerge victorious, I will allow them to sit with me on my throne, just as I emerged victorious and sat down with my Father on his throne.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, ɩn kʊ wʊn sɔr ka wʊ jãnɛ a n lõboor nɩtãa lɛ ɩn jɛb tʊ̃ɔ naa jãnɛ a n Sãa lõboor.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.

eng: After this I looked and there was a door that had been opened in heaven. The first voice that I had heard, which sounded like a trumpet, said to me, Come up here, and I will show you what must take place after this.
local: A anyã puor, n lɛ kãan nyɛ a saaju pãn na yuo ara. Ka a kɔkɔr 'lɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ wõ a ɩɩl ban pɛɛl kaar 'yɛr kʊ ma, Do wa, ka n wiil fʊ a ala na ɩ a anyã puor.

eng: Then I saw a scroll in the right hand of the one seated on the throne. It had writing on the front and the back, and it was sealed with seven seals.
local: N pãa nyɛn a 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju ka wʊ tara a kõr gãn 'lɔ ban pilʊ̃ a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ, ka a sɛbie be a pʊɔ pɔ nɩ a yõo, na ba de jãnsɩ ayopõi mar pɔɔ.

eng: At once I was in a Spirit-inspired trance and I saw a throne in heaven, and someone was seated on the throne.
